authors_text: Elliot Weiss,J. Christian Gerdes
title: High Speed Emulation in a Vehicle-in-the-Loop Driving Simulator
title_zh: 车辆在环驾驶模拟器中的高速仿真
comment: Manuscript accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Vehicles. 11 pages, 10 figures, 2 tables
comments: Manuscript accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Vehicles. 11 pages, 10 figures, 2 tables
abstract: Rendering accurate multisensory feedback is critical to ensure natural user behavior in driving simulators. In this work, we present a virtual reality (VR)-based Vehicle-in-the-Loop (ViL) simulator that provides visual, vestibular, and haptic feedback to drivers in high speed driving conditions. Designing our simulator around a four-wheel steer-by-wire vehicle enables us to emulate the dynamics of a vehicle traveling significantly faster than the test vehicle and to transmit corresponding haptic steering feedback to the driver. By scaling the speed of the test vehicle through a combination of VR visuals, vehicle dynamics emulation, and steering wheel force feedback, we can safely and immersively run experiments up to highway speeds within a limited driving space. In double lane change and highway weaving experiments, our high speed emulation method tracks yaw motion within human perception limits and provides sensory feedback comparable to the same maneuvers driven manually.
summary: Rendering accurate multisensory feedback is critical to ensure natural user behavior in driving simulators. In this work, we present a virtual reality (VR)-based Vehicle-in-the-Loop (ViL) simulator that provides visual, vestibular, and haptic feedback to drivers in high speed driving conditions. Designing our simulator around a four-wheel steer-by-wire vehicle enables us to emulate the dynamics of a vehicle traveling significantly faster than the test vehicle and to transmit corresponding haptic steering feedback to the driver. By scaling the speed of the test vehicle through a combination of VR visuals, vehicle dynamics emulation, and steering wheel force feedback, we can safely and immersively run experiments up to highway speeds within a limited driving space. In double lane change and highway weaving experiments, our high speed emulation method tracks yaw motion within human perception limits and provides sensory feedback comparable to the same maneuvers driven manually.
abstract_zh: 呈现准确的多感官反馈对于确保驾驶模拟器中的自然用户行为至关重要。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于虚拟现实 (VR) 的车辆在环 (ViL) 模拟器，可在高速驾驶条件下为驾驶员提供视觉、前庭和触觉反馈。围绕四轮线控转向车辆设计模拟器，使我们能够模拟比测试车辆行驶速度快得多的车辆的动态，并将相应的触觉转向反馈传输给驾驶员。通过结合 VR 视觉效果、车辆动力学仿真和方向盘力反馈来缩放测试车辆的速度，我们可以在有限的驾驶空间内安全、身临其境地进行高达高速公路速度的实验。在双车道变换和高速公路编织实验中，我们的高速仿真方法在人类感知极限内跟踪偏航运动，并提供与手动驾驶相同操作相当的感官反馈。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于虚拟现实的车辆在环驾驶模拟器，通过多感官反馈实现高速驾驶条件下的车辆动力学仿真。
AI.motivation: 传统驾驶模拟器难以在有限物理空间内安全实现高速驾驶实验，且多感官反馈不足影响用户行为真实性。
AI.method: 设计四轮转向线控车辆系统，结合VR视觉、车辆动力学仿真与转向力反馈，通过速度缩放技术实现高速场景模拟。
AI.result: 双车道变更与高速公路蛇形实验显示，系统可在人类感知范围内精确跟踪偏航运动并提供与真实驾驶相当的感官反馈。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了高速驾驶模拟的物理空间限制问题，为安全开展高速驾驶研究提供了可行技术方案。

search_text: High Speed Emulation in a Vehicle-in-the-Loop Driving Simulator 车辆在环驾驶模拟器中的高速仿真 Rendering accurate multisensory feedback is critical to ensure natural user behavior in driving simulators. In this work, we present a virtual reality (VR)-based Vehicle-in-the-Loop (ViL) simulator that provides visual, vestibular, and haptic feedback to drivers in high speed driving conditions. Designing our simulator around a four-wheel steer-by-wire vehicle enables us to emulate the dynamics of a vehicle traveling significantly faster than the test vehicle and to transmit corresponding haptic steering feedback to the driver. By scaling the speed of the test vehicle through a combination of VR visuals, vehicle dynamics emulation, and steering wheel force feedback, we can safely and immersively run experiments up to highway speeds within a limited driving space. In double lane change and highway weaving experiments, our high speed emulation method tracks yaw motion within human perception limits and provides sensory feedback comparable to the same maneuvers driven manually. 呈现准确的多感官反馈对于确保驾驶模拟器中的自然用户行为至关重要。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于虚拟现实 (VR) 的车辆在环 (ViL) 模拟器，可在高速驾驶条件下为驾驶员提供视觉、前庭和触觉反馈。围绕四轮线控转向车辆设计模拟器，使我们能够模拟比测试车辆行驶速度快得多的车辆的动态，并将相应的触觉转向反馈传输给驾驶员。通过结合 VR 视觉效果、车辆动力学仿真和方向盘力反馈来缩放测试车辆的速度，我们可以在有限的驾驶空间内安全、身临其境地进行高达高速公路速度的实验。在双车道变换和高速公路编织实验中，我们的高速仿真方法在人类感知极限内跟踪偏航运动，并提供与手动驾驶相同操作相当的感官反馈。 本文提出一种基于虚拟现实的车辆在环驾驶模拟器，通过多感官反馈实现高速驾驶条件下的车辆动力学仿真。 Elliot Weiss,J. Christian Gerdes eess.SY,cs.RO

authors_text: Xuebin Qin,Hang Dai,Xiaobin Hu,Deng-Ping Fan,Ling Shao,Luc Van Gool
title: Highly Accurate Dichotomous Image Segmentation
title_zh: 高精度二分图像分割
abstract: We present a systematic study on a new task called dichotomous image segmentation (DIS) , which aims to segment highly accurate objects from natural images. To this end, we collected the first large-scale DIS dataset, called DIS5K, which contains 5,470 high-resolution (e.g., 2K, 4K or larger) images covering camouflaged, salient, or meticulous objects in various backgrounds. DIS is annotated with extremely fine-grained labels. Besides, we introduce a simple intermediate supervision baseline (IS-Net) using both feature-level and mask-level guidance for DIS model training. IS-Net outperforms various cutting-edge baselines on the proposed DIS5K, making it a general self-learned supervision network that can facilitate future research in DIS. Further, we design a new metric called human correction efforts (HCE) which approximates the number of mouse clicking operations required to correct the false positives and false negatives. HCE is utilized to measure the gap between models and real-world applications and thus can complement existing metrics. Finally, we conduct the largest-scale benchmark, evaluating 16 representative segmentation models, providing a more insightful discussion regarding object complexities, and showing several potential applications (e.g., background removal, art design, 3D reconstruction). Hoping these efforts can open up promising directions for both academic and industries. Project page: https://xuebinqin.github.io/dis/index.html.
summary: We present a systematic study on a new task called dichotomous image segmentation (DIS) , which aims to segment highly accurate objects from natural images. To this end, we collected the first large-scale DIS dataset, called DIS5K, which contains 5,470 high-resolution (e.g., 2K, 4K or larger) images covering camouflaged, salient, or meticulous objects in various backgrounds. DIS is annotated with extremely fine-grained labels. Besides, we introduce a simple intermediate supervision baseline (IS-Net) using both feature-level and mask-level guidance for DIS model training. IS-Net outperforms various cutting-edge baselines on the proposed DIS5K, making it a general self-learned supervision network that can facilitate future research in DIS. Further, we design a new metric called human correction efforts (HCE) which approximates the number of mouse clicking operations required to correct the false positives and false negatives. HCE is utilized to measure the gap between models and real-world applications and thus can complement existing metrics. Finally, we conduct the largest-scale benchmark, evaluating 16 representative segmentation models, providing a more insightful discussion regarding object complexities, and showing several potential applications (e.g., background removal, art design, 3D reconstruction). Hoping these efforts can open up promising directions for both academic and industries. Project page: https://xuebinqin.github.io/dis/index.html.
abstract_zh: 我们对称为二分图像分割（DIS）的新任务进行了系统研究，旨在从自然图像中分割出高精度的对象。为此，我们收集了第一个大规模 DIS 数据集，称为 DIS5K，其中包含 5,470 张高分辨率（例如 2K、4K 或更大）图像，涵盖各种背景下的伪装、显着或细致的物体。 DIS 用极其细粒度的标签进行注释。此外，我们引入了一个简单的中间监督基线（IS-Net），使用特征级和掩模级指导进行 DIS 模型训练。 IS-Net 在所提出的 DIS5K 上优于各种前沿基线，使其成为一个通用的自学习监督网络，可以促进 DIS 的未来研究。此外，我们设计了一种称为人工纠正工作（HCE）的新指标，它近似于纠正误报和漏报所需的鼠标点击操作数量。 HCE 用于衡量模型与实际应用之间的差距，从而可以补充现有指标。最后，我们进行了最大规模的基准测试，评估了 16 个代表性分割模型，提供了有关对象复杂性的更深入的讨论，并展示了几种潜在的应用（例如背景去除、艺术设计、3D 重建）。希望这些努力能为学术界和工业界开辟有希望的方向。项目页面：https://xuebinqin.github.io/dis/index.html。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的二元图像分割任务（DIS），并构建了大规模数据集DIS5K，同时设计了中间监督基线模型IS-Net和人类修正努力度量指标HCE。
AI.motivation: 现有分割方法在处理高精度目标（如伪装、显著或精细物体）时存在局限性，缺乏大规模高质量数据集及针对性评估指标。
AI.method: 构建包含5470张高分辨率图像的DIS5K数据集；提出结合特征级和掩码级监督的IS-Net模型；设计衡量模型修正难度的HCE指标；开展包含16种模型的基准测试。
AI.result: IS-Net在DIS5K数据集上优于现有先进方法，HCE指标有效反映模型与实际应用的差距，基准测试揭示了目标复杂性与分割性能的关系。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为二元图像分割提供了新数据集、有效模型和评估指标，推动了该领域在学术界和工业界的应用发展。

authors_text: Weiqiao Han,Ashkan Jasour,Brian Williams
title: Non-Gaussian Risk Bounded Trajectory Optimization for Stochastic Nonlinear Systems in Uncertain Environments
title_zh: 不确定环境中随机非线性系统的非高斯风险有界轨迹优化
comment: Accepted at the 39th IEEE Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), 2022
comments: Accepted at the 39th IEEE Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), 2022
abstract: We address the risk bounded trajectory optimization problem of stochastic nonlinear robotic systems. More precisely, we consider the motion planning problem in which the robot has stochastic nonlinear dynamics and uncertain initial locations, and the environment contains multiple dynamic uncertain obstacles with arbitrary probabilistic distributions. The goal is to plan a sequence of control inputs for the robot to navigate to the target while bounding the probability of colliding with obstacles. Existing approaches to address risk bounded trajectory optimization problems are limited to particular classes of models and uncertainties such as Gaussian linear problems. In this paper, we deal with stochastic nonlinear models, nonlinear safety constraints, and arbitrary probabilistic uncertainties, the most general setting ever considered. To address the risk bounded trajectory optimization problem, we first formulate the problem as an optimization problem with stochastic dynamics equations and chance constraints. We then convert probabilistic constraints and stochastic dynamics constraints on random variables into a set of deterministic constraints on the moments of state probability distributions. Finally, we solve the resulting deterministic optimization problem using nonlinear optimization solvers and get a sequence of control inputs. To our best knowledge, it is the first time that the motion planning problem to such a general extent is considered and solved. To illustrate the performance of the proposed method, we provide several robotics examples.
summary: We address the risk bounded trajectory optimization problem of stochastic nonlinear robotic systems. More precisely, we consider the motion planning problem in which the robot has stochastic nonlinear dynamics and uncertain initial locations, and the environment contains multiple dynamic uncertain obstacles with arbitrary probabilistic distributions. The goal is to plan a sequence of control inputs for the robot to navigate to the target while bounding the probability of colliding with obstacles. Existing approaches to address risk bounded trajectory optimization problems are limited to particular classes of models and uncertainties such as Gaussian linear problems. In this paper, we deal with stochastic nonlinear models, nonlinear safety constraints, and arbitrary probabilistic uncertainties, the most general setting ever considered. To address the risk bounded trajectory optimization problem, we first formulate the problem as an optimization problem with stochastic dynamics equations and chance constraints. We then convert probabilistic constraints and stochastic dynamics constraints on random variables into a set of deterministic constraints on the moments of state probability distributions. Finally, we solve the resulting deterministic optimization problem using nonlinear optimization solvers and get a sequence of control inputs. To our best knowledge, it is the first time that the motion planning problem to such a general extent is considered and solved. To illustrate the performance of the proposed method, we provide several robotics examples.
abstract_zh: 我们解决随机非线性机器人系统的风险有界轨迹优化问题。更准确地说，我们考虑机器人具有随机非线性动力学和不确定初始位置，并且环境包含多个具有任意概率分布的动态不确定障碍物的运动规划问题。目标是为机器人规划一系列控制输入，以导航到目标，同时限制与障碍物碰撞的概率。解决风险有界轨迹优化问题的现有方法仅限于特定类别的模型和不确定性，例如高斯线性问题。在本文中，我们处理随机非线性模型、非线性安全约束和任意概率不确定性，这是有史以来考虑过的最常见的设置。为了解决风险有界轨迹优化问题，我们首先将该问题表述为具有随机动力学方程和机会约束的优化问题。然后，我们将随机变量的概率约束和随机动力学约束转换为状态概率分布矩的一组确定性约束。最后，我们使用非线性优化求解器求解所得的确定性优化问题，并获得一系列控制输入。据我们所知，这是第一次考虑并解决如此广泛的运动规划问题。为了说明所提出方法的性能，我们提供了几个机器人示例。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在不确定环境下具有非线性随机动力学的机器人系统的风险约束轨迹优化问题，目标是在动态障碍物中规划安全路径并限制碰撞概率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅适用于高斯线性模型，无法处理非线性系统、非高斯不确定性及复杂动态障碍物的通用场景。
AI.method: 将随机动力学方程与机会约束转化为状态概率分布的矩约束，构建确定性优化问题并利用非线性优化求解器求解控制输入序列。
AI.result: 首次在通用非线性模型和任意概率不确定性下解决运动规划问题，并通过多个机器人实例验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法突破了传统方法的局限性，为复杂不确定环境下的安全轨迹规划提供了通用解决方案。

search_text: Non-Gaussian Risk Bounded Trajectory Optimization for Stochastic Nonlinear Systems in Uncertain Environments 不确定环境中随机非线性系统的非高斯风险有界轨迹优化 We address the risk bounded trajectory optimization problem of stochastic nonlinear robotic systems. More precisely, we consider the motion planning problem in which the robot has stochastic nonlinear dynamics and uncertain initial locations, and the environment contains multiple dynamic uncertain obstacles with arbitrary probabilistic distributions. The goal is to plan a sequence of control inputs for the robot to navigate to the target while bounding the probability of colliding with obstacles. Existing approaches to address risk bounded trajectory optimization problems are limited to particular classes of models and uncertainties such as Gaussian linear problems. In this paper, we deal with stochastic nonlinear models, nonlinear safety constraints, and arbitrary probabilistic uncertainties, the most general setting ever considered. To address the risk bounded trajectory optimization problem, we first formulate the problem as an optimization problem with stochastic dynamics equations and chance constraints. We then convert probabilistic constraints and stochastic dynamics constraints on random variables into a set of deterministic constraints on the moments of state probability distributions. Finally, we solve the resulting deterministic optimization problem using nonlinear optimization solvers and get a sequence of control inputs. To our best knowledge, it is the first time that the motion planning problem to such a general extent is considered and solved. To illustrate the performance of the proposed method, we provide several robotics examples. 我们解决随机非线性机器人系统的风险有界轨迹优化问题。更准确地说，我们考虑机器人具有随机非线性动力学和不确定初始位置，并且环境包含多个具有任意概率分布的动态不确定障碍物的运动规划问题。目标是为机器人规划一系列控制输入，以导航到目标，同时限制与障碍物碰撞的概率。解决风险有界轨迹优化问题的现有方法仅限于特定类别的模型和不确定性，例如高斯线性问题。在本文中，我们处理随机非线性模型、非线性安全约束和任意概率不确定性，这是有史以来考虑过的最常见的设置。为了解决风险有界轨迹优化问题，我们首先将该问题表述为具有随机动力学方程和机会约束的优化问题。然后，我们将随机变量的概率约束和随机动力学约束转换为状态概率分布矩的一组确定性约束。最后，我们使用非线性优化求解器求解所得的确定性优化问题，并获得一系列控制输入。据我们所知，这是第一次考虑并解决如此广泛的运动规划问题。为了说明所提出方法的性能，我们提供了几个机器人示例。 本文研究在不确定环境下具有非线性随机动力学的机器人系统的风险约束轨迹优化问题，目标是在动态障碍物中规划安全路径并限制碰撞概率。 Weiqiao Han,Ashkan Jasour,Brian Williams cs.RO,eess.SY,math.OC

authors_text: Joseph Turian,Jordie Shier,Humair Raj Khan,Bhiksha Raj,Björn W. Schuller,Christian J. Steinmetz,Colin Malloy,George Tzanetakis,Gissel Velarde,Kirk McNally,Max Henry,Nicolas Pinto,Camille Noufi,Christian Clough,Dorien Herremans,Eduardo Fonseca,Jesse Engel,Justin Salamon,Philippe Esling,Pranay Manocha,Shinji Watanabe,Zeyu Jin,Yonatan Bisk
title: HEAR: Holistic Evaluation of Audio Representations
title_zh: HEAR：音频表示的整体评估
comment: to appear in Proceedings of Machine Learning Research (PMLR): NeurIPS 2021 Competition Track
comments: to appear in Proceedings of Machine Learning Research (PMLR): NeurIPS 2021 Competition Track
abstract: What audio embedding approach generalizes best to a wide range of downstream tasks across a variety of everyday domains without fine-tuning? The aim of the HEAR benchmark is to develop a general-purpose audio representation that provides a strong basis for learning in a wide variety of tasks and scenarios. HEAR evaluates audio representations using a benchmark suite across a variety of domains, including speech, environmental sound, and music. HEAR was launched as a NeurIPS 2021 shared challenge. In the spirit of shared exchange, each participant submitted an audio embedding model following a common API that is general-purpose, open-source, and freely available to use. Twenty-nine models by thirteen external teams were evaluated on nineteen diverse downstream tasks derived from sixteen datasets. Open evaluation code, submitted models and datasets are key contributions, enabling comprehensive and reproducible evaluation, as well as previously impossible longitudinal studies. It still remains an open question whether one single general-purpose audio representation can perform as holistically as the human ear.
summary: What audio embedding approach generalizes best to a wide range of downstream tasks across a variety of everyday domains without fine-tuning? HEAR evaluates audio representations using a benchmark suite across a variety of domains, including speech, environmental sound, and music. HEAR was launched as a NeurIPS 2021 shared challenge. In the spirit of shared exchange, each participant submitted an audio embedding model following a common API that is general-purpose, open-source, and freely available to use. Twenty-nine models by thirteen external teams were evaluated on nineteen diverse downstream tasks derived from sixteen datasets. Open evaluation code, submitted models and datasets are key contributions, enabling comprehensive and reproducible evaluation, as well as previously impossible longitudinal studies. It still remains an open question whether one single general-purpose audio representation can perform as holistically as the human ear.
abstract_zh: 哪种音频嵌入方法能够最好地推广到各种日常领域的各种下游任务，而无需进行微调？ HEAR 基准测试的目标是开发一种通用音频表示形式，为各种任务和场景的学习提供坚实的基础。 HEAR 使用跨多个领域的基准套件评估音频表示，包括语音、环境声音和音乐。 HEAR 是作为 NeurIPS 2021 共同挑战而推出的。本着共享交流的精神，每个参与者都按照通用、开源且免费使用的通用 API 提交了音频嵌入模型。 13 个外部团队的 29 个模型针对源自 16 个数据集的 19 个不同的下游任务进行了评估。开放的评估代码、提交的模型和数据集是关键贡献，实现了全面和可重复的评估，以及以前不可能的纵向研究。单一通用音频表示是否能够像人耳一样全面地执行仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。

AI.tldr: 开发并评估通用音频表示方法，以在不微调的情况下广泛应用于多种下游任务。
AI.motivation: 寻找一种无需微调即可在多种日常领域和任务中表现优异的通用音频表示方法。
AI.method: 通过跨多个领域的基准测试套件评估音频表示，并利用共享挑战赛收集的模型和数据集进行比较。
AI.result: 评估了29个模型在19个任务上的表现，开放了评估代码和数据集，但尚未找到单一最佳模型。
AI.conclusion: 目前尚未找到能全面替代人类听觉的单一通用音频表示方法，需进一步研究。

authors_text: Aurel Appius,Erik Bauer,Marc Blöchlinger,Aashi Kalra,Robin Oberson,Arman Raayatsanati,Pascal Strauch,Sarath Suresh,Marco von Salis,Robert K. Katzschmann
title: RAPTOR: Rapid Aerial Pickup and Transport of Objects by Robots
title_zh: RAPTOR：机器人快速空中拾取和运输物体
comment: 7 pages, 10 figures, accepted to IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2022. Video: https://youtu.be/KHkBlBABsC8
comments: 7 pages, 10 figures, accepted to IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2022. Video: https://youtu.be/KHkBlBABsC8
abstract: Rapid aerial grasping through robots can lead to many applications that utilize fast and dynamic picking and placing of objects. Rigid grippers traditionally used in aerial manipulators require high precision and specific object geometries for successful grasping. We propose RAPTOR, a quadcopter platform combined with a custom Fin Ray gripper to enable more flexible grasping of objects with different geometries, leveraging the properties of soft materials to increase the contact surface between the gripper and the objects. To reduce the communication latency, we present a new lightweight middleware solution based on Fast DDS (Data Distribution Service) as an alternative to ROS (Robot Operating System). We show that RAPTOR achieves an average of 83% grasping efficacy in a real-world setting for four different object geometries while moving at an average velocity of 1 m/s during grasping. In a high-velocity setting, RAPTOR supports up to four times the payload compared to previous works. Our results highlight the potential of aerial drones in automated warehouses and other manipulation applications where speed, swiftness, and robustness are essential while operating in hard-to-reach places.
summary: Rapid aerial grasping through robots can lead to many applications that utilize fast and dynamic picking and placing of objects. Rigid grippers traditionally used in aerial manipulators require high precision and specific object geometries for successful grasping. We propose RAPTOR, a quadcopter platform combined with a custom Fin Ray gripper to enable more flexible grasping of objects with different geometries, leveraging the properties of soft materials to increase the contact surface between the gripper and the objects. To reduce the communication latency, we present a new lightweight middleware solution based on Fast DDS (Data Distribution Service) as an alternative to ROS (Robot Operating System). We show that RAPTOR achieves an average of 83% grasping efficacy in a real-world setting for four different object geometries while moving at an average velocity of 1 m/s during grasping. In a high-velocity setting, RAPTOR supports up to four times the payload compared to previous works. Our results highlight the potential of aerial drones in automated warehouses and other manipulation applications where speed, swiftness, and robustness are essential while operating in hard-to-reach places.
abstract_zh: 通过机器人进行快速空中抓取可以带来许多利用快速动态拾取和放置物体的应用。传统上用于空中机械手的刚性夹具需要高精度和特定的物体几何形状才能成功抓取。我们提出了 RAPTOR，这是一个与定制 Fin Ray 夹具相结合的四轴飞行器平台，可以更灵活地抓取具有不同几何形状的物体，利用软材料的特性来增加夹具和物体之间的接触面积。为了减少通信延迟，我们提出了一种基于 Fast DDS（数据分发服务）的新型轻量级中间件解决方案，作为 ROS（机器人操作系统）的替代方案。我们表明，RAPTOR 在现实环境中对四种不同几何形状的物体的平均抓取效率为 83%，同时抓取期间以 1 m/s 的平均速度移动。在高速设置下，RAPTOR 支持的有效载荷是之前作品的四倍。我们的结果凸显了无人机在自动化仓库和其他操纵应用中的潜力，在这些应用中，在难以到达的地方操作时，速度、敏捷性和稳健性至关重要。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RAPTOR系统，通过四旋翼无人机结合柔性夹爪实现快速空中抓取与运输物体。
AI.motivation: 传统刚性夹爪对物体几何形状和精度要求高，难以适应复杂场景，需开发更灵活且高速的空中抓取方案。
AI.method: 设计定制化Fin Ray柔性夹爪增强接触面积，并采用基于Fast DDS的轻量级中间件降低通信延迟。
AI.result: 实际测试中RAPTOR在1m/s速度下实现83%抓取成功率，高速场景下负载能力较之前工作提升4倍。
AI.conclusion: 该系统展示了无人机在自动化仓储等需要速度与鲁棒性的场景中的应用潜力。

Rigid grippers traditionally used in aerial manipulators require high precision and specific object geometries for successful grasping. We propose RAPTOR, a quadcopter platform combined with a custom Fin Ray gripper to enable more flexible grasping of objects with different geometries, leveraging the properties of soft materials to increase the contact surface between the gripper and the objects. To reduce the communication latency, we present a new lightweight middleware solution based on Fast DDS (Data Distribution Service) as an alternative to ROS (Robot Operating System). We show that RAPTOR achieves an average of 83% grasping efficacy in a real-world setting for four different object geometries while moving at an average velocity of 1 m/s during grasping. In a high-velocity setting, RAPTOR supports up to four times the payload compared to previous works. Our results highlight the potential of aerial drones in automated warehouses and other manipulation applications where speed, swiftness, and robustness are essential while operating in hard-to-reach places. 通过机器人进行快速空中抓取可以带来许多利用快速动态拾取和放置物体的应用。传统上用于空中机械手的刚性夹具需要高精度和特定的物体几何形状才能成功抓取。我们提出了 RAPTOR，这是一个与定制 Fin Ray 夹具相结合的四轴飞行器平台，可以更灵活地抓取具有不同几何形状的物体，利用软材料的特性来增加夹具和物体之间的接触面积。为了减少通信延迟，我们提出了一种基于 Fast DDS（数据分发服务）的新型轻量级中间件解决方案，作为 ROS（机器人操作系统）的替代方案。我们表明，RAPTOR 在现实环境中对四种不同几何形状的物体的平均抓取效率为 83%，同时抓取期间以 1 m/s 的平均速度移动。在高速设置下，RAPTOR 支持的有效载荷是之前作品的四倍。我们的结果凸显了无人机在自动化仓库和其他操纵应用中的潜力，在这些应用中，在难以到达的地方操作时，速度、敏捷性和稳健性至关重要。 本文提出RAPTOR系统，通过四旋翼无人机结合柔性夹爪实现快速空中抓取与运输物体。 Aurel Appius,Erik Bauer,Marc Blöchlinger,Aashi Kalra,Robin Oberson,Arman Raayatsanati,Pascal Strauch,Sarath Suresh,Marco von Salis,Robert K. Katzschmann cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Rui Chen,Chenxi Wang,Tianhao Wei,Changliu Liu
title: A Composable Framework for Policy Design, Learning, and Transfer Toward Safe and Efficient Industrial Insertion
title_zh: 用于政策设计、学习和转移以实现安全高效的工业插入的可组合框架
abstract: Delicate industrial insertion tasks (e.g., PC board assembly) remain challenging for industrial robots. The challenges include low error tolerance, delicacy of the components, and large task variations with respect to the components to be inserted. To deliver a feasible robotic solution for these insertion tasks, we also need to account for hardware limits of existing robotic systems and minimize the integration effort. This paper proposes a composable framework for efficient integration of a safe insertion policy on existing robotic platforms to accomplish these insertion tasks. The policy has an interpretable modularized design and can be learned efficiently on hardware and transferred to new tasks easily. In particular, the policy includes a safe insertion agent as a baseline policy for insertion, an optimal configurable Cartesian tracker as an interface to robot hardware, a probabilistic inference module to handle component variety and insertion errors, and a safe learning module to optimize the parameters in the aforementioned modules to achieve the best performance on designated hardware. The experiment results on a UR10 robot show that the proposed framework achieves safety (for the delicacy of components), accuracy (for low tolerance), robustness (against perception error and component defection), adaptability and transferability (for task variations), as well as task efficiency during execution plus data and time efficiency during learning.
summary: Delicate industrial insertion tasks (e.g., PC board assembly) remain challenging for industrial robots. The challenges include low error tolerance, delicacy of the components, and large task variations with respect to the components to be inserted. To deliver a feasible robotic solution for these insertion tasks, we also need to account for hardware limits of existing robotic systems and minimize the integration effort. This paper proposes a composable framework for efficient integration of a safe insertion policy on existing robotic platforms to accomplish these insertion tasks. The policy has an interpretable modularized design and can be learned efficiently on hardware and transferred to new tasks easily. In particular, the policy includes a safe insertion agent as a baseline policy for insertion, an optimal configurable Cartesian tracker as an interface to robot hardware, a probabilistic inference module to handle component variety and insertion errors, and a safe learning module to optimize the parameters in the aforementioned modules to achieve the best performance on designated hardware. The experiment results on a UR10 robot show that the proposed framework achieves safety (for the delicacy of components), accuracy (for low tolerance), robustness (against perception error and component defection), adaptability and transferability (for task variations), as well as task efficiency during execution plus data and time efficiency during learning.
abstract_zh: 对于工业机器人来说，复杂的工业插入任务（例如印刷电路板组装）仍然具有挑战性。挑战包括低容错性、组件的精细度以及与要插入的组件相关的较大任务变化。为了为这些插入任务提供可行的机器人解决方案，我们还需要考虑现有机器人系统的硬件限制并最大限度地减少集成工作。本文提出了一种可组合框架，用于在现有机器人平台上有效集成安全插入策略，以完成这些插入任务。该策略具有可解释的模块化设计，可以在硬件上高效学习并轻松转移到新任务。特别是，该策略包括作为插入基线策略的安全插入代理、作为机器人硬件接口的最佳可配置笛卡尔跟踪器、用于处理组件多样性和插入错误的概率推理模块，以及用于优化上述模块中的参数以在指定硬件上实现最佳性能的安全学习模块。在UR10机器人上的实验结果表明，所提出的框架实现了安全性（针对组件的精细度）、准确性（针对低容差）、鲁棒性（针对感知错误和组件缺陷）、适应性和可转移性（针对任务变化），以及执行期间的任务效率以及学习期间的数据和时间效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可组合框架，用于在现有工业机器人平台上高效集成安全且适应性强的插入策略，以解决精密工业插入任务的挑战。
AI.motivation: 工业插入任务存在容错率低、组件精密、任务变化大等挑战，同时需兼顾现有机器人硬件限制与集成效率，传统方法难以满足需求。
AI.method: 设计模块化策略框架，包含安全插入代理、可配置轨迹跟踪器、概率推理模块及安全学习模块，通过硬件适配与参数优化实现策略的高效学习与跨任务迁移。
AI.result: 在UR10机器人实验中，框架在安全性、精度、鲁棒性、适应性及任务效率方面均表现优异，同时具备数据与时间效率优势。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过模块化设计与硬件协同优化，有效解决了工业插入任务的复杂性与硬件限制问题，为安全高效的工业自动化提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Saghir Alfasly,Jian Lu,Chen Xu,Yuru Zou
title: Learnable Irrelevant Modality Dropout for Multimodal Action Recognition on Modality-Specific Annotated Videos
title_zh: 用于特定模态注释视频上多模态动作识别的可学习的不相关模态丢弃
abstract: With the assumption that a video dataset is multimodality annotated in which auditory and visual modalities both are labeled or class-relevant, current multimodal methods apply modality fusion or cross-modality attention. However, effectively leveraging the audio modality in vision-specific annotated videos for action recognition is of particular challenge. To tackle this challenge, we propose a novel audio-visual framework that effectively leverages the audio modality in any solely vision-specific annotated dataset. We adopt the language models (e.g., BERT) to build a semantic audio-video label dictionary (SAVLD) that maps each video label to its most K-relevant audio labels in which SAVLD serves as a bridge between audio and video datasets. Then, SAVLD along with a pretrained audio multi-label model are used to estimate the audio-visual modality relevance during the training phase. Accordingly, a novel learnable irrelevant modality dropout (IMD) is proposed to completely drop out the irrelevant audio modality and fuse only the relevant modalities. Moreover, we present a new two-stream video Transformer for efficiently modeling the visual modalities. Results on several vision-specific annotated datasets including Kinetics400 and UCF-101 validated our framework as it outperforms most relevant action recognition methods.
summary: With the assumption that a video dataset is multimodality annotated in which auditory and visual modalities both are labeled or class-relevant, current multimodal methods apply modality fusion or cross-modality attention. However, effectively leveraging the audio modality in vision-specific annotated videos for action recognition is of particular challenge. To tackle this challenge, we propose a novel audio-visual framework that effectively leverages the audio modality in any solely vision-specific annotated dataset. We adopt the language models (e.g., BERT) to build a semantic audio-video label dictionary (SAVLD) that maps each video label to its most K-relevant audio labels in which SAVLD serves as a bridge between audio and video datasets. Then, SAVLD along with a pretrained audio multi-label model are used to estimate the audio-visual modality relevance during the training phase. Accordingly, a novel learnable irrelevant modality dropout (IMD) is proposed to completely drop out the irrelevant audio modality and fuse only the relevant modalities. Moreover, we present a new two-stream video Transformer for efficiently modeling the visual modalities. Results on several vision-specific annotated datasets including Kinetics400 and UCF-101 validated our framework as it outperforms most relevant action recognition methods.
abstract_zh: 假设视频数据集是多模态注释的，其中听觉和视觉模态都被标记或与类别相关，当前的多模态方法应用模态融合或跨模态注意。然而，有效利用特定于视觉的注释视频中的音频模式进行动作识别是一个特殊的挑战。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种新颖的视听框架，该框架可以有效地利用任何特定于视觉的注释数据集中的音频模式。我们采用语言模型（例如 BERT）构建语义音视频标签字典（SAVLD），将每个视频标签映射到其最 K 相关的音频标签，其中 SAVLD 充当音频和视频数据集之间的桥梁。然后，SAVLD 与预训练的音频多标签模型一起用于估计训练阶段的视听模态相关性。因此，提出了一种新颖的可学习的不相关模态丢弃（IMD），以完全丢弃不相关的音频模态并仅融合相关模态。此外，我们提出了一种新的双流视频 Transformer，用于有效地建模视觉模式。包括 Kinetics400 和 UCF-101 在内的几个特定于视觉的注释数据集的结果验证了我们的框架，因为它优于大多数相关的动作识别方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可学习的无关模态丢弃方法，用于在仅视觉标注的视频数据集中有效利用音频模态进行多模态动作识别。
AI.motivation: 现有方法假设视频数据集包含多模态标注，但在仅视觉标注的数据集中，音频模态的利用存在挑战，需解决如何有效融合未标注的音频信息问题。
AI.method: 构建语义音频-视频标签字典（SAVLD）映射视频标签到相关音频标签，结合预训练音频模型估计模态相关性，并设计可学习的无关模态丢弃（IMD）机制过滤无关音频，同时提出双流视频Transformer处理视觉模态。
AI.result: 在Kinetics400和UCF-101等仅视觉标注数据集上，该框架优于多数相关动作识别方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过模态相关性建模与动态丢弃无关模态，本文方法有效提升了仅视觉标注视频中多模态动作识别的性能。

Results on several vision-specific annotated datasets including Kinetics400 and UCF-101 validated our framework as it outperforms most relevant action recognition methods. 假设视频数据集是多模态注释的，其中听觉和视觉模态都被标记或与类别相关，当前的多模态方法应用模态融合或跨模态注意。然而，有效利用特定于视觉的注释视频中的音频模式进行动作识别是一个特殊的挑战。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种新颖的视听框架，该框架可以有效地利用任何特定于视觉的注释数据集中的音频模式。我们采用语言模型（例如 BERT）构建语义音视频标签字典（SAVLD），将每个视频标签映射到其最 K 相关的音频标签，其中 SAVLD 充当音频和视频数据集之间的桥梁。然后，SAVLD 与预训练的音频多标签模型一起用于估计训练阶段的视听模态相关性。因此，提出了一种新颖的可学习的不相关模态丢弃（IMD），以完全丢弃不相关的音频模态并仅融合相关模态。此外，我们提出了一种新的双流视频 Transformer，用于有效地建模视觉模式。包括 Kinetics400 和 UCF-101 在内的几个特定于视觉的注释数据集的结果验证了我们的框架，因为它优于大多数相关的动作识别方法。 本文提出一种可学习的无关模态丢弃方法，用于在仅视觉标注的视频数据集中有效利用音频模态进行多模态动作识别。 Saghir Alfasly,Jian Lu,Chen Xu,Yuru Zou cs.CV

authors_text: Yanhui Guo,Fangzhou Luo,Shaoyuan Xu
title: Self-Supervised Face Image Restoration with a One-Shot Reference
title_zh: 使用一次性参考进行自监督人脸图像恢复
abstract: For image restoration, methods leveraging priors from generative models have been proposed and demonstrated a promising capacity to robustly restore photorealistic and high-quality results. However, these methods are susceptible to semantic ambiguity, particularly with images that have obviously correct semantics such as facial images. In this paper, we propose a semantic-aware latent space exploration method for image restoration (SAIR). By explicitly modeling semantics information from a given reference image, SAIR is able to reliably restore severely degraded images not only to high-resolution and highly realistic looks but also to correct semantics. Quantitative and qualitative experiments collectively demonstrate the superior performance of the proposed SAIR. Our code is available at https://github.com/Liamkuo/SAIR.
summary: For image restoration, methods leveraging priors from generative models have been proposed and demonstrated a promising capacity to robustly restore photorealistic and high-quality results. However, these methods are susceptible to semantic ambiguity, particularly with images that have obviously correct semantics such as facial images. In this paper, we propose a semantic-aware latent space exploration method for image restoration (SAIR). By explicitly modeling semantics information from a given reference image, SAIR is able to reliably restore severely degraded images not only to high-resolution and highly realistic looks but also to correct semantics. Quantitative and qualitative experiments collectively demonstrate the superior performance of the proposed SAIR. Our code is available at https://github.com/Liamkuo/SAIR.
abstract_zh: 对于图像恢复，已经提出了利用生成模型先验的方法，并展示了稳健恢复照片级真实感和高质量结果的良好能力。然而，这些方法容易受到语义歧义的影响，特别是对于具有明显正确语义的图像（例如面部图像）。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于图像恢复的语义感知潜在空间探索方法（SAIR）。通过对给定参考图像的语义信息进行显式建模，SAIR 不仅能够可靠地将严重退化的图像恢复为高分辨率和高度逼真的外观，而且还能纠正语义。定量和定性实验共同证明了所提出的 SAIR 的优越性能。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/Liamkuo/SAIR 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于单次参考图像的自监督人脸图像修复方法SAIR，通过建模语义信息实现高质量且语义正确的修复。
AI.motivation: 现有生成模型先验方法在修复人脸等语义明确的图像时易受语义歧义影响，难以保证修复结果的语义准确性。
AI.method: 设计语义感知的潜在空间探索方法（SAIR），通过显式建模参考图像的语义信息引导修复过程。
AI.result: 定量与定性实验表明SAIR在高分辨率和真实感恢复方面优于现有方法，能有效保持语义正确性。
AI.conclusion: SAIR通过语义引导的潜在空间探索，实现了严重退化人脸图像的高质量语义正确修复。

authors_text: Matteo Iovino,Fethiye Irmak Doğan,Iolanda Leite,Christian Smith
title: Interactive Disambiguation for Behavior Tree Execution
title_zh: 行为树执行的交互式消歧
abstract: In recent years, robots are used in an increasing variety of tasks, especially by small- and medium- sized enterprises. These tasks are usually fast-changing, they have a collaborative scenario and happen in unpredictable environments with possible ambiguities. It is important to have methods capable of generating robot programs easily, that are made as general as possible by handling uncertainties. We present a system that integrates a method to learn Behavior Trees (BTs) from demonstration for pick and place tasks, with a framework that uses verbal interaction to ask follow-up clarification questions to resolve ambiguities. During the execution of a task, the system asks for user input when there is need to disambiguate an object in the scene, when the targets of the task are objects of a same type that are present in multiple instances. The integrated system is demonstrated on different scenarios of a pick and place task, with increasing level of ambiguities. The code used for this paper is made publicly available.
summary: In recent years, robots are used in an increasing variety of tasks, especially by small- and medium- sized enterprises. These tasks are usually fast-changing, they have a collaborative scenario and happen in unpredictable environments with possible ambiguities. It is important to have methods capable of generating robot programs easily, that are made as general as possible by handling uncertainties. We present a system that integrates a method to learn Behavior Trees (BTs) from demonstration for pick and place tasks, with a framework that uses verbal interaction to ask follow-up clarification questions to resolve ambiguities. During the execution of a task, the system asks for user input when there is need to disambiguate an object in the scene, when the targets of the task are objects of a same type that are present in multiple instances. The integrated system is demonstrated on different scenarios of a pick and place task, with increasing level of ambiguities. The code used for this paper is made publicly available.
abstract_zh: 近年来，机器人被用于越来越多的任务，特别是中小型企业。这些任务通常变化很快，它们具有协作场景，并且发生在不可预测的环境中，并且可能存在模糊性。重要的是拥有能够轻松生成机器人程序的方法，并通过处理不确定性使其尽可能通用。我们提出了一个系统，该系统集成了从拾取和放置任务的演示中学习行为树（BT）的方法，以及使用口头交互提出后续澄清问题以解决歧义的框架。在任务执行期间，当需要消除场景中的对象的歧义时，当任务的目标是存在于多个实例中的相同类型的对象时，系统会要求用户输入。该集成系统在拾放任务的不同场景中进行了演示，并且模糊程度不断增加。本文使用的代码已公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合行为树学习与交互式消歧的机器人系统，用于解决动态环境中物体识别的歧义问题。
AI.motivation: 工业场景中机器人需应对快速变化的任务、协作环境及物体歧义，传统方法难以灵活处理不确定性。
AI.method: 整合从演示中学习行为树（BTs）的方法，并在任务执行时通过用户交互澄清目标物体歧义，尤其针对同类多实例物体。
AI.result: 系统在不同复杂度的抓取任务场景中验证有效性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 交互式消歧框架提升了机器人处理环境不确定性能力，为动态场景下的自主操作提供可行方案。

authors_text: Narmina Baghirova,Carolina Lucía Gonzalez,Bernard Ries,David Schindl
title: Locally checkable problems parameterized by clique-width
title_zh: 由 clique-width 参数化的本地可检查问题
abstract: We continue the study initiated by Bonomo-Braberman and Gonzalez in 2020 on $r$-locally checkable problems. We propose a dynamic programming algorithm that takes as input a graph with an associated clique-width expression and solves a $1$-locally checkable problem under certain restrictions. We show that it runs in polynomial time in graphs of bounded clique-width, when the number of colors of the locally checkable problem is fixed. Furthermore, we present a first extension of our framework to global properties by taking into account the sizes of the color classes, and consequently enlarge the set of problems solvable in polynomial time with our approach in graphs of bounded clique-width. As examples, we apply this setting to show that, when parameterized by clique-width, the $[k]-$Roman domination problem is FPT, and the $k$-community problem, Max PDS and other variants are XP.
summary: We continue the study initiated by Bonomo-Braberman and Gonzalez in 2020 on $r$-locally checkable problems. We propose a dynamic programming algorithm that takes as input a graph with an associated clique-width expression and solves a $1$-locally checkable problem under certain restrictions. We show that it runs in polynomial time in graphs of bounded clique-width, when the number of colors of the locally checkable problem is fixed. Furthermore, we present a first extension of our framework to global properties by taking into account the sizes of the color classes, and consequently enlarge the set of problems solvable in polynomial time with our approach in graphs of bounded clique-width. As examples, we apply this setting to show that, when parameterized by clique-width, the $[k]-$Roman domination problem is FPT, and the $k$-community problem, Max PDS and other variants are XP.
abstract_zh: 我们继续 Bonomo-Braberman 和 Gonzalez 于 2020 年发起的关于 $r$ 本地可检查问题的研究。我们提出了一种动态编程算法，该算法将具有相关团宽度表达式的图作为输入，并在某些限制下解决 $1$ 局部可检查问题。我们证明，当局部可检查问题的颜色数量固定时，它在有界团宽度的图中以多项式时间运行。此外，我们通过考虑颜色类别的大小，首次将我们的框架扩展到全局属性，从而通过我们在有界团宽度图中的方法扩大了可在多项式时间内解决的问题集。作为示例，我们应用此设置来表明，当通过 clique-width 参数化时，$[k]-$Roman 统治问题是 FPT，而 $k$-community 问题、Max PDS 和其他变体是 XP。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了参数化为 clique-width 的局部可检查问题，提出了一种动态规划算法，并扩展了框架以解决全局性质问题。
AI.motivation: 延续2020年关于局部可检查问题的研究，旨在为具有有限 clique-width 的图提供更高效的多项式时间算法，并扩展至全局性质问题。
AI.method: 基于 clique-width 表达式设计动态规划算法，结合颜色类大小分析，扩展框架以处理全局性质。
AI.result: 在 clique-width 有界图中，固定颜色数时算法多项式时间运行；[k]-罗马支配等问题参数化为 clique-width 时为FPT，其他问题为XP。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效扩大了在 clique-width 有界图中可多项式时间求解的问题范围，并为特定问题提供了FPT/XP结果。

method: 基于 clique-width 表达式设计动态规划算法，结合颜色类大小分析，扩展框架以处理全局性质。
result: 在 clique-width 有界图中，固定颜色数时算法多项式时间运行；[k]-罗马支配等问题参数化为 clique-width 时为FPT，其他问题为XP。
conclusion: 该方法有效扩大了在 clique-width 有界图中可多项式时间求解的问题范围，并为特定问题提供了FPT/XP结果。
search_text: Locally checkable problems parameterized by clique-width 由 clique-width 参数化的本地可检查问题 We continue the study initiated by Bonomo-Braberman and Gonzalez in 2020 on $r$-locally checkable problems. We propose a dynamic programming algorithm that takes as input a graph with an associated clique-width expression and solves a $1$-locally checkable problem under certain restrictions. We show that it runs in polynomial time in graphs of bounded clique-width, when the number of colors of the locally checkable problem is fixed. Furthermore, we present a first extension of our framework to global properties by taking into account the sizes of the color classes, and consequently enlarge the set of problems solvable in polynomial time with our approach in graphs of bounded clique-width. As examples, we apply this setting to show that, when parameterized by clique-width, the $[k]-$Roman domination problem is FPT, and the $k$-community problem, Max PDS and other variants are XP. 我们继续 Bonomo-Braberman 和 Gonzalez 于 2020 年发起的关于 $r$ 本地可检查问题的研究。我们提出了一种动态编程算法，该算法将具有相关团宽度表达式的图作为输入，并在某些限制下解决 $1$ 局部可检查问题。我们证明，当局部可检查问题的颜色数量固定时，它在有界团宽度的图中以多项式时间运行。此外，我们通过考虑颜色类别的大小，首次将我们的框架扩展到全局属性，从而通过我们在有界团宽度图中的方法扩大了可在多项式时间内解决的问题集。作为示例，我们应用此设置来表明，当通过 clique-width 参数化时，$[k]-$Roman 统治问题是 FPT，而 $k$-community 问题、Max PDS 和其他变体是 XP。 本文研究了参数化为 clique-width 的局部可检查问题，提出了一种动态规划算法，并扩展了框架以解决全局性质问题。 Narmina Baghirova,Carolina Lucía Gonzalez,Bernard Ries,David Schindl cs.DM,cs.CC,cs.DS,math.CO

authors_text: Mingxiao Li,Marie-Francine Moens
title: Modeling Coreference Relations in Visual Dialog
title_zh: 在可视化对话框中建模共指关系
abstract: Visual dialog is a vision-language task where an agent needs to answer a series of questions grounded in an image based on the understanding of the dialog history and the image. The occurrences of coreference relations in the dialog makes it a more challenging task than visual question-answering. Most previous works have focused on learning better multi-modal representations or on exploring different ways of fusing visual and language features, while the coreferences in the dialog are mainly ignored. In this paper, based on linguistic knowledge and discourse features of human dialog we propose two soft constraints that can improve the model's ability of resolving coreferences in dialog in an unsupervised way. Experimental results on the VisDial v1.0 dataset shows that our model, which integrates two novel and linguistically inspired soft constraints in a deep transformer neural architecture, obtains new state-of-the-art performance in terms of recall at 1 and other evaluation metrics compared to current existing models and this without pretraining on other vision-language datasets. Our qualitative results also demonstrate the effectiveness of the method that we propose.
summary: Visual dialog is a vision-language task where an agent needs to answer a series of questions grounded in an image based on the understanding of the dialog history and the image. The occurrences of coreference relations in the dialog makes it a more challenging task than visual question-answering. Most previous works have focused on learning better multi-modal representations or on exploring different ways of fusing visual and language features, while the coreferences in the dialog are mainly ignored. In this paper, based on linguistic knowledge and discourse features of human dialog we propose two soft constraints that can improve the model's ability of resolving coreferences in dialog in an unsupervised way. Experimental results on the VisDial v1.0 dataset shows that our model, which integrates two novel and linguistically inspired soft constraints in a deep transformer neural architecture, obtains new state-of-the-art performance in terms of recall at 1 and other evaluation metrics compared to current existing models and this without pretraining on other vision-language datasets. Our qualitative results also demonstrate the effectiveness of the method that we propose.
abstract_zh: 视觉对话是一项视觉语言任务，智能体需要基于对对话历史和图像的理解来回答一系列基于图像的问题。对话中共指关系的出现使其成为比视觉问答更具挑战性的任务。之前的大多数工作都集中在学习更好的多模态表示或探索融合视觉和语言特征的不同方式，而对话中的共指主要被忽略。在本文中，基于人类对话的语言知识和话语特征，我们提出了两个软约束，可以提高模型以无监督方式解决对话中共指的能力。 VisDial v1.0 数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的模型在深度 Transformer 神经架构中集成了两个新颖且受语言启发的软约束，与当前现有模型相比，在 1 的召回率和其他评估指标方面获得了新的最先进的性能，并且无需在其他视觉语言数据集上进行预训练。我们的定性结果也证明了我们提出的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于语言学知识和对话话语特征的软约束方法，通过无监督方式提升视觉对话中核心ference解析能力。
AI.motivation: 视觉对话任务中核心ference关系被广泛忽略，而其对对话理解至关重要。现有方法多关注多模态表征学习，缺乏对对话中指代关系的专门处理。
AI.method: 设计两种语言学驱动的软约束机制，整合到深度Transformer架构中，通过对话历史和图像信息联合建模实现无监督核心ference解析。
AI.result: 在VisDial v1.0数据集上达到Recall@1等指标的新SOTA，且无需预训练其他视觉-语言数据集，定性结果验证方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过语言学约束有效提升视觉对话中的指代解析能力，为无监督核心ference建模提供新思路。

authors_text: Mingxiao Li,Marie-Francine Moens
title: Dynamic Key-value Memory Enhanced Multi-step Graph Reasoning for Knowledge-based Visual Question Answering
title_zh: 基于知识的视觉问答的动态键值记忆增强多步图推理
abstract: Knowledge-based visual question answering (VQA) is a vision-language task that requires an agent to correctly answer image-related questions using knowledge that is not presented in the given image. It is not only a more challenging task than regular VQA but also a vital step towards building a general VQA system. Most existing knowledge-based VQA systems process knowledge and image information similarly and ignore the fact that the knowledge base (KB) contains complete information about a triplet, while the extracted image information might be incomplete as the relations between two objects are missing or wrongly detected. In this paper, we propose a novel model named dynamic knowledge memory enhanced multi-step graph reasoning (DMMGR), which performs explicit and implicit reasoning over a key-value knowledge memory module and a spatial-aware image graph, respectively. Specifically, the memory module learns a dynamic knowledge representation and generates a knowledge-aware question representation at each reasoning step. Then, this representation is used to guide a graph attention operator over the spatial-aware image graph. Our model achieves new state-of-the-art accuracy on the KRVQR and FVQA datasets. We also conduct ablation experiments to prove the effectiveness of each component of the proposed model.
summary: Knowledge-based visual question answering (VQA) is a vision-language task that requires an agent to correctly answer image-related questions using knowledge that is not presented in the given image. It is not only a more challenging task than regular VQA but also a vital step towards building a general VQA system. Most existing knowledge-based VQA systems process knowledge and image information similarly and ignore the fact that the knowledge base (KB) contains complete information about a triplet, while the extracted image information might be incomplete as the relations between two objects are missing or wrongly detected. In this paper, we propose a novel model named dynamic knowledge memory enhanced multi-step graph reasoning (DMMGR), which performs explicit and implicit reasoning over a key-value knowledge memory module and a spatial-aware image graph, respectively. Specifically, the memory module learns a dynamic knowledge representation and generates a knowledge-aware question representation at each reasoning step. Then, this representation is used to guide a graph attention operator over the spatial-aware image graph. Our model achieves new state-of-the-art accuracy on the KRVQR and FVQA datasets. We also conduct ablation experiments to prove the effectiveness of each component of the proposed model.
abstract_zh: 基于知识的视觉问答（VQA）是一项视觉语言任务，要求代理使用给定图像中未呈现的知识正确回答与图像相关的问题。这不仅是比常规VQA更具挑战性的任务，也是构建通用VQA​​系统的重要一步。大多数现有的基于知识的 VQA 系统对知识和图像信息的处理类似，但忽略了知识库 (KB) 包含有关三元组的完整信息这一事实，而提取的图像信息可能不完整，因为两个对象之间的关系丢失或错误检测。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为动态知识记忆增强多步图推理（DMMGR）的新模型，该模型分别对键值知识记忆模块和空间感知图像图执行显式和隐式推理。具体来说，记忆模块学习动态知识表示，并在每个推理步骤生成知识感知问题表示。然后，该表示用于在空间感知图像图上引导图注意算子。我们的模型在 KRVQR 和 FVQA 数据集上实现了新的最先进的准确性。我们还进行了消融实验，以证明所提出模型的每个组件的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种动态键值记忆增强的多步图推理模型（DMMGR），用于知识增强的视觉问答任务，通过结合知识库与图像信息提升回答准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有知识增强视觉问答系统未能有效区分知识库（完整三元组信息）与图像信息（可能缺失或错误的物体关系），导致推理效果受限。
AI.method: 构建动态键值记忆模块学习知识表示，并生成知识感知的问题表示；结合空间感知图像图，通过图注意力机制进行显式与隐式推理。
AI.result: 在KRVQR和FVQA数据集上达到新的最先进精度，消融实验验证了各组件的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 动态记忆模块与多步图推理的结合有效整合了知识库与图像信息，为知识增强视觉问答提供了新思路。

authors_text: Qingyu Xing,Xiaohan Ma
title: Variational Auto-Encoder based Mandarin Speech Cloning
title_zh: 基于变分自动编码器的普通话语音克隆
abstract: Speech cloning technology is becoming more sophisticated thanks to the advances in machine learning. Researchers have successfully implemented natural-sounding English speech synthesis and good English speech cloning by some effective models. However, because of prosodic phrasing and large character set of Mandarin, Chinese utilization of these models is not yet complete. By creating a new dataset and replacing Tacotron synthesizer with VAENAR-TTS, we improved the existing speech cloning technique CV2TTS to almost real-time speech cloning while guaranteeing synthesis quality. In the process, we customized the subjective tests of synthesis quality assessment by attaching various scenarios, so that subjects focus on the differences between voice and our improvements maybe were more advantageous to practical applications. The results of the A/B test, real-time factor (RTF) and 2.74 mean opinion score (MOS) in terms of naturalness and similarity, reflect the real-time high-quality Mandarin speech cloning we achieved.
summary: Speech cloning technology is becoming more sophisticated thanks to the advances in machine learning. Researchers have successfully implemented natural-sounding English speech synthesis and good English speech cloning by some effective models. However, because of prosodic phrasing and large character set of Mandarin, Chinese utilization of these models is not yet complete. By creating a new dataset and replacing Tacotron synthesizer with VAENAR-TTS, we improved the existing speech cloning technique CV2TTS to almost real-time speech cloning while guaranteeing synthesis quality. In the process, we customized the subjective tests of synthesis quality assessment by attaching various scenarios, so that subjects focus on the differences between voice and our improvements maybe were more advantageous to practical applications. The results of the A/B test, real-time factor (RTF) and 2.74 mean opinion score (MOS) in terms of naturalness and similarity, reflect the real-time high-quality Mandarin speech cloning we achieved.
abstract_zh: 由于机器学习的进步，语音克隆技术变得越来越复杂。研究人员通过一些有效的模型成功实现了自然的英语语音合成和良好的英语语音克隆。然而，由于普通话的韵律措辞和庞大的字符集，中国人对这些模型的利用尚未完成。通过创建新的数据集并用 VAENAR-TTS 替换 Tacotron 合成器，我们将现有的语音克隆技术 CV2TTS 改进为几乎实时的语音克隆，同时保证了合成质量。在这个过程中，我们定制了综合质量评估的主观测试，附加了各种场景，让受试者关注语音之间的差异，我们的改进也许更有利于实际应用。 A/B测试的结果，在自然度和相似度方面的实时因子（RTF）和2.74的平均意见得分（MOS），反映了我们实现的实时高质量的普通话语音克隆。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于变分自编码器（VAE）的 Mandarin 语音克隆方法，通过改进现有模型实现高质量实时语音合成。
AI.motivation: 现有语音克隆模型在英语上效果良好，但因 Mandarin 的声调和复杂字符集，难以直接应用，需针对性优化。
AI.method: 构建新数据集并替换 Tacotron 为 VAENAR-TTS 模型，改进 CV2TTS 框架，设计多场景主观测试评估合成质量。
AI.result: A/B 测试与 MOS 评分为 2.74，实时因子（RTF）显示实现接近实时的高质量 Mandarin 语音克隆。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过 VAE 架构和场景化测试，有效解决了 Mandarin 语音克隆的实时性与自然度问题，具备实用价值。

search_text: Variational Auto-Encoder based Mandarin Speech Cloning 基于变分自动编码器的普通话语音克隆 Speech cloning technology is becoming more sophisticated thanks to the advances in machine learning. Researchers have successfully implemented natural-sounding English speech synthesis and good English speech cloning by some effective models. However, because of prosodic phrasing and large character set of Mandarin, Chinese utilization of these models is not yet complete. By creating a new dataset and replacing Tacotron synthesizer with VAENAR-TTS, we improved the existing speech cloning technique CV2TTS to almost real-time speech cloning while guaranteeing synthesis quality. In the process, we customized the subjective tests of synthesis quality assessment by attaching various scenarios, so that subjects focus on the differences between voice and our improvements maybe were more advantageous to practical applications. The results of the A/B test, real-time factor (RTF) and 2.74 mean opinion score (MOS) in terms of naturalness and similarity, reflect the real-time high-quality Mandarin speech cloning we achieved. 由于机器学习的进步，语音克隆技术变得越来越复杂。研究人员通过一些有效的模型成功实现了自然的英语语音合成和良好的英语语音克隆。然而，由于普通话的韵律措辞和庞大的字符集，中国人对这些模型的利用尚未完成。通过创建新的数据集并用 VAENAR-TTS 替换 Tacotron 合成器，我们将现有的语音克隆技术 CV2TTS 改进为几乎实时的语音克隆，同时保证了合成质量。在这个过程中，我们定制了综合质量评估的主观测试，附加了各种场景，让受试者关注语音之间的差异，我们的改进也许更有利于实际应用。 A/B测试的结果，在自然度和相似度方面的实时因子（RTF）和2.74的平均意见得分（MOS），反映了我们实现的实时高质量的普通话语音克隆。 本文提出基于变分自编码器（VAE）的 Mandarin 语音克隆方法，通过改进现有模型实现高质量实时语音合成。 Qingyu Xing,Xiaohan Ma cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Daizong Liu,Xiang Fang,Wei Hu,Pan Zhou
title: Exploring Optical-Flow-Guided Motion and Detection-Based Appearance for Temporal Sentence Grounding
title_zh: 探索光流引导运动和基于检测的外观以实现时间句子接地
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2201.00457
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2201.00457
abstract: Temporal sentence grounding aims to localize a target segment in an untrimmed video semantically according to a given sentence query. Most previous works focus on learning frame-level features of each whole frame in the entire video, and directly match them with the textual information. Such frame-level feature extraction leads to the obstacles of these methods in distinguishing ambiguous video frames with complicated contents and subtle appearance differences, thus limiting their performance. In order to differentiate fine-grained appearance similarities among consecutive frames, some state-of-the-art methods additionally employ a detection model like Faster R-CNN to obtain detailed object-level features in each frame for filtering out the redundant background contents. However, these methods suffer from missing motion analysis since the object detection module in Faster R-CNN lacks temporal modeling. To alleviate the above limitations, in this paper, we propose a novel Motion- and Appearance-guided 3D Semantic Reasoning Network (MA3SRN), which incorporates optical-flow-guided motion-aware, detection-based appearance-aware, and 3D-aware object-level features to better reason the spatial-temporal object relations for accurately modelling the activity among consecutive frames. Specifically, we first develop three individual branches for motion, appearance, and 3D encoding separately to learn fine-grained motion-guided, appearance-guided, and 3D-aware object features, respectively. Then, both motion and appearance information from corresponding branches are associated to enhance the 3D-aware features for the final precise grounding. Extensive experiments on three challenging datasets (ActivityNet Caption, Charades-STA and TACoS) demonstrate that the proposed MA3SRN model achieves a new state-of-the-art.
summary: Temporal sentence grounding aims to localize a target segment in an untrimmed video semantically according to a given sentence query. Most previous works focus on learning frame-level features of each whole frame in the entire video, and directly match them with the textual information. Such frame-level feature extraction leads to the obstacles of these methods in distinguishing ambiguous video frames with complicated contents and subtle appearance differences, thus limiting their performance. In order to differentiate fine-grained appearance similarities among consecutive frames, some state-of-the-art methods additionally employ a detection model like Faster R-CNN to obtain detailed object-level features in each frame for filtering out the redundant background contents. However, these methods suffer from missing motion analysis since the object detection module in Faster R-CNN lacks temporal modeling. To alleviate the above limitations, in this paper, we propose a novel Motion- and Appearance-guided 3D Semantic Reasoning Network (MA3SRN), which incorporates optical-flow-guided motion-aware, detection-based appearance-aware, and 3D-aware object-level features to better reason the spatial-temporal object relations for accurately modelling the activity among consecutive frames. Specifically, we first develop three individual branches for motion, appearance, and 3D encoding separately to learn fine-grained motion-guided, appearance-guided, and 3D-aware object features, respectively. Then, both motion and appearance information from corresponding branches are associated to enhance the 3D-aware features for the final precise grounding. Extensive experiments on three challenging datasets (ActivityNet Caption, Charades-STA and TACoS) demonstrate that the proposed MA3SRN model achieves a new state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 时间句子基础旨在根据给定的句子查询在语义上定位未修剪视频中的目标片段。之前的大多数工作都集中于学习整个视频中每一整帧的帧级特征，并将它们直接与文本信息进行匹配。这种帧级特征提取导致这些方法在区分具有复杂内容和细微外观差异的模糊视频帧时遇到障碍，从而限制了它们的性能。为了区分连续帧之间的细粒度外观相似性，一些最先进的方法还采用了 Faster R-CNN 等检测模型来获取每帧中详细的对象级特征，以过滤掉冗余的背景内容。然而，由于 Faster R-CNN 中的目标检测模块缺乏时间建模，这些方法都缺乏运动分析。为了缓解上述限制，在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的运动和外观引导的 3D 语义推理网络（MA3SRN），它结合了光流引导的运动感知、基于检测的外观感知和 3D 感知对象级特征，以更好地推理时空对象关系，从而准确地建模连续帧之间的活动。具体来说，我们首先开发三个单独的分支，分别用于运动、外观和 3D 编码，以分别学习细粒度的运动引导、外观引导和 3D 感知对象特征。然后，将来自相应分支的运动和外观信息关联起来，以增强最终精确接地的 3D 感知特征。对三个具有挑战性的数据集（ActivityNet Caption、Charades-STA 和 TACoS）进行的大量实验表明，所提出的 MA3SRN 模型达到了新的最先进水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合光流运动信息和检测外观信息的3D语义推理网络（MA3SRN），用于解决根据句子查询在未剪辑视频中定位目标片段的时序句子定位问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过帧级特征匹配文本信息，难以区分复杂内容和细微差异的视频帧；虽有方法引入目标检测模型提取对象级特征，但缺乏时间建模导致运动分析不足。
AI.method: 设计包含运动感知、外观感知和3D感知三个分支的MA3SRN网络，分别提取细粒度运动、外观和时序特征，并融合运动与外观信息增强3D感知特征以实现精准定位。
AI.result: 在ActivityNet Caption、Charades-STA和TACoS三个数据集上实验表明，MA3SRN达到当时最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合运动、外观和3D时序信息，MA3SRN有效建模了连续帧的时空关系，显著提升了时序句子定位的准确性。

authors_text: Hrishav Bakul Barua,Ashis Sau,Ruddra dev Roychoudhury
title: A Perspective on Robotic Telepresence and Teleoperation using Cognition: Are we there yet?
title_zh: 使用认知的机器人远程呈现和远程操作的视角：我们到了吗？
comment: :Artificial intelligence; Computer vision; Robotics; Machine learning; Deep learningACM Class:I.2; I.2.9; I.2.10
comments: :Artificial intelligence; Computer vision; Robotics; Machine learning; Deep learningACM Class:I.2; I.2.9; I.2.10
abstract: Telepresence and teleoperation robotics have attracted a great amount of attention in the last 10 years. With the Artificial Intelligence (AI) revolution already being started, we can see a wide range of robotic applications being realized. Intelligent robotic systems are being deployed both in industrial and domestic environments. Telepresence is the idea of being present in a remote location virtually or via robotic avatars. Similarly, the idea of operating a robot from a remote location for various tasks is called teleoperation. These technologies find significant application in health care, education, surveillance, disaster recovery, and corporate/government sectors. But question still remains about their maturity, security and safety levels. We also need to think about enhancing the user experience and trust in such technologies going into the next generation of computing.
summary: Telepresence and teleoperation robotics have attracted a great amount of attention in the last 10 years. With the Artificial Intelligence (AI) revolution already being started, we can see a wide range of robotic applications being realized. These technologies find significant application in health care, education, surveillance, disaster recovery, and corporate/government sectors. But question still remains about their maturity, security and safety levels. We also need to think about enhancing the user experience and trust in such technologies going into the next generation of computing.
abstract_zh: 过去十年中，远程呈现和远程操作机器人技术引起了广泛关注。随着人工智能（AI）革命的开始，我们可以看到广泛的机器人应用正在实现。智能机器人系统正在工业和家庭环境中部署。远程呈现是指以虚拟方式或通过机器人化身出现在远程位置的想法。同样，从远程位置操作机器人执行各种任务的想法称为远程操作。这些技术在医疗保健、教育、监控、灾难恢复和企业/政府部门有着重要的应用。但它们的成熟度、安全性和安全水平仍然存在疑问。我们还需要考虑增强用户体验以及对进入下一代计算的此类技术的信任。

AI.tldr: 探讨认知技术在远程存在和操作机器人中的应用现状及成熟度评估
AI.motivation: 随着AI进步，机器人应用增多，但需解决安全、信任及用户体验问题
AI.method: 通过综述现有技术，分析认知在远程机器人中的应用及面临的挑战
AI.result: 当前技术虽有进展，但成熟度、安全性和用户信任仍需提升
AI.conclusion: AI推动了远程机器人发展，但认知层面的挑战仍需解决，未来需加强安全性与用户体验

ai_content.motivation: 随着AI进步，机器人应用增多，但需解决安全、信任及用户体验问题

search_text: A Perspective on Robotic Telepresence and Teleoperation using Cognition: Are we there yet? 使用认知的机器人远程呈现和远程操作的视角：我们到了吗？ Telepresence and teleoperation robotics have attracted a great amount of attention in the last 10 years. With the Artificial Intelligence (AI) revolution already being started, we can see a wide range of robotic applications being realized. Intelligent robotic systems are being deployed both in industrial and domestic environments. Telepresence is the idea of being present in a remote location virtually or via robotic avatars. Similarly, the idea of operating a robot from a remote location for various tasks is called teleoperation. These technologies find significant application in health care, education, surveillance, disaster recovery, and corporate/government sectors. But question still remains about their maturity, security and safety levels. We also need to think about enhancing the user experience and trust in such technologies going into the next generation of computing. 过去十年中，远程呈现和远程操作机器人技术引起了广泛关注。随着人工智能（AI）革命的开始，我们可以看到广泛的机器人应用正在实现。智能机器人系统正在工业和家庭环境中部署。远程呈现是指以虚拟方式或通过机器人化身出现在远程位置的想法。同样，从远程位置操作机器人执行各种任务的想法称为远程操作。这些技术在医疗保健、教育、监控、灾难恢复和企业/政府部门有着重要的应用。但它们的成熟度、安全性和安全水平仍然存在疑问。我们还需要考虑增强用户体验以及对进入下一代计算的此类技术的信任。 探讨认知技术在远程存在和操作机器人中的应用现状及成熟度评估 Hrishav Bakul Barua,Ashis Sau,Ruddra dev Roychoudhury cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.HC,cs.LG

authors_text: Erick Galinkin
title: Towards a Responsible AI Development Lifecycle: Lessons From Information Security
title_zh: 迈向负责任的人工智能开发生命周期：信息安全的经验教训
abstract: Legislation and public sentiment throughout the world have promoted fairness metrics, explainability, and interpretability as prescriptions for the responsible development of ethical artificial intelligence systems. Despite the importance of these three pillars in the foundation of the field, they can be challenging to operationalize and attempts to solve the problems in production environments often feel Sisyphean. This difficulty stems from a number of factors: fairness metrics are computationally difficult to incorporate into training and rarely alleviate all of the harms perpetrated by these systems. Interpretability and explainability can be gamed to appear fair, may inadvertently reduce the privacy of personal information contained in training data, and increase user confidence in predictions -- even when the explanations are wrong. In this work, we propose a framework for responsibly developing artificial intelligence systems by incorporating lessons from the field of information security and the secure development lifecycle to overcome challenges associated with protecting users in adversarial settings. In particular, we propose leveraging the concepts of threat modeling, design review, penetration testing, and incident response in the context of developing AI systems as ways to resolve shortcomings in the aforementioned methods.
summary: Legislation and public sentiment throughout the world have promoted fairness metrics, explainability, and interpretability as prescriptions for the responsible development of ethical artificial intelligence systems. Despite the importance of these three pillars in the foundation of the field, they can be challenging to operationalize and attempts to solve the problems in production environments often feel Sisyphean. This difficulty stems from a number of factors: fairness metrics are computationally difficult to incorporate into training and rarely alleviate all of the harms perpetrated by these systems. Interpretability and explainability can be gamed to appear fair, may inadvertently reduce the privacy of personal information contained in training data, and increase user confidence in predictions -- even when the explanations are wrong. In this work, we propose a framework for responsibly developing artificial intelligence systems by incorporating lessons from the field of information security and the secure development lifecycle to overcome challenges associated with protecting users in adversarial settings. In particular, we propose leveraging the concepts of threat modeling, design review, penetration testing, and incident response in the context of developing AI systems as ways to resolve shortcomings in the aforementioned methods.
abstract_zh: 世界各地的立法和公众情绪都提倡公平性指标、可解释性和可解释性，作为负责任地开发道德人工智能系统的处方。尽管这三个支柱在该领域的基础上很重要，但它们的实施可能具有挑战性，并且解决生产环境中的问题的尝试常常让人感觉西西弗斯式的。这种困难源于多种因素：公平性指标在计算上很难纳入训练中，并且很少能减轻这些系统造成的所有危害。可解释性和可解释性可以被欺骗以显得公平，可能会无意中降低训练数据中包含的个人信息的隐私性，并增加用户对预测的信心——即使解释是错误的。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个负责任地开发人工智能系统的框架，通过结合信息安全领域和安全开发生命周期的经验教训，克服与在对抗环境中保护用户相关的挑战。特别是，我们建议在开发人工智能系统的背景下利用威胁建模、设计审查、渗透测试和事件响应的概念来解决上述方法的缺点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合信息安全领域经验的负责任的人工智能开发框架，以解决伦理AI系统在公平性、可解释性和安全性方面的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有AI伦理方法在实际应用中面临计算复杂性、隐私泄露风险及用户信任误导等问题，需借鉴信息安全领域的成熟实践来应对对抗性环境下的用户保护难题。
AI.method: 将信息安全中的威胁建模、设计审查、渗透测试和事件响应等概念融入AI系统开发流程，构建系统化的责任开发生命周期框架。
AI.result: 形成了一套可操作的AI开发方法论，通过安全领域的实践工具弥补传统伦理指标在实际部署中的不足。
AI.conclusion: 跨领域借鉴信息安全实践能为AI伦理问题提供更系统、可验证的解决方案，推动负责任的AI开发模式落地。

authors_text: Eloy Parra-Barrero,Yulia Sandamirskaya
title: What does it mean to represent? Mental representations as falsifiable memory patterns
title_zh: 代表什么意思？作为可证伪的记忆模式的心理表征
abstract: Representation is a key notion in neuroscience and artificial intelligence (AI). However, a longstanding philosophical debate highlights that specifying what counts as representation is trickier than it seems. With this brief opinion paper we would like to bring the philosophical problem of representation into attention and provide an implementable solution. We note that causal and teleological approaches often assumed by neuroscientists and engineers fail to provide a satisfactory account of representation. We sketch an alternative according to which representations correspond to inferred latent structures in the world, identified on the basis of conditional patterns of activation. These structures are assumed to have certain properties objectively, which allows for planning, prediction, and detection of unexpected events. We illustrate our proposal with the simulation of a simple neural network model. We believe this stronger notion of representation could inform future research in neuroscience and AI.
summary: Representation is a key notion in neuroscience and artificial intelligence (AI). However, a longstanding philosophical debate highlights that specifying what counts as representation is trickier than it seems. With this brief opinion paper we would like to bring the philosophical problem of representation into attention and provide an implementable solution. We note that causal and teleological approaches often assumed by neuroscientists and engineers fail to provide a satisfactory account of representation. We sketch an alternative according to which representations correspond to inferred latent structures in the world, identified on the basis of conditional patterns of activation. These structures are assumed to have certain properties objectively, which allows for planning, prediction, and detection of unexpected events. We illustrate our proposal with the simulation of a simple neural network model. We believe this stronger notion of representation could inform future research in neuroscience and AI.
abstract_zh: 表征是神经科学和人工智能 (AI) 中的一个关键概念。然而，一场长期的哲学辩论强调，明确什么才算是表征比看起来更棘手。通过这篇简短的意见书，我们希望引起人们对表征的哲学问题的关注，并提供一个可实施的解决方案。我们注意到，神经科学家和工程师经常假设的因果和目的论方法未能提供令人满意的表征解释。我们勾勒出一种替代方案，根据该替代方案，表征对应于世界中推断的潜在结构，并根据激活的条件模式进行识别。假设这些结构客观地具有某些属性，从而可以规划、预测和检测意外事件。我们通过模拟一个简单的神经网络模型来说明我们的建议。我们相信这种更强的表征概念可以为神经科学和人工智能的未来研究提供信息。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了神经科学和人工智能中'表征'的哲学定义问题，提出将心理表征视为可证伪的记忆模式，并通过神经网络模型验证该理论。
AI.motivation: 现有因果和目的论方法无法清晰界定表征的本质，需要建立更客观的表征定义以推动神经科学和AI研究。
AI.method: 提出基于条件激活模式推断世界潜在结构的理论框架，并通过简单神经网络模型进行模拟验证。
AI.result: 展示了该框架能实现规划、预测及异常检测功能，证明了可证伪表征概念的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该理论为表征研究提供了新的分析路径，可能促进神经科学与人工智能领域的方法论融合。

authors_text: Renzhi He,Yan Zhuang,Boya Fu,Fei Liu
title: Point Spread Function Estimation of Defocus
title_zh: 散焦的点扩散函数估计
abstract: This Point spread function (PSF) plays a crucial role in many computational imaging applications, such as shape from focus/defocus, depth estimation, and fluorescence microscopy. However, the mathematical model of the defocus process is still unclear. In this work, we develop an alternative method to estimate the precise mathematical model of the point spread function to describe the defocus process. We first derive the mathematical algorithm for the PSF which is used to generate the simulated focused images for different focus depth. Then we compute the loss function of the similarity between the simulated focused images and real focused images where we design a novel and efficient metric based on the defocus histogram to evaluate the difference between the focused images. After we solve the minimum value of the loss function, it means we find the optimal parameters for the PSF. We also construct a hardware system consisting of a focusing system and a structured light system to acquire the all-in-focus image, the focused image with corresponding focus depth, and the depth map in the same view. The three types of images, as a dataset, are used to obtain the precise PSF. Our experiments on standard planes and actual objects show that the proposed algorithm can accurately describe the defocus process. The accuracy of our algorithm is further proved by evaluating the difference among the actual focused images, the focused image generated by our algorithm, the focused image generated by others. The results show that the loss of our algorithm is 40% less than others on average.
summary: This Point spread function (PSF) plays a crucial role in many computational imaging applications, such as shape from focus/defocus, depth estimation, and fluorescence microscopy. However, the mathematical model of the defocus process is still unclear. In this work, we develop an alternative method to estimate the precise mathematical model of the point spread function to describe the defocus process. We first derive the mathematical algorithm for the PSF which is used to generate the simulated focused images for different focus depth. Then we compute the loss function of the similarity between the simulated focused images and real focused images where we design a novel and efficient metric based on the defocus histogram to evaluate the difference between the focused images. After we solve the minimum value of the loss function, it means we find the optimal parameters for the PSF. We also construct a hardware system consisting of a focusing system and a structured light system to acquire the all-in-focus image, the focused image with corresponding focus depth, and the depth map in the same view. The three types of images, as a dataset, are used to obtain the precise PSF. Our experiments on standard planes and actual objects show that the proposed algorithm can accurately describe the defocus process. The accuracy of our algorithm is further proved by evaluating the difference among the actual focused images, the focused image generated by our algorithm, the focused image generated by others. The results show that the loss of our algorithm is 40% less than others on average.
abstract_zh: 该点扩散函数 (PSF) 在许多计算成像应用中发挥着至关重要的作用，例如聚焦/散焦的形状、深度估计和荧光显微镜。然而，散焦过程的数学模型仍不清楚。在这项工作中，我们开发了一种替代方法来估计点扩散函数的精确数学模型，以描述散焦过程。我们首先推导出 PSF 的数学算法，用于生成不同焦深的模拟聚焦图像。然后，我们计算模拟聚焦图像和真实聚焦图像之间相似性的损失函数，其中我们基于散焦直方图设计了一种新颖且有效的度量来评估聚焦图像之间的差异。当我们求解出损失函数的最小值后，就意味着我们找到了PSF的最优参数。我们还构建了由聚焦系统和结构光系统组成的硬件系统，以获取全焦图像、具有相应焦深的聚焦图像以及同一视图中的深度图。这三种类型的图像作为数据集，用于获取精确的PSF。我们在标准平面和实际物体上的实验表明，所提出的算法可以准确地描述散焦过程。通过评估实际聚焦图像、我们算法生成的聚焦图像、其他算法生成的聚焦图像之间的差异，进一步证明了我们算法的准确性。结果表明，我们的算法的损失比其他算法平均减少了 40%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种精确估计失焦过程点扩散函数（PSF）的数学模型的方法，以提升计算成像应用的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有失焦过程的数学模型不明确，导致PSF估计不够精确，影响计算成像任务如深度估计和显微成像的效果。
AI.method: 通过推导PSF数学算法生成不同焦深的模拟图像，设计基于失焦直方图的相似度损失函数，并构建硬件系统获取多类型图像数据集以优化PSF参数。
AI.result: 实验表明，该算法在标准平面和实际物体上的失焦过程描述准确度优于现有方法，平均损失降低40%。
AI.conclusion: 提出的PSF估计方法显著提升了失焦建模的准确性，为计算成像应用提供了更可靠的理论基础。

authors_text: Yuanze Li,Yiwen Guo,Qizhang Li,Hongzhi Zhang,Wangmeng Zuo
title: On Steering Multi-Annotations per Sample for Multi-Task Learning
title_zh: 关于为多任务学习引导每个样本的多注释
abstract: The study of multi-task learning has drawn great attention from the community. Despite the remarkable progress, the challenge of optimally learning different tasks simultaneously remains to be explored. Previous works attempt to modify the gradients from different tasks. Yet these methods give a subjective assumption of the relationship between tasks, and the modified gradient may be less accurate. In this paper, we introduce Stochastic Task Allocation~(STA), a mechanism that addresses this issue by a task allocation approach, in which each sample is randomly allocated a subset of tasks. For further progress, we propose Interleaved Stochastic Task Allocation~(ISTA) to iteratively allocate all tasks to each example during several consecutive iterations. We evaluate STA and ISTA on various datasets and applications: NYUv2, Cityscapes, and COCO for scene understanding and instance segmentation. Our experiments show both STA and ISTA outperform current state-of-the-art methods. The code will be available.
summary: The study of multi-task learning has drawn great attention from the community. Despite the remarkable progress, the challenge of optimally learning different tasks simultaneously remains to be explored. Previous works attempt to modify the gradients from different tasks. Yet these methods give a subjective assumption of the relationship between tasks, and the modified gradient may be less accurate. In this paper, we introduce Stochastic Task Allocation~(STA), a mechanism that addresses this issue by a task allocation approach, in which each sample is randomly allocated a subset of tasks. For further progress, we propose Interleaved Stochastic Task Allocation~(ISTA) to iteratively allocate all tasks to each example during several consecutive iterations. We evaluate STA and ISTA on various datasets and applications: NYUv2, Cityscapes, and COCO for scene understanding and instance segmentation. Our experiments show both STA and ISTA outperform current state-of-the-art methods. The code will be available.
abstract_zh: 多任务学习的研究引起了社会的高度关注。尽管取得了显着的进步，但同时优化学习不同任务的挑战仍有待探索。以前的工作尝试修改不同任务的梯度。然而这些方法给出了任务之间关系的主观假设，并且修改后的梯度可能不太准确。在本文中，我们介绍了随机任务分配（STA），这是一种通过任务分配方法解决此问题的机制，其中每个样本都被随机分配任务子集。为了取得进一步的进展，我们提出了交错随机任务分配（ISTA），以在几次连续迭代期间迭代地将所有任务分配给每个示例。我们在各种数据集和应用程序上评估 STA 和 ISTA：NYUv2、Cityscapes 和 COCO，用于场景理解和实例分割。我们的实验表明 STA 和 ISTA 均优于当前最先进的方法。该代码将可用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Stochastic Task Allocation (STA)和Interleaved Stochastic Task Allocation (ISTA)的机制，通过为每个样本分配任务子集来优化多任务学习中的任务分配问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过主观假设任务间关系修改梯度，导致结果不够准确，因此需要更客观的任务分配策略。
AI.method: STA随机为每个样本分配任务子集，ISTA则通过多轮迭代逐步分配所有任务，从而减少任务间的干扰并提升学习效率。
AI.result: 在NYUv2、Cityscapes和COCO等数据集上，STA和ISTA均优于当前最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的任务分配机制有效解决了多任务学习中任务冲突问题，为后续研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Amit Sofer,Shlomo E. Chazan
title: CNN self-attention voice activity detector
title_zh: CNN 自注意力语音活动检测器
abstract: In this work we present a novel single-channel Voice Activity Detector (VAD) approach. We utilize a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) which exploits the spatial information of the noisy input spectrum to extract frame-wise embedding sequence, followed by a Self Attention (SA) Encoder with a goal of finding contextual information from the embedding sequence. Different from previous works which were employed on each frame (with context frames) separately, our method is capable of processing the entire signal at once, and thus enabling long receptive field. We show that the fusion of CNN and SA architectures outperforms methods based solely on CNN and SA. Extensive experimental-study shows that our model outperforms previous models on real-life benchmarks, and provides State Of The Art (SOTA) results with relatively small and lightweight model.
summary: In this work we present a novel single-channel Voice Activity Detector (VAD) approach. We utilize a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) which exploits the spatial information of the noisy input spectrum to extract frame-wise embedding sequence, followed by a Self Attention (SA) Encoder with a goal of finding contextual information from the embedding sequence. Different from previous works which were employed on each frame (with context frames) separately, our method is capable of processing the entire signal at once, and thus enabling long receptive field. We show that the fusion of CNN and SA architectures outperforms methods based solely on CNN and SA. Extensive experimental-study shows that our model outperforms previous models on real-life benchmarks, and provides State Of The Art (SOTA) results with relatively small and lightweight model.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的单通道语音活动检测器（VAD）方法。我们利用卷积神经网络（CNN），利用噪声输入频谱的空间信息来提取逐帧嵌入序列，然后使用自注意力（SA）编码器，其目标是从嵌入序列中查找上下文信息。与之前分别在每个帧（带有上下文帧）上采用的工作不同，我们的方法能够一次处理整个信号，从而实现长感受野。我们证明了 CNN 和 SA 架构的融合优于仅基于 CNN 和 SA 的方法。广泛的实验研究表明，我们的模型在现实生活基准上优于以前的模型，并以相对较小和轻量级的模型提供了最先进的（SOTA）结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合卷积神经网络（CNN）与自注意力机制（SA）的单通道语音活动检测器（VAD），通过提取噪声输入频谱的空间信息并捕捉上下文关联，实现更高效的语音活动检测。
AI.motivation: 传统VAD方法在处理长时依赖和上下文信息时存在局限，而现有模型或单独使用CNN或SA，难以兼顾局部特征与全局关联，导致性能不足。
AI.method: 采用CNN提取输入频谱的帧级嵌入序列，再通过自注意力编码器整合全局上下文信息，一次性处理完整信号以实现长感受野，区别于逐帧处理的现有方法。
AI.result: 实验表明该模型在真实场景基准测试中优于纯CNN或SA方法，达到SOTA性能，且模型规模较小、计算量低。
AI.conclusion: 融合CNN与SA架构能有效提升VAD性能，兼顾局部特征提取与全局上下文建模，轻量化设计使其适用于实际部署场景。
