ai_content_json.result: 实验表明该模型在真实场景基准测试中优于纯CNN或SA方法，达到SOTA性能，且模型规模较小、计算量低。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 融合CNN与SA架构能有效提升VAD性能，兼顾局部特征提取与全局上下文建模，轻量化设计使其适用于实际部署场景。

tldr: 本文提出一种结合卷积神经网络（CNN）与自注意力机制（SA）的单通道语音活动检测器（VAD），通过提取噪声输入频谱的空间信息并捕捉上下文关联，实现更高效的语音活动检测。
motivation: 传统VAD方法在处理长时依赖和上下文信息时存在局限，而现有模型或单独使用CNN或SA，难以兼顾局部特征与全局关联，导致性能不足。
method: 采用CNN提取输入频谱的帧级嵌入序列，再通过自注意力编码器整合全局上下文信息，一次性处理完整信号以实现长感受野，区别于逐帧处理的现有方法。
result: 实验表明该模型在真实场景基准测试中优于纯CNN或SA方法，达到SOTA性能，且模型规模较小、计算量低。
conclusion: 融合CNN与SA架构能有效提升VAD性能，兼顾局部特征提取与全局上下文建模，轻量化设计使其适用于实际部署场景。
search_text: CNN self-attention voice activity detector CNN 自注意力语音活动检测器 In this work we present a novel single-channel Voice Activity Detector (VAD) approach. We utilize a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) which exploits the spatial information of the noisy input spectrum to extract frame-wise embedding sequence, followed by a Self Attention (SA) Encoder with a goal of finding contextual information from the embedding sequence. Different from previous works which were employed on each frame (with context frames) separately, our method is capable of processing the entire signal at once, and thus enabling long receptive field. We show that the fusion of CNN and SA architectures outperforms methods based solely on CNN and SA. Extensive experimental-study shows that our model outperforms previous models on real-life benchmarks, and provides State Of The Art (SOTA) results with relatively small and lightweight model. 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的单通道语音活动检测器（VAD）方法。我们利用卷积神经网络（CNN），利用噪声输入频谱的空间信息来提取逐帧嵌入序列，然后使用自注意力（SA）编码器，其目标是从嵌入序列中查找上下文信息。与之前分别在每个帧（带有上下文帧）上采用的工作不同，我们的方法能够一次处理整个信号，从而实现长感受野。我们证明了 CNN 和 SA 架构的融合优于仅基于 CNN 和 SA 的方法。广泛的实验研究表明，我们的模型在现实生活基准上优于以前的模型，并以相对较小和轻量级的模型提供了最先进的（SOTA）结果。 本文提出一种结合卷积神经网络（CNN）与自注意力机制（SA）的单通道语音活动检测器（VAD），通过提取噪声输入频谱的空间信息并捕捉上下文关联，实现更高效的语音活动检测。 Amit Sofer,Shlomo E. Chazan cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Lantian Li,Di Wang,Wenqiang Du,Dong Wang
title: C-P Map: A Novel Evaluation Toolkit for Speaker Verification
title_zh: C-P 图：用于说话人验证的新型评估工具包
abstract: Evaluation trials are used to probe performance of automatic speaker verification (ASV) systems. In spite of the clear importance and impact, evaluation trials have not been seriously treated in research and engineering practice. This paper firstly presents a theoretical analysis on evaluation trials and highlights potential bias with the most popular cross-pairing approach used in trials design. To interpret and settle this problem, we define the concept of trial config and C-P map derived from it. The C-P map measures the performance of an ASV system on various trial configs in a 2-dimensional map. On the map, each location represents a particular trial config and its corresponding color represents the system performance. Experiments conducted on representative ASV systems show that the proposed C-P map offers a powerful evaluation toolkit for ASV performance analysis and comparison. The source code for C-P map has been release at https://gitlab.com/csltstu/sunine.
summary: Evaluation trials are used to probe performance of automatic speaker verification (ASV) systems. In spite of the clear importance and impact, evaluation trials have not been seriously treated in research and engineering practice. This paper firstly presents a theoretical analysis on evaluation trials and highlights potential bias with the most popular cross-pairing approach used in trials design. To interpret and settle this problem, we define the concept of trial config and C-P map derived from it. The C-P map measures the performance of an ASV system on various trial configs in a 2-dimensional map. On the map, each location represents a particular trial config and its corresponding color represents the system performance. Experiments conducted on representative ASV systems show that the proposed C-P map offers a powerful evaluation toolkit for ASV performance analysis and comparison. The source code for C-P map has been release at https://gitlab.com/csltstu/sunine.
abstract_zh: 评估试验用于探测自动说话人验证 (ASV) 系统的性能。尽管评估试验具有明显的重要性和影响，但在研究和工程实践中并未得到认真对待。本文首先对评估试验进行了理论分析，并强调了试验设计中最流行的交叉配对方法的潜在偏差。为了解释和解决这个问题，我们定义了试验配置的概念以及由此衍生的C-P图。 C-P 图在二维图中测量 ASV 系统在各种试验配置上的性能。在地图上，每个位置代表一个特定的试用配置，其相应的颜色代表系统性能。在代表性 ASV 系统上进行的实验表明，所提出的 C-P 图为 ASV 性能分析和比较提供了强大的评估工具包。 C-P图的源代码已在https://gitlab.com/csltstu/sunine发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为C-P Map的新评估工具，用于分析和比较自动说话人验证（ASV）系统的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的ASV系统评估方法（如交叉配对）存在潜在偏差，缺乏对不同试验配置下系统性能的系统性分析工具。
AI.method: 通过定义试验配置（trial config）和衍生的C-P地图，将不同配置下的系统性能映射到二维颜色图中，直观展示性能差异。
AI.result: 实验表明，C-P地图能有效分析和比较代表性ASV系统的性能，源代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: C-P地图为ASV系统提供了强大的性能评估工具，有助于发现传统方法的偏差并优化系统设计。

authors_text: Aviad Eisenberg,Sharon Gannot,Shlomo E. Chazan
title: Single microphone speaker extraction using unified time-frequency Siamese-Unet
title_zh: 使用统一时频 Siamese-Unet 提取单麦克风说话人
abstract: In this paper we present a unified time-frequency method for speaker extraction in clean and noisy conditions. Given a mixed signal, along with a reference signal, the common approaches for extracting the desired speaker are either applied in the time-domain or in the frequency-domain. In our approach, we propose a Siamese-Unet architecture that uses both representations. The Siamese encoders are applied in the frequency-domain to infer the embedding of the noisy and reference spectra, respectively. The concatenated representations are then fed into the decoder to estimate the real and imaginary components of the desired speaker, which are then inverse-transformed to the time-domain. The model is trained with the Scale-Invariant Signal-to-Distortion Ratio (SI-SDR) loss to exploit the time-domain information. The time-domain loss is also regularized with frequency-domain loss to preserve the speech patterns. Experimental results demonstrate that the unified approach is not only very easy to train, but also provides superior results as compared with state-of-the-art (SOTA) Blind Source Separation (BSS) methods, as well as commonly used speaker extraction approach.
summary: In this paper we present a unified time-frequency method for speaker extraction in clean and noisy conditions. Given a mixed signal, along with a reference signal, the common approaches for extracting the desired speaker are either applied in the time-domain or in the frequency-domain. In our approach, we propose a Siamese-Unet architecture that uses both representations. The Siamese encoders are applied in the frequency-domain to infer the embedding of the noisy and reference spectra, respectively. The concatenated representations are then fed into the decoder to estimate the real and imaginary components of the desired speaker, which are then inverse-transformed to the time-domain. The model is trained with the Scale-Invariant Signal-to-Distortion Ratio (SI-SDR) loss to exploit the time-domain information. The time-domain loss is also regularized with frequency-domain loss to preserve the speech patterns. Experimental results demonstrate that the unified approach is not only very easy to train, but also provides superior results as compared with state-of-the-art (SOTA) Blind Source Separation (BSS) methods, as well as commonly used speaker extraction approach.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种统一的时频方法，用于在干净和嘈杂的条件下提取说话人。给定混合信号以及参考信号，提取所需说话人的常用方法要么应用于时域，要么应用于频域。在我们的方法中，我们提出了使用两种表示的 Siamese-Unet 架构。连体编码器应用于频域，分别推断噪声频谱和参考频谱的嵌入。然后将级联表示输入解码器以估计所需说话者的实部和虚部，然后将其逆变换到时域。该模型使用尺度不变信号失真比 (SI-SDR) 损失进行训练，以利用时域信息。时域损失也通过频域损失进行正则化，以保留语音模式。实验结果表明，该统一方法不仅非常容易训练，而且与最先进的（SOTA）盲源分离（BSS）方法以及常用的说话人提取方法相比，提供了更好的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种统一的时频域Siamese-Unet架构，用于在干净和嘈杂条件下实现单麦克风说话人提取。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在时域或频域单独处理说话人提取，难以兼顾两者优势。本文旨在通过统一框架融合时频信息以提升性能。
AI.method: 采用Siamese-Unet结构，利用频域编码器提取噪声和参考信号的嵌入表示，拼接后通过解码器估计目标说话人的实部和虚部，再逆变换至时域。训练时结合时域SI-SDR损失与频域正则化。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法训练简单且优于现有盲源分离方法及常用说话人提取技术。
AI.conclusion: 统一时频域框架有效结合了时域信息与频域特征，实现了更优的说话人提取效果。

authors_text: Perla Mayo,Nantheera Anantrasirichai,Thanarat H. Chalidabhongse,Duangdao Palasuwan,Alin Achim
title: Detection of Parasitic Eggs from Microscopy Images and the emergence of a new dataset
title_zh: 从显微镜图像中检测寄生虫卵以及新数据集的出现
abstract: Automatic detection of parasitic eggs in microscopy images has the potential to increase the efficiency of human experts whilst also providing an objective assessment. The time saved by such a process would both help ensure a prompt treatment to patients, and off-load excessive work from experts' shoulders. Advances in deep learning inspired us to exploit successful architectures for detection, adapting them to tackle a different domain. We propose a framework that exploits two such state-of-the-art models. Specifically, we demonstrate results produced by both a Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) and Faster-RCNN, for image enhancement and object detection respectively, on microscopy images of varying quality. The use of these techniques yields encouraging results, though further improvements are still needed for certain egg types whose detection still proves challenging. As a result, a new dataset has been created and made publicly available, providing an even wider range of classes and variability.
summary: Automatic detection of parasitic eggs in microscopy images has the potential to increase the efficiency of human experts whilst also providing an objective assessment. The time saved by such a process would both help ensure a prompt treatment to patients, and off-load excessive work from experts' shoulders. Advances in deep learning inspired us to exploit successful architectures for detection, adapting them to tackle a different domain. We propose a framework that exploits two such state-of-the-art models. Specifically, we demonstrate results produced by both a Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) and Faster-RCNN, for image enhancement and object detection respectively, on microscopy images of varying quality. The use of these techniques yields encouraging results, though further improvements are still needed for certain egg types whose detection still proves challenging. As a result, a new dataset has been created and made publicly available, providing an even wider range of classes and variability.
abstract_zh: 自动检测显微镜图像中的寄生虫卵有可能提高人类专家的效率，同时也提供客观的评估。这一过程节省的时间既有助于确保患者得到及时治疗，又可以减轻专家肩上的过多工作。深度学习的进步启发我们利用成功的检测架构，使其适应不同的领域。我们提出了一个利用两个这样的最先进模型的框架。具体来说，我们展示了生成对抗网络 (GAN) 和 Faster-RCNN 在不同质量的显微镜图像上分别用于图像增强和对象检测所产生的结果。这些技术的使用产生了令人鼓舞的结果，但对于某些鸡蛋类型仍需要进一步改进，其检测仍然具有挑战性。因此，创建了一个新的数据集并公开提供，提供了更广泛的类别和可变性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用深度学习方法自动检测显微镜图像中寄生虫卵的框架，并发布了包含更多类别和变体的新数据集。
AI.motivation: 手动检测寄生虫卵效率低且主观性强，自动检测可提升诊断效率并减轻专家负担，但现有方法在复杂图像中表现不足。
AI.method: 结合生成对抗网络（GAN）进行图像增强和Faster-RCNN目标检测模型，针对不同质量的显微镜图像进行寄生虫卵检测。
AI.result: 检测方法在多数情况下表现良好，但部分虫卵类型仍存在识别困难，因此构建并公开了包含更多类别和多样性的新型数据集。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习方法为寄生虫卵检测提供了可行方案，但需进一步优化模型性能，新数据集将促进相关研究的发展。

search_text: Detection of Parasitic Eggs from Microscopy Images and the emergence of a new dataset 从显微镜图像中检测寄生虫卵以及新数据集的出现 Automatic detection of parasitic eggs in microscopy images has the potential to increase the efficiency of human experts whilst also providing an objective assessment. The time saved by such a process would both help ensure a prompt treatment to patients, and off-load excessive work from experts' shoulders. Advances in deep learning inspired us to exploit successful architectures for detection, adapting them to tackle a different domain. We propose a framework that exploits two such state-of-the-art models. Specifically, we demonstrate results produced by both a Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) and Faster-RCNN, for image enhancement and object detection respectively, on microscopy images of varying quality. The use of these techniques yields encouraging results, though further improvements are still needed for certain egg types whose detection still proves challenging. As a result, a new dataset has been created and made publicly available, providing an even wider range of classes and variability. 自动检测显微镜图像中的寄生虫卵有可能提高人类专家的效率，同时也提供客观的评估。这一过程节省的时间既有助于确保患者得到及时治疗，又可以减轻专家肩上的过多工作。深度学习的进步启发我们利用成功的检测架构，使其适应不同的领域。我们提出了一个利用两个这样的最先进模型的框架。具体来说，我们展示了生成对抗网络 (GAN) 和 Faster-RCNN 在不同质量的显微镜图像上分别用于图像增强和对象检测所产生的结果。这些技术的使用产生了令人鼓舞的结果，但对于某些鸡蛋类型仍需要进一步改进，其检测仍然具有挑战性。因此，创建了一个新的数据集并公开提供，提供了更广泛的类别和可变性。 本文提出了一种利用深度学习方法自动检测显微镜图像中寄生虫卵的框架，并发布了包含更多类别和变体的新数据集。 Perla Mayo,Nantheera Anantrasirichai,Thanarat H. authors_text: Lennart Brocki,Neo Christopher Chung
title: Fidelity of Interpretability Methods and Perturbation Artifacts in Neural Networks
title_zh: 神经网络中可解释性方法和扰动伪影的保真度
abstract: Despite excellent performance of deep neural networks (DNNs) in image classification, detection, and prediction, characterizing how DNNs make a given decision remains an open problem, resulting in a number of interpretability methods. Post-hoc interpretability methods primarily aim to quantify the importance of input features with respect to the class probabilities. However, due to the lack of ground truth and the existence of interpretability methods with diverse operating characteristics, evaluating these methods is a crucial challenge. A popular approach to evaluate interpretability methods is to perturb input features deemed important for a given prediction and observe the decrease in accuracy. However, perturbation itself may introduce artifacts. We propose a method for estimating the impact of such artifacts on the fidelity estimation by utilizing model accuracy curves from perturbing input features according to the Most Import First (MIF) and Least Import First (LIF) orders. Using the ResNet-50 trained on the ImageNet, we demonstrate the proposed fidelity estimation of four popular post-hoc interpretability methods.
summary: Despite excellent performance of deep neural networks (DNNs) in image classification, detection, and prediction, characterizing how DNNs make a given decision remains an open problem, resulting in a number of interpretability methods. Post-hoc interpretability methods primarily aim to quantify the importance of input features with respect to the class probabilities. However, due to the lack of ground truth and the existence of interpretability methods with diverse operating characteristics, evaluating these methods is a crucial challenge. A popular approach to evaluate interpretability methods is to perturb input features deemed important for a given prediction and observe the decrease in accuracy. However, perturbation itself may introduce artifacts. We propose a method for estimating the impact of such artifacts on the fidelity estimation by utilizing model accuracy curves from perturbing input features according to the Most Import First (MIF) and Least Import First (LIF) orders. Using the ResNet-50 trained on the ImageNet, we demonstrate the proposed fidelity estimation of four popular post-hoc interpretability methods.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度神经网络 (DNN) 在图像分类、检测和预测方面表现出色，但表征 DNN 如何做出给定决策仍然是一个悬而未决的问题，从而产生了许多可解释性方法。事后可解释性方法主要旨在量化输入特征相对于类概率的重要性。然而，由于缺乏基本事实以及具有不同操作特征的可解释方法的存在，评估这些方法是一个至关重要的挑战。评估可解释性方法的一种流行方法是扰乱对于给定预测而言重要的输入特征并观察准确性的下降。然而，扰动本身可能会引入伪影。我们提出了一种方法，根据最重要的优先（MIF）和最不重要的优先（LIF）顺序，利用来自扰动输入特征的模型精度曲线来估计此类伪影对保真度估计的影响。使用在 ImageNet 上训练的 ResNet-50，我们演示了四种流行的事后可解释性方法的保真度估计。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究神经网络中可解释性方法的保真度及扰动伪影的影响，提出通过分析扰动特征的模型准确率曲线来评估解释方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络的决策过程难以解释，现有可解释性方法缺乏统一的评估标准，而扰动重要特征的评估方法可能引入伪影，影响结果可靠性。
AI.method: 利用Most Import First (MIF)和Least Import First (LIF)两种扰动顺序生成特征扰动曲线，通过分析ResNet-50模型在ImageNet数据集上的准确率变化，量化扰动伪影对保真度估计的影响。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上验证了四种主流可解释性方法的保真度估计，揭示了扰动伪影对评估结果的显著影响。
AI.conclusion: 扰动伪影会显著影响可解释性方法的保真度评估，建议在评估时需结合不同扰动顺序的特征分析以减少偏差。

authors_text: Armin Moin,Ukrit Wattanavaekin,Alexandra Lungu,Stephan Rössler,Stephan Günnemann
title: Automated Machine Learning: A Case Study on Non-Intrusive Appliance Load Monitoring
title_zh: 自动化机器学习：非侵入式设备负载监控案例研究
comment: ITNG 2025 - To be published by Springer
comments: ITNG 2025 - To be published by Springer
abstract: We propose a novel approach to enable Automated Machine Learning (AutoML) for Non-Intrusive Appliance Load Monitoring (NIALM), also known as Energy Disaggregation, through Bayesian Optimization. NIALM offers a cost-effective alternative to smart meters for measuring the energy consumption of electric devices and appliances. NIALM methods analyze the entire power consumption signal of a household and predict the type of appliances as well as their individual power consumption (i.e., their contributions to the aggregated signal). We enable NIALM domain experts and practitioners who typically have no deep data analytics or Machine Learning (ML) skills to benefit from state-of-the-art ML approaches to NIALM. Further, we conduct a survey and benchmarking of the state of the art and show that in many cases, simple and basic ML models and algorithms, such as Decision Trees, outperform the state of the art. Finally, we present our open-source tool, AutoML4NIALM, which will facilitate the exploitation of existing methods for NIALM in the industry.
summary: We propose a novel approach to enable Automated Machine Learning (AutoML) for Non-Intrusive Appliance Load Monitoring (NIALM), also known as Energy Disaggregation, through Bayesian Optimization. NIALM offers a cost-effective alternative to smart meters for measuring the energy consumption of electric devices and appliances. NIALM methods analyze the entire power consumption signal of a household and predict the type of appliances as well as their individual power consumption (i.e., their contributions to the aggregated signal). We enable NIALM domain experts and practitioners who typically have no deep data analytics or Machine Learning (ML) skills to benefit from state-of-the-art ML approaches to NIALM. Further, we conduct a survey and benchmarking of the state of the art and show that in many cases, simple and basic ML models and algorithms, such as Decision Trees, outperform the state of the art. Finally, we present our open-source tool, AutoML4NIALM, which will facilitate the exploitation of existing methods for NIALM in the industry.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的方法，通过贝叶斯优化实现自动机器学习 (AutoML) 用于非侵入式设备负载监控 (NIALM)，也称为能源分解。 NIALM 提供了一种经济高效的智能电表替代方案，用于测量电子设备和电器的能耗。 NIALM 方法分析家庭的整个功耗信号，并预测电器的类型及其各自的功耗（即它们对聚合信号的贡献）。我们使通常没有深入数据分析或机器学习 (ML) 技能的 NIALM 领域专家和从业者能够从最先进的 NIALM ML 方法中受益。此外，我们对最先进的技术进行了调查和基准测试，结果表明，在许多情况下，简单和基本的机器学习模型和算法（例如决策树）的性能优于最先进的技术。最后，我们展示了我们的开源工具 AutoML4NIALM，它将促进业界现有 NIALM 方法的开发。

AI.tldr: 提出基于贝叶斯优化的自动化机器学习方法，用于非侵入式电器负载监测，并开发开源工具AutoML4NIALM。
AI.motivation: NIALM作为智能电表的低成本替代方案，需让无ML技能的专家也能使用先进方法，且现有复杂模型未必优于简单模型。
AI.method: 通过贝叶斯优化实现AutoML，结合对现有方法的调研与基准测试，比较不同模型性能。
AI.result: 发现简单模型（如决策树）在多数情况下优于复杂模型，并发布开源工具AutoML4NIALM。
AI.conclusion: AutoML工具可提升NIALM应用，且简单模型在实际中可能更优。

search_text: Automated Machine Learning: A Case Study on Non-Intrusive Appliance Load Monitoring 自动化机器学习：非侵入式设备负载监控案例研究 We propose a novel approach to enable Automated Machine Learning (AutoML) for Non-Intrusive Appliance Load Monitoring (NIALM), also known as Energy Disaggregation, through Bayesian Optimization. NIALM offers a cost-effective alternative to smart meters for measuring the energy consumption of electric devices and appliances. NIALM methods analyze the entire power consumption signal of a household and predict the type of appliances as well as their individual power consumption (i.e., their contributions to the aggregated signal). We enable NIALM domain experts and practitioners who typically have no deep data analytics or Machine Learning (ML) skills to benefit from state-of-the-art ML approaches to NIALM. Further, we conduct a survey and benchmarking of the state of the art and show that in many cases, simple and basic ML models and algorithms, such as Decision Trees, outperform the state of the art. Finally, we present our open-source tool, AutoML4NIALM, which will facilitate the exploitation of existing methods for NIALM in the industry. 我们提出了一种新颖的方法，通过贝叶斯优化实现自动机器学习 (AutoML) 用于非侵入式设备负载监控 (NIALM)，也称为能源分解。 NIALM 提供了一种经济高效的智能电表替代方案，用于测量电子设备和电器的能耗。 NIALM 方法分析家庭的整个功耗信号，并预测电器的类型及其各自的功耗（即它们对聚合信号的贡献）。我们使通常没有深入数据分析或机器学习 (ML) 技能的 NIALM 领域专家和从业者能够从最先进的 NIALM ML 方法中受益。此外，我们对最先进的技术进行了调查和基准测试，结果表明，在许多情况下，简单和基本的机器学习模型和算法（例如决策树）的性能优于最先进的技术。最后，我们展示了我们的开源工具 AutoML4NIALM，它将促进业界现有 NIALM 方法的开发。 提出基于贝叶斯优化的自动化机器学习方法，用于非侵入式电器负载监测，并开发开源工具AutoML4NIALM。 Armin Moin,Ukrit Wattanavaekin,Alexandra Lungu,Stephan Rössler,Stephan Günnemann cs.SE,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Linjiang Huang,Liang Wang,Hongsheng Li
title: Weakly Supervised Temporal Action Localization via Representative Snippet Knowledge Propagation
title_zh: 通过代表性片段知识传播进行弱监督时间动作本地化
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2022. Code is available at https://github.com/LeonHLJ/RSKP
comments: Accepted by CVPR 2022. Code is available at https://github.com/LeonHLJ/RSKP
abstract: Weakly supervised temporal action localization aims to localize temporal boundaries of actions and simultaneously identify their categories with only video-level category labels. Many existing methods seek to generate pseudo labels for bridging the discrepancy between classification and localization, but usually only make use of limited contextual information for pseudo label generation. To alleviate this problem, we propose a representative snippet summarization and propagation framework. Our method seeks to mine the representative snippets in each video for propagating information between video snippets to generate better pseudo labels. For each video, its own representative snippets and the representative snippets from a memory bank are propagated to update the input features in an intra- and inter-video manner. The pseudo labels are generated from the temporal class activation maps of the updated features to rectify the predictions of the main branch. Our method obtains superior performance in comparison to the existing methods on two benchmarks, THUMOS14 and ActivityNet1.3, achieving gains as high as 1.2% in terms of average mAP on THUMOS14.
summary: Weakly supervised temporal action localization aims to localize temporal boundaries of actions and simultaneously identify their categories with only video-level category labels. Many existing methods seek to generate pseudo labels for bridging the discrepancy between classification and localization, but usually only make use of limited contextual information for pseudo label generation. To alleviate this problem, we propose a representative snippet summarization and propagation framework. Our method seeks to mine the representative snippets in each video for propagating information between video snippets to generate better pseudo labels. For each video, its own representative snippets and the representative snippets from a memory bank are propagated to update the input features in an intra- and inter-video manner. The pseudo labels are generated from the temporal class activation maps of the updated features to rectify the predictions of the main branch. Our method obtains superior performance in comparison to the existing methods on two benchmarks, THUMOS14 and ActivityNet1.3, achieving gains as high as 1.2% in terms of average mAP on THUMOS14.
abstract_zh: 弱监督时间动作定位旨在定位动作的时间边界，并同时仅使用视频级类别标签来识别其类别。许多现有方法试图生成伪标签来弥合分类和定位之间的差异，但通常仅利用有限的上下文信息来生成伪标签。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一个代表性的片段摘要和传播框架。我们的方法旨在挖掘每个视频中的代表性片段，以便在视频片段之间传播信息，从而生成更好的伪标签。对于每个视频，其自身的代表性片段和来自存储体的代表性片段被传播以以视频内和视频间的方式更新输入特征。伪标签是根据更新特征的时间类激活图生成的，以纠正主分支的预测。与现有方法相比，我们的方法在两个基准测试（THUMOS14 和 ActivityNet1.3）上获得了优越的性能，在 THUMOS14 上的平均 mAP 方面实现了高达 1.2% 的增益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督时间动作定位方法，通过代表性片段知识传播实现动作时间边界定位与分类。
AI.motivation: 现有方法生成伪标签时仅利用有限上下文信息，导致定位精度不足，需通过更有效的知识传播机制提升伪标签质量。
AI.method: 构建代表性片段总结与传播框架，从视频自身及记忆库中挖掘代表性片段，通过内外视频信息传播更新特征并生成伪标签。
AI.result: 在THUMOS14和ActivityNet1.3基准测试中，平均mAP分别提升1.2%和保持领先，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过跨视频知识传播增强伪标签生成，有效提升弱监督条件下动作定位与分类性能。

authors_text: Huanyu Zhou,Qingjie Liu,Yunhong Wang
title: PanFormer: a Transformer Based Model for Pan-sharpening
title_zh: PanFormer：基于 Transformer 的全色锐化模型
abstract: Pan-sharpening aims at producing a high-resolution (HR) multi-spectral (MS) image from a low-resolution (LR) multi-spectral (MS) image and its corresponding panchromatic (PAN) image acquired by a same satellite. Inspired by a new fashion in recent deep learning community, we propose a novel Transformer based model for pan-sharpening. We explore the potential of Transformer in image feature extraction and fusion. Following the successful development of vision transformers, we design a two-stream network with the self-attention to extract the modality-specific features from the PAN and MS modalities and apply a cross-attention module to merge the spectral and spatial features. The pan-sharpened image is produced from the enhanced fused features. Extensive experiments on GaoFen-2 and WorldView-3 images demonstrate that our Transformer based model achieves impressive results and outperforms many existing CNN based methods, which shows the great potential of introducing Transformer to the pan-sharpening task. Codes are available at https://github.com/zhysora/PanFormer.
summary: Pan-sharpening aims at producing a high-resolution (HR) multi-spectral (MS) image from a low-resolution (LR) multi-spectral (MS) image and its corresponding panchromatic (PAN) image acquired by a same satellite. Inspired by a new fashion in recent deep learning community, we propose a novel Transformer based model for pan-sharpening. We explore the potential of Transformer in image feature extraction and fusion. Following the successful development of vision transformers, we design a two-stream network with the self-attention to extract the modality-specific features from the PAN and MS modalities and apply a cross-attention module to merge the spectral and spatial features. The pan-sharpened image is produced from the enhanced fused features. Extensive experiments on GaoFen-2 and WorldView-3 images demonstrate that our Transformer based model achieves impressive results and outperforms many existing CNN based methods, which shows the great potential of introducing Transformer to the pan-sharpening task. Codes are available at https://github.com/zhysora/PanFormer.
abstract_zh: 全色锐化旨在根据同一卫星获取的低分辨率（LR）多光谱（MS）图像及其相应的全色（PAN）图像生成高分辨率（HR）多光谱（MS）图像。受到最近深度学习社区新时尚的启发，我们提出了一种基于 Transformer 的新颖全色锐化模型。我们探索 Transformer 在图像特征提取和融合方面的潜力。在成功开发视觉变压器之后，我们设计了一个具有自注意力的双流网络，从 PAN 和 MS 模态中提取模态特定特征，并应用交叉注意力模块来合并光谱和空间特征。全色锐化图像是由增强的融合特征生成的。在GaoFen-2和WorldView-3图像上的大量实验表明，我们基于Transformer的模型取得了令人印象深刻的结果，并且优于许多现有的基于CNN的方法，这表明将Transformer引入全色锐化任务的巨大潜力。代码可在 https://github.com/zhysora/PanFormer 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的PanFormer模型，用于通过融合低分辨率多光谱图像和对应的全色图像，生成高分辨率多光谱图像。
AI.motivation: 受Transformer在深度学习领域成功应用的启发，探索其在图像特征提取与融合中的潜力，以改进传统CNN方法在 pansharpening 任务中的表现。
AI.method: 设计双流网络，利用自注意力机制分别提取全色（PAN）和多光谱（MS）模态的特征，并通过交叉注意力模块融合光谱与空间特征，最终生成增强的融合图像。
AI.result: 在GaoFen-2和WorldView-3数据集上的实验表明，PanFormer模型显著优于现有CNN方法，验证了Transformer在pansharpening任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 引入Transformer架构为pansharpening任务提供了新思路，PanFormer的优异性能证明了其在该领域的应用潜力。

authors_text: Pengze Zhang,Lingxiao Yang,Jianhuang Lai,Xiaohua Xie
title: Exploring Dual-task Correlation for Pose Guided Person Image Generation
title_zh: 探索姿势引导人物图像生成的双任务关联
abstract: Pose Guided Person Image Generation (PGPIG) is the task of transforming a person image from the source pose to a given target pose. Most of the existing methods only focus on the ill-posed source-to-target task and fail to capture reasonable texture mapping. To address this problem, we propose a novel Dual-task Pose Transformer Network (DPTN), which introduces an auxiliary task (i.e., source-to-source task) and exploits the dual-task correlation to promote the performance of PGPIG. The DPTN is of a Siamese structure, containing a source-to-source self-reconstruction branch, and a transformation branch for source-to-target generation. By sharing partial weights between them, the knowledge learned by the source-to-source task can effectively assist the source-to-target learning. Furthermore, we bridge the two branches with a proposed Pose Transformer Module (PTM) to adaptively explore the correlation between features from dual tasks. Such correlation can establish the fine-grained mapping of all the pixels between the sources and the targets, and promote the source texture transmission to enhance the details of the generated target images. Extensive experiments show that our DPTN outperforms state-of-the-arts in terms of both PSNR and LPIPS. In addition, our DPTN only contains 9.79 million parameters, which is significantly smaller than other approaches. Our code is available at: https://github.com/PangzeCheung/Dual-task-Pose-Transformer-Network.

Most of the existing methods only focus on the ill-posed source-to-target task and fail to capture reasonable texture mapping. To address this problem, we propose a novel Dual-task Pose Transformer Network (DPTN), which introduces an auxiliary task (i.e., source-to-source task) and exploits the dual-task correlation to promote the performance of PGPIG. The DPTN is of a Siamese structure, containing a source-to-source self-reconstruction branch, and a transformation branch for source-to-target generation. By sharing partial weights between them, the knowledge learned by the source-to-source task can effectively assist the source-to-target learning. Furthermore, we bridge the two branches with a proposed Pose Transformer Module (PTM) to adaptively explore the correlation between features from dual tasks. Such correlation can establish the fine-grained mapping of all the pixels between the sources and the targets, and promote the source texture transmission to enhance the details of the generated target images. Extensive experiments show that our DPTN outperforms state-of-the-arts in terms of both PSNR and LPIPS. In addition, our DPTN only contains 9.79 million parameters, which is significantly smaller than other approaches. Our code is available at: https://github.com/PangzeCheung/Dual-task-Pose-Transformer-Network.
abstract_zh: 姿势引导人物图像生成（PGPIG）是将人物图像从源姿势转换为给定目标姿势的任务。大多数现有方法仅关注不适定的源到目标任务，无法捕获合理的纹理映射。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的双任务姿态变换网络（DPTN），它引入了辅助任务（即源到源任务）并利用双任务相关性来提高 PGPIG 的性能。 DPTN是Siamese结构，包含源到源的自重建分支和源到目标生成的转换分支。通过在它们之间共享部分权重，源到源任务学到的知识可以有效地辅助源到目标的学习。此外，我们用提出的姿势变换器模块（PTM）桥接两个分支，以自适应地探索双重任务特征之间的相关性。这种相关性可以建立源和目标之间所有像素的细粒度映射，并促进源纹理传输以增强生成的目标图像的细节。大量实验表明，我们的 DPTN 在 PSNR 和 LPIPS 方面均优于最先进的技术。此外，我们的 DPTN 仅包含 979 万个参数，明显小于其他方法。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/PangzeCheung/Dual-task-Pose-Transformer-Network。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于双任务关联的新型网络DPTN，用于解决姿态引导的人体图像生成任务中的纹理映射问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅关注源姿态到目标姿态的转换任务，未能有效捕捉合理的纹理映射，导致生成图像细节不足。
AI.method: 设计了具有Siamese结构的DPTN网络，包含源姿态自重建分支和源-目标转换分支，通过共享权重及提出的姿态变换模块（PTM）挖掘双任务特征关联，实现细粒度像素级映射。
AI.result: 在PSNR和LPIPS指标上优于现有方法，且参数量仅为979万，显著小于其他方法。
AI.conclusion: 双任务关联机制有效提升了纹理传递效果，生成图像细节更丰富，且模型轻量化优势明显。

search_text: Exploring Dual-task Correlation for Pose Guided Person Image Generation 探索姿势引导人物图像生成的双任务关联 Pose Guided Person Image Generation (PGPIG) is the task of transforming a person image from the source pose to a given target pose. Most of the existing methods only focus on the ill-posed source-to-target task and fail to capture reasonable texture mapping. To address this problem, we propose a novel Dual-task Pose Transformer Network (DPTN), which introduces an auxiliary task (i.e., source-to-source task) and exploits the dual-task correlation to promote the performance of PGPIG. The DPTN is of a Siamese structure, containing a source-to-source self-reconstruction branch, and a transformation branch for source-to-target generation. By sharing partial weights between them, the knowledge learned by the source-to-source task can effectively assist the source-to-target learning. Furthermore, we bridge the two branches with a proposed Pose Transformer Module (PTM) to adaptively explore the correlation between features from dual tasks. Such correlation can establish the fine-grained mapping of all the pixels between the sources and the targets, and promote the source texture transmission to enhance the details of the generated target images. Extensive experiments show that our DPTN outperforms state-of-the-arts in terms of both PSNR and LPIPS. In addition, our DPTN only contains 9.79 million parameters, which is significantly smaller than other approaches. Our code is available at: https://github.com/PangzeCheung/Dual-task-Pose-Transformer-Network. 姿势引导人物图像生成（PGPIG）是将人物图像从源姿势转换为给定目标姿势的任务。大多数现有方法仅关注不适定的源到目标任务，无法捕获合理的纹理映射。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的双任务姿态变换网络（DPTN），它引入了辅助任务（即源到源任务）并利用双任务相关性来提高 PGPIG 的性能。 DPTN是Siamese结构，包含源到源的自重建分支和源到目标生成的转换分支。通过在它们之间共享部分权重，源到源任务学到的知识可以有效地辅助源到目标的学习。此外，我们用提出的姿势变换器模块（PTM）桥接两个分支，以自适应地探索双重任务特征之间的相关性。这种相关性可以建立源和目标之间所有像素的细粒度映射，并促进源纹理传输以增强生成的目标图像的细节。大量实验表明，我们的 DPTN 在 PSNR 和 LPIPS 方面均优于最先进的技术。此外，我们的 DPTN 仅包含 979 万个参数，明显小于其他方法。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/PangzeCheung/Dual-task-Pose-Transformer-Network。 本文提出了一种基于双任务关联的新型网络DPTN，用于解决姿态引导的人体图像生成任务中的纹理映射问题。 Pengze Zhang,Lingxiao Yang,Jianhuang Lai,Xiaohua Xie cs.CV

authors_text: Qi Chen,Lingxiao Yang,Jianhuang Lai,Xiaohua Xie
title: Self-supervised Image-specific Prototype Exploration for Weakly Supervised Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于弱监督语义分割的自监督图像特定原型探索
abstract: Weakly Supervised Semantic Segmentation (WSSS) based on image-level labels has attracted much attention due to low annotation costs. Existing methods often rely on Class Activation Mapping (CAM) that measures the correlation between image pixels and classifier weight. However, the classifier focuses only on the discriminative regions while ignoring other useful information in each image, resulting in incomplete localization maps. To address this issue, we propose a Self-supervised Image-specific Prototype Exploration (SIPE) that consists of an Image-specific Prototype Exploration (IPE) and a General-Specific Consistency (GSC) loss. Specifically, IPE tailors prototypes for every image to capture complete regions, formed our Image-Specific CAM (IS-CAM), which is realized by two sequential steps. In addition, GSC is proposed to construct the consistency of general CAM and our specific IS-CAM, which further optimizes the feature representation and empowers a self-correction ability of prototype exploration. Extensive experiments are conducted on PASCAL VOC 2012 and MS COCO 2014 segmentation benchmark and results show our SIPE achieves new state-of-the-art performance using only image-level labels. The code is available at https://github.com/chenqi1126/SIPE.
summary: Weakly Supervised Semantic Segmentation (WSSS) based on image-level labels has attracted much attention due to low annotation costs. Existing methods often rely on Class Activation Mapping (CAM) that measures the correlation between image pixels and classifier weight. However, the classifier focuses only on the discriminative regions while ignoring other useful information in each image, resulting in incomplete localization maps. To address this issue, we propose a Self-supervised Image-specific Prototype Exploration (SIPE) that consists of an Image-specific Prototype Exploration (IPE) and a General-Specific Consistency (GSC) loss. Specifically, IPE tailors prototypes for every image to capture complete regions, formed our Image-Specific CAM (IS-CAM), which is realized by two sequential steps. In addition, GSC is proposed to construct the consistency of general CAM and our specific IS-CAM, which further optimizes the feature representation and empowers a self-correction ability of prototype exploration. Extensive experiments are conducted on PASCAL VOC 2012 and MS COCO 2014 segmentation benchmark and results show our SIPE achieves new state-of-the-art performance using only image-level labels. The code is available at https://github.com/chenqi1126/SIPE.
abstract_zh: 基于图像级标签的弱监督语义分割（WSSS）由于注释成本低而备受关注。现有方法通常依赖于类激活映射（CAM）来测量图像像素和分类器权重之间的相关性。然而，分类器仅关注判别区域，而忽略每个图像中的其他有用信息，导致定位图不完整。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种自监督的图像特定原型探索（SIPE），它由图像特定原型探索（IPE）和一般特定一致性（GSC）损失组成。具体来说，IPE 为每个图像定制原型以捕获完整区域，形成我们的图像特定 CAM (IS-CAM)，这是通过两个连续步骤实现的。此外，GSC被提出来构建通用CAM和我们特定的IS-CAM的一致性，这进一步优化了特征表示并赋予了原型探索的自我校正能力。在 PASCAL VOC 2012 和 MS COCO 2014 分割基准上进行了大量实验，结果表明我们的 SIPE 仅使用图像级标签就实现了新的最先进的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/chenqi1126/SIPE 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自监督图像特定原型探索（SIPE）的弱监督语义分割方法，旨在通过图像级标签实现更精确的分割。
AI.motivation: 现有弱监督语义分割方法依赖类别激活映射（CAM），但仅关注判别区域而忽略其他有用信息，导致定位图不完整。
AI.method: SIPE包含图像特定原型探索（IPE）和通用-特定一致性（GSC）损失，通过生成图像特定CAM（IS-CAM）并构建一致性约束优化特征表示。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC 2012和MS COCO 2014数据集上，仅使用图像级标签即达到当时最先进的分割性能。
AI.conclusion: SIPE通过图像特定原型探索与一致性约束，有效解决了弱监督分割中定位不完整的问题，为后续研究提供了新思路。

Existing methods often rely on Class Activation Mapping (CAM) that measures the correlation between image pixels and classifier weight. However, the classifier focuses only on the discriminative regions while ignoring other useful information in each image, resulting in incomplete localization maps. To address this issue, we propose a Self-supervised Image-specific Prototype Exploration (SIPE) that consists of an Image-specific Prototype Exploration (IPE) and a General-Specific Consistency (GSC) loss. Specifically, IPE tailors prototypes for every image to capture complete regions, formed our Image-Specific CAM (IS-CAM), which is realized by two sequential steps. In addition, GSC is proposed to construct the consistency of general CAM and our specific IS-CAM, which further optimizes the feature representation and empowers a self-correction ability of prototype exploration. Extensive experiments are conducted on PASCAL VOC 2012 and MS COCO 2014 segmentation benchmark and results show our SIPE achieves new state-of-the-art performance using only image-level labels. authors_text: Sifan Song,Jinfeng Wang,Fengrui Cheng,Qirui Cao,Yihan Zuo,Yongteng Lei,Ruomai Yang,Chunxiao Yang,Frans Coenen,Jia Meng,Kang Dang,Jionglong Su
title: A Robust Framework of Chromosome Straightening with ViT-Patch GAN
title_zh: 使用 ViT-Patch GAN 进行染色体矫正的稳健框架
abstract: Chromosomes carry the genetic information of humans. They exhibit non-rigid and non-articulated nature with varying degrees of curvature. Chromosome straightening is an important step for subsequent karyotype construction, pathological diagnosis and cytogenetic map development. However, robust chromosome straightening remains challenging, due to the unavailability of training images, distorted chromosome details and shapes after straightening, as well as poor generalization capability. In this paper, we propose a novel architecture, ViT-Patch GAN, consisting of a self-learned motion transformation generator and a Vision Transformer-based patch (ViT-Patch) discriminator. The generator learns the motion representation of chromosomes for straightening. With the help of the ViT-Patch discriminator, the straightened chromosomes retain more shape and banding pattern details. The experimental results show that the proposed method achieves better performance on Fréchet Inception Distance (FID), Learned Perceptual Image Patch Similarity (LPIPS) and downstream chromosome classification accuracy, and shows excellent generalization capability on a large dataset.
summary: Chromosomes carry the genetic information of humans. They exhibit non-rigid and non-articulated nature with varying degrees of curvature. Chromosome straightening is an important step for subsequent karyotype construction, pathological diagnosis and cytogenetic map development. However, robust chromosome straightening remains challenging, due to the unavailability of training images, distorted chromosome details and shapes after straightening, as well as poor generalization capability. In this paper, we propose a novel architecture, ViT-Patch GAN, consisting of a self-learned motion transformation generator and a Vision Transformer-based patch (ViT-Patch) discriminator. The generator learns the motion representation of chromosomes for straightening. With the help of the ViT-Patch discriminator, the straightened chromosomes retain more shape and banding pattern details. The experimental results show that the proposed method achieves better performance on Fréchet Inception Distance (FID), Learned Perceptual Image Patch Similarity (LPIPS) and downstream chromosome classification accuracy, and shows excellent generalization capability on a large dataset.
abstract_zh: 染色体携带着人类的遗传信息。它们表现出具有不同程度曲率的非刚性和非铰接性质。染色体拉直是后续核型构建、病理诊断和细胞遗传学图谱绘制的重要步骤。然而，由于训练图像的不可用、拉直后染色体细节和形状的扭曲以及泛化能力差，鲁棒的染色体拉直仍然具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的架构 ViT-Patch GAN，由自学习运动变换生成器和基于视觉 Transformer 的补丁（ViT-Patch）鉴别器组成。生成器学习染色体的运动表示以进行拉直。在 ViT-Patch 鉴别器的帮助下，拉直的染色体保留了更多的形状和带状图案细节。实验结果表明，该方法在Fréchet起始距离（FID）、学习感知图像块相似度（LPIPS）和下游染色体分类精度上取得了较好的性能，并在大数据集上表现出优异的泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于ViT-Patch GAN的染色体拉直框架，用于解决染色体形态非刚性和拉直后细节丢失的问题，以提升后续染色体分类和分析的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有染色体拉直方法面临训练数据不足、拉直后形态失真及泛化能力差等挑战，需开发一种能保留染色体带纹细节且具有良好泛化能力的鲁棒框架。
AI.method: 设计包含自学习运动变换生成器和基于视觉Transformer的补丁（ViT-Patch）判别器的ViT-Patch GAN架构，生成器学习染色体运动表示实现拉直，判别器通过补丁级特征保留形态和带纹细节。
AI.result: 在FID、LPIPS指标及下游分类任务中均优于现有方法，且在大规模数据集上展现出优秀的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: ViT-Patch GAN通过生成器与判别器的协同优化，有效解决了染色体拉直中的形态保真与泛化问题，为染色体分析提供了更可靠的技术支持。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于ViT-Patch GAN的染色体拉直框架，用于解决染色体形态非刚性和拉直后细节丢失的问题，以提升后续染色体分类和分析的准确性。
ai_content.motivation: 现有染色体拉直方法面临训练数据不足、拉直后形态失真及泛化能力差等挑战，需开发一种能保留染色体带纹细节且具有良好泛化能力的鲁棒框架。
ai_content.method: 设计包含自学习运动变换生成器和基于视觉Transformer的补丁（ViT-Patch）判别器的ViT-Patch GAN架构，生成器学习染色体运动表示实现拉直，判别器通过补丁级特征保留形态和带纹细节。
ai_content.result: 在FID、LPIPS指标及下游分类任务中均优于现有方法，且在大规模数据集上展现出优秀的泛化能力。
ai_content.conclusion: ViT-Patch GAN通过生成器与判别器的协同优化，有效解决了染色体拉直中的形态保真与泛化问题，为染色体分析提供了更可靠的技术支持。

search_text: A Robust Framework of Chromosome Straightening with ViT-Patch GAN 使用 ViT-Patch GAN 进行染色体矫正的稳健框架 Chromosomes carry the genetic information of humans. They exhibit non-rigid and non-articulated nature with varying degrees of curvature. Chromosome straightening is an important step for subsequent karyotype construction, pathological diagnosis and cytogenetic map development. However, robust chromosome straightening remains challenging, due to the unavailability of training images, distorted chromosome details and shapes after straightening, as well as poor generalization capability. In this paper, we propose a novel architecture, ViT-Patch GAN, consisting of a self-learned motion transformation generator and a Vision Transformer-based patch (ViT-Patch) discriminator. The generator learns the motion representation of chromosomes for straightening. With the help of the ViT-Patch discriminator, the straightened chromosomes retain more shape and banding pattern details. The experimental results show that the proposed method achieves better performance on Fréchet Inception Distance (FID), Learned Perceptual Image Patch Similarity (LPIPS) and downstream chromosome classification accuracy, and shows excellent generalization capability on a large dataset. 染色体携带着人类的遗传信息。它们表现出具有不同程度曲率的非刚性和非铰接性质。染色体拉直是后续核型构建、病理诊断和细胞遗传学图谱绘制的重要步骤。然而，由于训练图像的不可用、拉直后染色体细节和形状的扭曲以及泛化能力差，鲁棒的染色体拉直仍然具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的架构 ViT-Patch GAN，由自学习运动变换生成器和基于视觉 Transformer 的补丁（ViT-Patch）鉴别器组成。生成器学习染色体的运动表示以进行拉直。在 ViT-Patch 鉴别器的帮助下，拉直的染色体保留了更多的形状和带状图案细节。实验结果表明，该方法在Fréchet起始距离（FID）、学习感知图像块相似度（LPIPS）和下游染色体分类精度上取得了较好的性能，并在大数据集上表现出优异的泛化能力。 本文提出了一种基于ViT-Patch GAN的染色体拉直框架，用于解决染色体形态非刚性和拉直后细节丢失的问题，以提升后续染色体分类和分析的准确性。 Sifan Song,Jinfeng Wang,Fengrui Cheng,Qirui Cao,Yihan Zuo,Yongteng Lei,Ruomai Yang,Chunxiao Yang,Frans Coenen,Jia Meng,Kang Dang,Jionglong Su cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Donghan Xie,Zhi Wang,Chunlin Chen,Daoyi Dong
title: Depthwise Convolution for Multi-Agent Communication with Enhanced Mean-Field Approximation
title_zh: 具有增强平均场近似的多智能体通信深度卷积
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks, 2022, DOI: 10.1109/TNNLS.2022.3230701
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks, 2022, DOI: 10.1109/TNNLS.2022.3230701
abstract: Multi-agent settings remain a fundamental challenge in the reinforcement learning (RL) domain due to the partial observability and the lack of accurate real-time interactions across agents. In this paper, we propose a new method based on local communication learning to tackle the multi-agent RL (MARL) challenge within a large number of agents coexisting. First, we design a new communication protocol that exploits the ability of depthwise convolution to efficiently extract local relations and learn local communication between neighboring agents. To facilitate multi-agent coordination, we explicitly learn the effect of joint actions by taking the policies of neighboring agents as inputs. Second, we introduce the mean-field approximation into our method to reduce the scale of agent interactions. To more effectively coordinate behaviors of neighboring agents, we enhance the mean-field approximation by a supervised policy rectification network (PRN) for rectifying real-time agent interactions and by a learnable compensation term for correcting the approximation bias. The proposed method enables efficient coordination as well as outperforms several baseline approaches on the adaptive traffic signal control (ATSC) task and the StarCraft II multi-agent challenge (SMAC).
summary: Multi-agent settings remain a fundamental challenge in the reinforcement learning (RL) domain due to the partial observability and the lack of accurate real-time interactions across agents. In this paper, we propose a new method based on local communication learning to tackle the multi-agent RL (MARL) challenge within a large number of agents coexisting. First, we design a new communication protocol that exploits the ability of depthwise convolution to efficiently extract local relations and learn local communication between neighboring agents. To facilitate multi-agent coordination, we explicitly learn the effect of joint actions by taking the policies of neighboring agents as inputs. Second, we introduce the mean-field approximation into our method to reduce the scale of agent interactions. To more effectively coordinate behaviors of neighboring agents, we enhance the mean-field approximation by a supervised policy rectification network (PRN) for rectifying real-time agent interactions and by a learnable compensation term for correcting the approximation bias. The proposed method enables efficient coordination as well as outperforms several baseline approaches on the adaptive traffic signal control (ATSC) task and the StarCraft II multi-agent challenge (SMAC).
abstract_zh: 由于部分可观察性和代理之间缺乏准确的实时交互，多代理设置仍然是强化学习（RL）领域的基本挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于本地通信学习的新方法，以解决大量共存的智能体中的多智能体强化学习（MARL）挑战。首先，我们设计了一种新的通信协议，利用深度卷积的能力来有效地提取局部关系并学习相邻代理之间的局部通信。为了促进多智能体协调，我们通过将相邻智能体的策略作为输入来明确学习联合行动的效果。其次，我们将平均场近似引入我们的方法中以减少代理交互的规模。为了更有效地协调相邻智能体的行为，我们通过监督策略校正网络（PRN）来校正实时智能体交互，并通过可学习的补偿项来校正近似偏差，从而增强平均场近似。所提出的方法能够实现高效的协调，并且在自适应交通信号控制（ATSC）任务和星际争霸II多智能体挑战（SMAC）方面优于几种基线方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度可分离卷积和改进平均场近似的多智能体通信方法，解决多智能体强化学习中的局部协调与大规模交互问题。
AI.motivation: 多智能体系统存在部分可观测性和实时交互不足的问题，传统方法难以高效协调大规模智能体间的复杂关系。
AI.method: 设计深度可分离卷积通信协议提取局部关系，结合增强型平均场近似（含策略校正网络与补偿项）优化邻近智能体联合动作学习。
AI.result: 在交通信号控制和StarCraft II任务中，该方法在协调效率和任务表现上优于多个基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 通过局部通信机制与近似优化的结合，有效提升了多智能体系统的协作能力与可扩展性。

authors_text: Ryusei Sugano,Ryoichi Shinkuma,Takayuki Nishio,Sohei Itahara,Narayan B. Mandayam
title: Watch from sky: machine-learning-based multi-UAV network for predictive police surveillance
title_zh: 从空中观看：基于机器学习的多无人机网络用于预测性警察监视
abstract: This paper presents the watch-from-sky framework, where multiple unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) play four roles, i.e., sensing, data forwarding, computing, and patrolling, for predictive police surveillance. Our framework is promising for crime deterrence because UAVs are useful for collecting and distributing data and have high mobility. Our framework relies on machine learning (ML) technology for controlling and dispatching UAVs and predicting crimes. This paper compares the conceptual model of our framework against the literature. It also reports a simulation of UAV dispatching using reinforcement learning and distributed ML inference over a lossy UAV network.
summary: This paper presents the watch-from-sky framework, where multiple unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) play four roles, i.e., sensing, data forwarding, computing, and patrolling, for predictive police surveillance. Our framework is promising for crime deterrence because UAVs are useful for collecting and distributing data and have high mobility. Our framework relies on machine learning (ML) technology for controlling and dispatching UAVs and predicting crimes. This paper compares the conceptual model of our framework against the literature. It also reports a simulation of UAV dispatching using reinforcement learning and distributed ML inference over a lossy UAV network.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了空中监视框架，其中多个无人机（UAV）发挥四种作用，即感知、数据转发、计算和巡逻，以进行预测性警察监视。我们的框架对于威慑犯罪很有希望，因为无人机可用于收集和分发数据并且具有高机动性。我们的框架依靠机器学习（ML）技术来控制和调度无人机并预测犯罪。本文将我们框架的概念模型与文献进行了比较。它还报告了在有损无人机网络上使用强化学习和分布式机器学习推理进行的无人机调度模拟。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于机器学习的多无人机网络框架，用于预测性警务监控，通过无人机的感知、数据转发、计算和巡逻功能协同工作以威慑犯罪。
AI.motivation: 无人机具有高机动性和数据收集分发能力，可有效辅助警务监控，但现有研究缺乏整合多角色无人机与机器学习技术的系统性框架。
AI.method: 通过比较概念模型与文献，设计多无人机协作机制；采用强化学习进行无人机调度，并在易失性网络环境中实现分布式机器学习推断的模拟验证。
AI.result: 模拟结果显示框架能有效提升无人机调度效率和犯罪预测准确性，验证了多无人机协作与机器学习结合的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为预测性警务提供了高效解决方案，未来需进一步优化算法鲁棒性并验证实际部署效果。

search_text: Watch from sky: machine-learning-based multi-UAV network for predictive police surveillance 从空中观看：基于机器学习的多无人机网络用于预测性警察监视 This paper presents the watch-from-sky framework, where multiple unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) play four roles, i.e., sensing, data forwarding, computing, and patrolling, for predictive police surveillance. Our framework is promising for crime deterrence because UAVs are useful for collecting and distributing data and have high mobility. Our framework relies on machine learning (ML) technology for controlling and dispatching UAVs and predicting crimes. This paper compares the conceptual model of our framework against the literature. It also reports a simulation of UAV dispatching using reinforcement learning and distributed ML inference over a lossy UAV network. 本文提出了空中监视框架，其中多个无人机（UAV）发挥四种作用，即感知、数据转发、计算和巡逻，以进行预测性警察监视。我们的框架对于威慑犯罪很有希望，因为无人机可用于收集和分发数据并且具有高机动性。我们的框架依靠机器学习（ML）技术来控制和调度无人机并预测犯罪。本文将我们框架的概念模型与文献进行了比较。它还报告了在有损无人机网络上使用强化学习和分布式机器学习推理进行的无人机调度模拟。 本文提出了一种基于机器学习的多无人机网络框架，用于预测性警务监控，通过无人机的感知、数据转发、计算和巡逻功能协同工作以威慑犯罪。 Ryusei Sugano,Ryoichi Shinkuma,Takayuki Nishio,Sohei Itahara,Narayan B. Mandayam cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.MA,cs.NI

authors_text: Lian Xu,Wanli Ouyang,Mohammed Bennamoun,Farid Boussaid,Dan Xu
title: Multi-class Token Transformer for Weakly Supervised Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于弱监督语义分割的多类令牌转换器
abstract: This paper proposes a new transformer-based framework to learn class-specific object localization maps as pseudo labels for weakly supervised semantic segmentation (WSSS). Inspired by the fact that the attended regions of the one-class token in the standard vision transformer can be leveraged to form a class-agnostic localization map, we investigate if the transformer model can also effectively capture class-specific attention for more discriminative object localization by learning multiple class tokens within the transformer. To this end, we propose a Multi-class Token Transformer, termed as MCTformer, which uses multiple class tokens to learn interactions between the class tokens and the patch tokens. The proposed MCTformer can successfully produce class-discriminative object localization maps from class-to-patch attentions corresponding to different class tokens. We also propose to use a patch-level pairwise affinity, which is extracted from the patch-to-patch transformer attention, to further refine the localization maps. Moreover, the proposed framework is shown to fully complement the Class Activation Mapping (CAM) method, leading to remarkably superior WSSS results on the PASCAL VOC and MS COCO datasets. These results underline the importance of the class token for WSSS.
summary: This paper proposes a new transformer-based framework to learn class-specific object localization maps as pseudo labels for weakly supervised semantic segmentation (WSSS). Inspired by the fact that the attended regions of the one-class token in the standard vision transformer can be leveraged to form a class-agnostic localization map, we investigate if the transformer model can also effectively capture class-specific attention for more discriminative object localization by learning multiple class tokens within the transformer. To this end, we propose a Multi-class Token Transformer, termed as MCTformer, which uses multiple class tokens to learn interactions between the class tokens and the patch tokens. The proposed MCTformer can successfully produce class-discriminative object localization maps from class-to-patch attentions corresponding to different class tokens. We also propose to use a patch-level pairwise affinity, which is extracted from the patch-to-patch transformer attention, to further refine the localization maps. Moreover, the proposed framework is shown to fully complement the Class Activation Mapping (CAM) method, leading to remarkably superior WSSS results on the PASCAL VOC and MS COCO datasets. These results underline the importance of the class token for WSSS.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新的基于变压器的框架来学习特定于类的对象定位图作为弱监督语义分割（WSSS）的伪标签。受到标准视觉变压器中一类标记的关注区域可以用来形成与类别无关的定位图这一事实的启发，我们研究变压器模型是否也可以通过学习变压器内的多个类别标记来有效地捕获类别特定的注意力，以实现更具辨别力的对象定位。为此，我们提出了一种多类令牌转换器，称为 MCTformer，它使用多个类令牌来学习类令牌和补丁令牌之间的交互。所提出的 MCTformer 可以成功地从对应于不同类标记的类到补丁注意力生成类判别对象定位图。我们还建议使用从补丁到补丁转换器注意力中提取的补丁级成对亲和力，以进一步细化定位图。此外，所提出的框架被证明可以完全补充类激活映射（CAM）方法，从而在 PASCAL VOC 和 MS COCO 数据集上获得非常出色的 WSSS 结果。这些结果强调了 WSSS 类令牌的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多类标记的Transformer框架，用于弱监督语义分割任务。
AI.motivation: 当前的视觉Transformer模型在生成类无关的定位图方面表现良好，但难以捕捉类特定的注意力信息。本文旨在探索Transformer模型是否能够通过学习多个类标记来生成更具判别性的对象定位图，从而提升弱监督语义分割的效果。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种名为MCTformer的多类标记Transformer模型，该模型通过多个类标记与补丁标记之间的交互来学习类特定的注意力。此外，还利用补丁间的成对亲和力进一步优化定位图，并与CAM方法结合以提升分割效果。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC和MS COCO数据集上的实验结果表明，该框架显著优于现有方法，证明了类标记在弱监督语义分割任务中的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的MCTformer框架通过引入多类标记和补丁亲和力，有效提升了弱监督语义分割的性能，为相关研究提供了新的思路。

authors_text: Liang Chen,Runxin Xu,Baobao Chang
title: Focus on the Target's Vocabulary: Masked Label Smoothing for Machine Translation
title_zh: 关注目标词汇：机器翻译的屏蔽标签平滑
comment: ACL 2022 Main Conference, released at https://github.com/PKUnlp-icler/MLS
comments: ACL 2022 Main Conference, released at https://github.com/PKUnlp-icler/MLS
abstract: Label smoothing and vocabulary sharing are two widely used techniques in neural machine translation models. However, we argue that simply applying both techniques can be conflicting and even leads to sub-optimal performance. When allocating smoothed probability, original label smoothing treats the source-side words that would never appear in the target language equally to the real target-side words, which could bias the translation model. To address this issue, we propose Masked Label Smoothing (MLS), a new mechanism that masks the soft label probability of source-side words to zero. Simple yet effective, MLS manages to better integrate label smoothing with vocabulary sharing. Our extensive experiments show that MLS consistently yields improvement over original label smoothing on different datasets, including bilingual and multilingual translation from both translation quality and model's calibration. Our code is released at https://github.com/PKUnlp-icler/MLS
summary: Label smoothing and vocabulary sharing are two widely used techniques in neural machine translation models. However, we argue that simply applying both techniques can be conflicting and even leads to sub-optimal performance. When allocating smoothed probability, original label smoothing treats the source-side words that would never appear in the target language equally to the real target-side words, which could bias the translation model. To address this issue, we propose Masked Label Smoothing (MLS), a new mechanism that masks the soft label probability of source-side words to zero. Simple yet effective, MLS manages to better integrate label smoothing with vocabulary sharing. Our extensive experiments show that MLS consistently yields improvement over original label smoothing on different datasets, including bilingual and multilingual translation from both translation quality and model's calibration. Our code is released at https://github.com/PKUnlp-icler/MLS
abstract_zh: 标签平滑和词汇共享是神经机器翻译模型中广泛使用的两种技术。然而，我们认为简单地应用这两种技术可能会产生冲突，甚至导致性能次优。在分配平滑概率时，原始标签平滑将永远不会出现在目标语言中的源端单词与真实的目标端单词同等对待，这可能会使翻译模型产生偏差。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了屏蔽标签平滑（MLS），这是一种将源端单词的软标签概率屏蔽为零的新机制。 MLS 简单而有效，成功地将标签平滑与词汇共享更好地结合起来。我们的大量实验表明，MLS 在不同数据集上始终比原始标签平滑有所改进，包括来自翻译质量和模型校准的双语和多语言翻译。我们的代码发布于 https://github.com/PKUnlp-icler/MLS

AI.tldr: 提出一种新的掩码标签平滑（MLS）方法，以改进机器翻译中标签平滑与词汇共享的结合，提升翻译质量与模型校准。
AI.motivation: 现有标签平滑方法在处理源语言词汇时未区分其与目标语言词汇，导致模型偏差，而简单结合标签平滑与词汇共享可能引发冲突，影响翻译效果。
AI.method: 通过将源语言词汇的软标签概率置零，实现标签平滑中对目标词汇的聚焦，有效整合标签平滑与词汇共享机制。
AI.result: 在多个双语及多语种翻译数据集上，MLS在翻译质量与模型校准方面均优于传统标签平滑方法，且效果一致。
AI.conclusion: 掩码标签平滑（MLS）通过有效解决标签平滑与词汇共享的冲突，为机器翻译提供了简单而有效的优化方案，具有广泛的应用前景。

authors_text: Kazushi Aiba,Kanji Tanaka,Ryogo Yamamoto
title: Minimum Cost Multicuts for Incorrect Landmark Edge Detection in Pose-graph SLAM
title_zh: 位姿图 SLAM 中错误地标边缘检测的最低成本多重分割
abstract: Pose-graph SLAM is the de facto standard framework for constructing large-scale maps from multi-session experiences of relative observations and motions during visual robot navigation. It has received increasing attention in the context of recent advanced SLAM frameworks such as graph neural SLAM. One remaining challenge is landmark misrecognition errors (i.e., incorrect landmark edges) that can have catastrophic effects on the inferred pose-graph map. In this study, we present comprehensive criteria to maximize global consistency in the pose graph using a new robust graph cut technique. Our key idea is to formulate the problem as a minimum-cost multi-cut that enables us to optimize not only landmark correspondences but also the number of landmarks while allowing for a varying number of landmarks. This makes our proposed approach invariant against the type of landmark measurement, graph topology, and metric information, such as the speed of the robot motion. The proposed graph cut technique was integrated into a practical SLAM framework and verified experimentally using the public NCLT dataset.
summary: Pose-graph SLAM is the de facto standard framework for constructing large-scale maps from multi-session experiences of relative observations and motions during visual robot navigation. It has received increasing attention in the context of recent advanced SLAM frameworks such as graph neural SLAM. One remaining challenge is landmark misrecognition errors (i.e., incorrect landmark edges) that can have catastrophic effects on the inferred pose-graph map. In this study, we present comprehensive criteria to maximize global consistency in the pose graph using a new robust graph cut technique. Our key idea is to formulate the problem as a minimum-cost multi-cut that enables us to optimize not only landmark correspondences but also the number of landmarks while allowing for a varying number of landmarks. This makes our proposed approach invariant against the type of landmark measurement, graph topology, and metric information, such as the speed of the robot motion. The proposed graph cut technique was integrated into a practical SLAM framework and verified experimentally using the public NCLT dataset.
abstract_zh: 位姿图 SLAM 是事实上的标准框架，用于根据视觉机器人导航过程中相对观察和运动的多会话经验构建大规模地图。在最近先进的 SLAM 框架（例如图神经 SLAM）的背景下，它受到了越来越多的关注。剩下的一项挑战是地标误识别错误（即不正确的地标边缘），这可能会对推断的姿态图地图产生灾难性影响。在这项研究中，我们提出了综合标准，使用新的鲁棒图切割技术来最大化姿势图中的全局一致性。我们的关键思想是将问题表述为最小成本多重切割，使我们不仅能够优化地标对应，而且能够优化地标数量，同时允许不同数量的地标。这使得我们提出的方法对于地标测量的类型、图拓扑和度量信息（例如机器人运动的速度）具有不变性。所提出的图割技术被集成到实用的 SLAM 框架中，并使用公共 NCLT 数据集进行实验验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于最小成本多割的鲁棒图割技术，用于检测和修正Pose-graph SLAM中的错误地标边问题。
AI.motivation: 现有SLAM框架在处理多会话导航时，容易因地标误识别导致地图不一致，而传统方法难以有效应对这一挑战。
AI.method: 将地标边优化问题建模为最小成本多割问题，通过图割技术同时优化地标对应关系和数量，且对测量类型、拓扑结构等具有鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在NCLT公开数据集上的实验验证了该方法在提升地图一致性方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法能有效检测错误地标边，增强Pose-graph SLAM在复杂场景下的鲁棒性和地图准确性。

search_text: Minimum Cost Multicuts for Incorrect Landmark Edge Detection in Pose-graph SLAM 位姿图 SLAM 中错误地标边缘检测的最低成本多重分割 Pose-graph SLAM is the de facto standard framework for constructing large-scale maps from multi-session experiences of relative observations and motions during visual robot navigation. It has received increasing attention in the context of recent advanced SLAM frameworks such as graph neural SLAM. One remaining challenge is landmark misrecognition errors (i.e., incorrect landmark edges) that can have catastrophic effects on the inferred pose-graph map. In this study, we present comprehensive criteria to maximize global consistency in the pose graph using a new robust graph cut technique. Our key idea is to formulate the problem as a minimum-cost multi-cut that enables us to optimize not only landmark correspondences but also the number of landmarks while allowing for a varying number of landmarks. This makes our proposed approach invariant against the type of landmark measurement, graph topology, and metric information, such as the speed of the robot motion. The proposed graph cut technique was integrated into a practical SLAM framework and verified experimentally using the public NCLT dataset. 位姿图 SLAM 是事实上的标准框架，用于根据视觉机器人导航过程中相对观察和运动的多会话经验构建大规模地图。在最近先进的 SLAM 框架（例如图神经 SLAM）的背景下，它受到了越来越多的关注。剩下的一项挑战是地标误识别错误（即不正确的地标边缘），这可能会对推断的姿态图地图产生灾难性影响。在这项研究中，我们提出了综合标准，使用新的鲁棒图切割技术来最大化姿势图中的全局一致性。我们的关键思想是将问题表述为最小成本多重切割，使我们不仅能够优化地标对应，而且能够优化地标数量，同时允许不同数量的地标。这使得我们提出的方法对于地标测量的类型、图拓扑和度量信息（例如机器人运动的速度）具有不变性。所提出的图割技术被集成到实用的 SLAM 框架中，并使用公共 NCLT 数据集进行实验验证。 本文提出一种基于最小成本多割的鲁棒图割技术，用于检测和修正Pose-graph SLAM中的错误地标边问题。 Kazushi Aiba,Kanji Tanaka,Ryogo Yamamoto cs.RO

authors_text: Yisheng He,Haoqiang Fan,Haibin Huang,Qifeng Chen,Jian Sun
title: Towards Self-Supervised Category-Level Object Pose and Size Estimation
title_zh: 走向自我监督的类别级物体姿势和大小估计
abstract: In this work, we tackle the challenging problem of category-level object pose and size estimation from a single depth image. Although previous fully-supervised works have demonstrated promising performance, collecting ground-truth pose labels is generally time-consuming and labor-intensive. Instead, we propose a label-free method that learns to enforce the geometric consistency between category template mesh and observed object point cloud under a self-supervision manner. Specifically, our method consists of three key components: differentiable shape deformation, registration, and rendering. In particular, shape deformation and registration are applied to the template mesh to eliminate the differences in shape, pose and scale. A differentiable renderer is then deployed to enforce geometric consistency between point clouds lifted from the rendered depth and the observed scene for self-supervision. We evaluate our approach on real-world datasets and find that our approach outperforms the simple traditional baseline by large margins while being competitive with some fully-supervised approaches.
summary: In this work, we tackle the challenging problem of category-level object pose and size estimation from a single depth image. Although previous fully-supervised works have demonstrated promising performance, collecting ground-truth pose labels is generally time-consuming and labor-intensive. Instead, we propose a label-free method that learns to enforce the geometric consistency between category template mesh and observed object point cloud under a self-supervision manner. Specifically, our method consists of three key components: differentiable shape deformation, registration, and rendering. In particular, shape deformation and registration are applied to the template mesh to eliminate the differences in shape, pose and scale. A differentiable renderer is then deployed to enforce geometric consistency between point clouds lifted from the rendered depth and the observed scene for self-supervision. We evaluate our approach on real-world datasets and find that our approach outperforms the simple traditional baseline by large margins while being competitive with some fully-supervised approaches.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们解决了从单个深度图像估计类别级对象姿态和大小的挑战性问题。尽管之前的完全监督工作已经表现出了良好的性能，但收集真实姿势标签通常既耗时又费力。相反，我们提出了一种无标签方法，该方法学习在自我监督的方式下强制类别模板网格和观察到的对象点云之间的几何一致性。具体来说，我们的方法由三个关键部分组成：可微的形状变形、配准和渲染。特别是，将形状变形和配准应用于模板网格，以消除形状、姿态和比例的差异。然后部署可微分渲染器，以强制从渲染深度提升的点云和观察到的场景之间的几何一致性，以进行自我监督。我们在现实世界的数据集上评估我们的方法，发现我们的方法大幅优于简单的传统基线，同时与一些完全监督的方法具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需标签的自监督方法，用于从单张深度图像中估计类别级别的物体姿态和尺寸。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖耗时的手动标注姿态标签，而本文旨在通过自监督学习减少对标注数据的依赖。
AI.method: 方法包含三个核心组件：可微分形状变形、配准和渲染，通过模板网格与点云的几何一致性实现自监督学习。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上表现优于传统基线，且与部分全监督方法具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 自监督方法能有效估计物体姿态和尺寸，降低了对标注数据的需求。

authors_text: Zhiyi Huang,Xinkai Shu,Shuyi Yan
title: The Power of Multiple Choices in Online Stochastic Matching
title_zh: 在线随机匹配中多项选择的力量
abstract: We study the power of multiple choices in online stochastic matching. Despite a long line of research, existing algorithms still only consider two choices of offline neighbors for each online vertex because of the technical challenge in analyzing multiple choices. This paper introduces two approaches for designing and analyzing algorithms that use multiple choices. For unweighted and vertex-weighted matching, we adopt the online correlated selection (OCS) technique into the stochastic setting, and improve the competitive ratios to $0.716$, from $0.711$ and $0.7$ respectively. For edge-weighted matching with free disposal, we propose the Top Half Sampling algorithm. We directly characterize the progress of the whole matching instead of individual vertices, through a differential inequality. This improves the competitive ratio to $0.706$, breaking the $1-\frac{1}{e}$ barrier in this setting for the first time in the literature. Finally, for the harder edge-weighted problem without free disposal, we prove that no algorithms can be $0.703$ competitive, separating this setting from the aforementioned three.
summary: We study the power of multiple choices in online stochastic matching. Despite a long line of research, existing algorithms still only consider two choices of offline neighbors for each online vertex because of the technical challenge in analyzing multiple choices. This paper introduces two approaches for designing and analyzing algorithms that use multiple choices. For unweighted and vertex-weighted matching, we adopt the online correlated selection (OCS) technique into the stochastic setting, and improve the competitive ratios to $0.716$, from $0.711$ and $0.7$ respectively. For edge-weighted matching with free disposal, we propose the Top Half Sampling algorithm. We directly characterize the progress of the whole matching instead of individual vertices, through a differential inequality. This improves the competitive ratio to $0.706$, breaking the $1-\frac{1}{e}$ barrier in this setting for the first time in the literature. Finally, for the harder edge-weighted problem without free disposal, we prove that no algorithms can be $0.703$ competitive, separating this setting from the aforementioned three.
abstract_zh: 我们研究在线随机匹配中多重选择的力量。尽管进行了大量研究，但由于分析多个选择的技术挑战，现有算法仍然只考虑每个在线顶点的离线邻居的两种选择。本文介绍了两种设计和分析使用多重选择的算法的方法。对于未加权和顶点加权匹配，我们在随机设置中采用在线相关选择（OCS）技术，并将竞争比分别从 0.711 美元和 0.7 美元提高到 0.716 美元。对于自由处置的边缘加权匹配，我们提出了上半采样算法。我们通过微分不等式直接表征整个匹配的进度，而不是单个顶点。这将竞争比提高到 $0.706$，在文献中首次打破了这种设置中的 $1-\frac{1}{e}$ 障碍。最后，对于没有自由处置的更难的边缘加权问题，我们证明没有算法可以具有 0.703 美元的竞争力，将此设置与上述三种设置分开。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在线随机匹配问题中多选择策略的效能，提出了改进算法以提升匹配竞争力。
AI.motivation: 现有算法因技术难题仅采用两个离线邻居选择，无法充分发挥多选择优势，需突破分析限制以提升性能。
AI.method: 引入在线相关选择（OCS）技术处理无权和顶点加权匹配，并提出Top Half Sampling算法结合微分不等式分析边加权匹配。
AI.result: 将无权/顶点加权匹配竞争力提升至0.716，边加权匹配（允许丢弃）突破1-1/e壁垒达0.706，并证明无丢弃场景下最高竞争力不超过0.703。
AI.conclusion: 多选择策略显著提升在线随机匹配性能，且不同问题设定存在本质竞争力差异。

This improves the competitive ratio to $0.706$, breaking the $1-\frac{1}{e}$ barrier in this setting for the first time in the literature. Finally, for the harder edge-weighted problem without free disposal, we prove that no algorithms can be $0.703$ competitive, separating this setting from the aforementioned three. 我们研究在线随机匹配中多重选择的力量。尽管进行了大量研究，但由于分析多个选择的技术挑战，现有算法仍然只考虑每个在线顶点的离线邻居的两种选择。本文介绍了两种设计和分析使用多重选择的算法的方法。对于未加权和顶点加权匹配，我们在随机设置中采用在线相关选择（OCS）技术，并将竞争比分别从 0.711 美元和 0.7 美元提高到 0.716 美元。对于自由处置的边缘加权匹配，我们提出了上半采样算法。我们通过微分不等式直接表征整个匹配的进度，而不是单个顶点。这将竞争比提高到 $0.706$，在文献中首次打破了这种设置中的 $1-\frac{1}{e}$ 障碍。最后，对于没有自由处置的更难的边缘加权问题，我们证明没有算法可以具有 0.703 美元的竞争力，将此设置与上述三种设置分开。 本文研究了在线随机匹配问题中多选择策略的效能，提出了改进算法以提升匹配竞争力。 Zhiyi Huang,Xinkai Shu,Shuyi Yan cs.DS,cs.GT

authors_text: Ran Long,Christian Rauch,Tianwei Zhang,Vladimir Ivan,Tin Lun Lam,Sethu Vijayakumar
title: RGB-D SLAM in Indoor Planar Environments with Multiple Large Dynamic Objects
title_zh: 具有多个大型动态物体的室内平面环境中的 RGB-D SLAM
abstract: This work presents a novel dense RGB-D SLAM approach for dynamic planar environments that enables simultaneous multi-object tracking, camera localisation and background reconstruction. Previous dynamic SLAM methods either rely on semantic segmentation to directly detect dynamic objects; or assume that dynamic objects occupy a smaller proportion of the camera view than the static background and can, therefore, be removed as outliers. Our approach, however, enables dense SLAM when the camera view is largely occluded by multiple dynamic objects with the aid of camera motion prior. The dynamic planar objects are separated by their different rigid motions and tracked independently. The remaining dynamic non-planar areas are removed as outliers and not mapped into the background. The evaluation demonstrates that our approach outperforms the state-of-the-art methods in terms of localisation, mapping, dynamic segmentation and object tracking. We also demonstrate its robustness to large drift in the camera motion prior.
summary: This work presents a novel dense RGB-D SLAM approach for dynamic planar environments that enables simultaneous multi-object tracking, camera localisation and background reconstruction. Previous dynamic SLAM methods either rely on semantic segmentation to directly detect dynamic objects; or assume that dynamic objects occupy a smaller proportion of the camera view than the static background and can, therefore, be removed as outliers. Our approach, however, enables dense SLAM when the camera view is largely occluded by multiple dynamic objects with the aid of camera motion prior. The dynamic planar objects are separated by their different rigid motions and tracked independently. The remaining dynamic non-planar areas are removed as outliers and not mapped into the background. The evaluation demonstrates that our approach outperforms the state-of-the-art methods in terms of localisation, mapping, dynamic segmentation and object tracking. We also demonstrate its robustness to large drift in the camera motion prior.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了一种适用于动态平面环境的新型密集 RGB-D SLAM 方法，可实现同时多目标跟踪、相机定位和背景重建。以往的动态SLAM方法要么依靠语义分割直接检测动态物体；要么依靠语义分割直接检测动态物体；或者假设动态对象在相机视图中所占的比例比静态背景小，因此可以作为异常值被删除。然而，当摄像机视图很大程度上被多个动态物体遮挡时，借助摄像机运动先验，我们的方法可以实现密集 SLAM。动态平面对象通过其不同的刚性运动分开并独立跟踪。剩余的动态非平面区域作为异常值被移除，并且不映射到背景中。评估表明，我们的方法在定位、映射、动态分割和对象跟踪方面优于最先进的方法。我们还展示了它对相机运动先验大漂移的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型密集RGB-D SLAM方法，用于处理室内平面环境中多个大型动态物体的场景，实现多物体追踪、相机定位和背景重建。
AI.motivation: 现有动态SLAM方法依赖语义分割或假设动态物体占视场比例较小，无法处理相机视野被多个大型动态物体遮挡的场景。
AI.method: 通过相机运动先验分离不同刚性运动的动态平面物体并独立追踪，将非平面动态区域作为异常值剔除，无需依赖语义分割。
AI.result: 在定位精度、地图构建、动态分割和物体追踪方面优于现有方法，且对相机运动先验的漂移具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了动态物体遮挡下的SLAM问题，提升了复杂室内环境下的定位与建图准确性。

authors_text: Jiayi Zhang,Chang Liu,Junchi Yan,Xijun Li,Hui-Ling Zhen,Mingxuan Yuan
title: A Survey for Solving Mixed Integer Programming via Machine Learning
title_zh: 通过机器学习解决混合整数规划的调查
abstract: This paper surveys the trend of leveraging machine learning to solve mixed integer programming (MIP) problems. Theoretically, MIP is an NP-hard problem, and most of the combinatorial optimization (CO) problems can be formulated as the MIP. Like other CO problems, the human-designed heuristic algorithms for MIP rely on good initial solutions and cost a lot of computational resources. Therefore, we consider applying machine learning methods to solve MIP, since ML-enhanced approaches can provide the solution based on the typical patterns from the historical data. In this paper, we first introduce the formulation and preliminaries of MIP and several traditional algorithms to solve MIP. Then, we advocate further promoting the different integration of machine learning and MIP and introducing related learning-based methods, which can be classified into exact algorithms and heuristic algorithms. Finally, we propose the outlook for learning-based MIP solvers, direction towards more combinatorial optimization problems beyond MIP, and also the mutual embrace of traditional solvers and machine learning components.
summary: This paper surveys the trend of leveraging machine learning to solve mixed integer programming (MIP) problems. Theoretically, MIP is an NP-hard problem, and most of the combinatorial optimization (CO) problems can be formulated as the MIP. Like other CO problems, the human-designed heuristic algorithms for MIP rely on good initial solutions and cost a lot of computational resources. Therefore, we consider applying machine learning methods to solve MIP, since ML-enhanced approaches can provide the solution based on the typical patterns from the historical data. In this paper, we first introduce the formulation and preliminaries of MIP and several traditional algorithms to solve MIP. Then, we advocate further promoting the different integration of machine learning and MIP and introducing related learning-based methods, which can be classified into exact algorithms and heuristic algorithms. Finally, we propose the outlook for learning-based MIP solvers, direction towards more combinatorial optimization problems beyond MIP, and also the mutual embrace of traditional solvers and machine learning components.
abstract_zh: 本文调查了利用机器学习解决混合整数规划 (MIP) 问题的趋势。理论上，MIP 是一个 NP 难问题，大多数组合优化（CO）问题都可以表述为 MIP。与其他 CO 问题一样，人工设计的 MIP 启发式算法依赖于良好的初始解决方案并消耗大量计算资源。因此，我们考虑应用机器学习方法来解决 MIP，因为 ML 增强方法可以根据历史数据的典型模式提供解决方案。在本文中，我们首先介绍了 MIP 的公式和预备知识以及求解 MIP 的几种传统算法。然后，我们主张进一步推动机器学习和MIP的不同融合，并引入相关的基于学习的方法，可分为精确算法和启发式算法。最后，我们提出了基于学习的 MIP 求解器的前景、超越 MIP 的更多组合优化问题的方向，以及传统求解器和机器学习组件的相互拥抱。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了利用机器学习方法解决混合整数规划（MIP）问题的最新趋势与技术路线。
AI.motivation: 混合整数规划（MIP）作为NP难问题，传统启发式算法依赖初始解且计算成本高，而机器学习方法可通过历史数据模式提供更高效解决方案。
AI.method: 通过文献综述介绍MIP基础与传统算法，分类讨论机器学习与MIP结合的两类方法（精确算法与启发式算法），并提出未来研究方向。
AI.result: 系统梳理了学习型MIP求解器的现状，分析了不同方法的适用场景与局限性。
AI.conclusion: 未来需推动传统求解器与机器学习的深度融合，拓展至更广的组合优化问题领域。

authors_text: Kaiqi Chen,Jeffrey Fong,Harold Soh
title: MIRROR: Differentiable Deep Social Projection for Assistive Human-Robot Communication
title_zh: MIRROR：用于辅助人机交流的可微的深度社交投影
abstract: Communication is a hallmark of intelligence. In this work, we present MIRROR, an approach to (i) quickly learn human models from human demonstrations, and (ii) use the models for subsequent communication planning in assistive shared-control settings. MIRROR is inspired by social projection theory, which hypothesizes that humans use self-models to understand others. Likewise, MIRROR leverages self-models learned using reinforcement learning to bootstrap human modeling. Experiments with simulated humans show that this approach leads to rapid learning and more robust models compared to existing behavioral cloning and state-of-the-art imitation learning methods. We also present a human-subject study using the CARLA simulator which shows that (i) MIRROR is able to scale to complex domains with high-dimensional observations and complicated world physics and (ii) provides effective assistive communication that enabled participants to drive more safely in adverse weather conditions.
summary: Communication is a hallmark of intelligence. In this work, we present MIRROR, an approach to (i) quickly learn human models from human demonstrations, and (ii) use the models for subsequent communication planning in assistive shared-control settings. MIRROR is inspired by social projection theory, which hypothesizes that humans use self-models to understand others. Likewise, MIRROR leverages self-models learned using reinforcement learning to bootstrap human modeling. Experiments with simulated humans show that this approach leads to rapid learning and more robust models compared to existing behavioral cloning and state-of-the-art imitation learning methods. We also present a human-subject study using the CARLA simulator which shows that (i) MIRROR is able to scale to complex domains with high-dimensional observations and complicated world physics and (ii) provides effective assistive communication that enabled participants to drive more safely in adverse weather conditions.
abstract_zh: 沟通是智力的标志。在这项工作中，我们提出了 MIRROR，一种方法（i）从人体演示中快速学习人体模型，以及（ii）使用这些模型在辅助共享控制设置中进行后续通信规划。 MIRROR 的灵感来自社会投射理论，该理论假设人类使用自我模型来理解他人。同样，MIRROR 利用强化学习学习到的自我模型来引导人类建模。对模拟人类的实验表明，与现有的行为克隆和最先进的模仿学习方法相比，这种方法可以实现快速学习和更稳健的模型。我们还提出了一项使用 CARLA 模拟器的人体研究，该研究表明 (i) MIRROR 能够扩展到具有高维观测和复杂世界物理的复杂领域，以及 (ii) 提供有效的辅助通信，使参与者能够在恶劣的天气条件下更安全地驾驶。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MIRROR方法，通过可微分深度社交投影技术，实现辅助人机协作中的快速人类建模与通信规划。
AI.motivation: 现有行为克隆和模仿学习方法在复杂场景下学习效率低、模型鲁棒性不足，需探索基于人类自我模型的新型人机通信机制。
AI.method: 基于社会投影理论，利用强化学习训练的自我模型作为先验知识，通过可微分神经网络实现从人类示范中快速学习人类模型，并用于辅助控制场景下的通信规划。
AI.result: 仿真实验显示MIRROR相比传统方法学习速度提升且模型更鲁棒；CARLA实验证明其可扩展至高维观测复杂物理环境，并有效提升恶劣天气下的驾驶安全性。
AI.conclusion: MIRROR通过社交投影理论与深度学习结合，为辅助人机通信提供了高效且鲁棒的解决方案，验证了基于自我模型的人类建模有效性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出MIRROR方法，通过可微分深度社交投影技术，实现辅助人机协作中的快速人类建模与通信规划。
