search_text: MIRROR: Differentiable Deep Social Projection for Assistive Human-Robot Communication MIRROR：用于辅助人机交流的可微的深度社交投影 Communication is a hallmark of intelligence. In this work, we present MIRROR, an approach to (i) quickly learn human models from human demonstrations, and (ii) use the models for subsequent communication planning in assistive shared-control settings. MIRROR is inspired by social projection theory, which hypothesizes that humans use self-models to understand others. Likewise, MIRROR leverages self-models learned using reinforcement learning to bootstrap human modeling. Experiments with simulated humans show that this approach leads to rapid learning and more robust models compared to existing behavioral cloning and state-of-the-art imitation learning methods. We also present a human-subject study using the CARLA simulator which shows that (i) MIRROR is able to scale to complex domains with high-dimensional observations and complicated world physics and (ii) provides effective assistive communication that enabled participants to drive more safely in adverse weather conditions. 沟通是智力的标志。在这项工作中，我们提出了 MIRROR，一种方法（i）从人体演示中快速学习人体模型，以及（ii）使用这些模型在辅助共享控制设置中进行后续通信规划。 MIRROR 的灵感来自社会投射理论，该理论假设人类使用自我模型来理解他人。同样，MIRROR 利用强化学习学习到的自我模型来引导人类建模。对模拟人类的实验表明，与现有的行为克隆和最先进的模仿学习方法相比，这种方法可以实现快速学习和更稳健的模型。我们还提出了一项使用 CARLA 模拟器的人体研究，该研究表明 (i) MIRROR 能够扩展到具有高维观测和复杂世界物理的复杂领域，以及 (ii) 提供有效的辅助通信，使参与者能够在恶劣的天气条件下更安全地驾驶。 本文提出MIRROR方法，通过可微分深度社交投影技术，实现辅助人机协作中的快速人类建模与通信规划。 Kaiqi Chen,Jeffrey Fong,Harold Soh cs.AI,cs.HC,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: George P. Kontoudis,Daniel J. Stilwell
title: Fully Decentralized, Scalable Gaussian Processes for Multi-Agent Federated Learning
title_zh: 用于多智能体联邦学习的完全去中心化、可扩展的高斯过程
abstract: In this paper, we propose decentralized and scalable algorithms for Gaussian process (GP) training and prediction in multi-agent systems. To decentralize the implementation of GP training optimization algorithms, we employ the alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM). A closed-form solution of the decentralized proximal ADMM is provided for the case of GP hyper-parameter training with maximum likelihood estimation. Multiple aggregation techniques for GP prediction are decentralized with the use of iterative and consensus methods. In addition, we propose a covariance-based nearest neighbor selection strategy that enables a subset of agents to perform predictions. The efficacy of the proposed methods is illustrated with numerical experiments on synthetic and real data.
summary: In this paper, we propose decentralized and scalable algorithms for Gaussian process (GP) training and prediction in multi-agent systems. To decentralize the implementation of GP training optimization algorithms, we employ the alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM). A closed-form solution of the decentralized proximal ADMM is provided for the case of GP hyper-parameter training with maximum likelihood estimation. Multiple aggregation techniques for GP prediction are decentralized with the use of iterative and consensus methods. In addition, we propose a covariance-based nearest neighbor selection strategy that enables a subset of agents to perform predictions. The efficacy of the proposed methods is illustrated with numerical experiments on synthetic and real data.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了用于多智能体系统中高斯过程（GP）训练和预测的去中心化且可扩展的算法。为了分散 GP 训练优化算法的实施，我们采用乘子交替方向法 (ADMM)。针对最大似然估计的 GP 超参数训练情况，提供了分散式近端 ADMM 的封闭式解决方案。通过使用迭代和共识方法，GP 预测的多种聚合技术是分散的。此外，我们提出了一种基于协方差的最近邻选择策略，使代理的子集能够执行预测。通过对合成数据和真实数据的数值实验说明了所提出方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出适用于多智能体联邦学习的去中心化、可扩展高斯过程算法。
AI.motivation: 传统高斯过程方法在联邦学习中存在集中式计算瓶颈，难以满足多智能体系统的隐私保护和可扩展性需求。
AI.method: 采用ADMM方法实现去中心化优化，提供闭式解用于超参数训练，并通过协方差最近邻选择策略实现分布式预测聚合。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实数据集上的实验验证了所提方法在预测精度和系统可扩展性方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的去中心化高斯过程框架为多智能体联邦学习提供了兼顾隐私保护与计算效率的解决方案。

authors_text: Sean Gillen,Katie Byl
title: Leveraging Reward Gradients For Reinforcement Learning in Differentiable Physics Simulations
title_zh: 在可微物理模拟中利用奖励梯度进行强化学习
abstract: In recent years, fully differentiable rigid body physics simulators have been developed, which can be used to simulate a wide range of robotic systems. In the context of reinforcement learning for control, these simulators theoretically allow algorithms to be applied directly to analytic gradients of the reward function. However, to date, these gradients have proved extremely challenging to use, and are outclassed by algorithms using no gradient information at all. In this work we present a novel algorithm, cross entropy analytic policy gradients, that is able to leverage these gradients to outperform state of art deep reinforcement learning on a set of challenging nonlinear control problems.
summary: In recent years, fully differentiable rigid body physics simulators have been developed, which can be used to simulate a wide range of robotic systems. In the context of reinforcement learning for control, these simulators theoretically allow algorithms to be applied directly to analytic gradients of the reward function. However, to date, these gradients have proved extremely challenging to use, and are outclassed by algorithms using no gradient information at all. In this work we present a novel algorithm, cross entropy analytic policy gradients, that is able to leverage these gradients to outperform state of art deep reinforcement learning on a set of challenging nonlinear control problems.
abstract_zh: 近年来，完全可微的刚体物理模拟器得到了发展，可用于模拟各种机器人系统。在控制强化学习的背景下，这些模拟器理论上允许将算法直接应用于奖励函数的分析梯度。然而，迄今为止，这些梯度已被证明使用起来极具挑战性，并且完全不使用梯度信息的算法所无法比拟。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的算法，即交叉熵分析策略梯度，它能够利用这些梯度在一系列具有挑战性的非线性控制问题上超越最先进的深度强化学习。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型算法，通过利用可微物理模拟中的奖励梯度，提升强化学习在复杂控制任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 尽管可微物理模拟器理论上允许直接使用奖励函数的解析梯度，但现有方法难以有效利用这些梯度，导致其性能不如无梯度算法。
AI.method: 提出交叉熵解析策略梯度算法，直接利用物理模拟器提供的解析梯度优化策略参数。
AI.result: 该算法在多个非线性控制任务中超越了当前最先进的深度强化学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 有效利用可微物理模拟的解析梯度可显著提升强化学习性能，为复杂控制问题提供新解决方案。

authors_text: R G Gayathri,Atul Sajjanhar,Yong Xiang
title: Hybrid Deep Learning Model using SPCAGAN Augmentation for Insider Threat Analysis
title_zh: 使用 SPCAGAN 增强的混合深度学习模型进行内部威胁分析
abstract: Cyberattacks from within an organization's trusted entities are known as insider threats. Anomaly detection using deep learning requires comprehensive data, but insider threat data is not readily available due to confidentiality concerns of organizations. Therefore, there arises demand to generate synthetic data to explore enhanced approaches for threat analysis. We propose a linear manifold learning-based generative adversarial network, SPCAGAN, that takes input from heterogeneous data sources and adds a novel loss function to train the generator to produce high-quality data that closely resembles the original data distribution. Furthermore, we introduce a deep learning-based hybrid model for insider threat analysis. We provide extensive experiments for data synthesis, anomaly detection, adversarial robustness, and synthetic data quality analysis using benchmark datasets. In this context, empirical comparisons show that GAN-based oversampling is competitive with numerous typical oversampling regimes. For synthetic data generation, our SPCAGAN model overcame the problem of mode collapse and converged faster than previous GAN models. Results demonstrate that our proposed approach has a lower error, is more accurate, and generates substantially superior synthetic insider threat data than previous models.
summary: Cyberattacks from within an organization's trusted entities are known as insider threats. Anomaly detection using deep learning requires comprehensive data, but insider threat data is not readily available due to confidentiality concerns of organizations. Therefore, there arises demand to generate synthetic data to explore enhanced approaches for threat analysis. We propose a linear manifold learning-based generative adversarial network, SPCAGAN, that takes input from heterogeneous data sources and adds a novel loss function to train the generator to produce high-quality data that closely resembles the original data distribution. Furthermore, we introduce a deep learning-based hybrid model for insider threat analysis. We provide extensive experiments for data synthesis, anomaly detection, adversarial robustness, and synthetic data quality analysis using benchmark datasets. In this context, empirical comparisons show that GAN-based oversampling is competitive with numerous typical oversampling regimes. For synthetic data generation, our SPCAGAN model overcame the problem of mode collapse and converged faster than previous GAN models. Results demonstrate that our proposed approach has a lower error, is more accurate, and generates substantially superior synthetic insider threat data than previous models.
abstract_zh: 来自组织受信任实体内部的网络攻击称为内部威胁。使用深度学习的异常检测需要全面的数据，但由于组织的机密性问题，内部威胁数据不易获得。因此，需要生成合成数据来探索增强的威胁分析方法。我们提出了一种基于线性流形学习的生成对抗网络 SPCAGAN，它从异构数据源获取输入，并添加一个新颖的损失函数来训练生成器生成与原始数据分布非常相似的高质量数据。此外，我们引入了一种基于深度学习的混合模型，用于内部威胁分析。我们使用基准数据集为数据合成、异常检测、对抗鲁棒性和合成数据质量分析提供广泛的实验。在这种情况下，实证比较表明，基于 GAN 的过采样与许多典型的过采样机制相比具有竞争力。对于合成数据生成，我们的 SPCAGAN 模型克服了模式崩溃问题，并且比以前的 GAN 模型收敛得更快。结果表明，我们提出的方法误差更低，更准确，并且生成的合成内部威胁数据比以前的模型要好得多。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于SPCAGAN生成对抗网络的混合深度学习模型，用于生成高质量的内部威胁合成数据以提升异常检测能力。
AI.motivation: 组织内部威胁数据因保密性难以获取，导致深度学习异常检测模型缺乏足够数据支撑，需通过合成数据增强分析方法。
AI.method: 设计SPCAGAN模型结合线性流形学习与新型损失函数，从异构数据源生成符合原始分布的合成数据，并构建混合深度学习模型进行威胁分析。
AI.result: SPCAGAN克服了模式崩溃问题，收敛速度更快；合成数据质量优于传统方法，在异常检测和对抗鲁棒性实验中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在内部威胁分析中实现了更准确的合成数据生成与检测效果，为数据稀缺场景下的安全分析提供了有效解决方案。

search_text: Hybrid Deep Learning Model using SPCAGAN Augmentation for Insider Threat Analysis 使用 SPCAGAN 增强的混合深度学习模型进行内部威胁分析 Cyberattacks from within an organization's trusted entities are known as insider threats. Anomaly detection using deep learning requires comprehensive data, but insider threat data is not readily available due to confidentiality concerns of organizations. Therefore, there arises demand to generate synthetic data to explore enhanced approaches for threat analysis. We propose a linear manifold learning-based generative adversarial network, SPCAGAN, that takes input from heterogeneous data sources and adds a novel loss function to train the generator to produce high-quality data that closely resembles the original data distribution. Furthermore, we introduce a deep learning-based hybrid model for insider threat analysis. We provide extensive experiments for data synthesis, anomaly detection, adversarial robustness, and synthetic data quality analysis using benchmark datasets. In this context, empirical comparisons show that GAN-based oversampling is competitive with numerous typical oversampling regimes. For synthetic data generation, our SPCAGAN model overcame the problem of mode collapse and converged faster than previous GAN models. Results demonstrate that our proposed approach has a lower error, is more accurate, and generates substantially superior synthetic insider threat data than previous models. 来自组织受信任实体内部的网络攻击称为内部威胁。使用深度学习的异常检测需要全面的数据，但由于组织的机密性问题，内部威胁数据不易获得。因此，需要生成合成数据来探索增强的威胁分析方法。我们提出了一种基于线性流形学习的生成对抗网络 SPCAGAN，它从异构数据源获取输入，并添加一个新颖的损失函数来训练生成器生成与原始数据分布非常相似的高质量数据。此外，我们引入了一种基于深度学习的混合模型，用于内部威胁分析。我们使用基准数据集为数据合成、异常检测、对抗鲁棒性和合成数据质量分析提供广泛的实验。在这种情况下，实证比较表明，基于 GAN 的过采样与许多典型的过采样机制相比具有竞争力。对于合成数据生成，我们的 SPCAGAN 模型克服了模式崩溃问题，并且比以前的 GAN 模型收敛得更快。结果表明，我们提出的方法误差更低，更准确，并且生成的合成内部威胁数据比以前的模型要好得多。 本文提出一种基于SPCAGAN生成对抗网络的混合深度学习模型，用于生成高质量的内部威胁合成数据以提升异常检测能力。 R G Gayathri,Atul Sajjanhar,Yong Xiang cs.CR,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Qilong Zhangli,Jingru Yi,Di Liu,Xiaoxiao He,Zhaoyang Xia,Qi Chang,Ligong Han,Yunhe Gao,Song Wen,Haiming Tang,He Wang,Mu Zhou,Dimitris Metaxas
title: Region Proposal Rectification Towards Robust Instance Segmentation of Biological Images
title_zh: 针对生物图像鲁棒实例分割的区域提案修正
abstract: Top-down instance segmentation framework has shown its superiority in object detection compared to the bottom-up framework. While it is efficient in addressing over-segmentation, top-down instance segmentation suffers from over-crop problem. However, a complete segmentation mask is crucial for biological image analysis as it delivers important morphological properties such as shapes and volumes. In this paper, we propose a region proposal rectification (RPR) module to address this challenging incomplete segmentation problem. In particular, we offer a progressive ROIAlign module to introduce neighbor information into a series of ROIs gradually. The ROI features are fed into an attentive feed-forward network (FFN) for proposal box regression. With additional neighbor information, the proposed RPR module shows significant improvement in correction of region proposal locations and thereby exhibits favorable instance segmentation performances on three biological image datasets compared to state-of-the-art baseline methods. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed RPR module is effective in both anchor-based and anchor-free top-down instance segmentation approaches, suggesting the proposed method can be applied to general top-down instance segmentation of biological images.
summary: Top-down instance segmentation framework has shown its superiority in object detection compared to the bottom-up framework. While it is efficient in addressing over-segmentation, top-down instance segmentation suffers from over-crop problem. However, a complete segmentation mask is crucial for biological image analysis as it delivers important morphological properties such as shapes and volumes. In this paper, we propose a region proposal rectification (RPR) module to address this challenging incomplete segmentation problem. In particular, we offer a progressive ROIAlign module to introduce neighbor information into a series of ROIs gradually. The ROI features are fed into an attentive feed-forward network (FFN) for proposal box regression. With additional neighbor information, the proposed RPR module shows significant improvement in correction of region proposal locations and thereby exhibits favorable instance segmentation performances on three biological image datasets compared to state-of-the-art baseline methods. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed RPR module is effective in both anchor-based and anchor-free top-down instance segmentation approaches, suggesting the proposed method can be applied to general top-down instance segmentation of biological images.
abstract_zh: 与自下而上的框架相比，自上而下的实例分割框架在目标检测方面显示出了其优越性。虽然它可以有效地解决过度分割问题，但自上而下的实例分割会遇到过度裁剪问题。然而，完整的分割掩模对于生物图像分析至关重要，因为它提供了重要的形态特性，例如形状和体积。在本文中，我们提出了一个区域提议校正（RPR）模块来解决这个具有挑战性的不完全分割问题。特别是，我们提供了一个渐进式 ROIAlign 模块，将邻居信息逐渐引入一系列 ROI 中。 ROI 特征被输入到注意力前馈网络 (FFN) 中以进行建议框回归。通过额外的邻居信息，所提出的 RPR 模块在区域提议位置的校正方面显示出显着的改进，从而与最先进的基线方法相比，在三个生物图像数据集上表现出良好的实例分割性能。实验结果表明，所提出的 RPR 模块在基于锚和无锚的自顶向下实例分割方法中都是有效的，这表明所提出的方法可以应用于生物图像的一般自顶向下实例分割。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种区域建议校正模块（RPR），用于解决生物图像实例分割中的不完整分割问题。
AI.motivation: 自上而下实例分割框架存在过度裁剪问题，导致分割掩膜不完整，而完整掩膜对生物图像形态学分析至关重要。
AI.method: 设计渐进式ROIAlign模块引入邻居信息，并结合注意力前馈网络（FFN）进行区域建议框回归校正。
AI.result: 在三个生物图像数据集上显著优于现有方法，且适用于锚点和无锚点两种自上而下分割框架。
AI.conclusion: RPR模块能有效提升生物图像实例分割的完整性与准确性，具有通用性。

authors_text: Xiaobai Ma,David Isele,Jayesh K. Gupta,Kikuo Fujimura,Mykel J. Kochenderfer
title: Recursive Reasoning Graph for Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 多智能体强化学习的递归推理图
abstract: Multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) provides an efficient way for simultaneously learning policies for multiple agents interacting with each other. However, in scenarios requiring complex interactions, existing algorithms can suffer from an inability to accurately anticipate the influence of self-actions on other agents. Incorporating an ability to reason about other agents' potential responses can allow an agent to formulate more effective strategies. This paper adopts a recursive reasoning model in a centralized-training-decentralized-execution framework to help learning agents better cooperate with or compete against others. The proposed algorithm, referred to as the Recursive Reasoning Graph (R2G), shows state-of-the-art performance on multiple multi-agent particle and robotics games.
summary: Multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) provides an efficient way for simultaneously learning policies for multiple agents interacting with each other. However, in scenarios requiring complex interactions, existing algorithms can suffer from an inability to accurately anticipate the influence of self-actions on other agents. Incorporating an ability to reason about other agents' potential responses can allow an agent to formulate more effective strategies. This paper adopts a recursive reasoning model in a centralized-training-decentralized-execution framework to help learning agents better cooperate with or compete against others. The proposed algorithm, referred to as the Recursive Reasoning Graph (R2G), shows state-of-the-art performance on multiple multi-agent particle and robotics games.
abstract_zh: 多智能体强化学习（MARL）为同时学习多个智能体相互交互的策略提供了一种有效的方法。然而，在需要复杂交互的场景中，现有算法可能无法准确预测自我行为对其他智能体的影响。结合推理其他智能体潜在响应的能力可以让智能体制定更有效的策略。本文采用集中训练分散执行框架中的递归推理模型来帮助学习代理更好地与他人合作或竞争。所提出的算法被称为递归推理图（R2G），在多个多智能体粒子和机器人游戏上显示出最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为R2G的递归推理图算法，用于解决多智能体强化学习中复杂交互场景下的策略学习问题。
AI.motivation: 现有MARL算法难以准确预测自身行为对其他智能体的影响，导致合作或竞争策略效果不佳。
AI.method: 采用递归推理模型，在集中训练-分散执行框架中构建智能体间的动态响应关系图。
AI.result: R2G算法在多个多智能体粒子环境和机器人游戏中达到最先进性能水平。
AI.conclusion: 递归推理机制有效提升了多智能体系统中策略学习的准确性和适应性。

Incorporating an ability to reason about other agents' potential responses can allow an agent to formulate more effective strategies. This paper adopts a recursive reasoning model in a centralized-training-decentralized-execution framework to help learning agents better cooperate with or compete against others. The proposed algorithm, referred to as the Recursive Reasoning Graph (R2G), shows state-of-the-art performance on multiple multi-agent particle and robotics games. 多智能体强化学习（MARL）为同时学习多个智能体相互交互的策略提供了一种有效的方法。然而，在需要复杂交互的场景中，现有算法可能无法准确预测自我行为对其他智能体的影响。结合推理其他智能体潜在响应的能力可以让智能体制定更有效的策略。本文采用集中训练分散执行框架中的递归推理模型来帮助学习代理更好地与他人合作或竞争。所提出的算法被称为递归推理图（R2G），在多个多智能体粒子和机器人游戏上显示出最先进的性能。 本文提出一种名为R2G的递归推理图算法，用于解决多智能体强化学习中复杂交互场景下的策略学习问题。 Xiaobai Ma,David Isele,Jayesh K. Gupta,Kikuo Fujimura,Mykel J. Kochenderfer cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.MA

authors_text: Xubo Liu,Xinhao Mei,Qiushi Huang,Jianyuan Sun,Jinzheng Zhao,Haohe Liu,Mark D. Plumbley,Volkan Kılıç,Wenwu Wang
title: Leveraging Pre-trained BERT for Audio Captioning
title_zh: 利用预先训练的 BERT 进行音频字幕
comment: Submitted to the 30th European Signal Processing Conference (EUSIPCO), 5 pages, 2 figures
comments: Submitted to the 30th European Signal Processing Conference (EUSIPCO), 5 pages, 2 figures
abstract: Audio captioning aims at using natural language to describe the content of an audio clip. Existing audio captioning systems are generally based on an encoder-decoder architecture, in which acoustic information is extracted by an audio encoder and then a language decoder is used to generate the captions. Training an audio captioning system often encounters the problem of data scarcity. Transferring knowledge from pre-trained audio models such as Pre-trained Audio Neural Networks (PANNs) have recently emerged as a useful method to mitigate this issue. However, there is less attention on exploiting pre-trained language models for the decoder, compared with the encoder. BERT is a pre-trained language model that has been extensively used in Natural Language Processing (NLP) tasks. Nevertheless, the potential of BERT as the language decoder for audio captioning has not been investigated. In this study, we demonstrate the efficacy of the pre-trained BERT model for audio captioning. Specifically, we apply PANNs as the encoder and initialize the decoder from the public pre-trained BERT models. We conduct an empirical study on the use of these BERT models for the decoder in the audio captioning model. Our models achieve competitive results with the existing audio captioning methods on the AudioCaps dataset.

BERT is a pre-trained language model that has been extensively used in Natural Language Processing (NLP) tasks. Nevertheless, the potential of BERT as the language decoder for audio captioning has not been investigated. In this study, we demonstrate the efficacy of the pre-trained BERT model for audio captioning. Specifically, we apply PANNs as the encoder and initialize the decoder from the public pre-trained BERT models. We conduct an empirical study on the use of these BERT models for the decoder in the audio captioning model. Our models achieve competitive results with the existing audio captioning methods on the AudioCaps dataset.
abstract_zh: 音频字幕旨在使用自然语言来描述音频剪辑的内容。现有的音频字幕系统通常基于编码器-解码器架构，其中由音频编码器提取声学信息，然后使用语言解码器生成字幕。训练音频字幕系统经常遇到数据稀缺的问题。从预训练音频模型（例如预训练音频神经网络 (PANN)）转移知识最近已成为缓解此问题的有效方法。然而，与编码器相比，人们较少关注利用解码器的预训练语言模型。 BERT 是一种预训练的语言模型，已广泛应用于自然语言处理（NLP）任务中。然而，BERT 作为音频字幕语言解码器的潜力尚未得到研究。在这项研究中，我们展示了预训练的 BERT 模型在音频字幕方面的功效。具体来说，我们应用 PANN 作为编码器，并从公共预训练的 BERT 模型初始化解码器。我们对这些 BERT 模型在音频字幕模型中的解码器的使用进行了实证研究。我们的模型在 AudioCaps 数据集上与现有的音频字幕方法相比取得了有竞争力的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将预训练BERT模型应用于音频字幕生成任务的解码器部分，以提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有音频字幕系统面临数据稀缺问题，虽采用预训练音频模型（如PANNs）缓解，但较少探索预训练语言模型（如BERT）在解码器中的应用潜力。
AI.method: 以PANNs作为音频编码器提取声学特征，使用公开预训练BERT模型初始化解码器，并在AudioCaps数据集上进行实验验证。
AI.result: 所提模型在AudioCaps数据集上的表现与现有音频字幕方法具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 预训练BERT作为解码器在音频字幕任务中有效，为未来研究提供了新方向。

authors_text: Maximilian Lam,Michael Mitzenmacher,Vijay Janapa Reddi,Gu-Yeon Wei,David Brooks
title: Tabula: Efficiently Computing Nonlinear Activation Functions for Secure Neural Network Inference
title_zh: Tabula：高效计算非线性激活函数以实现安全神经网络推理
abstract: Multiparty computation approaches to secure neural network inference commonly rely on garbled circuits for securely executing nonlinear activation functions. However, garbled circuits require excessive communication between server and client, impose significant storage overheads, and incur large runtime penalties. To reduce these costs, we propose an alternative to garbled circuits: Tabula, an algorithm based on secure lookup tables. Our approach precomputes lookup tables during an offline phase that contains the result of all possible nonlinear function calls. Because these tables incur exponential storage costs in the number of operands and the precision of the input values, we use quantization to reduce these storage costs to make this approach practical. This enables an online phase where securely computing the result of a nonlinear function requires just a single round of communication, with communication cost equal to twice the number of bits of the input to the nonlinear function. In practice our approach costs 2 bytes of communication per nonlinear function call in the online phase. Compared to garbled circuits with 8-bit quantized inputs, when computing individual nonlinear functions during the online phase, experiments show Tabula with 8-bit activations uses between $280$-$560 \times$ less communication, is over $100\times$ faster, and uses a comparable (within a factor of 2) amount of storage; compared against other state-of-the-art protocols Tabula achieves greater than $40\times$ communication reduction. This leads to significant performance gains over garbled circuits with quantized inputs during the online phase of secure inference of neural networks: Tabula reduces end-to-end inference communication by up to $9 \times$ and achieves an end-to-end inference speedup of up to $50 \times$, while imposing comparable storage and offline preprocessing costs.
summary: Multiparty computation approaches to secure neural network inference commonly rely on garbled circuits for securely executing nonlinear activation functions. However, garbled circuits require excessive communication between server and client, impose significant storage overheads, and incur large runtime penalties. To reduce these costs, we propose an alternative to garbled circuits: Tabula, an algorithm based on secure lookup tables. Our approach precomputes lookup tables during an offline phase that contains the result of all possible nonlinear function calls. Because these tables incur exponential storage costs in the number of operands and the precision of the input values, we use quantization to reduce these storage costs to make this approach practical. This enables an online phase where securely computing the result of a nonlinear function requires just a single round of communication, with communication cost equal to twice the number of bits of the input to the nonlinear function. In practice our approach costs 2 bytes of communication per nonlinear function call in the online phase. Compared to garbled circuits with 8-bit quantized inputs, when computing individual nonlinear functions during the online phase, experiments show Tabula with 8-bit activations uses between $280$-$560 \times$ less communication, is over $100\times$ faster, and uses a comparable (within a factor of 2) amount of storage; compared against other state-of-the-art protocols Tabula achieves greater than $40\times$ communication reduction. This leads to significant performance gains over garbled circuits with quantized inputs during the online phase of secure inference of neural networks: Tabula reduces end-to-end inference communication by up to $9 \times$ and achieves an end-to-end inference speedup of up to $50 \times$, while imposing comparable storage and offline preprocessing costs.
abstract_zh: 确保神经网络推理安全的多方计算方法通常依赖于乱码电路来安全地执行非线性激活函数。然而，乱码电路需要服务器和客户端之间进行过多的通信，造成显着的存储开销，并导致大量的运行时间损失。为了降低这些成本，我们提出了一种乱码电路的替代方案：Tabula，一种基于安全查找表的算法。我们的方法在离线阶段预先计算查找表，其中包含所有可能的非线性函数调用的结果。由于这些表在操作数数量和输入值精度方面会产生指数存储成本，因此我们使用量化来降低这些存储成本，以使这种方法切实可行。这使得在线阶段能够安全地计算非线性函数的结果，仅需要一轮通信，通信成本等于非线性函数输入位数的两倍。实际上，我们的方法在在线阶段每个非线性函数调用需要 2 个字节的通信成本。与具有 8 位量化输入的乱码电路相比，在在线阶段计算单个非线性函数时，实验表明，具有 8 位激活的 Tabula 使用的通信量少了 280 美元 - 560 美元，速度快了 100 美元以上，并且使用了相当的存储量（在 2 倍以内）；与其他最先进的协议相比，Tabula 实现了超过 40\times$ 的通信减少。这使得在神经网络安全推理的在线阶段，与具有量化输入的乱码电路相比，性能得到了显着提升：Tabula 将端到端推理通信减少了高达 9 美元，并实现了高达 50 美元的端到端推理加速，同时实现了相当的存储和离线预处理成本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Tabula的算法，用于在安全神经网络推理中高效计算非线性激活函数，以替代传统的加密电路方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的多方计算方法依赖加密电路实现安全非线性激活函数计算，但存在通信开销大、存储成本高和运行时延高的问题。
AI.method: 通过预计算安全查找表（Lookup Tables）并结合量化技术降低存储成本，实现在线阶段只需单轮通信的非线性函数计算。
AI.result: 相比8位量化输入的加密电路，Tabula在通信量上减少280-560倍，速度提升100倍以上，存储成本相近；相比其他先进协议，通信量减少40倍以上，端到端推理通信量减少9倍，速度提升50倍。
AI.conclusion: Tabula在保持可比存储和预处理成本的前提下，显著提升了安全神经网络推理的通信效率和运行速度。

authors_text: Jonathan A. Kelner,Frederic Koehler,Raghu Meka,Dhruv Rohatgi
title: Distributional Hardness Against Preconditioned Lasso via Erasure-Robust Designs
title_zh: 通过稳健擦除设计对抗预条件套索的分布硬度
abstract: Sparse linear regression with ill-conditioned Gaussian random designs is widely believed to exhibit a statistical/computational gap, but there is surprisingly little formal evidence for this belief, even in the form of examples that are hard for restricted classes of algorithms. Recent work has shown that, for certain covariance matrices, the broad class of Preconditioned Lasso programs provably cannot succeed on polylogarithmically sparse signals with a sublinear number of samples. However, this lower bound only shows that for every preconditioner, there exists at least one signal that it fails to recover successfully. This leaves open the possibility that, for example, trying multiple different preconditioners solves every sparse linear regression problem. In this work, we prove a stronger lower bound that overcomes this issue. For an appropriate covariance matrix, we construct a single signal distribution on which any invertibly-preconditioned Lasso program fails with high probability, unless it receives a linear number of samples. Surprisingly, at the heart of our lower bound is a new positive result in compressed sensing. We show that standard sparse random designs are with high probability robust to adversarial measurement erasures, in the sense that if $b$ measurements are erased, then all but $O(b)$ of the coordinates of the signal are still information-theoretically identifiable. To our knowledge, this is the first time that partial recoverability of arbitrary sparse signals under erasures has been studied in compressed sensing.
summary: Sparse linear regression with ill-conditioned Gaussian random designs is widely believed to exhibit a statistical/computational gap, but there is surprisingly little formal evidence for this belief, even in the form of examples that are hard for restricted classes of algorithms. Recent work has shown that, for certain covariance matrices, the broad class of Preconditioned Lasso programs provably cannot succeed on polylogarithmically sparse signals with a sublinear number of samples. However, this lower bound only shows that for every preconditioner, there exists at least one signal that it fails to recover successfully. This leaves open the possibility that, for example, trying multiple different preconditioners solves every sparse linear regression problem. In this work, we prove a stronger lower bound that overcomes this issue. For an appropriate covariance matrix, we construct a single signal distribution on which any invertibly-preconditioned Lasso program fails with high probability, unless it receives a linear number of samples. Surprisingly, at the heart of our lower bound is a new positive result in compressed sensing. We show that standard sparse random designs are with high probability robust to adversarial measurement erasures, in the sense that if $b$ measurements are erased, then all but $O(b)$ of the coordinates of the signal are still information-theoretically identifiable. To our knowledge, this is the first time that partial recoverability of arbitrary sparse signals under erasures has been studied in compressed sensing.
abstract_zh: 人们普遍认为，病态高斯随机设计的稀疏线性回归表现出统计/计算差距，但令人惊讶的是，这种信念的正式证据很少，即使是对于受限算法类别来说很难的示例形式。最近的工作表明，对于某些协方差矩阵，广泛的预处理 Lasso 程序可能无法在具有次线性样本数的多对数稀疏信号上取得成功。然而，这个下界仅表明对于每个预处理器，至少存在一个信号表明其无法成功恢复。这留下了一种可能性，例如，尝试多个不同的预处理器可以解决每个稀疏线性回归问题。在这项工作中，我们证明了一个更强的下界来克服这个问题。对于适当的协方差矩阵，我们构建了一个单一信号分布，任何可逆预处理的 Lasso 程序都以高概率失败，除非它接收到线性数量的样本。令人惊讶的是，我们下限的核心是压缩感知领域的一个新的积极结果。我们证明，标准稀疏随机设计对于对抗性测量擦除具有很高的概率鲁棒性，从某种意义上说，如果擦除 $b$ 测量值，那么除了 $O(b)$ 之外的所有信号坐标在信息理论上仍然是可识别的。据我们所知，这是首次在压缩感知中研究擦除情况下任意稀疏信号的部分恢复性。

AI.tldr: 本文通过构造特定协方差矩阵和信号分布，证明了预条件Lasso在样本量不足时无法有效解决稀疏线性回归问题，从而强化了统计计算间隙的下界。
AI.motivation: 尽管稀疏线性回归在病态高斯设计下存在统计计算间隙的猜想，但缺乏针对预条件Lasso等算法类的正式证据，现有结果仅能证明单个预条件器的失败案例。
AI.method: 构造特定协方差矩阵和信号分布，结合压缩感知中对抗性测量擦除的鲁棒性结果，证明任何可逆预条件Lasso在样本量不足时均无法成功恢复信号。
AI.result: 证明了当样本量低于线性规模时，所有可逆预条件Lasso均无法以高概率恢复特定信号分布；同时发现标准稀疏设计在擦除测量下仍具有部分可恢复性。
AI.conclusion: 通过构造性证明强化了预条件Lasso的计算下界，排除了通过多预条件器组合解决稀疏回归的可能性，并为压缩感知提供了新的鲁棒性理论支持。

authors_text: Kiran Mantripragada,Faisal Z. Qureshi
title: Evaluation of Dirichlet Process Gaussian Mixtures for Segmentation on Noisy Hyperspectral Images
title_zh: 用于噪声高光谱图像分割的狄利克雷过程高斯混合评估
abstract: Image segmentation is a fundamental step for the interpretation of Remote Sensing Images. Clustering or segmentation methods usually precede the classification task and are used as support tools for manual labeling. The most common algorithms, such as k-means, mean-shift, and MRS, require an extra manual step to find the scale parameter. The segmentation results are severely affected if the parameters are not correctly tuned and diverge from the optimal values. Additionally, the search for the optimal scale is a costly task, as it requires a comprehensive hyper-parameter search. This paper proposes and evaluates a method for segmentation of Hyperspectral Images using the Dirichlet Process Gaussian Mixture Model. Our model can self-regulate the parameters until it finds the optimal values of scale and the number of clusters in a given dataset. The results demonstrate the potential of our method to find objects in a Hyperspectral Image while bypassing the burden of manual search of the optimal parameters. In addition, our model also produces similar results on noisy datasets, while previous research usually required a pre-processing task for noise reduction and spectral smoothing.
summary: Image segmentation is a fundamental step for the interpretation of Remote Sensing Images. Clustering or segmentation methods usually precede the classification task and are used as support tools for manual labeling. The most common algorithms, such as k-means, mean-shift, and MRS, require an extra manual step to find the scale parameter. The segmentation results are severely affected if the parameters are not correctly tuned and diverge from the optimal values. Additionally, the search for the optimal scale is a costly task, as it requires a comprehensive hyper-parameter search. This paper proposes and evaluates a method for segmentation of Hyperspectral Images using the Dirichlet Process Gaussian Mixture Model. Our model can self-regulate the parameters until it finds the optimal values of scale and the number of clusters in a given dataset. The results demonstrate the potential of our method to find objects in a Hyperspectral Image while bypassing the burden of manual search of the optimal parameters. In addition, our model also produces similar results on noisy datasets, while previous research usually required a pre-processing task for noise reduction and spectral smoothing.
abstract_zh: 图像分割是遥感图像解释的基本步骤。聚类或分割方法通常先于分类任务，并用作手动标记的支持工具。最常见的算法（例如 k-means、mean-shift 和 MRS）需要额外的手动步骤来查找尺度参数。如果参数没有正确调整并偏离最佳值，分割结果会受到严重影响。此外，搜索最佳尺度是一项代价高昂的任务，因为它需要全面的超参数搜索。本文提出并评估了一种使用狄利克雷过程高斯混合模型分割高光谱图像的方法。我们的模型可以自我调节参数，直到找到给定数据集中的最佳规模值和聚类数量。结果证明了我们的方法在高光谱图像中查找对象的潜力，同时绕过了手动搜索最佳参数的负担。此外，我们的模型还在噪声数据集上产生类似的结果，而以前的研究通常需要预处理任务来降噪和频谱平滑。

AI.tldr: 评估狄利克雷过程高斯混合模型在噪声超光谱图像分割中的应用。
AI.motivation: 传统分割方法（如k-means）需手动调整参数，耗时且结果易受参数影响，而现有研究通常需要预处理降噪。
AI.method: 提出基于狄利克雷过程高斯混合模型的自适应分割方法，自动调节尺度参数和聚类数量。
AI.result: 在噪声数据集上实现有效分割，无需预处理，且结果与传统方法相近。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可高效分割噪声超光谱图像，减少人工干预和预处理需求。

authors_text: Michael Hibbard,Abraham P. Vinod,Jesse Quattrociocchi,Ufuk Topcu
title: Safely: Safe Stochastic Motion Planning Under Constrained Sensing via Duality
title_zh: 安全：通过对偶性约束感知下的安全随机运动规划
comment: 11 pages, submitted to Transactions on Robotics (T-RO)
comments: 11 pages, submitted to Transactions on Robotics (T-RO)
abstract: Consider a robot operating in an uncertain environment with stochastic, dynamic obstacles. Despite the clear benefits for trajectory optimization, it is often hard to keep track of each obstacle at every time step due to sensing and hardware limitations. We introduce the Safely motion planner, a receding-horizon control framework, that simultaneously synthesizes both a trajectory for the robot to follow as well as a sensor selection strategy that prescribes trajectory-relevant obstacles to measure at each time step while respecting the sensing constraints of the robot. We perform the motion planning using sequential quadratic programming, and prescribe obstacles to sense based on the duality information associated with the convex subproblems. We guarantee safety by ensuring that the probability of the robot colliding with any of the obstacles is below a prescribed threshold at every time step of the planned robot trajectory. We demonstrate the efficacy of the Safely motion planner through software and hardware experiments.
summary: Consider a robot operating in an uncertain environment with stochastic, dynamic obstacles. Despite the clear benefits for trajectory optimization, it is often hard to keep track of each obstacle at every time step due to sensing and hardware limitations. We introduce the Safely motion planner, a receding-horizon control framework, that simultaneously synthesizes both a trajectory for the robot to follow as well as a sensor selection strategy that prescribes trajectory-relevant obstacles to measure at each time step while respecting the sensing constraints of the robot. We perform the motion planning using sequential quadratic programming, and prescribe obstacles to sense based on the duality information associated with the convex subproblems. We guarantee safety by ensuring that the probability of the robot colliding with any of the obstacles is below a prescribed threshold at every time step of the planned robot trajectory. We demonstrate the efficacy of the Safely motion planner through software and hardware experiments.
abstract_zh: 考虑一个在具有随机动态障碍的不确定环境中运行的机器人。尽管轨迹优化有明显的好处，但由于传感和硬件的限制，通常很难在每个时间步跟踪每个障碍物。我们引入了 Safely 运动规划器，这是一种后退地平线控制框架，它同时合成机器人要遵循的轨迹以及传感器选择策略，该策略规定在每个时间步测量与轨迹相关的障碍物，同时尊重机器人的传感约束。我们使用顺序二次规划执行运动规划，并根据与凸子问题相关的对偶信息规定感知障碍。我们通过确保机器人在计划的机器人轨迹的每个时间步与任何障碍物碰撞的概率低于规定的阈值来保证安全。我们通过软件和硬件实验展示了 Safely 运动规划器的功效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Safely的运动规划器，用于在受限感知条件下为存在随机动态障碍物的机器人安全规划轨迹，并同时确定需要测量的障碍物。
AI.motivation: 机器人在不确定环境中因感知和硬件限制难以实时跟踪所有障碍物，导致轨迹优化存在安全隐患，需在规划轨迹时兼顾传感器选择策略以确保安全。
AI.method: 基于滚动时域控制框架，结合序列二次规划进行运动规划，并利用凸子问题的对偶信息确定需感知的障碍物，通过概率约束保证轨迹安全。
AI.result: 通过软件和硬件实验验证了Safely运动规划器在动态障碍环境中的有效性，能够满足感知约束并保持碰撞概率低于设定阈值。
AI.conclusion: Safely通过联合优化轨迹与传感器选择策略，在受限感知条件下实现了安全可靠的运动规划，为复杂动态环境下的机器人控制提供了新方法。

authors_text: Phaedra S. Curlin,Madaline A. Muniz,Mason M. Bell,Alexis A. Muniz,Jack O. Burns
title: Virtual Reality Digital Twin and Environment for Troubleshooting Lunar-based Infrastructure Assembly Failures
title_zh: 用于解决月球基础设施组装故障的虚拟现实数字孪生和环境
comment: 5 pages, 9 figures, submitted to: International Workshop on Virtual, Augmented, and Mixed-Reality for Human-Robot Interactions 2022
comments: 5 pages, 9 figures, submitted to: International Workshop on Virtual, Augmented, and Mixed-Reality for Human-Robot Interactions 2022
abstract: Humans and robots will need to collaborate in order to create a sustainable human lunar presence by the end of the 2020s. This includes cases in which a human will be required to teleoperate an autonomous rover that has encountered an instrument assembly failure. To aid teleoperators in the troubleshooting process, we propose a virtual reality digital twin placed in a simulated environment. Here, the operator can virtually interact with a digital version of the rover and mechanical arm that uses the same controls and kinematic model. The user can also adopt the egocentric (a first person view through using stereoscopic passthrough) and exocentric (a third person view where the operator can virtually walk around the environment and rover as if they were on site) view. We also discuss our metrics for evaluating the differences between our digital and physical robot, as well as the experimental concept based on real and applicable missions, and future work that would compare our platform to traditional troubleshooting methods.
summary: Humans and robots will need to collaborate in order to create a sustainable human lunar presence by the end of the 2020s. This includes cases in which a human will be required to teleoperate an autonomous rover that has encountered an instrument assembly failure. To aid teleoperators in the troubleshooting process, we propose a virtual reality digital twin placed in a simulated environment. Here, the operator can virtually interact with a digital version of the rover and mechanical arm that uses the same controls and kinematic model. The user can also adopt the egocentric (a first person view through using stereoscopic passthrough) and exocentric (a third person view where the operator can virtually walk around the environment and rover as if they were on site) view. We also discuss our metrics for evaluating the differences between our digital and physical robot, as well as the experimental concept based on real and applicable missions, and future work that would compare our platform to traditional troubleshooting methods.
abstract_zh: 人类和机器人需要合作，以便在 2020 年代末之前创造可持续的人类月球存在。这包括需要人员远程操作遇到仪器组装故障的自主流动站的情况。为了帮助远程操作员进行故障排除过程，我们建议在模拟环境中放置虚拟现实数字孪生。在这里，操作员可以虚拟地与使用相同控制和运动学模型的数字版本的流动站和机械臂进行交互。用户还可以采用以自我为中心（通过使用立体透视的第一人称视图）和外中心（第三人称视图，其中操作员可以虚拟地在环境中行走并漫游，就像他们在现场一样）视图。我们还讨论了评估数字机器人和物理机器人之间差异的指标，以及基于真实和适用任务的实验概念，以及将我们的平台与传统故障排除方法进行比较的未来工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于虚拟现实的数字孪生环境，用于远程诊断月球基地基础设施组装故障，通过虚拟交互辅助操作员控制机器人机械臂。
AI.motivation: 为实现2020年代末月球可持续有人居住目标，需解决月面机器人组装故障的远程诊断难题，传统方法存在操作延迟和空间感知不足的问题。
AI.method: 构建与物理机器人相同运动学模型的虚拟数字孪生系统，集成第一人称立体视觉与第三人称漫游视角，设计数字孪生与实体机器人性能对比评估指标。
AI.result: 验证了虚拟环境与物理系统的控制一致性，建立了基于真实任务场景的实验框架，但尚未开展与传统方法的对比实验。
AI.conclusion: 该数字孪生平台为月球基地远程运维提供了沉浸式训练与故障诊断新范式，未来需通过对比实验验证其相对于传统方法的效能优势。

authors_text: Aleksandros Sobczyk,Efstratios Gallopoulos
title: pylspack: Parallel algorithms and data structures for sketching, column subset selection, regression and leverage scores
title_zh: pylspack：用于草图绘制、列子集选择、回归和杠杆分数的并行算法和数据结构
abstract: We present parallel algorithms and data structures for three fundamental operations in Numerical Linear Algebra: (i) Gaussian and CountSketch random projections and their combination, (ii) computation of the Gram matrix and (iii) computation of the squared row norms of the product of two matrices, with a special focus on "tall-and-skinny" matrices, which arise in many applications. We provide a detailed analysis of the ubiquitous CountSketch transform and its combination with Gaussian random projections, accounting for memory requirements, computational complexity and workload balancing. We also demonstrate how these results can be applied to column subset selection, least squares regression and leverage scores computation. These tools have been implemented in pylspack, a publicly available Python package (https://github.com/IBM/pylspack) whose core is written in C++ and parallelized with OpenMP, and which is compatible with standard matrix data structures of SciPy and NumPy. Extensive numerical experiments indicate that the proposed algorithms scale well and significantly outperform existing libraries for tall-and-skinny matrices.
summary: We present parallel algorithms and data structures for three fundamental operations in Numerical Linear Algebra: (i) Gaussian and CountSketch random projections and their combination, (ii) computation of the Gram matrix and (iii) computation of the squared row norms of the product of two matrices, with a special focus on "tall-and-skinny" matrices, which arise in many applications. We provide a detailed analysis of the ubiquitous CountSketch transform and its combination with Gaussian random projections, accounting for memory requirements, computational complexity and workload balancing. We also demonstrate how these results can be applied to column subset selection, least squares regression and leverage scores computation. These tools have been implemented in pylspack, a publicly available Python package (https://github.com/IBM/pylspack) whose core is written in C++ and parallelized with OpenMP, and which is compatible with standard matrix data structures of SciPy and NumPy. Extensive numerical experiments indicate that the proposed algorithms scale well and significantly outperform existing libraries for tall-and-skinny matrices.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了数值线性代数中三种基本运算的并行算法和数据结构：（i）高斯和 CountSketch 随机投影及其组合，（ii）格拉姆矩阵的计算和（iii）两个矩阵乘积的平方行范数的计算，特别关注在许多应用中出现的“高瘦”矩阵。我们对无处不在的 CountSketch 变换及其与高斯随机投影的组合进行了详细分析，考虑了内存需求、计算复杂性和工作负载平衡。我们还演示了如何将这些结果应用于列子集选择、最小二乘回归和杠杆分数计算。这些工具已在 pylspack 中实现，pylspack 是一个公开可用的 Python 包（https://github.com/IBM/pylspack），其核心是用 C++ 编写的，并与 OpenMP 并行化，并且与 SciPy 和 NumPy 的标准矩阵数据结构兼容。大量的数值实验表明，所提出的算法具有良好的扩展性，并且在高瘦矩阵方面明显优于现有的库。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为pylspack的并行算法和数据结构，用于处理数值线性代数中的关键操作，如随机投影、Gram矩阵计算和矩阵乘积的行范数计算，特别针对高而瘦矩阵进行了优化。
AI.motivation: 高而瘦矩阵在许多应用中广泛存在，但现有方法在处理此类矩阵时效率较低，亟需高效的并行算法和工具。
AI.method: 设计并行算法优化CountSketch和Gaussian随机投影的组合，分析内存需求和计算复杂度，通过OpenMP在C++中实现核心算法，并兼容SciPy和NumPy的矩阵结构。

search_text: pylspack: Parallel algorithms and data structures for sketching, column subset selection, regression and leverage scores pylspack：用于草图绘制、列子集选择、回归和杠杆分数的并行算法和数据结构 We present parallel algorithms and data structures for three fundamental operations in Numerical Linear Algebra: (i) Gaussian and CountSketch random projections and their combination, (ii) computation of the Gram matrix and (iii) computation of the squared row norms of the product of two matrices, with a special focus on "tall-and-skinny" matrices, which arise in many applications. We provide a detailed analysis of the ubiquitous CountSketch transform and its combination with Gaussian random projections, accounting for memory requirements, computational complexity and workload balancing. We also demonstrate how these results can be applied to column subset selection, least squares regression and leverage scores computation. These tools have been implemented in pylspack, a publicly available Python package (https://github.com/IBM/pylspack) whose core is written in C++ and parallelized with OpenMP, and which is compatible with standard matrix data structures of SciPy and NumPy. Extensive numerical experiments indicate that the proposed algorithms scale well and significantly outperform existing libraries for tall-and-skinny matrices. 我们提出了数值线性代数中三种基本运算的并行算法和数据结构：（i）高斯和 CountSketch 随机投影及其组合，（ii）格拉姆矩阵的计算和（iii）两个矩阵乘积的平方行范数的计算，特别关注在许多应用中出现的“高瘦”矩阵。我们对无处不在的 CountSketch 变换及其与高斯随机投影的组合进行了详细分析，考虑了内存需求、计算复杂性和工作负载平衡。我们还演示了如何将这些结果应用于列子集选择、最小二乘回归和杠杆分数计算。这些工具已在 pylspack 中实现，pylspack 是一个公开可用的 Python 包（https://github.com/IBM/pylspack），其核心是用 C++ 编写的，并与 OpenMP 并行化，并且与 SciPy 和 NumPy 的标准矩阵数据结构兼容。大量的数值实验表明，所提出的算法具有良好的扩展性，并且在高瘦矩阵方面明显优于现有的库。 本文提出了一种名为pylspack的并行算法和数据结构，用于处理数值线性代数中的关键操作，如随机投影、Gram矩阵计算和矩阵乘积的行范数计算，特别针对高而瘦矩阵进行了优化。 Aleksandros Sobczyk,Efstratios Gallopoulos cs.DS,cs.DC,cs.MS

authors_text: Yawei Li,Xin Wu,Ping Yang,Guoqian Jiang,Yuan Luo
title: Machine Learning Applications in Lung Cancer Diagnosis, Treatment and Prognosis
title_zh: 机器学习在肺癌诊断、治疗和预后中的应用
abstract: The recent development of imaging and sequencing technologies enables systematic advances in the clinical study of lung cancer. Meanwhile, the human mind is limited in effectively handling and fully utilizing the accumulation of such enormous amounts of data. Machine learning-based approaches play a critical role in integrating and analyzing these large and complex datasets, which have extensively characterized lung cancer through the use of different perspectives from these accrued data. In this article, we provide an overview of machine learning-based approaches that strengthen the varying aspects of lung cancer diagnosis and therapy, including early detection, auxiliary diagnosis, prognosis prediction and immunotherapy practice. Moreover, we highlight the challenges and opportunities for future applications of machine learning in lung cancer.
summary: The recent development of imaging and sequencing technologies enables systematic advances in the clinical study of lung cancer. Meanwhile, the human mind is limited in effectively handling and fully utilizing the accumulation of such enormous amounts of data. Machine learning-based approaches play a critical role in integrating and analyzing these large and complex datasets, which have extensively characterized lung cancer through the use of different perspectives from these accrued data. In this article, we provide an overview of machine learning-based approaches that strengthen the varying aspects of lung cancer diagnosis and therapy, including early detection, auxiliary diagnosis, prognosis prediction and immunotherapy practice. Moreover, we highlight the challenges and opportunities for future applications of machine learning in lung cancer.
abstract_zh: 成像和测序技术的最新发展使肺癌临床研究取得了系统性进展。同时，人类的思维在有效处理和充分利用如此大量的数据积累方面是有限的。基于机器学习的方法在整合和分析这些庞大而复杂的数据集方面发挥着关键作用，这些数据集通过使用这些累积数据的不同视角来广泛描述肺癌的特征。在本文中，我们概述了基于机器学习的方法，这些方法加强了肺癌诊断和治疗的各个方面，包括早期检测、辅助诊断、预后预测和免疫治疗实践。此外，我们强调了机器学习未来在肺癌中应用的挑战和机遇。

AI.tldr: 综述机器学习在肺癌诊断、治疗及预后中的应用，探讨其挑战与机遇
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以处理肺癌研究中的海量数据，需借助机器学习提升分析效率与准确性
AI.method: 系统综述机器学习技术在肺癌早期检测、辅助诊断、预后预测及免疫治疗中的具体应用案例与技术手段
AI.result: 总结机器学习在提升肺癌诊疗精准度中的成效，同时指出数据质量、模型可解释性及临床转化等挑战
AI.conclusion: 机器学习显著推动肺癌诊疗发展，未来需解决数据标准化、算法优化及多学科协作等问题以促进临床应用

authors_text: Cong Cao,Tianwei Lin,Dongliang He,Fu Li,Huanjing Yue,Jingyu Yang,Errui Ding
title: Adversarial Dual-Student with Differentiable Spatial Warping for Semi-Supervised Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于半监督语义分割的具有可微分空间扭曲的对抗性双学生
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology (TCSVT)
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology (TCSVT)
abstract: A common challenge posed to robust semantic segmentation is the expensive data annotation cost. Existing semi-supervised solutions show great potential for solving this problem. Their key idea is constructing consistency regularization with unsupervised data augmentation from unlabeled data for model training. The perturbations for unlabeled data enable the consistency training loss, which benefits semi-supervised semantic segmentation. However, these perturbations destroy image context and introduce unnatural boundaries, which is harmful for semantic segmentation. Besides, the widely adopted semi-supervised learning framework, i.e. mean-teacher, suffers performance limitation since the student model finally converges to the teacher model. In this paper, first of all, we propose a context friendly differentiable geometric warping to conduct unsupervised data augmentation; secondly, a novel adversarial dual-student framework is proposed to improve the Mean-Teacher from the following two aspects: (1) dual student models are learned independently except for a stabilization constraint to encourage exploiting model diversities; (2) adversarial training scheme is applied to both students and the discriminators are resorted to distinguish reliable pseudo-label of unlabeled data for self-training. Effectiveness is validated via extensive experiments on PASCAL VOC2012 and Cityscapes. Our solution significantly improves the performance and state-of-the-art results are achieved on both datasets. Remarkably, compared with fully supervision, our solution achieves comparable mIoU of 73.4% using only 12.5% annotated data on PASCAL VOC2012. Our codes and models are available at https://github.com/cao-cong/ADS-SemiSeg.
summary: A common challenge posed to robust semantic segmentation is the expensive data annotation cost. Existing semi-supervised solutions show great potential for solving this problem. Their key idea is constructing consistency regularization with unsupervised data augmentation from unlabeled data for model training. The perturbations for unlabeled data enable the consistency training loss, which benefits semi-supervised semantic segmentation. However, these perturbations destroy image context and introduce unnatural boundaries, which is harmful for semantic segmentation. Besides, the widely adopted semi-supervised learning framework, i.e. mean-teacher, suffers performance limitation since the student model finally converges to the teacher model. In this paper, first of all, we propose a context friendly differentiable geometric warping to conduct unsupervised data augmentation; secondly, a novel adversarial dual-student framework is proposed to improve the Mean-Teacher from the following two aspects: (1) dual student models are learned independently except for a stabilization constraint to encourage exploiting model diversities; (2) adversarial training scheme is applied to both students and the discriminators are resorted to distinguish reliable pseudo-label of unlabeled data for self-training. Effectiveness is validated via extensive experiments on PASCAL VOC2012 and Cityscapes. Our solution significantly improves the performance and state-of-the-art results are achieved on both datasets. Remarkably, compared with fully supervision, our solution achieves comparable mIoU of 73.4% using only 12.5% annotated data on PASCAL VOC2012. Our codes and models are available at https://github.com/cao-cong/ADS-SemiSeg.
abstract_zh: 强大的语义分割面临的一个常见挑战是昂贵的数据注释成本。现有的半监督解决方案显示出解决该问题的巨大潜力。他们的关键思想是通过来自未标记数据的无监督数据增强来构建一致性正则化以进行模型训练。未标记数据的扰动会导致一致性训练损失，这有利于半监督语义分割。然而，这些扰动破坏了图像上下文并引入了不自然的边界，这对语义分割有害。此外，广泛采用的半监督学习框架，即平均教师，由于学生模型最终收敛于教师模型而受到性能限制。在本文中，首先，我们提出了一种上下文友好的可微几何扭曲来进行无监督数据增强；其次，提出了一种新颖的对抗性双学生框架，从以下两个方面改进平均教师：（1）除了稳定约束之外，双学生模型是独立学习的，以鼓励利用模型多样性； （2）对两个学生都应用对抗性训练方案，并利用判别器来区分未标记数据的可靠伪标签以进行自我训练。通过 PASCAL VOC2012 和 Cityscapes 的大量实验验证了有效性。我们的解决方案显着提高了性能，并且在两个数据集上都取得了最先进的结果。值得注意的是，与完全监督相比，我们的解决方案仅使用 PASCAL VOC2012 上 12.5% 的注释数据即可实现 73.4% 的可比较 mIoU。我们的代码和模型可在 https://github.com/cao-cong/ADS-SemiSeg 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对抗双学生的半监督语义分割方法，通过可微分空间扭曲和一致性正则化降低标注成本。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督方法在数据增强时破坏图像上下文并引入不自然边界，且均值教师框架存在模型收敛限制。
AI.method: 提出上下文友好的可微几何扭曲进行数据增强，并设计对抗双学生框架：1）独立训练双模型以挖掘多样性；2）通过对抗训练筛选可靠伪标签。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC2012和Cityscapes数据集上取得SOTA结果，仅用12.5%标注数据即可达到73.4%mIoU（媲美全监督）。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了半监督语义分割中的上下文破坏和模型退化问题，显著提升性能。

In this paper, first of all, we propose a context friendly differentiable geometric warping to conduct unsupervised data augmentation; secondly, a novel adversarial dual-student framework is proposed to improve the Mean-Teacher from the following two aspects: (1) dual student models are learned independently except for a stabilization constraint to encourage exploiting model diversities; (2) adversarial training scheme is applied to both students and the discriminators are resorted to distinguish reliable pseudo-label of unlabeled data for self-training. Effectiveness is validated via extensive experiments on PASCAL VOC2012 and Cityscapes. Our solution significantly improves the performance and state-of-the-art results are achieved on both datasets. Remarkably, compared with fully supervision, our solution achieves comparable mIoU of 73.4% using only 12.5% annotated data on PASCAL VOC2012. Our codes and models are available at https://github.com/cao-cong/ADS-SemiSeg. 强大的语义分割面临的一个常见挑战是昂贵的数据注释成本。现有的半监督解决方案显示出解决该问题的巨大潜力。他们的关键思想是通过来自未标记数据的无监督数据增强来构建一致性正则化以进行模型训练。未标记数据的扰动会导致一致性训练损失，这有利于半监督语义分割。然而，这些扰动破坏了图像上下文并引入了不自然的边界，这对语义分割有害。此外，广泛采用的半监督学习框架，即平均教师，由于学生模型最终收敛于教师模型而受到性能限制。在本文中，首先，我们提出了一种上下文友好的可微几何扭曲来进行无监督数据增强；其次，提出了一种新颖的对抗性双学生框架，从以下两个方面改进平均教师：（1）除了稳定约束之外，双学生模型是独立学习的，以鼓励利用模型多样性； （2）对两个学生都应用对抗性训练方案，并利用判别器来区分未标记数据的可靠伪标签以进行自我训练。通过 PASCAL VOC2012 和 Cityscapes 的大量实验验证了有效性。我们的解决方案显着提高了性能，并且在两个数据集上都取得了最先进的结果。值得注意的是，与完全监督相比，我们的解决方案仅使用 PASCAL VOC2012 上 12.5% 的注释数据即可实现 73.4% 的可比较 mIoU。我们的代码和模型可在 https://github.com/cao-cong/ADS-SemiSeg 获取。 本文提出一种基于对抗双学生的半监督语义分割方法，通过可微分空间扭曲和一致性正则化降低标注成本。 Cong Cao,Tianwei Lin,Dongliang He,Fu Li,Huanjing Yue,Jingyu Yang,Errui Ding cs.CV

authors_text: Samuel B. Hopkins,Tselil Schramm,Jonathan Shi
title: A Robust Spectral Algorithm for Overcomplete Tensor Decomposition
title_zh: 一种用于过完全张量分解的鲁棒谱算法
comment: 60 pages, 4 figures, ACM Annual Workshop on Computational Learning Theory 2019
comments: 60 pages, 4 figures, ACM Annual Workshop on Computational Learning Theory 2019
abstract: We give a spectral algorithm for decomposing overcomplete order-4 tensors, so long as their components satisfy an algebraic non-degeneracy condition that holds for nearly all (all but an algebraic set of measure $0$) tensors over $(\mathbb{R}^d)^{\otimes 4}$ with rank $n \le d^2$. Our algorithm is robust to adversarial perturbations of bounded spectral norm. Our algorithm is inspired by one which uses the sum-of-squares semidefinite programming hierarchy (Ma, Shi, and Steurer STOC'16, arXiv:1610.01980), and we achieve comparable robustness and overcompleteness guarantees under similar algebraic assumptions. However, our algorithm avoids semidefinite programming and may be implemented as a series of basic linear-algebraic operations. We consequently obtain a much faster running time than semidefinite programming methods: our algorithm runs in time $\tilde O(n^2d^3) \le \tilde O(d^7)$, which is subquadratic in the input size $d^4$ (where we have suppressed factors related to the condition number of the input tensor).
summary: We give a spectral algorithm for decomposing overcomplete order-4 tensors, so long as their components satisfy an algebraic non-degeneracy condition that holds for nearly all (all but an algebraic set of measure $0$) tensors over $(\mathbb{R}^d)^{\otimes 4}$ with rank $n \le d^2$. Our algorithm is robust to adversarial perturbations of bounded spectral norm. Our algorithm is inspired by one which uses the sum-of-squares semidefinite programming hierarchy (Ma, Shi, and Steurer STOC'16, arXiv:1610.01980), and we achieve comparable robustness and overcompleteness guarantees under similar algebraic assumptions. However, our algorithm avoids semidefinite programming and may be implemented as a series of basic linear-algebraic operations. We consequently obtain a much faster running time than semidefinite programming methods: our algorithm runs in time $\tilde O(n^2d^3) \le \tilde O(d^7)$, which is subquadratic in the input size $d^4$ (where we have suppressed factors related to the condition number of the input tensor).
abstract_zh: 我们给出了一种用于分解过完备 4 阶张量的谱算法，只要它们的分量满足代数非简并条件，该条件适用于 $(\mathbb{R}^d)^{\otimes 4}$ 上的几乎所有（除了代数测度 $0$ 之外的所有）张量，秩为 $n \le d^2$。我们的算法对于有界谱范数的对抗性扰动具有鲁棒性。我们的算法受到使用平方和半定编程层次结构的算法的启发（Ma、Shi 和 Steurer STOC'16，arXiv：1610.01980），并且我们在类似的代数假设下实现了相当的鲁棒性和超完备性保证。然而，我们的算法避免了半定规划，并且可以作为一系列基本线性代数运算来实现。因此，我们获得了比半定编程方法快得多的运行时间：我们的算法运行时间为 $\tilde O(n^2d^3) \le \tilde O(d^7)$，它是输入大小 $d^4$ 的次二次方（其中我们抑制了与输入张量的条件数相关的因子）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种鲁棒的谱算法，用于分解满足特定代数非退化条件的高阶张量。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理高阶张量分解时存在计算效率低或鲁棒性不足的问题，需开发更高效的算法。
AI.method: 基于谱方法设计算法，避免使用半定规划，通过线性代数操作实现快速分解。
AI.result: 算法在保证鲁棒性的同时，将时间复杂度降至输入规模的亚二次阶，显著优于半定规划方法。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为高阶张量分解提供了高效且鲁棒的解决方案，具有重要的理论与应用价值。

authors_text: Alexander Fabisch,Manuela Uliano,Dennis Marschner,Melvin Laux,Johannes Brust,Marco Controzzi
title: A Modular Approach to the Embodiment of Hand Motions from Human Demonstrations
title_zh: 从人体演示中体现手部动作的模块化方法
abstract: Manipulating objects with robotic hands is a complicated task. Not only the fingers of the hand, but also the pose of the robot's end effector need to be coordinated. Using human demonstrations of movements is an intuitive and data-efficient way of guiding the robot's behavior. We propose a modular framework with an automatic embodiment mapping to transfer recorded human hand motions to robotic systems. In this work, we use motion capture to record human motion. We evaluate our approach on eight challenging tasks, in which a robotic hand needs to grasp and manipulate either deformable or small and fragile objects. We test a subset of trajectories in simulation and on a real robot and the overall success rates are aligned.
summary: Manipulating objects with robotic hands is a complicated task. Not only the fingers of the hand, but also the pose of the robot's end effector need to be coordinated. Using human demonstrations of movements is an intuitive and data-efficient way of guiding the robot's behavior. We propose a modular framework with an automatic embodiment mapping to transfer recorded human hand motions to robotic systems. In this work, we use motion capture to record human motion. We evaluate our approach on eight challenging tasks, in which a robotic hand needs to grasp and manipulate either deformable or small and fragile objects. We test a subset of trajectories in simulation and on a real robot and the overall success rates are aligned.
abstract_zh: 用机器人手操纵物体是一项复杂的任务。不仅手的手指需要协调，机器人末端执行器的姿势也需要协调。使用人类动作演示是指导机器人行为的直观且数据高效的方式。我们提出了一个具有自动实施例映射的模块化框架，用于将记录的人手运动传输到机器人系统。在这项工作中，我们使用动作捕捉来记录人体动作。我们评估了八项具有挑战性的任务的方法，其中机器人手需要抓住和操纵可变形或小而易碎的物体。我们在模拟和真实机器人上测试了一部分轨迹，总体成功率是一致的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种模块化框架，将人类演示的手部动作映射到机器人系统，以实现复杂物体的抓取与操作。
AI.motivation: 机器人手部操作需要协调多自由度动作，传统编程复杂低效，而人类演示能提供直观且数据高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过动作捕捉记录人类手部运动，构建模块化框架实现动作到机器人末端执行器的自动映射，并在仿真与实物机器人上验证。
AI.result: 在8个挑战性任务中，包括变形/易碎物体操作，仿真与真实机器人测试的成功率保持一致。
AI.conclusion: 模块化方法有效解决了人类动作到机器人系统的迁移问题，验证了框架在复杂操作任务中的可行性。

authors_text: Frederic Becker,Julian Skirzyński,Bas van Opheusden,Falk Lieder
title: Boosting human decision-making with AI-generated decision aids
title_zh: 利用人工智能生成的决策辅助工具促进人类决策
comment: Submitted to the Computational Brain and Behavior journal. Code available at https://github.com/RationalityEnhancement/InterpretableStrategyDiscovery
comments: Submitted to the Computational Brain and Behavior journal. Code available at https://github.com/RationalityEnhancement/InterpretableStrategyDiscovery
abstract: Human decision-making is plagued by many systematic errors. Many of these errors can be avoided by providing decision aids that guide decision-makers to attend to the important information and integrate it according to a rational decision strategy. Designing such decision aids used to be a tedious manual process. Advances in cognitive science might make it possible to automate this process in the future. We recently introduced machine learning methods for discovering optimal strategies for human decision-making automatically and an automatic method for explaining those strategies to people. Decision aids constructed by this method were able to improve human decision-making. However, following the descriptions generated by this method is very tedious. We hypothesized that this problem can be overcome by conveying the automatically discovered decision strategy as a series of natural language instructions for how to reach a decision. Experiment 1 showed that people do indeed understand such procedural instructions more easily than the decision aids generated by our previous method. Encouraged by this finding, we developed an algorithm for translating the output of our previous method into procedural instructions. We applied the improved method to automatically generate decision aids for a naturalistic planning task (i.e., planning a road trip) and a naturalistic decision task (i.e., choosing a mortgage). Experiment 2 showed that these automatically generated decision-aids significantly improved people's performance in planning a road trip and choosing a mortgage. These findings suggest that AI-powered boosting might have potential for improving human decision-making in the real world.
summary: Human decision-making is plagued by many systematic errors. Many of these errors can be avoided by providing decision aids that guide decision-makers to attend to the important information and integrate it according to a rational decision strategy. Designing such decision aids used to be a tedious manual process. Advances in cognitive science might make it possible to automate this process in the future. We recently introduced machine learning methods for discovering optimal strategies for human decision-making automatically and an automatic method for explaining those strategies to people. Decision aids constructed by this method were able to improve human decision-making. However, following the descriptions generated by this method is very tedious. We hypothesized that this problem can be overcome by conveying the automatically discovered decision strategy as a series of natural language instructions for how to reach a decision. Experiment 1 showed that people do indeed understand such procedural instructions more easily than the decision aids generated by our previous method. Encouraged by this finding, we developed an algorithm for translating the output of our previous method into procedural instructions. We applied the improved method to automatically generate decision aids for a naturalistic planning task (i.e., planning a road trip) and a naturalistic decision task (i.e., choosing a mortgage). Experiment 2 showed that these automatically generated decision-aids significantly improved people's performance in planning a road trip and choosing a mortgage. These findings suggest that AI-powered boosting might have potential for improving human decision-making in the real world.
abstract_zh: 人类的决策受到许多系统性错误的困扰。通过提供决策辅助工具，引导决策者关注重要信息并根据合理的决策策略整合这些信息，可以避免许多此类错误。设计此类决策辅助工具曾经是一个繁琐的手动过程。认知科学的进步可能使未来这一过程的自动化成为可能。我们最近引入了机器学习方法，用于自动发现人类决策的最佳策略，以及一种向人们解释这些策略的自动方法。通过这种方法构建的决策辅助工具能够改善人类的决策。然而，遵循这种方法生成的描述是非常乏味的。我们假设，可以通过将自动发现的决策策略作为一系列如何达成决策的自然语言指令来解决。实验 1 表明，人们确实比我们之前的方法生成的决策辅助工具更容易理解此类程序指令。受这一发现的鼓舞，我们开发了一种算法，用于将先前方法的输出转换为程序指令。我们应用改进的方法来自动生成自然规划任务（即规划公路旅行）和自然决策任务（即选择抵押贷款）的决策辅助。实验 2 表明，这些自动生成的决策辅助工具显着提高了人们在规划公路旅行和选择抵押贷款方面的表现。这些发现表明，人工智能驱动的增强可能有潜力改善现实世界中人类的决策。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用AI生成的决策辅助工具提升人类决策质量，通过自动化策略发现和自然语言指令生成解决传统方法的繁琐问题。
AI.motivation: 人类决策存在系统性错误，传统决策辅助工具设计依赖人工且效率低，需探索自动化方法提升决策效果。
AI.method: 结合机器学习自动发现最优决策策略，并开发算法将其转化为自然语言指令，应用于路线规划和抵押贷款等实际任务。
AI.result: 实验表明，自然语言指令显著提升被试在路线规划和抵押贷款任务中的表现，验证了AI辅助决策的有效性。
AI.conclusion: AI生成的决策辅助工具可通过自动化策略转化有效提升人类现实决策能力，具有实际应用潜力。

search_text: Boosting human decision-making with AI-generated decision aids 利用人工智能生成的决策辅助工具促进人类决策 Human decision-making is plagued by many systematic errors. Many of these errors can be avoided by providing decision aids that guide decision-makers to attend to the important information and integrate it according to a rational decision strategy. Designing such decision aids used to be a tedious manual process. Advances in cognitive science might make it possible to automate this process in the future. We recently introduced machine learning methods for discovering optimal strategies for human decision-making automatically and an automatic method for explaining those strategies to people. Decision aids constructed by this method were able to improve human decision-making. However, following the descriptions generated by this method is very tedious. We hypothesized that this problem can be overcome by conveying the automatically discovered decision strategy as a series of natural language instructions for how to reach a decision. Experiment 1 showed that people do indeed understand such procedural instructions more easily than the decision aids generated by our previous method. Encouraged by this finding, we developed an algorithm for translating the output of our previous method into procedural instructions. We applied the improved method to automatically generate decision aids for a naturalistic planning task (i.e., planning a road trip) and a naturalistic decision task (i.e., choosing a mortgage). Experiment 2 showed that these automatically generated decision-aids significantly improved people's performance in planning a road trip and choosing a mortgage. These findings suggest that AI-powered boosting might have potential for improving human decision-making in the real world. 人类的决策受到许多系统性错误的困扰。通过提供决策辅助工具，引导决策者关注重要信息并根据合理的决策策略整合这些信息，可以避免许多此类错误。设计此类决策辅助工具曾经是一个繁琐的手动过程。认知科学的进步可能使未来这一过程的自动化成为可能。我们最近引入了机器学习方法，用于自动发现人类决策的最佳策略，以及一种向人们解释这些策略的自动方法。通过这种方法构建的决策辅助工具能够改善人类的决策。然而，遵循这种方法生成的描述是非常乏味的。我们假设，可以通过将自动发现的决策策略作为一系列如何达成决策的自然语言指令来解决。实验 1 表明，人们确实比我们之前的方法生成的决策辅助工具更容易理解此类程序指令。受这一发现的鼓舞，我们开发了一种算法，用于将先前方法的输出转换为程序指令。我们应用改进的方法来自动生成自然规划任务（即规划公路旅行）和自然决策任务（即选择抵押贷款）的决策辅助。实验 2 表明，这些自动生成的决策辅助工具显着提高了人们在规划公路旅行和选择抵押贷款方面的表现。这些发现表明，人工智能驱动的增强可能有潜力改善现实世界中人类的决策。 本文提出利用AI生成的决策辅助工具提升人类决策质量，通过自动化策略发现和自然语言指令生成解决传统方法的繁琐问题。 Frederic Becker,Julian Skirzyński,Bas van Opheusden,Falk Lieder cs.AI,cs.CY,cs.HC

authors_text: Yihua Sun,Qingsong Yao,Yuanyuan Lyu,Jianji Wang,Yi Xiao,Hongen Liao,S. Kevin Zhou
title: Rib Suppression in Digital Chest Tomosynthesis
title_zh: 数字胸部断层合成中的肋骨抑制
abstract: Digital chest tomosynthesis (DCT) is a technique to produce sectional 3D images of a human chest for pulmonary disease screening, with 2D X-ray projections taken within an extremely limited range of angles. However, under the limited angle scenario, DCT contains strong artifacts caused by the presence of ribs, jamming the imaging quality of the lung area. Recently, great progress has been achieved for rib suppression in a single X-ray image, to reveal a clearer lung texture. We firstly extend the rib suppression problem to the 3D case at the software level. We propose a $\textbf{T}$omosynthesis $\textbf{RI}$b Su$\textbf{P}$pression and $\textbf{L}$ung $\textbf{E}$nhancement $\textbf{Net}$work (TRIPLE-Net) to model the 3D rib component and provide a rib-free DCT. TRIPLE-Net takes the advantages from both 2D and 3D domains, which model the ribs in DCT with the exact FBP procedure and 3D depth information, respectively. The experiments on simulated datasets and clinical data have shown the effectiveness of TRIPLE-Net to preserve lung details as well as improve the imaging quality of pulmonary diseases. Finally, an expert user study confirms our findings.
summary: Digital chest tomosynthesis (DCT) is a technique to produce sectional 3D images of a human chest for pulmonary disease screening, with 2D X-ray projections taken within an extremely limited range of angles. However, under the limited angle scenario, DCT contains strong artifacts caused by the presence of ribs, jamming the imaging quality of the lung area. Recently, great progress has been achieved for rib suppression in a single X-ray image, to reveal a clearer lung texture. We firstly extend the rib suppression problem to the 3D case at the software level. We propose a $\textbf{T}$omosynthesis $\textbf{RI}$b Su$\textbf{P}$pression and $\textbf{L}$ung $\textbf{E}$nhancement $\textbf{Net}$work (TRIPLE-Net) to model the 3D rib component and provide a rib-free DCT. TRIPLE-Net takes the advantages from both 2D and 3D domains, which model the ribs in DCT with the exact FBP procedure and 3D depth information, respectively. The experiments on simulated datasets and clinical data have shown the effectiveness of TRIPLE-Net to preserve lung details as well as improve the imaging quality of pulmonary diseases. Finally, an expert user study confirms our findings.
abstract_zh: 数字胸部断层合成 (DCT) 是一种生成人体胸部截面 3D 图像以进行肺部疾病筛查的技术，并在极其有限的角度范围内进行 2D X 射线投影。然而，在有限的角度场景下，DCT 包含由于肋骨的存在而引起的强烈伪影，干扰了肺部区域的成像质量。最近，在单张 X 射线图像中的肋骨抑制方面取得了巨大进展，以显示更清晰的肺部纹理。我们首先在软件层面将肋骨抑制问题扩展到 3D 情况。我们提出 $\textbf{T}$omosynthesis $\textbf{RI}$b Su$\textbf{P}$pression 和 $\textbf{L}$ung $\textbf{E}$nhancement $\textbf{Net}$work (TRIPLE-Net) 来对 3D 肋骨组件进行建模并提供无肋骨 DCT。 TRIPLE-Net 充分利用了 2D 和 3D 领域的优点，分别使用精确的 FBP 过程和 3D 深度信息对 DCT 中的肋骨进行建模。模拟数据集和临床数据的实验表明了TRIPLE-Net在保留肺部细节以及提高肺部疾病成像质量方面的有效性。最后，专家用户研究证实了我们的发现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TRIPLE-Net的深度学习网络，用于在数字胸部断层合成图像中抑制肋骨伪影，以提升肺部成像质量。
AI.motivation: 数字胸部断层合成（DCT）在肺部疾病筛查中受肋骨伪影干扰，现有单张X光图像的肋骨抑制方法无法直接应用于3D场景，需开发针对3D DCT的肋骨抑制技术。
AI.method: TRIPLE-Net结合2D和3D领域优势，利用精确的FBP算法和3D深度信息建模DCT中的肋骨成分，实现肋骨抑制与肺部增强。
AI.result: 在模拟数据集和临床数据上的实验表明，TRIPLE-Net能有效保留肺部细节并提升肺部疾病成像质量，专家评估验证了其效果。
AI.conclusion: TRIPLE-Net成功解决了3D DCT中的肋骨伪影问题，为肺部疾病的精准筛查提供了更清晰的影像支持。

authors_text: Shiwei Liu,Yuesong Tian,Tianlong Chen,Li Shen
title: Don't Be So Dense: Sparse-to-Sparse GAN Training Without Sacrificing Performance
title_zh: 不要那么密集：在不牺牲性能的情况下进行稀疏到稀疏的 GAN 训练
abstract: Generative adversarial networks (GANs) have received an upsurging interest since being proposed due to the high quality of the generated data. While achieving increasingly impressive results, the resource demands associated with the large model size hinders the usage of GANs in resource-limited scenarios. For inference, the existing model compression techniques can reduce the model complexity with comparable performance. However, the training efficiency of GANs has less been explored due to the fragile training process of GANs. In this paper, we, for the first time, explore the possibility of directly training sparse GAN from scratch without involving any dense or pre-training steps. Even more unconventionally, our proposed method enables directly training sparse unbalanced GANs with an extremely sparse generator from scratch. Instead of training full GANs, we start with sparse GANs and dynamically explore the parameter space spanned over the generator throughout training. Such a sparse-to-sparse training procedure enhances the capacity of the highly sparse generator progressively while sticking to a fixed small parameter budget with appealing training and inference efficiency gains. Extensive experiments with modern GAN architectures validate the effectiveness of our method. Our sparsified GANs, trained from scratch in one single run, are able to outperform the ones learned by expensive iterative pruning and re-training. Perhaps most importantly, we find instead of inheriting parameters from expensive pre-trained GANs, directly training sparse GANs from scratch can be a much more efficient solution. For example, only training with a 80% sparse generator and a 70% sparse discriminator, our method can achieve even better performance than the dense BigGAN.
summary: Generative adversarial networks (GANs) have received an upsurging interest since being proposed due to the high quality of the generated data. While achieving increasingly impressive results, the resource demands associated with the large model size hinders the usage of GANs in resource-limited scenarios. For inference, the existing model compression techniques can reduce the model complexity with comparable performance. However, the training efficiency of GANs has less been explored due to the fragile training process of GANs. In this paper, we, for the first time, explore the possibility of directly training sparse GAN from scratch without involving any dense or pre-training steps. Even more unconventionally, our proposed method enables directly training sparse unbalanced GANs with an extremely sparse generator from scratch. Instead of training full GANs, we start with sparse GANs and dynamically explore the parameter space spanned over the generator throughout training. Such a sparse-to-sparse training procedure enhances the capacity of the highly sparse generator progressively while sticking to a fixed small parameter budget with appealing training and inference efficiency gains. Extensive experiments with modern GAN architectures validate the effectiveness of our method. Our sparsified GANs, trained from scratch in one single run, are able to outperform the ones learned by expensive iterative pruning and re-training. Perhaps most importantly, we find instead of inheriting parameters from expensive pre-trained GANs, directly training sparse GANs from scratch can be a much more efficient solution. For example, only training with a 80% sparse generator and a 70% sparse discriminator, our method can achieve even better performance than the dense BigGAN.
abstract_zh: 生成对抗网络（GAN）自提出以来，由于生成的数据质量很高，引起了人们的广泛关注。虽然取得了越来越令人印象深刻的结果，但与大模型​​相关的资源需求阻碍了 GAN 在资源有限的场景中的使用。就推理而言，现有的模型压缩技术可以在性能相当的情况下降低模型复杂度。然而，由于 GAN 的训练过程脆弱，人们对 GAN 的训练效率研究较少。在本文中，我们首次探索了从头开始直接训练稀疏 GAN 而不涉及任何密集或预训练步骤的可能性。更非传统的是，我们提出的方法可以使用极其稀疏的生成器从头开始直接训练稀疏不平衡 GAN。我们不是训练完整的 GAN，而是从稀疏 GAN 开始，并在整个训练过程中动态探索跨越生成器的参数空间。这种稀疏到稀疏的训练过程逐步增强了高度稀疏生成器的能力，同时坚持固定的小参数预算，具有有吸引力的训练和推理效率增益。现代 GAN 架构的大量实验验证了我们方法的有效性。我们的稀疏 GAN 在一次运行中从头开始训练，能够超越通过昂贵的迭代修剪和重新训练学到的结果。也许最重要的是，我们发现直接从头开始训练稀疏 GAN 可能是一种更有效的解决方案，而不是从昂贵的预训练 GAN 继承参数。例如，仅使用 80% 稀疏生成器和 70% 稀疏判别器进行训练，我们的方法可以实现比密集 BigGAN 更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种直接从零开始训练稀疏生成对抗网络（GAN）的方法，无需预训练或密集模型，以提高训练和推理效率。
AI.motivation: 现有GAN压缩技术主要关注推理阶段的模型压缩，而训练效率因GAN训练过程的脆弱性未被充分探索。大型GAN模型在资源受限场景下存在计算开销大的问题。
AI.method: 首次直接训练稀疏且不平衡的GAN，从稀疏生成器和判别器开始，通过动态探索生成器参数空间逐步提升稀疏模型容量，保持固定小参数预算。
AI.result: 实验表明，仅使用80%稀疏生成器和70%稀疏判别器的单次训练即可超越迭代剪枝重训练的稀疏GAN，甚至优于密集模型BigGAN。
AI.conclusion: 直接训练稀疏GAN比继承预训练模型参数更高效，无需预训练和多次迭代剪枝即可实现高性能稀疏GAN，显著提升资源利用效率。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种直接从零开始训练稀疏生成对抗网络（GAN）的方法，无需预训练或密集模型，以提高训练和推理效率。
ai_content.motivation: 现有GAN压缩技术主要关注推理阶段的模型压缩，而训练效率因GAN训练过程的脆弱性未被充分探索。大型GAN模型在资源受限场景下存在计算开销大的问题。
ai_content.method: 首次直接训练稀疏且不平衡的GAN，从稀疏生成器和判别器开始，通过动态探索生成器参数空间逐步提升稀疏模型容量，保持固定小参数预算。
