search_text: Don't Be So Dense: Sparse-to-Sparse GAN Training Without Sacrificing Performance 不要那么密集：在不牺牲性能的情况下进行稀疏到稀疏的 GAN 训练 Generative adversarial networks (GANs) have received an upsurging interest since being proposed due to the high quality of the generated data. While achieving increasingly impressive results, the resource demands associated with the large model size hinders the usage of GANs in resource-limited scenarios. For inference, the existing model compression techniques can reduce the model complexity with comparable performance. However, the training efficiency of GANs has less been explored due to the fragile training process of GANs. In this paper, we, for the first time, explore the possibility of directly training sparse GAN from scratch without involving any dense or pre-training steps. Even more unconventionally, our proposed method enables directly training sparse unbalanced GANs with an extremely sparse generator from scratch. Instead of training full GANs, we start with sparse GANs and dynamically explore the parameter space spanned over the generator throughout training. Such a sparse-to-sparse training procedure enhances the capacity of the highly sparse generator progressively while sticking to a fixed small parameter budget with appealing training and inference efficiency gains. Extensive experiments with modern GAN architectures validate the effectiveness of our method. Our sparsified GANs, trained from scratch in one single run, are able to outperform the ones learned by expensive iterative pruning and re-training. Perhaps most importantly, we find instead of inheriting parameters from expensive pre-trained GANs, directly training sparse GANs from scratch can be a much more efficient solution. For example, only training with a 80% sparse generator and a 70% sparse discriminator, our method can achieve even better performance than the dense BigGAN. 生成对抗网络（GAN）自提出以来，由于生成的数据质量很高，引起了人们的广泛关注。虽然取得了越来越令人印象深刻的结果，但与大模型​​相关的资源需求阻碍了 GAN 在资源有限的场景中的使用。就推理而言，现有的模型压缩技术可以在性能相当的情况下降低模型复杂度。然而，由于 GAN 的训练过程脆弱，人们对 GAN 的训练效率研究较少。在本文中，我们首次探索了从头开始直接训练稀疏 GAN 而不涉及任何密集或预训练步骤的可能性。更非传统的是，我们提出的方法可以使用极其稀疏的生成器从头开始直接训练稀疏不平衡 GAN。我们不是训练完整的 GAN，而是从稀疏 GAN 开始，并在整个训练过程中动态探索跨越生成器的参数空间。这种稀疏到稀疏的训练过程逐步增强了高度稀疏生成器的能力，同时坚持固定的小参数预算，具有有吸引力的训练和推理效率增益。现代 GAN 架构的大量实验验证了我们方法的有效性。我们的稀疏 GAN 在一次运行中从头开始训练，能够超越通过昂贵的迭代修剪和重新训练学到的结果。也许最重要的是，我们发现直接从头开始训练稀疏 GAN 可能是一种更有效的解决方案，而不是从昂贵的预训练 GAN 继承参数。例如，仅使用 80% 稀疏生成器和 70% 稀疏判别器进行训练，我们的方法可以实现比密集 BigGAN 更好的性能。 本文提出了一种直接从零开始训练稀疏生成对抗网络（GAN）的方法，无需预训练或密集模型，以提高训练和推理效率。 Shiwei Liu,Yuesong Tian,Tianlong Chen,Li Shen cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Yidan Feng,Biqi Yang,Xianzhi Li,Chi-Wing Fu,Rui Cao,Kai Chen,Qi Dou,Mingqiang Wei,Yun-Hui Liu,Pheng-Ann Heng
title: Towards Robust Part-aware Instance Segmentation for Industrial Bin Picking
title_zh: 实现工业垃圾箱拣选的鲁棒零件感知实例分割
abstract: Industrial bin picking is a challenging task that requires accurate and robust segmentation of individual object instances. Particularly, industrial objects can have irregular shapes, that is, thin and concave, whereas in bin-picking scenarios, objects are often closely packed with strong occlusion. To address these challenges, we formulate a novel part-aware instance segmentation pipeline. The key idea is to decompose industrial objects into correlated approximate convex parts and enhance the object-level segmentation with part-level segmentation. We design a part-aware network to predict part masks and part-to-part offsets, followed by a part aggregation module to assemble the recognized parts into instances. To guide the network learning, we also propose an automatic label decoupling scheme to generate ground-truth part-level labels from instance-level labels. Finally, we contribute the first instance segmentation dataset, which contains a variety of industrial objects that are thin and have non-trivial shapes. Extensive experimental results on various industrial objects demonstrate that our method can achieve the best segmentation results compared with the state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: Industrial bin picking is a challenging task that requires accurate and robust segmentation of individual object instances. Particularly, industrial objects can have irregular shapes, that is, thin and concave, whereas in bin-picking scenarios, objects are often closely packed with strong occlusion. To address these challenges, we formulate a novel part-aware instance segmentation pipeline. The key idea is to decompose industrial objects into correlated approximate convex parts and enhance the object-level segmentation with part-level segmentation. We design a part-aware network to predict part masks and part-to-part offsets, followed by a part aggregation module to assemble the recognized parts into instances. To guide the network learning, we also propose an automatic label decoupling scheme to generate ground-truth part-level labels from instance-level labels. Finally, we contribute the first instance segmentation dataset, which contains a variety of industrial objects that are thin and have non-trivial shapes. Extensive experimental results on various industrial objects demonstrate that our method can achieve the best segmentation results compared with the state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 工业垃圾箱拣选是一项具有挑战性的任务，需要对各个对象实例进行准确而强大的分割。特别是，工业物体可能具有不规则的形状，即薄而凹的形状，而在垃圾箱拣选场景中，物体通常紧密堆积且遮挡严重。为了应对这些挑战，我们制定了一种新颖的零件感知实例分割管道。其关键思想是将工业对象分解为相关的近似凸部分，并通过零件级分割增强对象级分割。我们设计了一个零件感知网络来预测零件掩模和零件到零件的偏移，然后设计一个零件聚合模块来将识别的零件组装成实例。为了指导网络学习，我们还提出了一种自动标签解耦方案，从实例级标签生成真实的部分级标签。最后，我们贡献了第一个实例分割数据集，其中包含各种薄且具有重要形状的工业对象。对各种工业对象的广泛实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们的方法可以实现最佳的分割结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向工业抓取的鲁棒部分感知实例分割方法，解决工业物体形状不规则和遮挡问题。
AI.motivation: 工业场景中物体形状复杂且密集排列导致遮挡严重，传统分割方法难以准确识别单个物体实例。
AI.method: 将物体分解为相关凸部分，设计部分感知网络预测部分掩码和偏移量，通过部分聚合模块组装实例，并提出自动标签解耦方案生成部分级标注。
AI.result: 在多种工业物体上实验表明，该方法相比现有技术取得最佳分割效果，并贡献了首个工业实例分割数据集。
AI.conclusion: 部分感知分割框架有效提升了工业抓取场景下复杂物体的实例分割精度，为后续研究提供新思路。

Particularly, industrial objects can have irregular shapes, that is, thin and concave, whereas in bin-picking scenarios, objects are often closely packed with strong occlusion. To address these challenges, we formulate a novel part-aware instance segmentation pipeline. The key idea is to decompose industrial objects into correlated approximate convex parts and enhance the object-level segmentation with part-level segmentation. We design a part-aware network to predict part masks and part-to-part offsets, followed by a part aggregation module to assemble the recognized parts into instances. To guide the network learning, we also propose an automatic label decoupling scheme to generate ground-truth part-level labels from instance-level labels. Finally, we contribute the first instance segmentation dataset, which contains a variety of industrial objects that are thin and have non-trivial shapes. Extensive experimental results on various industrial objects demonstrate that our method can achieve the best segmentation results compared with the state-of-the-art approaches. 工业垃圾箱拣选是一项具有挑战性的任务，需要对各个对象实例进行准确而强大的分割。特别是，工业物体可能具有不规则的形状，即薄而凹的形状，而在垃圾箱拣选场景中，物体通常紧密堆积且遮挡严重。为了应对这些挑战，我们制定了一种新颖的零件感知实例分割管道。其关键思想是将工业对象分解为相关的近似凸部分，并通过零件级分割增强对象级分割。我们设计了一个零件感知网络来预测零件掩模和零件到零件的偏移，然后设计一个零件聚合模块来将识别的零件组装成实例。为了指导网络学习，我们还提出了一种自动标签解耦方案，从实例级标签生成真实的部分级标签。最后，我们贡献了第一个实例分割数据集，其中包含各种薄且具有重要形状的工业对象。对各种工业对象的广泛实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们的方法可以实现最佳的分割结果。 本文提出一种面向工业抓取的鲁棒部分感知实例分割方法，解决工业物体形状不规则和遮挡问题。 Yidan Feng,Biqi Yang,Xianzhi Li,Chi-Wing Fu,Rui Cao,Kai Chen,Qi Dou,Mingqiang Wei,Yun-Hui Liu,Pheng-Ann Heng cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Yicong Hong,Zun Wang,Qi Wu,Stephen Gould
title: Bridging the Gap Between Learning in Discrete and Continuous Environments for Vision-and-Language Navigation
title_zh: 弥合视觉和语言导航的离散和连续环境中的学习之间的差距
abstract: Most existing works in vision-and-language navigation (VLN) focus on either discrete or continuous environments, training agents that cannot generalize across the two. The fundamental difference between the two setups is that discrete navigation assumes prior knowledge of the connectivity graph of the environment, so that the agent can effectively transfer the problem of navigation with low-level controls to jumping from node to node with high-level actions by grounding to an image of a navigable direction. To bridge the discrete-to-continuous gap, we propose a predictor to generate a set of candidate waypoints during navigation, so that agents designed with high-level actions can be transferred to and trained in continuous environments. We refine the connectivity graph of Matterport3D to fit the continuous Habitat-Matterport3D, and train the waypoints predictor with the refined graphs to produce accessible waypoints at each time step. Moreover, we demonstrate that the predicted waypoints can be augmented during training to diversify the views and paths, and therefore enhance agent's generalization ability. Through extensive experiments we show that agents navigating in continuous environments with predicted waypoints perform significantly better than agents using low-level actions, which reduces the absolute discrete-to-continuous gap by 11.76% Success Weighted by Path Length (SPL) for the Cross-Modal Matching Agent and 18.24% SPL for the Recurrent VLN-BERT. Our agents, trained with a simple imitation learning objective, outperform previous methods by a large margin, achieving new state-of-the-art results on the testing environments of the R2R-CE and the RxR-CE datasets.
summary: Most existing works in vision-and-language navigation (VLN) focus on either discrete or continuous environments, training agents that cannot generalize across the two. The fundamental difference between the two setups is that discrete navigation assumes prior knowledge of the connectivity graph of the environment, so that the agent can effectively transfer the problem of navigation with low-level controls to jumping from node to node with high-level actions by grounding to an image of a navigable direction. To bridge the discrete-to-continuous gap, we propose a predictor to generate a set of candidate waypoints during navigation, so that agents designed with high-level actions can be transferred to and trained in continuous environments. We refine the connectivity graph of Matterport3D to fit the continuous Habitat-Matterport3D, and train the waypoints predictor with the refined graphs to produce accessible waypoints at each time step. Moreover, we demonstrate that the predicted waypoints can be augmented during training to diversify the views and paths, and therefore enhance agent's generalization ability. Through extensive experiments we show that agents navigating in continuous environments with predicted waypoints perform significantly better than agents using low-level actions, which reduces the absolute discrete-to-continuous gap by 11.76% Success Weighted by Path Length (SPL) for the Cross-Modal Matching Agent and 18.24% SPL for the Recurrent VLN-BERT. Our agents, trained with a simple imitation learning objective, outperform previous methods by a large margin, achieving new state-of-the-art results on the testing environments of the R2R-CE and the RxR-CE datasets.
abstract_zh: 大多数视觉和语言导航（VLN）领域的现有工作都集中在离散或连续环境上，训练代理无法在这两者之间进行泛化。两种设置之间的根本区别在于，离散导航假设环境连接图的先验知识，因此代理可以通过基于可导航方向的图像，有效地将低级控制的导航问题转移到具有高级操作的从一个节点跳转到另一个节点。为了弥合离散与连续之间的差距，我们提出了一个预测器来在导航过程中生成一组候选路径点，以便使用高级动作设计的代理可以转移到连续环境中并在连续环境中进行训练。我们细化 Matterport3D 的连接图以适应连续的 Habitat-Matterport3D，并使用细化的图训练路点预测器，以在每个时间步生成可访问的路点。此外，我们证明了在训练过程中可以增强预测的航路点，以使视图和路径多样化，从而增强智能体的泛化能力。通过大量实验，我们表明，在连续环境中使用预测路径点进行导航的智能体的性能明显优于使用低级操作的智能体，这将跨模态匹配智能体的路径长度加权成功率 (SPL) 的绝对离散与连续差距减少了 11.76%，将循环 VLN-BERT 的 SPL 减少了 18.24%。我们的智能体经过简单的模仿学习目标的训练，大大优于以前的方法，在 R2R-CE 和 RxR-CE 数据集的测试环境上取得了新的最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 该论文旨在解决视觉与语言导航（VLN）中离散环境与连续环境之间的差距问题，提出通过生成候选路标点使智能体在两种环境中实现迁移学习。
AI.motivation: 现有VLN方法仅适用于离散或连续环境，无法跨环境泛化。离散环境依赖预设连接图，而连续环境需低级控制，两者存在根本差异。
AI.method: 提出路标点预测器生成导航候选点，重构Matterport3D连接图适配连续环境，并通过训练增强视图多样性以提升泛化能力，采用简单模仿学习目标进行训练。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用预测路标点的智能体在连续环境中的成功率显著提升，绝对离散-连续差距减少11.76%（Cross-Modal Matching Agent）和18.24%（Recurrent VLN-BERT），并在R2R-CE和RxR-CE数据集上达到新SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过路标点预测有效弥合离散与连续环境差距，验证了模仿学习在跨环境迁移中的有效性，为VLN领域提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 该论文旨在解决视觉与语言导航（VLN）中离散环境与连续环境之间的差距问题，提出通过生成候选路标点使智能体在两种环境中实现迁移学习。
ai_content.motivation: 现有VLN方法仅适用于离散或连续环境，无法跨环境泛化。离散环境依赖预设连接图，而连续环境需低级控制，两者存在根本差异。
ai_content.method: 提出路标点预测器生成导航候选点，重构Matterport3D连接图适配连续环境，并通过训练增强视图多样性以提升泛化能力，采用简单模仿学习目标进行训练。
ai_content.result: 实验表明，使用预测路标点的智能体在连续环境中的成功率显著提升，绝对离散-连续差距减少11.76%（Cross-Modal Matching Agent）和18.24%（Recurrent VLN-BERT），并在R2R-CE和RxR-CE数据集上达到新SOTA。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法通过路标点预测有效弥合离散与连续环境差距，验证了模仿学习在跨环境迁移中的有效性，为VLN领域提供新思路。

search_text: Bridging the Gap Between Learning in Discrete and Continuous Environments for Vision-and-Language Navigation 弥合视觉和语言导航的离散和连续环境中的学习之间的差距 Most existing works in vision-and-language navigation (VLN) focus on either discrete or continuous environments, training agents that cannot generalize across the two. The fundamental difference between the two setups is that discrete navigation assumes prior knowledge of the connectivity graph of the environment, so that the agent can effectively transfer the problem of navigation with low-level controls to jumping from node to node with high-level actions by grounding to an image of a navigable direction. To bridge the discrete-to-continuous gap, we propose a predictor to generate a set of candidate waypoints during navigation, so that agents designed with high-level actions can be transferred to and trained in continuous environments. We refine the connectivity graph of Matterport3D to fit the continuous Habitat-Matterport3D, and train the waypoints predictor with the refined graphs to produce accessible waypoints at each time step. Moreover, we demonstrate that the predicted waypoints can be augmented during training to diversify the views and paths, and therefore enhance agent's generalization ability. Through extensive experiments we show that agents navigating in continuous environments with predicted waypoints perform significantly better than agents using low-level actions, which reduces the absolute discrete-to-continuous gap by 11.76% Success Weighted by Path Length (SPL) for the Cross-Modal Matching Agent and 18.24% SPL for the Recurrent VLN-BERT. Our agents, trained with a simple imitation learning objective, outperform previous methods by a large margin, achieving new state-of-the-art results on the testing environments of the R2R-CE and the RxR-CE datasets. 大多数视觉和语言导航（VLN）领域的现有工作都集中在离散或连续环境上，训练代理无法在这两者之间进行泛化。两种设置之间的根本区别在于，离散导航假设环境连接图的先验知识，因此代理可以通过基于可导航方向的图像，有效地将低级控制的导航问题转移到具有高级操作的从一个节点跳转到另一个节点。为了弥合离散与连续之间的差距，我们提出了一个预测器来在导航过程中生成一组候选路径点，以便使用高级动作设计的代理可以转移到连续环境中并在连续环境中进行训练。我们细化 Matterport3D 的连接图以适应连续的 Habitat-Matterport3D，并使用细化的图训练路点预测器，以在每个时间步生成可访问的路点。此外，我们证明了在训练过程中可以增强预测的航路点，以使视图和路径多样化，从而增强智能体的泛化能力。通过大量实验，我们表明，在连续环境中使用预测路径点进行导航的智能体的性能明显优于使用低级操作的智能体，这将跨模态匹配智能体的路径长度加权成功率 (SPL) 的绝对离散与连续差距减少了 11.76%，将循环 VLN-BERT 的 SPL 减少了 18.24%。我们的智能体经过简单的模仿学习目标的训练，大大优于以前的方法，在 R2R-CE 和 RxR-CE 数据集的测试环境上取得了新的最先进的结果。 该论文旨在解决视觉与语言导航（VLN）中离散环境与连续环境之间的差距问题，提出通过生成候选路标点使智能体在两种环境中实现迁移学习。 Yicong Hong,Zun Wang,Qi Wu,Stephen Gould cs.CV,cs.CL,cs.RO

authors_text: Michael A. Bender,Alex Conway,Martín Farach-Colton,Hanna Komlós,William Kuszmaul,Nicole Wein
title: Online List Labeling: Breaking the $\log^2n$ Barrier
title_zh: 在线列表标签：打破 $\log^2n$ 障碍
comment: Full version for FOCS 2022 camera ready
comments: Full version for FOCS 2022 camera ready
abstract: The online list labeling problem is an algorithmic primitive with a large literature of upper bounds, lower bounds, and applications. The goal is to store a dynamically-changing set of $n$ items in an array of $m$ slots, while maintaining the invariant that the items appear in sorted order, and while minimizing the relabeling cost, defined to be the number of items that are moved per insertion/deletion. For the linear regime, where $m = (1 + Θ(1)) n$, an upper bound of $O(\log^2 n)$ on the relabeling cost has been known since 1981. A lower bound of $Ω(\log^2 n)$ is known for deterministic algorithms and for so-called smooth algorithms, but the best general lower bound remains $Ω(\log n)$. The central open question in the field is whether $O(\log^2 n)$ is optimal for all algorithms. In this paper, we give a randomized data structure that achieves an expected relabeling cost of $O(\log^{3/2} n)$ per operation. More generally, if $m = (1 + \varepsilon) n$ for $\varepsilon = O(1)$, the expected relabeling cost becomes $O(\varepsilon^{-1} \log^{3/2} n)$. Our solution is history independent, meaning that the state of the data structure is independent of the order in which items are inserted/deleted. For history-independent data structures, we also prove a matching lower bound: for all $ε$ between $1 / n^{1/3}$ and some sufficiently small positive constant, the optimal expected cost for history-independent list-labeling solutions is $Θ(\varepsilon^{-1}\log^{3/2} n)$.
summary: The online list labeling problem is an algorithmic primitive with a large literature of upper bounds, lower bounds, and applications. The goal is to store a dynamically-changing set of $n$ items in an array of $m$ slots, while maintaining the invariant that the items appear in sorted order, and while minimizing the relabeling cost, defined to be the number of items that are moved per insertion/deletion. For the linear regime, where $m = (1 + Θ(1)) n$, an upper bound of $O(\log^2 n)$ on the relabeling cost has been known since 1981. A lower bound of $Ω(\log^2 n)$ is known for deterministic algorithms and for so-called smooth algorithms, but the best general lower bound remains $Ω(\log n)$. The central open question in the field is whether $O(\log^2 n)$ is optimal for all algorithms. In this paper, we give a randomized data structure that achieves an expected relabeling cost of $O(\log^{3/2} n)$ per operation. More generally, if $m = (1 + \varepsilon) n$ for $\varepsilon = O(1)$, the expected relabeling cost becomes $O(\varepsilon^{-1} \log^{3/2} n)$. Our solution is history independent, meaning that the state of the data structure is independent of the order in which items are inserted/deleted. For history-independent data structures, we also prove a matching lower bound: for all $ε$ between $1 / n^{1/3}$ and some sufficiently small positive constant, the optimal expected cost for history-independent list-labeling solutions is $Θ(\varepsilon^{-1}\log^{3/2} n)$.
abstract_zh: 在线列表标记问题是一种算法原语，具有大量有关上限、下限和应用的文献。目标是将一组动态变化的 $n$ 项存储在 $m$ 个槽的数组中，同时保持项按排序顺序出现的不变性，并最小化重新标记成本（定义为每次插入/删除移动的项数）。对于线性机制，其中 $m = (1 + θ(1)) n$，重新标记成本的上限 $O(\log^2 n)$ 自 1981 年以来就已为人所知。对于确定性算法和所谓的平滑算法，$Ω(\log^2 n)$ 的下限已知，但最佳通用下限仍然是 $Ω(\log n)$。该领域的核心开放问题是 $O(\log^2 n)$ 是否对于所有算法都是最优的。在本文中，我们给出了一个随机数据结构，该结构实现了每次操作 $O(\log^{3/2} n)$ 的预期重新标记成本。更一般地，如果 $m = (1 + \varepsilon) n$ 对于 $\varepsilon = O(1)$，则预期重新标记成本变为 $O(\varepsilon^{-1} \log^{3/2} n)$。我们的解决方案与历史无关，这意味着数据结构的状态与插入/删除项目的顺序无关。对于与历史无关的数据结构，我们还证明了一个匹配的下界：对于 $1 / n^{1/3}$ 之间的所有 $ε$ 和一些足够小的正常数，与历史无关的列表标记解决方案的最佳预期成本为 $θ(\varepsilon^{-1}\log^{3/2} n)$。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在线列表标记问题，提出了一种随机化数据结构，将每次操作的重新标记成本从已知的O(log²n)降低到O(log^{3/2}n)。
AI.motivation: 在线列表标记问题要求动态维护有序数组并最小化重新标记成本。尽管已知确定性算法的下界为Ω(log²n)，但一般情况的最优性仍为开放问题。本文旨在突破这一理论限制。
AI.method: 设计了一种历史无关的随机化数据结构，结合概率分析与历史无关性证明，同时建立了匹配的历史无关算法下界。
AI.result: 实现了期望重新标记成本O(log^{3/2}n)的算法，并证明对于历史无关结构，该成本在ε∈[1/n^{1/3},常数]时达到Θ(ε^{-1}log^{3/2}n)。
AI.conclusion: 本文突破了长期存在的log²n壁垒，为历史无关算法提供了最优性证明，但通用算法的最优性仍需进一步研究。

authors_text: Wanchao Su,Hui Ye,Shu-Yu Chen,Lin Gao,Hongbo Fu
title: DrawingInStyles: Portrait Image Generation and Editing with Spatially Conditioned StyleGAN
title_zh: DrawingInStyles：使用空间条件 StyleGAN 生成和编辑肖像图像
abstract: The research topic of sketch-to-portrait generation has witnessed a boost of progress with deep learning techniques. The recently proposed StyleGAN architectures achieve state-of-the-art generation ability but the original StyleGAN is not friendly for sketch-based creation due to its unconditional generation nature. To address this issue, we propose a direct conditioning strategy to better preserve the spatial information under the StyleGAN framework. Specifically, we introduce Spatially Conditioned StyleGAN (SC-StyleGAN for short), which explicitly injects spatial constraints to the original StyleGAN generation process. We explore two input modalities, sketches and semantic maps, which together allow users to express desired generation results more precisely and easily. Based on SC-StyleGAN, we present DrawingInStyles, a novel drawing interface for non-professional users to easily produce high-quality, photo-realistic face images with precise control, either from scratch or editing existing ones. Qualitative and quantitative evaluations show the superior generation ability of our method to existing and alternative solutions. The usability and expressiveness of our system are confirmed by a user study.
summary: The research topic of sketch-to-portrait generation has witnessed a boost of progress with deep learning techniques. The recently proposed StyleGAN architectures achieve state-of-the-art generation ability but the original StyleGAN is not friendly for sketch-based creation due to its unconditional generation nature. To address this issue, we propose a direct conditioning strategy to better preserve the spatial information under the StyleGAN framework. Specifically, we introduce Spatially Conditioned StyleGAN (SC-StyleGAN for short), which explicitly injects spatial constraints to the original StyleGAN generation process. We explore two input modalities, sketches and semantic maps, which together allow users to express desired generation results more precisely and easily. Based on SC-StyleGAN, we present DrawingInStyles, a novel drawing interface for non-professional users to easily produce high-quality, photo-realistic face images with precise control, either from scratch or editing existing ones. Qualitative and quantitative evaluations show the superior generation ability of our method to existing and alternative solutions. The usability and expressiveness of our system are confirmed by a user study.
abstract_zh: 素描到肖像生成的研究课题见证了深度学习技术的进步。最近提出的 StyleGAN 架构实现了最先进的生成能力，但原始 StyleGAN 由于其无条件生成性质，对于基于草图的创建并不友好。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种直接调节策略，以更好地保留 StyleGAN 框架下的空间信息。具体来说，我们引入了 Spatially Conditioned StyleGAN（简称 SC-StyleGAN），它显式地将空间约束注入到原始 StyleGAN 生成过程中。我们探索两种输入模式：草图和语义图，它们共同允许用户更准确、更轻松地表达所需的生成结果。基于 SC-StyleGAN，我们推出了 DrawingInStyles，这是一种新颖的绘图界面，供非专业用户通过精确控制轻松生成高质量、逼真的面部图像，无论是从头开始还是编辑现有图像。定性和定量评估表明我们的方法比现有和替代解决方案具有优越的生成能力。我们系统的可用性和表现力已通过用户研究得到证实。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于空间约束的StyleGAN框架（SC-StyleGAN），结合草图和语义图输入，实现高质量人像生成与编辑，并开发了面向非专业用户的绘图界面DrawingInStyles。
AI.motivation: 传统StyleGAN因无条件生成特性难以满足基于草图的创作需求，需通过空间约束增强生成过程的可控性，使用户能更精确地表达创作意图。
AI.method: 在StyleGAN中引入空间约束机制，设计SC-StyleGAN模型，支持草图和语义图两种输入模态，并构建DrawingInStyles界面实现从零创作或编辑现有图像的交互功能。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在生成质量上优于现有方案，用户研究验证了系统的可用性与表达力，可生成高精度写实人像并支持精细控制。
AI.conclusion: SC-StyleGAN通过空间条件注入有效解决了无条件生成的局限性，DrawingInStyles系统为非专业用户提供了一种直观的人像生成与编辑工具，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: DrawingInStyles: Portrait Image Generation and Editing with Spatially Conditioned StyleGAN DrawingInStyles：使用空间条件 StyleGAN 生成和编辑肖像图像 The research topic of sketch-to-portrait generation has witnessed a boost of progress with deep learning techniques. The recently proposed StyleGAN architectures achieve state-of-the-art generation ability but the original StyleGAN is not friendly for sketch-based creation due to its unconditional generation nature. To address this issue, we propose a direct conditioning strategy to better preserve the spatial information under the StyleGAN framework. Specifically, we introduce Spatially Conditioned StyleGAN (SC-StyleGAN for short), which explicitly injects spatial constraints to the original StyleGAN generation process. We explore two input modalities, sketches and semantic maps, which together allow users to express desired generation results more precisely and easily. Based on SC-StyleGAN, we present DrawingInStyles, a novel drawing interface for non-professional users to easily produce high-quality, photo-realistic face images with precise control, either from scratch or editing existing ones. Qualitative and quantitative evaluations show the superior generation ability of our method to existing and alternative solutions. The usability and expressiveness of our system are confirmed by a user study. 素描到肖像生成的研究课题见证了深度学习技术的进步。最近提出的 StyleGAN 架构实现了最先进的生成能力，但原始 StyleGAN 由于其无条件生成性质，对于基于草图的创建并不友好。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种直接调节策略，以更好地保留 StyleGAN 框架下的空间信息。具体来说，我们引入了 Spatially Conditioned StyleGAN（简称 SC-StyleGAN），它显式地将空间约束注入到原始 StyleGAN 生成过程中。我们探索两种输入模式：草图和语义图，它们共同允许用户更准确、更轻松地表达所需的生成结果。基于 SC-StyleGAN，我们推出了 DrawingInStyles，这是一种新颖的绘图界面，供非专业用户通过精确控制轻松生成高质量、逼真的面部图像，无论是从头开始还是编辑现有图像。定性和定量评估表明我们的方法比现有和替代解决方案具有优越的生成能力。我们系统的可用性和表现力已通过用户研究得到证实。 本文提出了一种基于空间约束的StyleGAN框架（SC-StyleGAN），结合草图和语义图输入，实现高质量人像生成与编辑，并开发了面向非专业用户的绘图界面DrawingInStyles。 Wanchao Su,Hui Ye,Shu-Yu Chen,Lin Gao,Hongbo Fu cs.GR,cs.CV

authors_text: Qishuai Diao,Yi Jiang,Bin Wen,Jia Sun,Zehuan Yuan
title: MetaFormer: A Unified Meta Framework for Fine-Grained Recognition
title_zh: MetaFormer：用于细粒度识别的统一元框架
abstract: Fine-Grained Visual Classification(FGVC) is the task that requires recognizing the objects belonging to multiple subordinate categories of a super-category. Recent state-of-the-art methods usually design sophisticated learning pipelines to tackle this task. However, visual information alone is often not sufficient to accurately differentiate between fine-grained visual categories. Nowadays, the meta-information (e.g., spatio-temporal prior, attribute, and text description) usually appears along with the images. This inspires us to ask the question: Is it possible to use a unified and simple framework to utilize various meta-information to assist in fine-grained identification? To answer this problem, we explore a unified and strong meta-framework(MetaFormer) for fine-grained visual classification. In practice, MetaFormer provides a simple yet effective approach to address the joint learning of vision and various meta-information. Moreover, MetaFormer also provides a strong baseline for FGVC without bells and whistles. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MetaFormer can effectively use various meta-information to improve the performance of fine-grained recognition. In a fair comparison, MetaFormer can outperform the current SotA approaches with only vision information on the iNaturalist2017 and iNaturalist2018 datasets. Adding meta-information, MetaFormer can exceed the current SotA approaches by 5.9% and 5.3%, respectively. Moreover, MetaFormer can achieve 92.3% and 92.7% on CUB-200-2011 and NABirds, which significantly outperforms the SotA approaches. The source code and pre-trained models are released athttps://github.com/dqshuai/MetaFormer.
summary: Fine-Grained Visual Classification(FGVC) is the task that requires recognizing the objects belonging to multiple subordinate categories of a super-category. Recent state-of-the-art methods usually design sophisticated learning pipelines to tackle this task. However, visual information alone is often not sufficient to accurately differentiate between fine-grained visual categories. Nowadays, the meta-information (e.g., spatio-temporal prior, attribute, and text description) usually appears along with the images. This inspires us to ask the question: Is it possible to use a unified and simple framework to utilize various meta-information to assist in fine-grained identification? To answer this problem, we explore a unified and strong meta-framework(MetaFormer) for fine-grained visual classification. In practice, MetaFormer provides a simple yet effective approach to address the joint learning of vision and various meta-information. Moreover, MetaFormer also provides a strong baseline for FGVC without bells and whistles. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MetaFormer can effectively use various meta-information to improve the performance of fine-grained recognition. In a fair comparison, MetaFormer can outperform the current SotA approaches with only vision information on the iNaturalist2017 and iNaturalist2018 datasets. Adding meta-information, MetaFormer can exceed the current SotA approaches by 5.9% and 5.3%, respectively. Moreover, MetaFormer can achieve 92.3% and 92.7% on CUB-200-2011 and NABirds, which significantly outperforms the SotA approaches. The source code and pre-trained models are released athttps://github.com/dqshuai/MetaFormer.
abstract_zh: 细粒度视觉分类（FGVC）是需要识别属于超类别的多个从属类别的对象的任务。最近最先进的方法通常会设计复杂的学习管道来解决这一任务。然而，仅视觉信息通常不足以准确地区分细粒度的视觉类别。如今，元信息（例如时空先验、属性和文本描述）通常与图像一起出现。这启发我们提出一个问题：是否可以通过一个统一、简单的框架来利用各种元信息来辅助细粒度的识别？为了回答这个问题，我们探索了一个统一且强大的元框架（MetaFormer）来进行细粒度的视觉分类。在实践中，MetaFormer 提供了一种简单而有效的方法来解决视觉和各种元信息的联合学习。此外，MetaFormer 还为 FGVC 提供了强大的基线，无需任何附加功能。大量的实验证明MetaFormer可以有效地利用各种元信息来提高细粒度识别的性能。公平地比较，仅使用 iNaturalist2017 和 iNaturalist2018 数据集上的视觉信息，MetaFormer 的性能就可以优于当前的 SotA 方法。添加元信息后，MetaFormer 可以分别超过当前 SotA 方法 5.9% 和 5.3%。此外，MetaFormer 在 CUB-200-2011 和 NABirds 上可以达到 92.3% 和 92.7%，明显优于 SotA 方法。源代码和预训练模型发布于https://github.com/dqshuai/MetaFormer。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的元框架MetaFormer，用于细粒度视觉分类任务，通过结合视觉信息和多种元信息（如时空先验、属性和文本描述）来提升分类性能。
AI.motivation: 传统细粒度视觉分类方法依赖复杂的学习流程，但仅靠视觉信息难以准确区分细粒度类别。元信息（如属性、文本描述等）常伴随图像出现，但缺乏统一框架有效利用这些信息。
AI.method: 设计MetaFormer框架，通过简单而有效的方式联合学习视觉信息与多种元信息，无需复杂模块即可整合多源数据。
AI.result: 在iNaturalist2017/2018数据集上，仅使用视觉信息时优于现有SotA方法；加入元信息后分别提升5.9%和5.3%。在CUB-200-2011和NABirds数据集上达到92.3%和92.7%，显著超越现有方法。
AI.conclusion: MetaFormer通过统一整合元信息与视觉信息，为细粒度识别提供了简单高效的解决方案，并成为该领域的强基线模型。

authors_text: Chen Wang,Song-Hai Zhang,Yizhuo Zhang,Stefanie Zollmann,Shi-Min Hu
title: On Rotation Gains Within and Beyond Perceptual Limitations for Seated VR
title_zh: 论坐式 VR 的感知限制之内和之外的旋转增益
abstract: Head tracking in head-mounted displays (HMDs) enables users to explore a 360-degree virtual scene with free head movements. However, for seated use of HMDs such as users sitting on a chair or a couch, physically turning around 360-degree is not possible. Redirection techniques decouple tracked physical motion and virtual motion, allowing users to explore virtual environments with more flexibility. In seated situations with only head movements available, the difference of stimulus might cause the detection thresholds of rotation gains to differ from that of redirected walking. Therefore we present an experiment with a two-alternative forced-choice (2AFC) design to compare the thresholds for seated and standing situations. Results indicate that users are unable to discriminate rotation gains between 0.89 and 1.28, a smaller range compared to the standing condition. We further treated head amplification as an interaction technique and found that a gain of 2.5, though not a hard threshold, was near the largest gain that users consider applicable. Overall, our work aims to better understand human perception of rotation gains in seated VR and the results provide guidance for future design choices of its applications.
summary: Head tracking in head-mounted displays (HMDs) enables users to explore a 360-degree virtual scene with free head movements. However, for seated use of HMDs such as users sitting on a chair or a couch, physically turning around 360-degree is not possible. Redirection techniques decouple tracked physical motion and virtual motion, allowing users to explore virtual environments with more flexibility. In seated situations with only head movements available, the difference of stimulus might cause the detection thresholds of rotation gains to differ from that of redirected walking. Therefore we present an experiment with a two-alternative forced-choice (2AFC) design to compare the thresholds for seated and standing situations. Results indicate that users are unable to discriminate rotation gains between 0.89 and 1.28, a smaller range compared to the standing condition. We further treated head amplification as an interaction technique and found that a gain of 2.5, though not a hard threshold, was near the largest gain that users consider applicable. Overall, our work aims to better understand human perception of rotation gains in seated VR and the results provide guidance for future design choices of its applications.
abstract_zh: 头戴式显示器 (HMD) 中的头部跟踪使用户能够自由头部运动来探索 360 度虚拟场景。然而，对于坐着使用 HMD 的情况，例如坐在椅子或沙发上的用户，不可能进行 360 度的身体转动。重定向技术将跟踪的物理运动和虚拟运动解耦，使用户能够更灵活地探索虚拟环境。在只有头部运动的坐姿情况下，刺激的差异可能会导致旋转增益的检测阈值与重定向行走的检测阈值不同。因此，我们提出了一项采用两种替代强制选择（2AFC）设计的实验来比较坐着和站立情况下的阈值。结果表明，用户无法区分 0.89 和 1.28 之间的旋转增益，与站立状态相比，该范围较小。我们进一步将头部放大视为一种交互技术，发现 2.5 的增益虽然不是硬性阈值，但接近用户认为适用的最大增益。总体而言，我们的工作旨在更好地了解人类对坐式 VR 旋转增益的感知，其结果为其应用的未来设计选择提供指导。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了在坐姿VR环境中旋转增益的人类感知阈值，并探讨了其在交互设计中的应用。
AI.motivation: 在坐姿使用VR设备时，用户无法进行360度的物理旋转，因此需要通过旋转增益技术来增强虚拟环境的探索性。然而，坐姿下的感知阈值可能与站立情况不同，需要进一步研究。
AI.method: 采用两选一强制选择（2AFC）实验设计，比较坐姿和站立情况下用户对旋转增益的感知阈值，并将头部放大作为交互技术进行测试。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，用户在坐姿情况下无法区分0.89到1.28之间的旋转增益，范围比站立情况更小。此外，增益为2.5时接近用户认为适用的最大值。

search_text: On Rotation Gains Within and Beyond Perceptual Limitations for Seated VR 论坐式 VR 的感知限制之内和之外的旋转增益 Head tracking in head-mounted displays (HMDs) enables users to explore a 360-degree virtual scene with free head movements. However, for seated use of HMDs such as users sitting on a chair or a couch, physically turning around 360-degree is not possible. Redirection techniques decouple tracked physical motion and virtual motion, allowing users to explore virtual environments with more flexibility. In seated situations with only head movements available, the difference of stimulus might cause the detection thresholds of rotation gains to differ from that of redirected walking. Therefore we present an experiment with a two-alternative forced-choice (2AFC) design to compare the thresholds for seated and standing situations. Results indicate that users are unable to discriminate rotation gains between 0.89 and 1.28, a smaller range compared to the standing condition. We further treated head amplification as an interaction technique and found that a gain of 2.5, though not a hard threshold, was near the largest gain that users consider applicable. Overall, our work aims to better understand human perception of rotation gains in seated VR and the results provide guidance for future design choices of its applications. 头戴式显示器 (HMD) 中的头部跟踪使用户能够自由头部运动来探索 360 度虚拟场景。然而，对于坐着使用 HMD 的情况，例如坐在椅子或沙发上的用户，不可能进行 360 度的身体转动。重定向技术将跟踪的物理运动和虚拟运动解耦，使用户能够更灵活地探索虚拟环境。在只有头部运动的坐姿情况下，刺激的差异可能会导致旋转增益的检测阈值与重定向行走的检测阈值不同。因此，我们提出了一项采用两种替代强制选择（2AFC）设计的实验来比较坐着和站立情况下的阈值。结果表明，用户无法区分 0.89 和 1.28 之间的旋转增益，与站立状态相比，该范围较小。我们进一步将头部放大视为一种交互技术，发现 2.5 的增益虽然不是硬性阈值，但接近用户认为适用的最大增益。总体而言，我们的工作旨在更好地了解人类对坐式 VR 旋转增益的感知，其结果为其应用的未来设计选择提供指导。 该论文研究了在坐姿VR环境中旋转增益的人类感知阈值，并探讨了其在交互设计中的应用。 Chen Wang,Song-Hai Zhang,Yizhuo Zhang,Stefanie Zollmann,Shi-Min Hu cs.HC,cs.GR

authors_text: Claudio Filipi Goncalves do Santos,Mateus Roder,Leandro A. Passos,João P. Papa
title: MaxDropoutV2: An Improved Method to Drop out Neurons in Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: MaxDropoutV2：一种在卷积神经网络中丢弃神经元的改进方法
abstract: In the last decade, exponential data growth supplied the machine learning-based algorithms' capacity and enabled their usage in daily life activities. Additionally, such an improvement is partially explained due to the advent of deep learning techniques, i.e., stacks of simple architectures that end up in more complex models. Although both factors produce outstanding results, they also pose drawbacks regarding the learning process since training complex models denotes an expensive task and results are prone to overfit the training data. A supervised regularization technique called MaxDropout was recently proposed to tackle the latter, providing several improvements concerning traditional regularization approaches. In this paper, we present its improved version called MaxDropoutV2. Results considering two public datasets show that the model performs faster than the standard version and, in most cases, provides more accurate results.
summary: In the last decade, exponential data growth supplied the machine learning-based algorithms' capacity and enabled their usage in daily life activities. Additionally, such an improvement is partially explained due to the advent of deep learning techniques, i.e., stacks of simple architectures that end up in more complex models. Although both factors produce outstanding results, they also pose drawbacks regarding the learning process since training complex models denotes an expensive task and results are prone to overfit the training data. A supervised regularization technique called MaxDropout was recently proposed to tackle the latter, providing several improvements concerning traditional regularization approaches. In this paper, we present its improved version called MaxDropoutV2. Results considering two public datasets show that the model performs faster than the standard version and, in most cases, provides more accurate results.
abstract_zh: 在过去的十年中，指数级的数据增长提供了基于机器学习的算法的能力，并使其能够在日常生活活动中使用。此外，这种改进的部分原因是深度学习技术的出现，即简单架构的堆栈最终形成更复杂的模型。尽管这两个因素都产生了出色的结果，但它们也对学习过程造成了缺点，因为训练复杂的模型意味着一项昂贵的任务，并且结果很容易与训练数据过度拟合。最近提出了一种名为 MaxDropout 的监督正则化技术来解决后者，它对传统正则化方法提供了一些改进。在本文中，我们提出了其改进版本，称为 MaxDropoutV2。考虑两个公共数据集的结果表明，该模型的执行速度比标准版本更快，并且在大多数情况下提供更准确的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的神经元丢弃方法MaxDropoutV2，用于提升卷积神经网络的训练效率和准确性。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型虽表现优异，但训练复杂模型成本高且易过拟合，传统正则化方法存在不足，需改进现有技术以解决这些问题。
AI.method: 提出MaxDropoutV2方法，作为原有MaxDropout的改进版本，优化神经元丢弃策略以增强模型泛化能力。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集上的实验表明，MaxDropoutV2相比标准版本训练速度更快，且多数情况下准确率更高。
AI.conclusion: MaxDropoutV2有效缓解了过拟合问题，在保持模型性能的同时提升了训练效率，适用于卷积神经网络的训练过程。

authors_text: Md Imran Hossen,Xiali Hei
title: aaeCAPTCHA: The Design and Implementation of Audio Adversarial CAPTCHA
title_zh: aaeCAPTCHA：音频对抗验证码的设计与实现
comment: Accepted at 7th IEEE European Symposium on Security and Privacy (EuroS&P 2022)
comments: Accepted at 7th IEEE European Symposium on Security and Privacy (EuroS&P 2022)
abstract: CAPTCHAs are designed to prevent malicious bot programs from abusing websites. Most online service providers deploy audio CAPTCHAs as an alternative to text and image CAPTCHAs for visually impaired users. However, prior research investigating the security of audio CAPTCHAs found them highly vulnerable to automated attacks using Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) systems. To improve the robustness of audio CAPTCHAs against automated abuses, we present the design and implementation of an audio adversarial CAPTCHA (aaeCAPTCHA) system in this paper. The aaeCAPTCHA system exploits audio adversarial examples as CAPTCHAs to prevent the ASR systems from automatically solving them. Furthermore, we conducted a rigorous security evaluation of our new audio CAPTCHA design against five state-of-the-art DNN-based ASR systems and three commercial Speech-to-Text (STT) services. Our experimental evaluations demonstrate that aaeCAPTCHA is highly secure against these speech recognition technologies, even when the attacker has complete knowledge of the current attacks against audio adversarial examples. We also conducted a usability evaluation of the proof-of-concept implementation of the aaeCAPTCHA scheme. Our results show that it achieves high robustness at a moderate usability cost compared to normal audio CAPTCHAs. Finally, our extensive analysis highlights that aaeCAPTCHA can significantly enhance the security and robustness of traditional audio CAPTCHA systems while maintaining similar usability.
summary: CAPTCHAs are designed to prevent malicious bot programs from abusing websites. Most online service providers deploy audio CAPTCHAs as an alternative to text and image CAPTCHAs for visually impaired users. However, prior research investigating the security of audio CAPTCHAs found them highly vulnerable to automated attacks using Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) systems. To improve the robustness of audio CAPTCHAs against automated abuses, we present the design and implementation of an audio adversarial CAPTCHA (aaeCAPTCHA) system in this paper. The aaeCAPTCHA system exploits audio adversarial examples as CAPTCHAs to prevent the ASR systems from automatically solving them. Furthermore, we conducted a rigorous security evaluation of our new audio CAPTCHA design against five state-of-the-art DNN-based ASR systems and three commercial Speech-to-Text (STT) services. Our experimental evaluations demonstrate that aaeCAPTCHA is highly secure against these speech recognition technologies, even when the attacker has complete knowledge of the current attacks against audio adversarial examples. We also conducted a usability evaluation of the proof-of-concept implementation of the aaeCAPTCHA scheme. Our results show that it achieves high robustness at a moderate usability cost compared to normal audio CAPTCHAs. Finally, our extensive analysis highlights that aaeCAPTCHA can significantly enhance the security and robustness of traditional audio CAPTCHA systems while maintaining similar usability.
abstract_zh: 验证码旨在防止恶意机器人程序滥用网站。大多数在线服务提供商都会为视障用户部署音频验证码作为文本和图像验证码的替代方案。然而，之前对音频验证码安全性的研究发现，它们非常容易受到使用自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统的自动攻击。为了提高音频验证码针对自动滥用的鲁棒性，我们在本文中提出了音频对抗性验证码（aaeCAPTCHA）系统的设计和实现。 aaeCAPTCHA 系统利用音频对抗示例作为验证码来防止 ASR 系统自动解决它们。此外，我们还针对五个最先进的基于 DNN 的 ASR 系统和三个商业语音转文本 (STT) 服务对新的音频验证码设计进行了严格的安全评估。我们的实验评估表明，即使攻击者完全了解当前针对音频对抗示例的攻击，aaeCAPTCHA 对于这些语音识别技术也具有高度安全性。我们还对 aaeCAPTCHA 方案的概念验证实施进行了可用性评估。我们的结果表明，与普通音频验证码相比，它以适度的可用性成本实现了高鲁棒性。最后，我们的广泛分析强调，aaeCAPTCHA 可以显着增强传统音频验证码系统的安全性和稳健性，同时保持类似的可用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于音频对抗样本的新型音频验证码系统aaeCAPTCHA，旨在增强音频验证码对自动语音识别系统的安全性。
AI.motivation: 传统音频验证码存在被自动语音识别（ASR）系统破解的高风险，需设计更安全的验证码方案以防止恶意自动化攻击。
AI.method: 通过生成音频对抗样本作为验证码，利用深度神经网络（DNN）和商业语音转文本服务进行多轮安全测试，并评估系统可用性。
AI.result: 实验表明aaeCAPTCHA在攻击者掌握完整攻击知识的情况下仍能有效抵御五种先进ASR系统和三种商业STT服务，同时保持与传统音频验证码相近的可用性。
AI.conclusion: aaeCAPTCHA通过对抗样本技术显著提升了音频验证码的安全性，为传统验证码系统提供了可行的增强方案。

conclusion: aaeCAPTCHA通过对抗样本技术显著提升了音频验证码的安全性，为传统验证码系统提供了可行的增强方案。
search_text: aaeCAPTCHA: The Design and Implementation of Audio Adversarial CAPTCHA aaeCAPTCHA：音频对抗验证码的设计与实现 CAPTCHAs are designed to prevent malicious bot programs from abusing websites. Most online service providers deploy audio CAPTCHAs as an alternative to text and image CAPTCHAs for visually impaired users. However, prior research investigating the security of audio CAPTCHAs found them highly vulnerable to automated attacks using Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) systems. To improve the robustness of audio CAPTCHAs against automated abuses, we present the design and implementation of an audio adversarial CAPTCHA (aaeCAPTCHA) system in this paper. The aaeCAPTCHA system exploits audio adversarial examples as CAPTCHAs to prevent the ASR systems from automatically solving them. Furthermore, we conducted a rigorous security evaluation of our new audio CAPTCHA design against five state-of-the-art DNN-based ASR systems and three commercial Speech-to-Text (STT) services. Our experimental evaluations demonstrate that aaeCAPTCHA is highly secure against these speech recognition technologies, even when the attacker has complete knowledge of the current attacks against audio adversarial examples. We also conducted a usability evaluation of the proof-of-concept implementation of the aaeCAPTCHA scheme. Our results show that it achieves high robustness at a moderate usability cost compared to normal audio CAPTCHAs. Finally, our extensive analysis highlights that aaeCAPTCHA can significantly enhance the security and robustness of traditional audio CAPTCHA systems while maintaining similar usability. 验证码旨在防止恶意机器人程序滥用网站。大多数在线服务提供商都会为视障用户部署音频验证码作为文本和图像验证码的替代方案。然而，之前对音频验证码安全性的研究发现，它们非常容易受到使用自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统的自动攻击。为了提高音频验证码针对自动滥用的鲁棒性，我们在本文中提出了音频对抗性验证码（aaeCAPTCHA）系统的设计和实现。 aaeCAPTCHA 系统利用音频对抗示例作为验证码来防止 ASR 系统自动解决它们。此外，我们还针对五个最先进的基于 DNN 的 ASR 系统和三个商业语音转文本 (STT) 服务对新的音频验证码设计进行了严格的安全评估。我们的实验评估表明，即使攻击者完全了解当前针对音频对抗示例的攻击，aaeCAPTCHA 对于这些语音识别技术也具有高度安全性。我们还对 aaeCAPTCHA 方案的概念验证实施进行了可用性评估。我们的结果表明，与普通音频验证码相比，它以适度的可用性成本实现了高鲁棒性。最后，我们的广泛分析强调，aaeCAPTCHA 可以显着增强传统音频验证码系统的安全性和稳健性，同时保持类似的可用性。 本文提出了一种基于音频对抗样本的新型音频验证码系统aaeCAPTCHA，旨在增强音频验证码对自动语音识别系统的安全性。 Md Imran Hossen,Xiali Hei cs.CR,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors: Leandro A. Passos João Paulo Papa
authors_json: Leandro A. Passos João Paulo Papa
authors_text: Thierry P. Moreira,Marcos Cleison S. Santana,Leandro A. Passos João Paulo Papa,Kelton Augusto P. da Costa
title: An End-to-End Approach for Seam Carving Detection using Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用深度神经网络进行接缝雕刻检测的端到端方法
abstract: Seam carving is a computational method capable of resizing images for both reduction and expansion based on its content, instead of the image geometry. Although the technique is mostly employed to deal with redundant information, i.e., regions composed of pixels with similar intensity, it can also be used for tampering images by inserting or removing relevant objects. Therefore, detecting such a process is of extreme importance regarding the image security domain. However, recognizing seam-carved images does not represent a straightforward task even for human eyes, and robust computation tools capable of identifying such alterations are very desirable. In this paper, we propose an end-to-end approach to cope with the problem of automatic seam carving detection that can obtain state-of-the-art results. Experiments conducted over public and private datasets with several tampering configurations evidence the suitability of the proposed model.
summary: Seam carving is a computational method capable of resizing images for both reduction and expansion based on its content, instead of the image geometry. Although the technique is mostly employed to deal with redundant information, i.e., regions composed of pixels with similar intensity, it can also be used for tampering images by inserting or removing relevant objects. Therefore, detecting such a process is of extreme importance regarding the image security domain. However, recognizing seam-carved images does not represent a straightforward task even for human eyes, and robust computation tools capable of identifying such alterations are very desirable. In this paper, we propose an end-to-end approach to cope with the problem of automatic seam carving detection that can obtain state-of-the-art results. Experiments conducted over public and private datasets with several tampering configurations evidence the suitability of the proposed model.
abstract_zh: 接缝雕刻是一种计算方法，能够根据图像内容（而不是图像几何形状）调整图像大小以进行缩小和扩展。尽管该技术主要用于处理冗余信息，即由具有相似强度的像素组成的区域，但它也可以用于通过插入或删除相关对象来篡改图像。因此，检测此类过程对于图像安全领域极为重要。然而，即使对于人眼来说，识别接缝雕刻图像也不是一项简单的任务，因此非常需要能够识别此类更改的强大计算工具。在本文中，我们提出了一种端到端的方法来解决自动接缝雕刻检测问题，可以获得最先进的结果。在具有多种篡改配置的公共和私人数据集上进行的实验证明了所提出模型的适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的深度神经网络方法，用于自动检测图像缝合（seam carving）篡改。
AI.motivation: 缝合技术可被用于图像篡改（如插入或移除物体），但其检测对人类视觉和现有工具均具挑战性，因此需要开发鲁棒的自动检测方法以保障图像安全。
AI.method: 设计端到端深度神经网络模型，通过分析图像内容特征和篡改痕迹，结合公开与私有数据集进行训练与验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多个篡改配置下达到最先进的检测性能，验证了模型的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的端到端方法能够有效检测缝合篡改，为图像安全领域提供了可靠的计算工具。

authors_text: Guofang Li,Yonggui Zhu
title: A Novel Dual Dense Connection Network for Video Super-resolution
title_zh: 一种用于视频超分辨率的新型双密集连接网络
abstract: Video super-resolution (VSR) refers to the reconstruction of high-resolution (HR) video from the corresponding low-resolution (LR) video. Recently, VSR has received increasing attention. In this paper, we propose a novel dual dense connection network that can generate high-quality super-resolution (SR) results. The input frames are creatively divided into reference frame, pre-temporal group and post-temporal group, representing information in different time periods. This grouping method provides accurate information of different time periods without causing time information disorder. Meanwhile, we produce a new loss function, which is beneficial to enhance the convergence ability of the model. Experiments show that our model is superior to other advanced models in Vid4 datasets and SPMCS-11 datasets.
summary: Video super-resolution (VSR) refers to the reconstruction of high-resolution (HR) video from the corresponding low-resolution (LR) video. Recently, VSR has received increasing attention. In this paper, we propose a novel dual dense connection network that can generate high-quality super-resolution (SR) results. The input frames are creatively divided into reference frame, pre-temporal group and post-temporal group, representing information in different time periods. This grouping method provides accurate information of different time periods without causing time information disorder. Meanwhile, we produce a new loss function, which is beneficial to enhance the convergence ability of the model. Experiments show that our model is superior to other advanced models in Vid4 datasets and SPMCS-11 datasets.
abstract_zh: 视频超分辨率（VSR）是指从相应的低分辨率（LR）视频重建高分辨率（HR）视频。近年来，VSR越来越受到人们的关注。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的双密集连接网络，可以生成高质量的超分辨率（SR）结果。输入帧创造性地分为参考帧、前时间组和后时间组，代表不同时间段的信息。这种分组方式提供了不同时间段的准确信息，不会造成时间信息混乱。同时，我们产生了新的损失函数，有利于增强模型的收敛能力。实验表明，我们的模型在 Vid4 数据集和 SPMCS-11 数据集上优于其他高级模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型双密集连接网络，用于从低分辨率视频生成高分辨率视频。
AI.motivation: 视频超分辨率技术需处理时间信息连续性与模型收敛效率问题，现有方法存在信息混乱或收敛能力不足的缺陷。
AI.method: 将输入帧划分为参考帧、前后时序组以保持时间信息有序性，并设计新型损失函数提升模型收敛能力。
AI.result: 在Vid4和SPMCS-11数据集上，该模型性能优于其他先进算法。
AI.conclusion: 双密集连接结构与新型损失函数有效提升了视频超分辨率质量与模型效率。

authors_text: Namhoon Cho,Seokwon Lee,Hyo-Sang Shin,Antonios Tsourdos
title: Bayesian Learning Approach to Model Predictive Control
title_zh: 预测控制模型的贝叶斯学习方法
abstract: This study presents a Bayesian learning perspective towards model predictive control algorithms. High-level frameworks have been developed separately in the earlier studies on Bayesian learning and sampling-based model predictive control. On one hand, the Bayesian learning rule provides a general framework capable of generating various machine learning algorithms as special instances. On the other hand, the dynamic mirror descent model predictive control framework is capable of diversifying sample-rollout-based control algorithms. However, connections between the two frameworks have still not been fully appreciated in the context of stochastic optimal control. This study combines the Bayesian learning rule point of view into the model predictive control setting by taking inspirations from the view of understanding model predictive controller as an online learner. The selection of posterior class and natural gradient approximation for the variational formulation governs diversification of model predictive control algorithms in the Bayesian learning approach to model predictive control. This alternative viewpoint complements the dynamic mirror descent framework through streamlining the explanation of design choices.
summary: This study presents a Bayesian learning perspective towards model predictive control algorithms. High-level frameworks have been developed separately in the earlier studies on Bayesian learning and sampling-based model predictive control. On one hand, the Bayesian learning rule provides a general framework capable of generating various machine learning algorithms as special instances. On the other hand, the dynamic mirror descent model predictive control framework is capable of diversifying sample-rollout-based control algorithms. However, connections between the two frameworks have still not been fully appreciated in the context of stochastic optimal control. This study combines the Bayesian learning rule point of view into the model predictive control setting by taking inspirations from the view of understanding model predictive controller as an online learner. The selection of posterior class and natural gradient approximation for the variational formulation governs diversification of model predictive control algorithms in the Bayesian learning approach to model predictive control. This alternative viewpoint complements the dynamic mirror descent framework through streamlining the explanation of design choices.
abstract_zh: 本研究提出了模型预测控制算法的贝叶斯学习视角。在贝叶斯学习和基于采样的模型预测控制的早期研究中，已经分别开发了高级框架。一方面，贝叶斯学习规则提供了一个能够生成各种机器学习算法作为特殊实例的通用框架。另一方面，动态镜像下降模型预测控制框架能够使基于样本推出的控制算法多样化。然而，在随机最优控制的背景下，这两个框架之间的联系尚未得到充分认识。本研究从将模型预测控制器理解为在线学习器的角度汲取灵感，将贝叶斯学习规则的观点结合到模型预测控制设置中。变分公式的后验类别和自然梯度近似的选择决定了模型预测控制的贝叶斯学习方法中模型预测控制算法的多样化。这种替代观点通过简化设计选择的解释来补充动态镜像下降框架。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于贝叶斯学习的模型预测控制方法，将贝叶斯学习框架与动态镜像下降模型预测控制框架相结合。
AI.motivation: 贝叶斯学习与采样型模型预测控制框架虽各有优势，但两者在随机最优控制领域的联系尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 通过将贝叶斯学习规则引入模型预测控制，结合后验类选择与自然梯度近似进行变分公式化，形成新的控制算法多样化机制。
AI.result: 建立了贝叶斯学习视角下的模型预测控制框架，为设计选择提供了更简洁的解释并补充了动态镜像下降框架。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为随机最优控制提供了统一的理论视角，同时优化了模型预测控制算法的设计逻辑。

search_text: Bayesian Learning Approach to Model Predictive Control 预测控制模型的贝叶斯学习方法 This study presents a Bayesian learning perspective towards model predictive control algorithms. High-level frameworks have been developed separately in the earlier studies on Bayesian learning and sampling-based model predictive control. On one hand, the Bayesian learning rule provides a general framework capable of generating various machine learning algorithms as special instances. On the other hand, the dynamic mirror descent model predictive control framework is capable of diversifying sample-rollout-based control algorithms. However, connections between the two frameworks have still not been fully appreciated in the context of stochastic optimal control. This study combines the Bayesian learning rule point of view into the model predictive control setting by taking inspirations from the view of understanding model predictive controller as an online learner. The selection of posterior class and natural gradient approximation for the variational formulation governs diversification of model predictive control algorithms in the Bayesian learning approach to model predictive control. This alternative viewpoint complements the dynamic mirror descent framework through streamlining the explanation of design choices. 本研究提出了模型预测控制算法的贝叶斯学习视角。在贝叶斯学习和基于采样的模型预测控制的早期研究中，已经分别开发了高级框架。一方面，贝叶斯学习规则提供了一个能够生成各种机器学习算法作为特殊实例的通用框架。另一方面，动态镜像下降模型预测控制框架能够使基于样本推出的控制算法多样化。然而，在随机最优控制的背景下，这两个框架之间的联系尚未得到充分认识。本研究从将模型预测控制器理解为在线学习器的角度汲取灵感，将贝叶斯学习规则的观点结合到模型预测控制设置中。变分公式的后验类别和自然梯度近似的选择决定了模型预测控制的贝叶斯学习方法中模型预测控制算法的多样化。这种替代观点通过简化设计选择的解释来补充动态镜像下降框架。 本文提出了一种基于贝叶斯学习的模型预测控制方法，将贝叶斯学习框架与动态镜像下降模型预测控制框架相结合。 Namhoon Cho,Seokwon Lee,Hyo-Sang Shin,Antonios Tsourdos cs.LG,cs.RO,eess.SY,math.OC

authors_text: Yong Liu,Siqi Mai,Xiangning Chen,Cho-Jui Hsieh,Yang You
title: Towards Efficient and Scalable Sharpness-Aware Minimization
title_zh: 实现高效且可扩展的锐度感知最小化
abstract: Recently, Sharpness-Aware Minimization (SAM), which connects the geometry of the loss landscape and generalization, has demonstrated significant performance boosts on training large-scale models such as vision transformers. However, the update rule of SAM requires two sequential (non-parallelizable) gradient computations at each step, which can double the computational overhead. In this paper, we propose a novel algorithm LookSAM - that only periodically calculates the inner gradient ascent, to significantly reduce the additional training cost of SAM. The empirical results illustrate that LookSAM achieves similar accuracy gains to SAM while being tremendously faster - it enjoys comparable computational complexity with first-order optimizers such as SGD or Adam. To further evaluate the performance and scalability of LookSAM, we incorporate a layer-wise modification and perform experiments in the large-batch training scenario, which is more prone to converge to sharp local minima. We are the first to successfully scale up the batch size when training Vision Transformers (ViTs). With a 64k batch size, we are able to train ViTs from scratch in minutes while maintaining competitive performance.
summary: Recently, Sharpness-Aware Minimization (SAM), which connects the geometry of the loss landscape and generalization, has demonstrated significant performance boosts on training large-scale models such as vision transformers. However, the update rule of SAM requires two sequential (non-parallelizable) gradient computations at each step, which can double the computational overhead. In this paper, we propose a novel algorithm LookSAM - that only periodically calculates the inner gradient ascent, to significantly reduce the additional training cost of SAM. The empirical results illustrate that LookSAM achieves similar accuracy gains to SAM while being tremendously faster - it enjoys comparable computational complexity with first-order optimizers such as SGD or Adam. To further evaluate the performance and scalability of LookSAM, we incorporate a layer-wise modification and perform experiments in the large-batch training scenario, which is more prone to converge to sharp local minima. We are the first to successfully scale up the batch size when training Vision Transformers (ViTs). With a 64k batch size, we are able to train ViTs from scratch in minutes while maintaining competitive performance.
abstract_zh: 最近，将损失景观的几何形状与泛化联系起来的锐度感知最小化（SAM）在训练视觉变换器等大规模模型时表现出了显着的性能提升。然而，SAM 的更新规则在每一步都需要进行两次连续的（不可并行的）梯度计算，这会使计算开销增加一倍。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的算法 LookSAM - 仅定期计算内部梯度上升，以显着减少 SAM 的额外训练成本。实证结果表明，LookSAM 实现了与 SAM 类似的精度增益，同时速度更快 - 它具有与 SGD 或 Adam 等一阶优化器相当的计算复杂性。为了进一步评估 LookSAM 的性能和可扩展性，我们结合了分层修改并在大批量训练场景中进行实验，该场景更容易收敛到尖锐的局部最小值。我们是第一个在训练 Vision Transformers (ViTs) 时成功扩大批量大小的人。凭借 64k 批量大小，我们能够在几分钟内从头开始训练 ViT，同时保持有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为LookSAM的新算法，旨在减少Sharpness-Aware Minimization（SAM）的计算开销，同时保持其性能优势。
AI.motivation: SAM虽然能提升大规模模型的泛化性能，但其每次迭代需要两次顺序梯度计算，导致计算成本翻倍。现有方法缺乏高效且可扩展的替代方案。
AI.method: 设计LookSAM算法，仅周期性计算内部梯度上升，而非每步计算，从而降低计算复杂度；结合分层修改与大批次训练实验，验证算法可扩展性。
AI.result: LookSAM在保持与SAM相似精度的同时，训练速度显著提升，计算复杂度接近SGD/Adam；首次成功将Vision Transformer的批次规模扩展至64k，实现分钟级训练。
AI.conclusion: LookSAM有效解决了SAM的计算瓶颈，为大规模模型训练提供了高效且可扩展的锐度感知优化方案。

authors_text: Odysseas Pappas,Nantheera Anantrasirichai,Byron Adams,Alin Achim
title: High-resolution Coastline Extraction in SAR Images via MISP-GGD Superpixel Segmentation
title_zh: 通过 MISP-GGD 超像素分割在 SAR 图像中提取高分辨率海岸线
comment: To appear in proceedings CIE RADAR 2021
comments: To appear in proceedings CIE RADAR 2021
abstract: High accuracy coastline/shoreline extraction from SAR imagery is a crucial step in a number of maritime and coastal monitoring applications. We present a method based on image segmentation using the Generalised Gamma Mixture Model superpixel algorithm (MISP-GGD). MISP-GGD produces superpixels adhering with great accuracy to object edges in the image, such as the coastline. Unsupervised clustering of the generated superpixels according to textural and radiometric features allows for generation of a land/water mask from which a highly accurate coastline can be extracted. We present results of our proposed method on a number of SAR images of varying characteristics.
summary: High accuracy coastline/shoreline extraction from SAR imagery is a crucial step in a number of maritime and coastal monitoring applications. We present a method based on image segmentation using the Generalised Gamma Mixture Model superpixel algorithm (MISP-GGD). MISP-GGD produces superpixels adhering with great accuracy to object edges in the image, such as the coastline. Unsupervised clustering of the generated superpixels according to textural and radiometric features allows for generation of a land/water mask from which a highly accurate coastline can be extracted. We present results of our proposed method on a number of SAR images of varying characteristics.
abstract_zh: 从 SAR 图像中提取高精度海岸线是许多海上和沿海监测应用的关键步骤。我们提出了一种基于使用广义伽玛混合模型超像素算法（MISP-GGD）的图像分割的方法。 MISP-GGD 生成的超像素非常精确地附着在图像中的对象边缘（例如海岸线）。根据纹理和辐射特征对生成的超像素进行无监督聚类，可以生成陆地/水掩模，从中可以提取高度准确的海岸线。我们展示了我们提出的方法在许多不同特征的 SAR 图像上的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于MISP-GGD超像素分割算法的高分辨率SAR图像海岸线提取方法。
AI.motivation: 合成孔径雷达(SAR)图像中的高精度海岸线提取对海洋和海岸监测应用至关重要，传统方法存在边缘定位不精确的问题。
AI.method: 采用MISP-GGD超像素分割算法生成贴合目标边缘的超像素，通过纹理和辐射特征的无监督聚类生成陆地/水域掩膜，进而提取海岸线。
AI.result: 在多种特征的SAR图像上验证了该方法，实现了高精度的海岸线提取。
AI.conclusion: MISP-GGD超像素分割结合特征聚类能有效提升SAR图像海岸线提取的准确性，为海岸监测提供可靠技术手段。

authors_text: Robin Jeanne Kirschner,Nico Mansfeld,Saeed Abdolshah,Sami Haddadin
title: ISO/TS 15066: How Different Interpretations Affect Risk Assessment
title_zh: ISO/TS 15066：不同的解释如何影响风险评估
abstract: The current technical specification ISO/TS15066:2016(E) for safe human-robot interaction contains logically conflicting definitions for the contact between human and robot. This may result in different interpretations for the contact classification and thus no unique outcome can be expected, which may even cause a risk to the human. In previous work, we showed a first set of implications. This paper addresses the possible interpretations of a collision scenario as a result of the varying interpretations for a risk assessment. With an experiment including four commercially available robot systems we demonstrate the procedure of the risk assessment following the different interpretations of the TS. The results indicate possible incorrect use of the technical specification, which we believe needs to be resolved in future revisions. For this, we suggest tools in form of a decision tree and constrained collision force maps, which enable a simple, unambiguous risk assessment for HRI.
summary: The current technical specification ISO/TS15066:2016(E) for safe human-robot interaction contains logically conflicting definitions for the contact between human and robot. This may result in different interpretations for the contact classification and thus no unique outcome can be expected, which may even cause a risk to the human. In previous work, we showed a first set of implications. This paper addresses the possible interpretations of a collision scenario as a result of the varying interpretations for a risk assessment. With an experiment including four commercially available robot systems we demonstrate the procedure of the risk assessment following the different interpretations of the TS. The results indicate possible incorrect use of the technical specification, which we believe needs to be resolved in future revisions. For this, we suggest tools in form of a decision tree and constrained collision force maps, which enable a simple, unambiguous risk assessment for HRI.
abstract_zh: 当前关于安全人机交互的技术规范 ISO/TS15066:2016(E) 对于人与机器人之间的接触包含逻辑上相互冲突的定义。这可能会导致对接触分类的不同解释，因此无法预期独特的结果，甚至可能对人类造成风险。在之前的工作中，我们展示了第一组含义。本文讨论了由于风险评估的不同解释而导致的碰撞场景的可能解释。通过包括四个商用机器人系统的实验，我们展示了根据 TS 的不同解释进行风险评估的过程。结果表明技术规范可能存在错误使用，我们认为需要在未来的修订中解决这一问题。为此，我们建议使用决策树和约束碰撞力图形式的工具，这些工具可以对 HRI 进行简单、明确的风险评估。

AI.tldr: 分析ISO/TS 15066标准中关于人机接触定义的歧义性对风险评估的影响，并提出改进工具。
AI.motivation: 当前ISO/TS 15066标准中对人机接触的定义存在逻辑冲突，导致风险评估结果不一致，可能威胁人身安全。
AI.method: 通过四套商用机器人系统实验，对比不同解释下风险评估流程，验证标准应用中的问题。
AI.result: 实验表明标准可能存在误用风险，需在修订中明确规范，并提出决策树和碰撞力图作为辅助工具。
AI.conclusion: 建议未来标准修订中消除定义歧义，并引入可视化工具以实现更准确的人机交互风险评估。

authors_text: Juho Kalliokoski,Basak Sakcak,Markku Suomalainen,Katherine J. Mimnaugh,Alexis P. Chambers,Timo Ojala,Steven M. LaValle
title: HI-DWA: Human-Influenced Dynamic Window Approach for Shared Control of a Telepresence Robot
title_zh: HI-DWA：用于远程呈现机器人共享控制的受人类影响的动态窗口方法
comment: Accepted for publication in IROS (International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems) 2022
comments: Accepted for publication in IROS (International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems) 2022
abstract: This paper considers the problem of enabling the user to modify the path of a telepresence robot. The robot is capable of autonomously navigating to a goal predefined by the user, but the user might still want to modify the path, for example, to go further away from other people, or to go closer to landmarks she wants to see on the way. We propose Human-Influenced Dynamic Window Approach (HI-DWA), a shared control method aimed for telepresence robots based on Dynamic Window Approach (DWA) that allows the user to influence the control input given to the robot. To verify the proposed method, we performed a user study (N=32) in Virtual Reality (VR) to compare HI-DWA with switching between autonomous navigation and manual control for controlling a simulated telepresence robot moving in a virtual environment. Results showed that users reached their goal faster using HI-DWA controller and found it easier to use. Preference between the two methods was split equally. Qualitative analysis revealed that a major reason for the participants that preferred switching between two modes was the feeling of control. We also analyzed the effect of different input methods, joystick and gesture, on the preference and perceived workload.
summary: This paper considers the problem of enabling the user to modify the path of a telepresence robot. The robot is capable of autonomously navigating to a goal predefined by the user, but the user might still want to modify the path, for example, to go further away from other people, or to go closer to landmarks she wants to see on the way. We propose Human-Influenced Dynamic Window Approach (HI-DWA), a shared control method aimed for telepresence robots based on Dynamic Window Approach (DWA) that allows the user to influence the control input given to the robot. To verify the proposed method, we performed a user study (N=32) in Virtual Reality (VR) to compare HI-DWA with switching between autonomous navigation and manual control for controlling a simulated telepresence robot moving in a virtual environment. Results showed that users reached their goal faster using HI-DWA controller and found it easier to use. Preference between the two methods was split equally. Qualitative analysis revealed that a major reason for the participants that preferred switching between two modes was the feeling of control. We also analyzed the effect of different input methods, joystick and gesture, on the preference and perceived workload.
abstract_zh: 本文考虑了使用户能够修改远程呈现机器人路径的问题。机器人能够自主导航到用户预定义的目标，但用户可能仍然想要修改路径，例如，远离其他人，或者更靠近她想在途中看到的地标。我们提出了受人类影响的动态窗口方法（HI-DWA），这是一种基于动态窗口方法（DWA）的针对远程呈现机器人的共享控制方法，允许用户影响给予机器人的控制输入。为了验证所提出的方法，我们在虚拟现实 (VR) 中进行了一项用户研究 (N=32)，以将 HI-DWA 与自主导航和手动控制之间的切换进行比较，以控制在虚拟环境中移动的模拟远程呈现机器人。结果表明，用户使用 HI-DWA 控制器可以更快地实现目标，并且发现它更易于使用。两种方法的偏好均等。定性分析显示，参与者更喜欢在两种模式之间切换的一个主要原因是控制感。我们还分析了不同输入方法、操纵杆和手势对偏好和感知工作量的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HI-DWA方法，解决用户远程操控机器人时动态调整路径的问题，实现人机共享控制。
AI.motivation: 用户在远程操控机器人时可能需要临时调整路径（如避障或靠近目标），传统切换自主/手动模式存在效率与控制权矛盾。
AI.method: 基于动态窗口法（DWA）设计HI-DWA算法，融合用户实时输入指令，通过VR环境进行32人用户实验对比HI-DWA与模式切换方案。
AI.result: HI-DWA使用户达目标速度提升且操作更简便，但用户对两种方式偏好均分，偏好切换模式者认为其更具控制感，输入方式影响操作负荷感知。
AI.conclusion: HI-DWA在效率和易用性上优于传统模式切换，但需平衡用户控制权需求，未来可优化输入交互方式降低操作负荷。

authors_text: Ensheng Shi,Yanlin Wang,Wei Tao,Lun Du,Hongyu Zhang,Shi Han,Dongmei Zhang,Hongbin Sun
title: RACE: Retrieval-Augmented Commit Message Generation
title_zh: RACE：检索增强提交消息生成
comment: Accepted by EMNLP 2022 (The 2022 Conference on Empirical Methods in Natural Language Processing)
comments: Accepted by EMNLP 2022 (The 2022 Conference on Empirical Methods in Natural Language Processing)
abstract: Commit messages are important for software development and maintenance. Many neural network-based approaches have been proposed and shown promising results on automatic commit message generation. However, the generated commit messages could be repetitive or redundant. In this paper, we propose RACE, a new retrieval-augmented neural commit message generation method, which treats the retrieved similar commit as an exemplar and leverages it to generate an accurate commit message. As the retrieved commit message may not always accurately describe the content/intent of the current code diff, we also propose an exemplar guider, which learns the semantic similarity between the retrieved and current code diff and then guides the generation of commit message based on the similarity. We conduct extensive experiments on a large public dataset with five programming languages. Experimental results show that RACE can outperform all baselines. Furthermore, RACE can boost the performance of existing Seq2Seq models in commit message generation.
summary: Commit messages are important for software development and maintenance. Many neural network-based approaches have been proposed and shown promising results on automatic commit message generation. However, the generated commit messages could be repetitive or redundant. In this paper, we propose RACE, a new retrieval-augmented neural commit message generation method, which treats the retrieved similar commit as an exemplar and leverages it to generate an accurate commit message. As the retrieved commit message may not always accurately describe the content/intent of the current code diff, we also propose an exemplar guider, which learns the semantic similarity between the retrieved and current code diff and then guides the generation of commit message based on the similarity. We conduct extensive experiments on a large public dataset with five programming languages. Experimental results show that RACE can outperform all baselines. Furthermore, RACE can boost the performance of existing Seq2Seq models in commit message generation.
abstract_zh: 提交消息对于软件开发和维护非常重要。已经提出了许多基于神经网络的方法，并在自动提交消息生成方面显示出了有希望的结果。但是，生成的提交消息可能是重复的或冗余的。在本文中，我们提出了 RACE，一种新的检索增强神经提交消息生成方法，它将检索到的相似提交视为范例，并利用它来生成准确的提交消息。由于检索到的提交消息可能并不总是准确地描述当前代码差异的内容/意图，我们还提出了一个示例引导器，它学习检索到的代码差异和当前代码差异之间的语义相似性，然后根据相似性指导提交消息的生成。我们使用五种编程语言在大型公共数据集上进行了广泛的实验。实验结果表明，RACE 可以优于所有基线。此外，RACE 可以提高现有 Seq2Seq 模型在提交消息生成方面的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RACE方法，通过检索类似提交信息作为范例，结合语义相似性引导生成更准确的提交信息。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络生成的提交信息存在重复或冗余问题，需提升生成准确性和相关性。
AI.method: RACE方法检索相似提交作为范例，并设计范例引导器学习检索内容与当前代码差异的语义相似性以指导生成。
AI.result: 在五种编程语言的大型数据集上，RACE优于所有基线方法，并提升现有Seq2Seq模型性能。
AI.conclusion: RACE有效解决提交信息生成中的冗余问题，显著提升生成质量与模型表现。

conclusion: RACE有效解决提交信息生成中的冗余问题，显著提升生成质量与模型表现。
search_text: RACE: Retrieval-Augmented Commit Message Generation RACE：检索增强提交消息生成 Commit messages are important for software development and maintenance. Many neural network-based approaches have been proposed and shown promising results on automatic commit message generation. However, the generated commit messages could be repetitive or redundant. In this paper, we propose RACE, a new retrieval-augmented neural commit message generation method, which treats the retrieved similar commit as an exemplar and leverages it to generate an accurate commit message. As the retrieved commit message may not always accurately describe the content/intent of the current code diff, we also propose an exemplar guider, which learns the semantic similarity between the retrieved and current code diff and then guides the generation of commit message based on the similarity. We conduct extensive experiments on a large public dataset with five programming languages. Experimental results show that RACE can outperform all baselines. Furthermore, RACE can boost the performance of existing Seq2Seq models in commit message generation. 提交消息对于软件开发和维护非常重要。已经提出了许多基于神经网络的方法，并在自动提交消息生成方面显示出了有希望的结果。但是，生成的提交消息可能是重复的或冗余的。在本文中，我们提出了 RACE，一种新的检索增强神经提交消息生成方法，它将检索到的相似提交视为范例，并利用它来生成准确的提交消息。由于检索到的提交消息可能并不总是准确地描述当前代码差异的内容/意图，我们还提出了一个示例引导器，它学习检索到的代码差异和当前代码差异之间的语义相似性，然后根据相似性指导提交消息的生成。我们使用五种编程语言在大型公共数据集上进行了广泛的实验。实验结果表明，RACE 可以优于所有基线。此外，RACE 可以提高现有 Seq2Seq 模型在提交消息生成方面的性能。 本文提出RACE方法，通过检索类似提交信息作为范例，结合语义相似性引导生成更准确的提交信息。 Ensheng Shi,Yanlin Wang,Wei Tao,Lun Du,Hongyu Zhang,Shi Han,Dongmei Zhang,Hongbin Sun cs.SE,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Adhi Widagdo,Markku Suomalainen,Basak Sakcak,Katherine J. Mimnaugh,Juho Kalliokoski,Alexis P. Chambers,Timo Ojala,Steven M. LaValle
title: A Study of Preference and Comfort for Users Immersed in a Telepresence Robot
title_zh: 沉浸在远程呈现机器人中的用户偏好和舒适度研究
comment: Submitted to IROS (International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems) 2022
comments: Submitted to IROS (International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems) 2022
abstract: In this paper, we show that unwinding the rotations of a user immersed in a telepresence robot is preferred and may increase the feeling of presence or "being there". By immersive telepresence, we mean a scenario where a user wearing a head-mounted display embodies a mobile robot equipped with a 360° camera in another location, such that the user can move the robot and communicate with people around it. By unwinding the rotations, the user never perceives rotational motion through the head-mounted display while staying stationary, avoiding sensory mismatch which causes a major part of VR sickness. We performed a user study (N=32) on a Dolly mobile robot platform, mimicking an earlier similar study done in simulation. Unlike the simulated study, in this study there is no significant difference in the VR sickness suffered by the participants, or the condition they find more comfortable (unwinding or automatic rotations). However, participants still prefer the unwinding condition, and they judge it to render a stronger feeling of presence, a major piece in natural communication. We show that participants aboard a real telepresence robot perceive distances similarly suitable as in simulation, presenting further evidence on the applicability of VR as a research platform for robotics and human-robot interaction.
summary: In this paper, we show that unwinding the rotations of a user immersed in a telepresence robot is preferred and may increase the feeling of presence or "being there". By immersive telepresence, we mean a scenario where a user wearing a head-mounted display embodies a mobile robot equipped with a 360° camera in another location, such that the user can move the robot and communicate with people around it. By unwinding the rotations, the user never perceives rotational motion through the head-mounted display while staying stationary, avoiding sensory mismatch which causes a major part of VR sickness. We performed a user study (N=32) on a Dolly mobile robot platform, mimicking an earlier similar study done in simulation. Unlike the simulated study, in this study there is no significant difference in the VR sickness suffered by the participants, or the condition they find more comfortable (unwinding or automatic rotations). However, participants still prefer the unwinding condition, and they judge it to render a stronger feeling of presence, a major piece in natural communication. We show that participants aboard a real telepresence robot perceive distances similarly suitable as in simulation, presenting further evidence on the applicability of VR as a research platform for robotics and human-robot interaction.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们表明，放松沉浸在远程呈现机器人中的用户的旋转是首选，并且可能会增加临场感或“在那里”的感觉。沉浸式远程呈现是指这样一种场景：佩戴头戴式显示器的用户在另一个位置体现出配备有 360° 摄像头的移动机器人，这样用户就可以移动机器人并与周围的人进行交流。通过解除旋转，用户在保持静止状态时永远不会通过头戴式显示器感知旋转运动，从而避免了导致 VR 晕眩的感觉不匹配。我们在 Dolly 移动机器人平台上进行了一项用户研究 (N=32)，模仿了早期在模拟中进行的类似研究。与模拟研究不同，在这项研究中，参与者所遭受的 VR 晕眩感或他们认为更舒适的状况（放松或自动旋转）没有显着差异。然而，参与者仍然更喜欢放松的状态，他们认为它可以提供更强烈的存在感，这是自然交流的重要组成部分。我们表明，真实的远程呈现机器人上的参与者感知的距离与模拟中的距离相似，这进一步证明了 VR 作为机器人和人机交互研究平台的适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了用户在沉浸式远程存在机器人中的偏好和舒适度，比较了旋转解缠与自动旋转两种方式对用户感知和舒适度的影响。
AI.motivation: 远程存在系统中旋转运动可能导致虚拟现实晕动症，而解缠旋转可能减少感官冲突，提升用户的临场感和自然交互体验。
AI.method: 通过32名参与者的用户实验，在Dolly移动机器人平台上测试解缠旋转与自动旋转两种条件，对比VR晕动症、舒适度及临场感差异。
AI.result: 实验未发现两种条件在VR晕动症或舒适度上的显著差异，但参与者更偏好解缠旋转，认为其能增强临场感；同时实际机器人与模拟实验中距离感知一致性验证了VR研究平台的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 解缠旋转虽未显著提升舒适度，但被用户偏好用于增强临场感，表明VR可作为远程存在机器人研究的有效工具。

authors_text: Wilfried Jakob,Christian Blume
title: Pareto Optimization or Cascaded Weighted Sum: A Comparison of Concepts
title_zh: 帕累托优化或级联加权和：概念比较
abstract: According to the published papers and books since the turn of the century, Pareto optimization is the dominating assessment method for multi-objective nonlinear optimization problems treated by population-based optimizers like Evolutionary Algorithms. However, is it always the method of choice for real-world applications, where either more than four objectives have to be considered, or the same type of task is repeated again and again with only minor modifications, in an automated optimization or planning process? This paper presents a classification of application scenarios and compares the Pareto approach with an extended version of the weighted sum, called cascaded weighted sum, for the different scenarios. Its range of application within the field of multi-objective optimization is discussed as well as its strengths and weaknesses.
summary: According to the published papers and books since the turn of the century, Pareto optimization is the dominating assessment method for multi-objective nonlinear optimization problems treated by population-based optimizers like Evolutionary Algorithms. However, is it always the method of choice for real-world applications, where either more than four objectives have to be considered, or the same type of task is repeated again and again with only minor modifications, in an automated optimization or planning process? This paper presents a classification of application scenarios and compares the Pareto approach with an extended version of the weighted sum, called cascaded weighted sum, for the different scenarios. Its range of application within the field of multi-objective optimization is discussed as well as its strengths and weaknesses.
abstract_zh: 根据世纪之交以来发表的论文和书籍，帕累托优化是基于群体的优化器（如进化算法）处理多目标非线性优化问题的主要评估方法。然而，它是否始终是现实应用程序的首选方法，在自动优化或规划过程中，要么必须考虑四个以上的目标，要么一次又一次地重复相同类型的任务，而只需进行微小的修改？本文提出了应用场景的分类，并针对不同场景将 Pareto 方法与加权和的扩展版本（称为级联加权和）进行了比较。讨论了它在多目标优化领域的应用范围以及它的优点和缺点。

AI.tldr: 比较Pareto优化与级联加权和方法在不同应用场景下的效果
AI.motivation: 质疑Pareto优化在现实应用中的适用性，特别是在多目标或重复任务中的表现
AI.method: 对应用场景进行分类，并比较Pareto方法与级联加权和方法
AI.result: 发现级联加权和在特定场景下可能优于Pareto优化，尤其在处理多目标或重复任务时
AI.conclusion: 根据具体应用场景选择合适的优化方法，而非单一依赖Pareto优化
