authors_text: Nassim Belmecheri,Noureddine Aribi,Nadjib Lazaar,Yahia Lebbah,Samir Loudni
title: Boosting the Learning for Ranking Patterns
title_zh: 促进排名模式的学习
abstract: Discovering relevant patterns for a particular user remains a challenging tasks in data mining. Several approaches have been proposed to learn user-specific pattern ranking functions. These approaches generalize well, but at the expense of the running time. On the other hand, several measures are often used to evaluate the interestingness of patterns, with the hope to reveal a ranking that is as close as possible to the user-specific ranking. In this paper, we formulate the problem of learning pattern ranking functions as a multicriteria decision making problem. Our approach aggregates different interestingness measures into a single weighted linear ranking function, using an interactive learning procedure that operates in either passive or active modes. A fast learning step is used for eliciting the weights of all the measures by mean of pairwise comparisons. This approach is based on Analytic Hierarchy Process (AHP), and a set of user-ranked patterns to build a preference matrix, which compares the importance of measures according to the user-specific interestingness. A sensitivity based heuristic is proposed for the active learning mode, in order to insure high quality results with few user ranking queries. Experiments conducted on well-known datasets show that our approach significantly reduces the running time and returns precise pattern ranking, while being robust to user-error compared with state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: Discovering relevant patterns for a particular user remains a challenging tasks in data mining. Several approaches have been proposed to learn user-specific pattern ranking functions. These approaches generalize well, but at the expense of the running time. On the other hand, several measures are often used to evaluate the interestingness of patterns, with the hope to reveal a ranking that is as close as possible to the user-specific ranking. In this paper, we formulate the problem of learning pattern ranking functions as a multicriteria decision making problem. Our approach aggregates different interestingness measures into a single weighted linear ranking function, using an interactive learning procedure that operates in either passive or active modes. A fast learning step is used for eliciting the weights of all the measures by mean of pairwise comparisons. This approach is based on Analytic Hierarchy Process (AHP), and a set of user-ranked patterns to build a preference matrix, which compares the importance of measures according to the user-specific interestingness. A sensitivity based heuristic is proposed for the active learning mode, in order to insure high quality results with few user ranking queries. Experiments conducted on well-known datasets show that our approach significantly reduces the running time and returns precise pattern ranking, while being robust to user-error compared with state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 发现特定用户的相关模式仍然是数据挖掘中的一项具有挑战性的任务。已经提出了几种方法来学习特定于用户的模式排名函数。这些方法概括性很好，但以牺牲运行时间为代价。另一方面，通常使用多种度量来评估模式的有趣程度，希望揭示尽可能接近特定于用户的排名的排名。在本文中，我们将学习模式排序函数问题表述为多标准决策问题。我们的方法使用以被动或主动模式运行的交互式学习程序，将不同的兴趣度量聚合为单个加权线性排名函数。快速学习步骤用于通过成对比较得出所有度量的权重。该方法基于层次分析法（AHP）和一组用户排序模式来构建偏好矩阵，该矩阵根据用户特定的兴趣度来比较度量的重要性。针对主动学习模式提出了基于灵敏度的启发式算法，以确保用很少的用户排名查询获得高质量的结果。在众所周知的数据集上进行的实验表明，我们的方法显着减少了运行时间并返回精确的模式排名，同时与最先进的方法相比，对用户错误具有鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过多准则决策方法学习模式排名函数的高效算法，以解决传统方法计算耗时且难以平衡用户特定排名的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有模式排名方法虽能泛化但计算效率低，而基于有趣性度量的评估方法难以精准匹配用户需求，需在效率与准确性间寻求平衡。
AI.method: 将多有趣性度量整合为加权线性函数，采用AHP层次分析法结合用户反馈构建偏好矩阵，并通过主动学习策略优化权重，减少用户交互次数。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在公开数据集上显著降低计算耗时，输出排名精度优于现有方法，且对用户错误具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的多准则交互学习框架有效兼顾了计算效率与用户个性化需求，为模式挖掘领域提供了新的解决方案。

search_text: Boosting the Learning for Ranking Patterns 促进排名模式的学习 Discovering relevant patterns for a particular user remains a challenging tasks in data mining. Several approaches have been proposed to learn user-specific pattern ranking functions. These approaches generalize well, but at the expense of the running time. On the other hand, several measures are often used to evaluate the interestingness of patterns, with the hope to reveal a ranking that is as close as possible to the user-specific ranking. In this paper, we formulate the problem of learning pattern ranking functions as a multicriteria decision making problem. Our approach aggregates different interestingness measures into a single weighted linear ranking function, using an interactive learning procedure that operates in either passive or active modes. A fast learning step is used for eliciting the weights of all the measures by mean of pairwise comparisons. This approach is based on Analytic Hierarchy Process (AHP), and a set of user-ranked patterns to build a preference matrix, which compares the importance of measures according to the user-specific interestingness. A sensitivity based heuristic is proposed for the active learning mode, in order to insure high quality results with few user ranking queries. Experiments conducted on well-known datasets show that our approach significantly reduces the running time and returns precise pattern ranking, while being robust to user-error compared with state-of-the-art approaches. 发现特定用户的相关模式仍然是数据挖掘中的一项具有挑战性的任务。已经提出了几种方法来学习特定于用户的模式排名函数。这些方法概括性很好，但以牺牲运行时间为代价。另一方面，通常使用多种度量来评估模式的有趣程度，希望揭示尽可能接近特定于用户的排名的排名。在本文中，我们将学习模式排序函数问题表述为多标准决策问题。我们的方法使用以被动或主动模式运行的交互式学习程序，将不同的兴趣度量聚合为单个加权线性排名函数。快速学习步骤用于通过成对比较得出所有度量的权重。该方法基于层次分析法（AHP）和一组用户排序模式来构建偏好矩阵，该矩阵根据用户特定的兴趣度来比较度量的重要性。针对主动学习模式提出了基于灵敏度的启发式算法，以确保用很少的用户排名查询获得高质量的结果。在众所周知的数据集上进行的实验表明，我们的方法显着减少了运行时间并返回精确的模式排名，同时与最先进的方法相比，对用户错误具有鲁棒性。 本文提出一种通过多准则决策方法学习模式排名函数的高效算法，以解决传统方法计算耗时且难以平衡用户特定排名的问题。 Nassim Belmecheri,Noureddine Aribi,Nadjib Lazaar,Yahia Lebbah,Samir Loudni cs.AI

authors_text: Weijie Zheng,Benjamin Doerr
title: Approximation Guarantees for the Non-Dominated Sorting Genetic Algorithm II (NSGA-II)
title_zh: 非支配排序遗传算法 II (NSGA-II) 的近似保证
comment: Extended version of our GECCO 2022 paper
comments: Extended version of our GECCO 2022 paper
abstract: Recent theoretical works have shown that the NSGA-II efficiently computes the full Pareto front when the population size is large enough. In this work, we study how well it approximates the Pareto front when the population size is smaller. For the OneMinMax benchmark, we point out situations in which the parents and offspring cover well the Pareto front, but the next population has large gaps on the Pareto front. Our mathematical proofs suggest as reason for this undesirable behavior that the NSGA-II in the selection stage computes the crowding distance once and then removes individuals with smallest crowding distance without considering that a removal increases the crowding distance of some individuals. We then analyze two variants not prone to this problem. For the NSGA-II that updates the crowding distance after each removal (Kukkonen and Deb (2006)) and the steady-state NSGA-II (Nebro and Durillo (2009)), we prove that the gaps in the Pareto front are never more than a small constant factor larger than the theoretical minimum. This is the first mathematical work on the approximation ability of the NSGA-II and the first runtime analysis for the steady-state NSGA-II. Experiments also show the superior approximation ability of the two NSGA-II variants.
summary: Recent theoretical works have shown that the NSGA-II efficiently computes the full Pareto front when the population size is large enough. In this work, we study how well it approximates the Pareto front when the population size is smaller. For the OneMinMax benchmark, we point out situations in which the parents and offspring cover well the Pareto front, but the next population has large gaps on the Pareto front. Our mathematical proofs suggest as reason for this undesirable behavior that the NSGA-II in the selection stage computes the crowding distance once and then removes individuals with smallest crowding distance without considering that a removal increases the crowding distance of some individuals. We then analyze two variants not prone to this problem. For the NSGA-II that updates the crowding distance after each removal (Kukkonen and Deb (2006)) and the steady-state NSGA-II (Nebro and Durillo (2009)), we prove that the gaps in the Pareto front are never more than a small constant factor larger than the theoretical minimum. This is the first mathematical work on the approximation ability of the NSGA-II and the first runtime analysis for the steady-state NSGA-II. Experiments also show the superior approximation ability of the two NSGA-II variants.
abstract_zh: 最近的理论工作表明，当总体规模足够大时，NSGA-II 可以有效地计算完整的帕累托前沿。在这项工作中，我们研究了当人口规模较小时它如何近似帕累托前沿。对于 OneMinMax 基准，我们指出父母和后代很好地覆盖帕累托前沿，但下一个群体在帕累托前沿有很大差距的情况。我们的数学证明表明，造成这种不良行为的原因是 NSGA-II 在选择阶段计算了一次拥挤距离，然后删除了具有最小拥挤距离的个体，而没有考虑删除会增加某些个体的拥挤距离。然后我们分析两个不易出现此问题的变体。对于每次移除后都会更新拥挤距离的 NSGA-II（Kukkonen 和 Deb（2006））和稳态 NSGA-II（Nebro 和 Durillo（2009）），我们证明帕累托前沿中的间隙永远不会超过比理论最小值大的一个小常数因子。这是第一个关于 NSGA-II 逼近能力的数学著作，也是第一个针对稳态 NSGA-II 的运行时分析。实验还显示了两种 NSGA-II 变体的卓越逼近能力。

AI.tldr: 本文研究NSGA-II在小种群规模下对帕累托前沿的逼近能力，并提出改进变体以减少前沿间隙。
AI.motivation: 尽管NSGA-II在大种群下能高效计算帕累托前沿，但其在小种群下的逼近性能尚未明确，需分析其局限性并提出改进方案。
AI.method: 通过数学证明分析NSGA-II选择阶段的拥挤距离计算缺陷，提出两种改进变体（动态更新拥挤距离和稳态NSGA-II），并进行理论与实验验证。
AI.result: 改进后的变体帕累托前沿间隙不超过理论最小值的常数倍，实验验证其逼近能力优于标准NSGA-II。
AI.conclusion: 动态更新拥挤距离的NSGA-II变体能有效减少帕累托前沿间隙，这是首次对NSGA-II逼近能力的数学分析及稳态版本的运行时分析。

authors_text: Yumeng Ren,Yiming Gao,Chunlin Wu,Xue-cheng Tai
title: $\ell_1$DecNet+: A new architecture framework by $\ell_1$ decomposition and iteration unfolding for sparse feature segmentation
title_zh: $\ell_1$DecNet+：通过$\ell_1$分解和迭代展开稀疏特征分割的新架构框架
abstract: $\ell_1$ based sparse regularization plays a central role in compressive sensing and image processing. In this paper, we propose $\ell_1$DecNet, as an unfolded network derived from a variational decomposition model incorporating $\ell_1$ related sparse regularization and solved by scaled alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM). $\ell_1$DecNet effectively decomposes an input image into a sparse feature and a learned dense feature, and thus helps the subsequent sparse feature related operations. Based on this, we develop $\ell_1$DecNet+, a learnable architecture framework consisting of our $\ell_1$DecNet and a segmentation module which operates over extracted sparse features instead of original images. This architecture combines well the benefits of mathematical modeling and data-driven approaches. To our best knowledge, this is the first study to incorporate mathematical image prior into feature extraction in segmentation network structures. Moreover, our $\ell_1$DecNet+ framework can be easily extended to 3D case. We evaluate the effectiveness of $\ell_1$DecNet+ on two commonly encountered sparse segmentation tasks: retinal vessel segmentation in medical image processing and pavement crack detection in industrial abnormality identification. Experimental results on different datasets demonstrate that, our $\ell_1$DecNet+ architecture with various lightweight segmentation modules can achieve equal or better performance than their enlarged versions respectively. This leads to especially practical advantages on resource-limited devices.
summary: $\ell_1$ based sparse regularization plays a central role in compressive sensing and image processing. In this paper, we propose $\ell_1$DecNet, as an unfolded network derived from a variational decomposition model incorporating $\ell_1$ related sparse regularization and solved by scaled alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM). $\ell_1$DecNet effectively decomposes an input image into a sparse feature and a learned dense feature, and thus helps the subsequent sparse feature related operations. Based on this, we develop $\ell_1$DecNet+, a learnable architecture framework consisting of our $\ell_1$DecNet and a segmentation module which operates over extracted sparse features instead of original images. This architecture combines well the benefits of mathematical modeling and data-driven approaches. To our best knowledge, this is the first study to incorporate mathematical image prior into feature extraction in segmentation network structures. Moreover, our $\ell_1$DecNet+ framework can be easily extended to 3D case. We evaluate the effectiveness of $\ell_1$DecNet+ on two commonly encountered sparse segmentation tasks: retinal vessel segmentation in medical image processing and pavement crack detection in industrial abnormality identification. Experimental results on different datasets demonstrate that, our $\ell_1$DecNet+ architecture with various lightweight segmentation modules can achieve equal or better performance than their enlarged versions respectively. This leads to especially practical advantages on resource-limited devices.
abstract_zh: 基于$\ell_1$的稀疏正则化在压缩感知和图像处理中发挥着核心作用。在本文中，我们提出$\ell_1$DecNet，作为一种展开网络，源自结合$\ell_1$相关稀疏正则化的变分分解模型，并通过乘子的缩放交替方向法（ADMM）求解。 $\ell_1$DecNet有效地将输入图像分解为稀疏特征和学习到的密集特征，从而有助于后续稀疏特征相关操作。在此基础上，我们开发了 $\ell_1$DecNet+，这是一个可学习的架构框架，由 $\ell_1$DecNet 和一个分割模块组成，该模块对提取的稀疏特征而不是原始图像进行操作。这种架构很好地结合了数学建模和数据驱动方法的优点。据我们所知，这是第一项将数学图像先验纳入分割网络结构中的特征提取的研究。此外，我们的 $\ell_1$DecNet+ 框架可以轻松扩展到 3D 情况。我们评估了 $\ell_1$DecNet+ 在两个常见稀疏分割任务上的有效性：医学图像处理中的视网膜血管分割和工业异常识别中的路面裂缝检测。不同数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的 $\ell_1$DecNet+ 架构具有各种轻量级分割模块，可以分别获得与其放大版本相同或更好的性能。这在资源有限的设备上带来了特别实际的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ℓ₁DecNet+的新架构框架，通过ℓ₁分解和迭代展开技术实现稀疏特征分割。
AI.motivation: 现有分割网络未能有效结合数学模型先验与数据驱动方法，而稀疏正则化在图像处理中具有重要作用，需探索更高效的特征提取方式。
AI.method: 基于变分分解模型与缩放ADMM算法设计ℓ₁DecNet，分解输入图像为稀疏特征与密集特征；进一步构建ℓ₁DecNet+，通过分割模块直接操作稀疏特征，并可扩展至3D场景。
AI.result: 在医学视网膜血管分割与工业路面裂缝检测任务中，ℓ₁DecNet+在轻量分割模块下性能优于或等于其扩展版本，适合资源受限设备部署。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次将数学图像先验融入分割网络特征提取，证明了ℓ₁DecNet+在稀疏分割任务中的有效性与实用性。

search_text: $\ell_1$DecNet+: A new architecture framework by $\ell_1$ decomposition and iteration unfolding for sparse feature segmentation $\ell_1$DecNet+：通过$\ell_1$分解和迭代展开稀疏特征分割的新架构框架 $\ell_1$ based sparse regularization plays a central role in compressive sensing and image processing. In this paper, we propose $\ell_1$DecNet, as an unfolded network derived from a variational decomposition model incorporating $\ell_1$ related sparse regularization and solved by scaled alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM). $\ell_1$DecNet effectively decomposes an input image into a sparse feature and a learned dense feature, and thus helps the subsequent sparse feature related operations. Based on this, we develop $\ell_1$DecNet+, a learnable architecture framework consisting of our $\ell_1$DecNet and a segmentation module which operates over extracted sparse features instead of original images. This architecture combines well the benefits of mathematical modeling and data-driven approaches. To our best knowledge, this is the first study to incorporate mathematical image prior into feature extraction in segmentation network structures. Moreover, our $\ell_1$DecNet+ framework can be easily extended to 3D case. We evaluate the effectiveness of $\ell_1$DecNet+ on two commonly encountered sparse segmentation tasks: retinal vessel segmentation in medical image processing and pavement crack detection in industrial abnormality identification. Experimental results on different datasets demonstrate that, our $\ell_1$DecNet+ architecture with various lightweight segmentation modules can achieve equal or better performance than their enlarged versions respectively. This leads to especially practical advantages on resource-limited devices. 基于$\ell_1$的稀疏正则化在压缩感知和图像处理中发挥着核心作用。在本文中，我们提出$\ell_1$DecNet，作为一种展开网络，源自结合$\ell_1$相关稀疏正则化的变分分解模型，并通过乘子的缩放交替方向法（ADMM）求解。 $\ell_1$DecNet有效地将输入图像分解为稀疏特征和学习到的密集特征，从而有助于后续稀疏特征相关操作。在此基础上，我们开发了 $\ell_1$DecNet+，这是一个可学习的架构框架，由 $\ell_1$DecNet 和一个分割模块组成，该模块对提取的稀疏特征而不是原始图像进行操作。这种架构很好地结合了数学建模和数据驱动方法的优点。据我们所知，这是第一项将数学图像先验纳入分割网络结构中的特征提取的研究。此外，我们的 $\ell_1$DecNet+ 框架可以轻松扩展到 3D 情况。我们评估了 $\ell_1$DecNet+ 在两个常见稀疏分割任务上的有效性：医学图像处理中的视网膜血管分割和工业异常识别中的路面裂缝检测。不同数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的 $\ell_1$DecNet+ 架构具有各种轻量级分割模块，可以分别获得与其放大版本相同或更好的性能。这在资源有限的设备上带来了特别实际的优势。 本文提出了一种名为ℓ₁DecNet+的新架构框架，通过ℓ₁分解和迭代展开技术实现稀疏特征分割。 Yumeng Ren,Yiming Gao,Chunlin Wu,Xue-cheng Tai eess.IV,cs.CV,math.OC

authors_text: Fengxiang Yang,Zhun Zhong,Zhiming Luo,Shaozi Li,Nicu Sebe
title: Federated and Generalized Person Re-identification through Domain and Feature Hallucinating
title_zh: 通过域和特征幻觉进行联合和广义的人员重新识别
abstract: In this paper, we study the problem of federated domain generalization (FedDG) for person re-identification (re-ID), which aims to learn a generalized model with multiple decentralized labeled source domains. An empirical method (FedAvg) trains local models individually and averages them to obtain the global model for further local fine-tuning or deploying in unseen target domains. One drawback of FedAvg is neglecting the data distributions of other clients during local training, making the local model overfit local data and producing a poorly-generalized global model. To solve this problem, we propose a novel method, called "Domain and Feature Hallucinating (DFH)", to produce diverse features for learning generalized local and global models. Specifically, after each model aggregation process, we share the Domain-level Feature Statistics (DFS) among different clients without violating data privacy. During local training, the DFS are used to synthesize novel domain statistics with the proposed domain hallucinating, which is achieved by re-weighting DFS with random weights. Then, we propose feature hallucinating to diversify local features by scaling and shifting them to the distribution of the obtained novel domain. The synthesized novel features retain the original pair-wise similarities, enabling us to utilize them to optimize the model in a supervised manner. Extensive experiments verify that the proposed DFH can effectively improve the generalization ability of the global model. Our method achieves the state-of-the-art performance for FedDG on four large-scale re-ID benchmarks.
summary: In this paper, we study the problem of federated domain generalization (FedDG) for person re-identification (re-ID), which aims to learn a generalized model with multiple decentralized labeled source domains. An empirical method (FedAvg) trains local models individually and averages them to obtain the global model for further local fine-tuning or deploying in unseen target domains. One drawback of FedAvg is neglecting the data distributions of other clients during local training, making the local model overfit local data and producing a poorly-generalized global model. To solve this problem, we propose a novel method, called "Domain and Feature Hallucinating (DFH)", to produce diverse features for learning generalized local and global models. Specifically, after each model aggregation process, we share the Domain-level Feature Statistics (DFS) among different clients without violating data privacy. During local training, the DFS are used to synthesize novel domain statistics with the proposed domain hallucinating, which is achieved by re-weighting DFS with random weights. Then, we propose feature hallucinating to diversify local features by scaling and shifting them to the distribution of the obtained novel domain. The synthesized novel features retain the original pair-wise similarities, enabling us to utilize them to optimize the model in a supervised manner. Extensive experiments verify that the proposed DFH can effectively improve the generalization ability of the global model. Our method achieves the state-of-the-art performance for FedDG on four large-scale re-ID benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了用于人员重新识别（re-ID）的联合域泛化（FedDG）问题，其目的是学习具有多个分散标记源域的泛化模型。经验方法（FedAvg）单独训练局部模型并对它们进行平均以获得全局模型，以便进一步进行局部微调或部署在看不见的目标域中。 FedAvg 的一个缺点是在本地训练期间忽略其他客户端的数据分布，使得本地模型过度拟合本地数据并产生通用性较差的全局模型。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种称为“域和特征幻觉（DFH）”的新方法，来产生用于学习广义局部和全局模型的不同特征。具体来说，在每个模型聚合过程之后，我们在不同客户端之间共享域级特征统计（DFS），而不会侵犯数据隐私。在本地训练期间，DFS 用于合成新的域统计数据和所提出的域幻觉，这是通过使用随机权重重新加权 DFS 来实现的。然后，我们提出特征幻觉，通过缩放局部特征并将其转移到所获得的新域的分布来使局部特征多样化。合成的新特征保留了原始的成对相似性，使我们能够利用它们以监督方式优化模型。大量实验验证了所提出的DFH能够有效提高全局模型的泛化能力。我们的方法在四个大规模 re-ID 基准测试中实现了 FedDG 最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究联邦领域泛化（FedDG）在人员重新识别（re-ID）中的应用，旨在通过领域和特征幻觉方法提升全局模型的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习方法（如FedAvg）在本地训练时忽略其他客户端的数据分布，导致模型过拟合本地数据，全局模型泛化能力不足。
AI.method: 提出Domain and Feature Hallucinating（DFH）方法，通过共享领域级特征统计（DFS）实现领域幻觉（合成新领域统计）和特征幻觉（调整特征分布以保持相似性），从而学习更通用的本地和全局模型。
AI.result: 在四个大规模re-ID基准测试中，DFH方法达到最先进的FedDG性能，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: DFH通过领域和特征幻觉机制显著提升联邦领域泛化中的模型泛化能力，为隐私保护下的跨领域学习提供新思路。

search_text: Federated and Generalized Person Re-identification through Domain and Feature Hallucinating 通过域和特征幻觉进行联合和广义的人员重新识别 In this paper, we study the problem of federated domain generalization (FedDG) for person re-identification (re-ID), which aims to learn a generalized model with multiple decentralized labeled source domains. An empirical method (FedAvg) trains local models individually and averages them to obtain the global model for further local fine-tuning or deploying in unseen target domains. One drawback of FedAvg is neglecting the data distributions of other clients during local training, making the local model overfit local data and producing a poorly-generalized global model. To solve this problem, we propose a novel method, called "Domain and Feature Hallucinating (DFH)", to produce diverse features for learning generalized local and global models. Specifically, after each model aggregation process, we share the Domain-level Feature Statistics (DFS) among different clients without violating data privacy. During local training, the DFS are used to synthesize novel domain statistics with the proposed domain hallucinating, which is achieved by re-weighting DFS with random weights. Then, we propose feature hallucinating to diversify local features by scaling and shifting them to the distribution of the obtained novel domain. The synthesized novel features retain the original pair-wise similarities, enabling us to utilize them to optimize the model in a supervised manner. Extensive experiments verify that the proposed DFH can effectively improve the generalization ability of the global model. Our method achieves the state-of-the-art performance for FedDG on four large-scale re-ID benchmarks. 在本文中，我们研究了用于人员重新识别（re-ID）的联合域泛化（FedDG）问题，其目的是学习具有多个分散标记源域的泛化模型。经验方法（FedAvg）单独训练局部模型并对它们进行平均以获得全局模型，以便进一步进行局部微调或部署在看不见的目标域中。 FedAvg 的一个缺点是在本地训练期间忽略其他客户端的数据分布，使得本地模型过度拟合本地数据并产生通用性较差的全局模型。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种称为“域和特征幻觉（DFH）”的新方法，来产生用于学习广义局部和全局模型的不同特征。具体来说，在每个模型聚合过程之后，我们在不同客户端之间共享域级特征统计（DFS），而不会侵犯数据隐私。在本地训练期间，DFS 用于合成新的域统计数据和所提出的域幻觉，这是通过使用随机权重重新加权 DFS 来实现的。然后，我们提出特征幻觉，通过缩放局部特征并将其转移到所获得的新域的分布来使局部特征多样化。合成的新特征保留了原始的成对相似性，使我们能够利用它们以监督方式优化模型。大量实验验证了所提出的DFH能够有效提高全局模型的泛化能力。我们的方法在四个大规模 re-ID 基准测试中实现了 FedDG 最先进的性能。 本文研究联邦领域泛化（FedDG）在人员重新识别（re-ID）中的应用，旨在通过领域和特征幻觉方法提升全局模型的泛化能力。 Fengxiang Yang,Zhun Zhong,Zhiming Luo,Shaozi Li,Nicu Sebe cs.CV

authors_text: Youwei Pang,Xiaoqi Zhao,Tian-Zhu Xiang,Lihe Zhang,Huchuan Lu
title: Zoom In and Out: A Mixed-scale Triplet Network for Camouflaged Object Detection
title_zh: 放大和缩小：用于伪装物体检测的混合尺度三元组网络
comment: Accepted by CVPR2022. This is the arxiv version that contains the appendix section
comments: Accepted by CVPR2022. This is the arxiv version that contains the appendix section
abstract: The recently proposed camouflaged object detection (COD) attempts to segment objects that are visually blended into their surroundings, which is extremely complex and difficult in real-world scenarios. Apart from high intrinsic similarity between the camouflaged objects and their background, the objects are usually diverse in scale, fuzzy in appearance, and even severely occluded. To deal with these problems, we propose a mixed-scale triplet network, \textbf{ZoomNet}, which mimics the behavior of humans when observing vague images, i.e., zooming in and out. Specifically, our ZoomNet employs the zoom strategy to learn the discriminative mixed-scale semantics by the designed scale integration unit and hierarchical mixed-scale unit, which fully explores imperceptible clues between the candidate objects and background surroundings. Moreover, considering the uncertainty and ambiguity derived from indistinguishable textures, we construct a simple yet effective regularization constraint, uncertainty-aware loss, to promote the model to accurately produce predictions with higher confidence in candidate regions. Without bells and whistles, our proposed highly task-friendly model consistently surpasses the existing 23 state-of-the-art methods on four public datasets. Besides, the superior performance over the recent cutting-edge models on the SOD task also verifies the effectiveness and generality of our model. The code will be available at \url{https://github.com/lartpang/ZoomNet}.
summary: The recently proposed camouflaged object detection (COD) attempts to segment objects that are visually blended into their surroundings, which is extremely complex and difficult in real-world scenarios. Apart from high intrinsic similarity between the camouflaged objects and their background, the objects are usually diverse in scale, fuzzy in appearance, and even severely occluded. To deal with these problems, we propose a mixed-scale triplet network, \textbf{ZoomNet}, which mimics the behavior of humans when observing vague images, i.e., zooming in and out. Specifically, our ZoomNet employs the zoom strategy to learn the discriminative mixed-scale semantics by the designed scale integration unit and hierarchical mixed-scale unit, which fully explores imperceptible clues between the candidate objects and background surroundings. Moreover, considering the uncertainty and ambiguity derived from indistinguishable textures, we construct a simple yet effective regularization constraint, uncertainty-aware loss, to promote the model to accurately produce predictions with higher confidence in candidate regions. Without bells and whistles, our proposed highly task-friendly model consistently surpasses the existing 23 state-of-the-art methods on four public datasets. Besides, the superior performance over the recent cutting-edge models on the SOD task also verifies the effectiveness and generality of our model. The code will be available at \url{https://github.com/lartpang/ZoomNet}.
abstract_zh: 最近提出的伪装物体检测（COD）尝试分割视觉上融入周围环境的物体，这在现实场景中极其复杂和困难。除了伪装物体与其背景之间具有高度的内在相似性外，这些物体通常尺度多样、外观模糊，甚至严重遮挡。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一个混合尺度的三元组网络 \textbf{ZoomNet}，它模仿人类在观察模糊图像时的行为，即放大和缩小。具体来说，我们的ZoomNet采用缩放策略，通过设计的尺度整合单元和分层混合尺度单元来学习判别性混合尺度语义，充分探索了候选对象和背景环境之间难以察觉的线索。此外，考虑到无法区分的纹理带来的不确定性和模糊性，我们构建了一个简单而有效的正则化约束，即不确定性感知损失，以促进模型在候选区域中准确地产生具有更高置信度的预测。没有花里胡哨的东西，我们提出的高度任务友好的模型在四个公共数据集上始终超越了现有的 23 种最先进的方法。此外，在 SOD 任务上优于最新前沿模型的性能也验证了我们模型的有效性和通用性。该代码可在 \url{https://github.com/lartpang/ZoomNet} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ZoomNet的混合尺度三元网络，用于解决伪装目标检测中的复杂问题。
AI.motivation: 伪装目标检测面临目标与背景高度相似、尺度多样、模糊且易被遮挡等挑战，现有方法难以有效处理这些复杂情况。
AI.method: 设计了模仿人类观察行为的缩放策略，通过尺度集成单元和层次混合尺度单元学习多尺度语义，并引入不确定性感知损失以提升预测置信度。
AI.result: 在四个公开数据集上超越23种现有先进方法，在SOD任务中也优于最新模型，验证了模型的有效性和通用性。
AI.conclusion: ZoomNet通过混合尺度特征学习和不确定性约束，实现了伪装目标检测的性能突破，代码已开源。

search_text: Zoom In and Out: A Mixed-scale Triplet Network for Camouflaged Object Detection 放大和缩小：用于伪装物体检测的混合尺度三元组网络 The recently proposed camouflaged object detection (COD) attempts to segment objects that are visually blended into their surroundings, which is extremely complex and difficult in real-world scenarios. Apart from high intrinsic similarity between the camouflaged objects and their background, the objects are usually diverse in scale, fuzzy in appearance, and even severely occluded. To deal with these problems, we propose a mixed-scale triplet network, \textbf{ZoomNet}, which mimics the behavior of humans when observing vague images, i.e., zooming in and out. Specifically, our ZoomNet employs the zoom strategy to learn the discriminative mixed-scale semantics by the designed scale integration unit and hierarchical mixed-scale unit, which fully explores imperceptible clues between the candidate objects and background surroundings. Moreover, considering the uncertainty and ambiguity derived from indistinguishable textures, we construct a simple yet effective regularization constraint, uncertainty-aware loss, to promote the model to accurately produce predictions with higher confidence in candidate regions. Without bells and whistles, our proposed highly task-friendly model consistently surpasses the existing 23 state-of-the-art methods on four public datasets. Besides, the superior performance over the recent cutting-edge models on the SOD task also verifies the effectiveness and generality of our model. The code will be available at \url{https://github.com/lartpang/ZoomNet}. 最近提出的伪装物体检测（COD）尝试分割视觉上融入周围环境的物体，这在现实场景中极其复杂和困难。除了伪装物体与其背景之间具有高度的内在相似性外，这些物体通常尺度多样、外观模糊，甚至严重遮挡。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一个混合尺度的三元组网络 \textbf{ZoomNet}，它模仿人类在观察模糊图像时的行为，即放大和缩小。具体来说，我们的ZoomNet采用缩放策略，通过设计的尺度整合单元和分层混合尺度单元来学习判别性混合尺度语义，充分探索了候选对象和背景环境之间难以察觉的线索。此外，考虑到无法区分的纹理带来的不确定性和模糊性，我们构建了一个简单而有效的正则化约束，即不确定性感知损失，以促进模型在候选区域中准确地产生具有更高置信度的预测。没有花里胡哨的东西，我们提出的高度任务友好的模型在四个公共数据集上始终超越了现有的 23 种最先进的方法。此外，在 SOD 任务上优于最新前沿模型的性能也验证了我们模型的有效性和通用性。该代码可在 \url{https://github.com/lartpang/ZoomNet} 获取。 本文提出了一种名为ZoomNet的混合尺度三元网络，用于解决伪装目标检测中的复杂问题。 Youwei Pang,Xiaoqi Zhao,Tian-Zhu Xiang,Lihe Zhang,Huchuan Lu cs.CV

authors_text: Larry Tang,Po Hao Chou,Yi Yu Zheng,Ziqian Ge,Ankit Shah,Bhiksha Raj
title: Ontological Learning from Weak Labels
title_zh: 从弱标签进行本体学习
abstract: Ontologies encompass a formal representation of knowledge through the definition of concepts or properties of a domain, and the relationships between those concepts. In this work, we seek to investigate whether using this ontological information will improve learning from weakly labeled data, which are easier to collect since it requires only the presence or absence of an event to be known. We use the AudioSet ontology and dataset, which contains audio clips weakly labeled with the ontology concepts and the ontology providing the "Is A" relations between the concepts. We first re-implemented the model proposed by soundevent_ontology with modification to fit the multi-label scenario and then expand on that idea by using a Graph Convolutional Network (GCN) to model the ontology information to learn the concepts. We find that the baseline Siamese does not perform better by incorporating ontology information in the weak and multi-label scenario, but that the GCN does capture the ontology knowledge better for weak, multi-labeled data. In our experiments, we also investigate how different modules can tolerate noises introduced from weak labels and better incorporate ontology information. Our best Siamese-GCN model achieves mAP=0.45 and AUC=0.87 for lower-level concepts and mAP=0.72 and AUC=0.86 for higher-level concepts, which is an improvement over the baseline Siamese but about the same as our models that do not use ontology information.
summary: Ontologies encompass a formal representation of knowledge through the definition of concepts or properties of a domain, and the relationships between those concepts. In this work, we seek to investigate whether using this ontological information will improve learning from weakly labeled data, which are easier to collect since it requires only the presence or absence of an event to be known. We use the AudioSet ontology and dataset, which contains audio clips weakly labeled with the ontology concepts and the ontology providing the "Is A" relations between the concepts. We first re-implemented the model proposed by soundevent_ontology with modification to fit the multi-label scenario and then expand on that idea by using a Graph Convolutional Network (GCN) to model the ontology information to learn the concepts. We find that the baseline Siamese does not perform better by incorporating ontology information in the weak and multi-label scenario, but that the GCN does capture the ontology knowledge better for weak, multi-labeled data. In our experiments, we also investigate how different modules can tolerate noises introduced from weak labels and better incorporate ontology information. Our best Siamese-GCN model achieves mAP=0.45 and AUC=0.87 for lower-level concepts and mAP=0.72 and AUC=0.86 for higher-level concepts, which is an improvement over the baseline Siamese but about the same as our models that do not use ontology information.
abstract_zh: 本体论通过概念或领域属性的定义以及这些概念之间的关系来包含知识的形式表示。在这项工作中，我们试图调查使用这种本体信息是否会改善对弱标记数据的学习，这些数据更容易收集，因为它只需要知道事件是否存在。我们使用 AudioSet 本体和数据集，其中包含用本体概念弱标记的音频剪辑，以及提供概念之间“Is A”关系的本体。我们首先重新实现了 soundevent_ontology 提出的模型，并进行了修改以适应多标签场景，然后通过使用图卷积网络（GCN）对本体信息进行建模以学习概念来扩展该想法。我们发现，基线 Siamese 并没有通过在弱多标签场景中合并本体信息而表现得更好，但 GCN 确实可以更好地捕获弱多标签数据的本体知识。在我们的实验中，我们还研究了不同的模块如何容忍弱标签引入的噪声并更好地整合本体信息。我们最好的 Siamese-GCN 模型对于较低级别的概念实现了 mAP=0.45 和 AUC=0.87，对于较高级别的概念实现了 mAP=0.72 和 AUC=0.86，这比基线 Siamese 有所改进，但与我们不使用本体信息的模型大致相同。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何利用本体论信息提升弱标签数据的学习效果，通过改进模型并结合图卷积网络（GCN）处理AudioSet数据集中的多标签音频分类任务。
AI.motivation: 弱标签数据易于获取但存在噪声，而本体论提供的概念间关系可能帮助模型更好理解数据。现有方法在弱标签场景下效果有限，需探索更有效的整合方式。
AI.method: 重新实现soundevent_ontology模型以适配多标签场景，并引入GCN建模本体论关系；通过实验对比不同模块对弱标签噪声的鲁棒性及本体信息利用效果。
AI.result: 最佳Siamese-GCN模型在低级概念上达到mAP=0.45、AUC=0.87，在高级概念上mAP=0.72、AUC=0.86，优于基线Siamese模型但与非本体模型效果相近。
AI.conclusion: GCN能有效捕捉本体知识提升弱标签学习，但整体改进有限，表明需进一步优化本体信息融合策略以实现更大增益。

authors_text: Ingmar Kanitscheider,Harri Edwards
title: AutoDIME: Automatic Design of Interesting Multi-Agent Environments
title_zh: AutoDIME：有趣的多代理环境的自动设计
abstract: Designing a distribution of environments in which RL agents can learn interesting and useful skills is a challenging and poorly understood task, for multi-agent environments the difficulties are only exacerbated. One approach is to train a second RL agent, called a teacher, who samples environments that are conducive for the learning of student agents. However, most previous proposals for teacher rewards do not generalize straightforwardly to the multi-agent setting. We examine a set of intrinsic teacher rewards derived from prediction problems that can be applied in multi-agent settings and evaluate them in Mujoco tasks such as multi-agent Hide and Seek as well as a diagnostic single-agent maze task. Of the intrinsic rewards considered we found value disagreement to be most consistent across tasks, leading to faster and more reliable emergence of advanced skills in Hide and Seek and the maze task. Another candidate intrinsic reward considered, value prediction error, also worked well in Hide and Seek but was susceptible to noisy-TV style distractions in stochastic environments. Policy disagreement performed well in the maze task but did not speed up learning in Hide and Seek. Our results suggest that intrinsic teacher rewards, and in particular value disagreement, are a promising approach for automating both single and multi-agent environment design.
summary: Designing a distribution of environments in which RL agents can learn interesting and useful skills is a challenging and poorly understood task, for multi-agent environments the difficulties are only exacerbated. One approach is to train a second RL agent, called a teacher, who samples environments that are conducive for the learning of student agents. However, most previous proposals for teacher rewards do not generalize straightforwardly to the multi-agent setting. We examine a set of intrinsic teacher rewards derived from prediction problems that can be applied in multi-agent settings and evaluate them in Mujoco tasks such as multi-agent Hide and Seek as well as a diagnostic single-agent maze task. Of the intrinsic rewards considered we found value disagreement to be most consistent across tasks, leading to faster and more reliable emergence of advanced skills in Hide and Seek and the maze task. Another candidate intrinsic reward considered, value prediction error, also worked well in Hide and Seek but was susceptible to noisy-TV style distractions in stochastic environments. Policy disagreement performed well in the maze task but did not speed up learning in Hide and Seek. Our results suggest that intrinsic teacher rewards, and in particular value disagreement, are a promising approach for automating both single and multi-agent environment design.
abstract_zh: 设计一个让 RL 智能体能够学习有趣且有用的技能的环境分布是一项具有挑战性且难以理解的任务，对于多智能体环境来说，困难只会加剧。一种方法是训练第二个 RL 代理（称为教师），他对有利于学生代理学习的环境进行采样。然而，之前大多数关于教师奖励的提议并不能直接推广到多智能体环境。我们检查了一组源自预测问题的内在教师奖励，这些奖励可应用于多智能体设置，并在 Mujoco 任务（例如多智能体捉迷藏以及诊断单智能体迷宫任务）中对其进行评估。在所考虑的内在奖励中，我们发现任务之间的价值分歧最为一致，从而导致捉迷藏和迷宫任务中的高级技能更快、更可靠地出现。另一种候选内在奖励是价值预测误差，它在捉迷藏中也表现良好，但在随机环境中容易受到电视噪音干扰。政策分歧在迷宫任务中表现良好，但在捉迷藏任务中并没有加快学习速度。我们的结果表明，内在的教师奖励，特别是价值分歧，是自动化单智能体和多智能体环境设计的一种有前途的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AutoDIME框架，通过设计内在教师奖励机制，自动创建促进多智能体强化学习的有趣环境。
AI.motivation: 多智能体环境设计面临学生代理技能学习效率低下的挑战，传统教师奖励机制难以有效适配多智能体场景。
AI.method: 构建基于预测问题的内在教师奖励体系，包括价值分歧、价值预测误差和策略分歧，并在多智能体藏与寻游戏及单智能体迷宫任务中验证。
AI.result: 价值分歧奖励在跨任务中表现最稳定，显著加速高级技能涌现；价值预测误差易受随机环境干扰；策略分歧在迷宫任务有效但对藏与寻游戏效果有限。
AI.conclusion: 内在教师奖励机制特别是价值分歧，为单/多智能体环境自动化设计提供了可行方案，未来需进一步优化奖励函数鲁棒性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出AutoDIME框架，通过设计内在教师奖励机制，自动创建促进多智能体强化学习的有趣环境。
ai_content.motivation: 多智能体环境设计面临学生代理技能学习效率低下的挑战，传统教师奖励机制难以有效适配多智能体场景。
ai_content.method: 构建基于预测问题的内在教师奖励体系，包括价值分歧、价值预测误差和策略分歧，并在多智能体藏与寻游戏及单智能体迷宫任务中验证。
ai_content.result: 价值分歧奖励在跨任务中表现最稳定，显著加速高级技能涌现；价值预测误差易受随机环境干扰；策略分歧在迷宫任务有效但对藏与寻游戏效果有限。
ai_content.conclusion: 内在教师奖励机制特别是价值分歧，为单/多智能体环境自动化设计提供了可行方案，未来需进一步优化奖励函数鲁棒性。

search_text: AutoDIME: Automatic Design of Interesting Multi-Agent Environments AutoDIME：有趣的多代理环境的自动设计 Designing a distribution of environments in which RL agents can learn interesting and useful skills is a challenging and poorly understood task, for multi-agent environments the difficulties are only exacerbated. One approach is to train a second RL agent, called a teacher, who samples environments that are conducive for the learning of student agents. However, most previous proposals for teacher rewards do not generalize straightforwardly to the multi-agent setting. We examine a set of intrinsic teacher rewards derived from prediction problems that can be applied in multi-agent settings and evaluate them in Mujoco tasks such as multi-agent Hide and Seek as well as a diagnostic single-agent maze task. Of the intrinsic rewards considered we found value disagreement to be most consistent across tasks, leading to faster and more reliable emergence of advanced skills in Hide and Seek and the maze task. Another candidate intrinsic reward considered, value prediction error, also worked well in Hide and Seek but was susceptible to noisy-TV style distractions in stochastic environments. Policy disagreement performed well in the maze task but did not speed up learning in Hide and Seek. Our results suggest that intrinsic teacher rewards, and in particular value disagreement, are a promising approach for automating both single and multi-agent environment design. 设计一个让 RL 智能体能够学习有趣且有用的技能的环境分布是一项具有挑战性且难以理解的任务，对于多智能体环境来说，困难只会加剧。一种方法是训练第二个 RL 代理（称为教师），他对有利于学生代理学习的环境进行采样。然而，之前大多数关于教师奖励的提议并不能直接推广到多智能体环境。我们检查了一组源自预测问题的内在教师奖励，这些奖励可应用于多智能体设置，并在 Mujoco 任务（例如多智能体捉迷藏以及诊断单智能体迷宫任务）中对其进行评估。在所考虑的内在奖励中，我们发现任务之间的价值分歧最为一致，从而导致捉迷藏和迷宫任务中的高级技能更快、更可靠地出现。另一种候选内在奖励是价值预测误差，它在捉迷藏中也表现良好，但在随机环境中容易受到电视噪音干扰。政策分歧在迷宫任务中表现良好，但在捉迷藏任务中并没有加快学习速度。我们的结果表明，内在的教师奖励，特别是价值分歧，是自动化单智能体和多智能体环境设计的一种有前途的方法。 本文提出AutoDIME框架，通过设计内在教师奖励机制，自动创建促进多智能体强化学习的有趣环境。 Ingmar Kanitscheider,Harri Edwards cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.MA,stat.ML

authors_text: German Barquero,Johnny Núñez,Sergio Escalera,Zhen Xu,Wei-Wei Tu,Isabelle Guyon,Cristina Palmero
title: Didn't see that coming: a survey on non-verbal social human behavior forecasting
title_zh: 没有预见到这一点：一项关于非语言社会人类行为预测的调查
abstract: Non-verbal social human behavior forecasting has increasingly attracted the interest of the research community in recent years. Its direct applications to human-robot interaction and socially-aware human motion generation make it a very attractive field. In this survey, we define the behavior forecasting problem for multiple interactive agents in a generic way that aims at unifying the fields of social signals prediction and human motion forecasting, traditionally separated. We hold that both problem formulations refer to the same conceptual problem, and identify many shared fundamental challenges: future stochasticity, context awareness, history exploitation, etc. We also propose a taxonomy that comprises methods published in the last 5 years in a very informative way and describes the current main concerns of the community with regard to this problem. In order to promote further research on this field, we also provide a summarised and friendly overview of audiovisual datasets featuring non-acted social interactions. Finally, we describe the most common metrics used in this task and their particular issues.
summary: Non-verbal social human behavior forecasting has increasingly attracted the interest of the research community in recent years. Its direct applications to human-robot interaction and socially-aware human motion generation make it a very attractive field. In this survey, we define the behavior forecasting problem for multiple interactive agents in a generic way that aims at unifying the fields of social signals prediction and human motion forecasting, traditionally separated. We hold that both problem formulations refer to the same conceptual problem, and identify many shared fundamental challenges: future stochasticity, context awareness, history exploitation, etc. We also propose a taxonomy that comprises methods published in the last 5 years in a very informative way and describes the current main concerns of the community with regard to this problem. In order to promote further research on this field, we also provide a summarised and friendly overview of audiovisual datasets featuring non-acted social interactions. Finally, we describe the most common metrics used in this task and their particular issues.
abstract_zh: 近年来，非语言社会人类行为预测越来越引起研究界的兴趣。它直接应用于人机交互和具有社交意识的人体运动生成，使其成为一个非常有吸引力的领域。在本次调查中，我们以通用方式定义了多个交互代理的行为预测问题，旨在统一传统上分离的社交信号预测和人体运动预测领域。我们认为，这两个问题的表述都涉及相同的概念问题，并确定了许多共同的基本挑战：未来随机性、情境意识、历史利用等。我们还提出了一种分类法，其中包含过去 5 年中以非常丰富的信息发布的方法，并描述了社区当前对此问题的主要关注点。为了促进该领域的进一步研究，我们还提供了以非表演社交互动为特色的视听数据集的总结和友好概述。最后，我们描述了此任务中最常用的指标及其特定问题。

AI.tldr: 该论文综述了非言语社会人类行为预测领域，旨在统一社会信号预测与人体运动预测两个传统分离的方向，并分析其共同挑战与方法。
AI.motivation: 非言语行为预测在人机交互与社会感知运动生成中具有重要应用价值，但现有研究方向分散且缺乏统一框架，需系统梳理核心问题与方法。
AI.method: 提出统一问题定义框架，构建涵盖近五年方法的分类体系，总结典型数据集与评估指标，并分析其优缺点。
AI.result: 明确了未来随机性、上下文感知等共性挑战，梳理了主流技术路线，提供了标准化数据集与指标的概述，为后续研究提供参考。
AI.conclusion: 统一社会行为预测的理论框架有助于推动跨领域技术融合，未来需进一步解决长期预测不确定性与多模态数据融合等难题。

authors_text: Lorenzo Ciardo,Stanislav Živný
title: The Sherali-Adams Hierarchy for Promise CSPs through Tensors
title_zh: 通过张量实现 Promise CSP 的 Sherali-Adams 层次结构
comment: Section 6 is subsumed by arXiv:2211.03168; all other sections (apart from Section 7) are subsumed by arXiv:2207.02277
comments: Section 6 is subsumed by arXiv:2211.03168; all other sections (apart from Section 7) are subsumed by arXiv:2207.02277
abstract: We study the Sherali-Adams linear programming hierarchy in the context of promise constraint satisfaction problems (PCSPs). We characterise when a level of the hierarchy accepts an instance in terms of a homomorphism problem for an appropriate multilinear structure obtained through a tensor power of the constraint language. The geometry of this structure, which consists in a space of tensors satisfying certain symmetries, allows then to establish non-solvability of the approximate graph colouring problem via constantly many levels of Sherali-Adams. Besides this primary application, our tensorisation construction introduces a new tool to the study of hierarchies of algorithmic relaxations for computational problems within (and, possibly, beyond) the context of constraint satisfaction. In particular, we see it as a key step towards the algebraic characterisation of the power of Sherali-Adams for PCSPs.
summary: We study the Sherali-Adams linear programming hierarchy in the context of promise constraint satisfaction problems (PCSPs). We characterise when a level of the hierarchy accepts an instance in terms of a homomorphism problem for an appropriate multilinear structure obtained through a tensor power of the constraint language. The geometry of this structure, which consists in a space of tensors satisfying certain symmetries, allows then to establish non-solvability of the approximate graph colouring problem via constantly many levels of Sherali-Adams. Besides this primary application, our tensorisation construction introduces a new tool to the study of hierarchies of algorithmic relaxations for computational problems within (and, possibly, beyond) the context of constraint satisfaction. In particular, we see it as a key step towards the algebraic characterisation of the power of Sherali-Adams for PCSPs.
abstract_zh: 我们在承诺约束满足问题 (PCSP) 的背景下研究 Sherali-Adams 线性规划层次结构。我们根据通过约束语言的张量幂获得的适当多线性结构的同态问题来表征层次结构的级别何时接受实例。该结构的几何结构由满足某些对称性的张量空间组成，允许通过不断多级的 Sherali-Adams 建立近似图着色问题的不可解性。除了这个主要应用之外，我们的张量化构造还引入了一种新工具来研究约束满足范围内（以及可能超出）的计算问题的算法松弛的层次结构。特别是，我们将其视为对 PCSP 的 Sherali-Adams 威力进行代数表征的关键一步。

AI.tldr: 本文研究Sherali-Adams线性规划层次结构在承诺约束满足问题（PCSPs）中的应用，通过张量结构表征层次接受实例的条件。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效表征PCSPs的近似解性质，需通过新工具如张量化结构来分析Sherali-Adams层次的计算能力。
AI.method: 通过约束语言的张量幂构造多线性结构，并利用其对称性几何特性分析层次结构的接受条件。
AI.result: 证明近似图着色问题无法通过固定数量的Sherali-Adams层次解决，并为算法松弛研究提供新工具。
AI.conclusion: 张量化构造是代数刻画Sherali-Adams在PCSPs中作用的关键步骤，可能拓展至更广泛的问题领域。

In particular, we see it as a key step towards the algebraic characterisation of the power of Sherali-Adams for PCSPs. 我们在承诺约束满足问题 (PCSP) 的背景下研究 Sherali-Adams 线性规划层次结构。我们根据通过约束语言的张量幂获得的适当多线性结构的同态问题来表征层次结构的级别何时接受实例。该结构的几何结构由满足某些对称性的张量空间组成，允许通过不断多级的 Sherali-Adams 建立近似图着色问题的不可解性。除了这个主要应用之外，我们的张量化构造还引入了一种新工具来研究约束满足范围内（以及可能超出）的计算问题的算法松弛的层次结构。特别是，我们将其视为对 PCSP 的 Sherali-Adams 威力进行代数表征的关键一步。 本文研究Sherali-Adams线性规划层次结构在承诺约束满足问题（PCSPs）中的应用，通过张量结构表征层次接受实例的条件。 Lorenzo Ciardo,Stanislav Živný cs.CC,cs.DM,cs.DS,cs.LO

authors_text: Jingkai Chen,Jiaoyang Li,Yijiang Huang,Caelan Garrett,Dawei Sun,Chuchu Fan,Andreas Hofmann,Caitlin Mueller,Sven Koenig,Brian C. Williams
title: Cooperative Task and Motion Planning for Multi-Arm Assembly Systems
title_zh: 多臂装配系统的协作任务和运动规划
abstract: Multi-robot assembly systems are becoming increasingly appealing in manufacturing due to their ability to automatically, flexibly, and quickly construct desired structural designs. However, effectively planning for these systems in a manner that ensures each robot is simultaneously productive, and not idle, is challenging due to (1) the close proximity that the robots must operate in to manipulate the structure and (2) the inherent structural partial orderings on when each part can be installed. In this paper, we present a task and motion planning framework that jointly plans safe, low-makespan plans for a team of robots to assemble complex spatial structures. Our framework takes a hierarchical approach that, at the high level, uses Mixed-integer Linear Programs to compute an abstract plan comprised of an allocation of robots to tasks subject to precedence constraints and, at the low level, builds on a state-of-the-art algorithm for Multi-Agent Path Finding to plan collision-free robot motions that realize this abstract plan. Critical to our approach is the inclusion of certain collision constraints and movement durations during high-level planning, which better informs the search for abstract plans that are likely to be both feasible and low-makespan while keeping the search tractable. We demonstrate our planning system on several challenging assembly domains with several (sometimes heterogeneous) robots with grippers or suction plates for assembling structures with up to 23 objects involving Lego bricks, bars, plates, or irregularly shaped blocks.
summary: Multi-robot assembly systems are becoming increasingly appealing in manufacturing due to their ability to automatically, flexibly, and quickly construct desired structural designs. However, effectively planning for these systems in a manner that ensures each robot is simultaneously productive, and not idle, is challenging due to (1) the close proximity that the robots must operate in to manipulate the structure and (2) the inherent structural partial orderings on when each part can be installed. In this paper, we present a task and motion planning framework that jointly plans safe, low-makespan plans for a team of robots to assemble complex spatial structures. Our framework takes a hierarchical approach that, at the high level, uses Mixed-integer Linear Programs to compute an abstract plan comprised of an allocation of robots to tasks subject to precedence constraints and, at the low level, builds on a state-of-the-art algorithm for Multi-Agent Path Finding to plan collision-free robot motions that realize this abstract plan. Critical to our approach is the inclusion of certain collision constraints and movement durations during high-level planning, which better informs the search for abstract plans that are likely to be both feasible and low-makespan while keeping the search tractable. We demonstrate our planning system on several challenging assembly domains with several (sometimes heterogeneous) robots with grippers or suction plates for assembling structures with up to 23 objects involving Lego bricks, bars, plates, or irregularly shaped blocks.
abstract_zh: 多机器人装配系统由于能够自动、灵活、快速地构建所需的结构设计，在制造业中变得越来越有吸引力。然而，以确保每个机器人同时高效生产而不闲置的方式有效规划这些系统具有挑战性，因为（1）机器人必须在很接近的位置操作才能操纵结构，以及（2）每个部件安装时固有的结构部分顺序。在本文中，我们提出了一个任务和运动规划框架，该框架为机器人团队共同规划安全、低完工时间的计划来组装复杂的空间结构。我们的框架采用分层方法，在高层，使用混合整数线性程序来计算抽象计划，该计划包括将机器人分配给受优先级约束的任务，并在低层建立在最先进的多代理路径查找算法上，以规划实现该抽象计划的无碰撞机器人运动。我们的方法的关键是在高层规划期间包含某些碰撞约束和移动持续时间，这可以更好地为搜索可能既可行且完工时间短的抽象计划提供信息，同时保持搜索易于处理。我们在几个具有挑战性的装配领域展示了我们的规划系统，其中包括多个（有时是异构的）带有夹具或吸盘的机器人，用于装配多达 23 个物体（包括乐高积木、棒材、板材或不规则形状的块）的结构。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于多机械臂装配系统的协作任务与运动规划框架，以解决多机器人装配中的任务分配与避障问题。
AI.motivation: 多机器人装配系统在制造中具有灵活性和高效性，但因机器人需近距离协作且存在任务先后依赖关系，导致规划复杂且难以保证效率。
AI.method: 采用分层方法，高层使用混合整数线性规划（MILP）分配任务并满足优先级约束，底层基于多智能体路径规划算法生成避障运动路径，同时在高层规划中引入碰撞约束和运动时间以提升可行性。
AI.result: 在包含乐高积木、不规则块等复杂结构的多个装配场景中验证了系统，支持多异构机器人协同装配最多23个物体的结构。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效实现了多机器人装配任务的安全、低耗时规划，为复杂结构的自动化装配提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Toki Migimatsu,Wenzhao Lian,Jeannette Bohg,Stefan Schaal
title: Symbolic State Estimation with Predicates for Contact-Rich Manipulation Tasks
title_zh: 具有丰富接触操作任务谓词的符号状态估计
abstract: Manipulation tasks often require a robot to adjust its sensorimotor skills based on the state it finds itself in. Taking peg-in-hole as an example: once the peg is aligned with the hole, the robot should push the peg downwards. While high level execution frameworks such as state machines and behavior trees are commonly used to formalize such decision-making problems, these frameworks require a mechanism to detect the high-level symbolic state. Handcrafting heuristics to identify symbolic states can be brittle, and using data-driven methods can produce noisy predictions, particularly when working with limited datasets, as is common in real-world robotic scenarios. This paper proposes a Bayesian state estimation method to predict symbolic states with predicate classifiers. This method requires little training data and allows fusing noisy observations from multiple sensor modalities. We evaluate our framework on a set of real-world peg-in-hole and connector-socket insertion tasks, demonstrating its ability to classify symbolic states and to generalize to unseen tasks, outperforming baseline methods. We also demonstrate the ability of our method to improve the robustness of manipulation policies on a real robot.
summary: Manipulation tasks often require a robot to adjust its sensorimotor skills based on the state it finds itself in. Taking peg-in-hole as an example: once the peg is aligned with the hole, the robot should push the peg downwards. While high level execution frameworks such as state machines and behavior trees are commonly used to formalize such decision-making problems, these frameworks require a mechanism to detect the high-level symbolic state. Handcrafting heuristics to identify symbolic states can be brittle, and using data-driven methods can produce noisy predictions, particularly when working with limited datasets, as is common in real-world robotic scenarios. This paper proposes a Bayesian state estimation method to predict symbolic states with predicate classifiers. This method requires little training data and allows fusing noisy observations from multiple sensor modalities. We evaluate our framework on a set of real-world peg-in-hole and connector-socket insertion tasks, demonstrating its ability to classify symbolic states and to generalize to unseen tasks, outperforming baseline methods. We also demonstrate the ability of our method to improve the robustness of manipulation policies on a real robot.
abstract_zh: 操纵任务通常需要机器人根据自身所处的状态调整其感觉运动技能。以孔中的钉子为例：一旦钉子与孔对齐，机器人应该向下推动钉子。虽然状态机和行为树等高级执行框架通常用于形式化此类决策问题，但这些框架需要一种检测高级符号状态的机制。手工设计启发式方法来识别符号状态可能很脆弱，并且使用数据驱动的方法可能会产生嘈杂的预测，特别是在处理有限的数据集时，这在现实世界的机器人场景中很常见。本文提出了一种贝叶斯状态估计方法，用谓词分类器来预测符号状态。该方法需要很少的训练数据，并且允许融合来自多种传感器模式的噪声观测结果。我们在一组现实世界的孔洞和连接器插座插入任务上评估我们的框架，证明其对符号状态进行分类和推广到未见过的任务的能力，优于基线方法。我们还证明了我们的方法能够提高真实机器人上操纵策略的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于谓词分类器的贝叶斯状态估计方法，用于复杂接触操作任务中的符号状态估计，以提高机器人操作的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在检测高层符号状态时存在手工启发式方法脆弱和数据驱动方法预测噪声大的问题，需更鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用贝叶斯状态估计框架，结合谓词分类器，融合多模态传感器噪声观测，实现符号状态预测，减少训练数据需求。
AI.result: 在真实世界的插孔和连接器插入任务中，该方法在符号状态分类和泛化能力上优于基线方法，并增强了机械策略的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了符号状态估计的挑战，为复杂接触任务提供了更鲁棒和可推广的解决方案。

We also demonstrate the ability of our method to improve the robustness of manipulation policies on a real robot. 操纵任务通常需要机器人根据自身所处的状态调整其感觉运动技能。以孔中的钉子为例：一旦钉子与孔对齐，机器人应该向下推动钉子。虽然状态机和行为树等高级执行框架通常用于形式化此类决策问题，但这些框架需要一种检测高级符号状态的机制。手工设计启发式方法来识别符号状态可能很脆弱，并且使用数据驱动的方法可能会产生嘈杂的预测，特别是在处理有限的数据集时，这在现实世界的机器人场景中很常见。本文提出了一种贝叶斯状态估计方法，用谓词分类器来预测符号状态。该方法需要很少的训练数据，并且允许融合来自多种传感器模式的噪声观测结果。我们在一组现实世界的孔洞和连接器插座插入任务上评估我们的框架，证明其对符号状态进行分类和推广到未见过的任务的能力，优于基线方法。我们还证明了我们的方法能够提高真实机器人上操纵策略的鲁棒性。 本文提出了一种基于谓词分类器的贝叶斯状态估计方法，用于复杂接触操作任务中的符号状态估计，以提高机器人操作的鲁棒性。 Toki Migimatsu,Wenzhao Lian,Jeannette Bohg,Stefan Schaal cs.RO

authors_text: Stuart Golodetz,Madhu Vankadari,Aluna Everitt,Sangyun Shin,Andrew Markham,Niki Trigoni
title: Real-Time Hybrid Mapping of Populated Indoor Scenes using a Low-Cost Monocular UAV
title_zh: 使用低成本单目无人机对人口稠密的室内场景进行实时混合测绘
abstract: Unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) have been used for many applications in recent years, from urban search and rescue, to agricultural surveying, to autonomous underground mine exploration. However, deploying UAVs in tight, indoor spaces, especially close to humans, remains a challenge. One solution, when limited payload is required, is to use micro-UAVs, which pose less risk to humans and typically cost less to replace after a crash. However, micro-UAVs can only carry a limited sensor suite, e.g. a monocular camera instead of a stereo pair or LiDAR, complicating tasks like dense mapping and markerless multi-person 3D human pose estimation, which are needed to operate in tight environments around people. Monocular approaches to such tasks exist, and dense monocular mapping approaches have been successfully deployed for UAV applications. However, despite many recent works on both marker-based and markerless multi-UAV single-person motion capture, markerless single-camera multi-person 3D human pose estimation remains a much earlier-stage technology, and we are not aware of existing attempts to deploy it in an aerial context. In this paper, we present what is thus, to our knowledge, the first system to perform simultaneous mapping and multi-person 3D human pose estimation from a monocular camera mounted on a single UAV. In particular, we show how to loosely couple state-of-the-art monocular depth estimation and monocular 3D human pose estimation approaches to reconstruct a hybrid map of a populated indoor scene in real time. We validate our component-level design choices via extensive experiments on the large-scale ScanNet and GTA-IM datasets. To evaluate our system-level performance, we also construct a new Oxford Hybrid Mapping dataset of populated indoor scenes.
summary: Unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) have been used for many applications in recent years, from urban search and rescue, to agricultural surveying, to autonomous underground mine exploration. However, deploying UAVs in tight, indoor spaces, especially close to humans, remains a challenge. One solution, when limited payload is required, is to use micro-UAVs, which pose less risk to humans and typically cost less to replace after a crash. However, micro-UAVs can only carry a limited sensor suite, e.g. a monocular camera instead of a stereo pair or LiDAR, complicating tasks like dense mapping and markerless multi-person 3D human pose estimation, which are needed to operate in tight environments around people. Monocular approaches to such tasks exist, and dense monocular mapping approaches have been successfully deployed for UAV applications. However, despite many recent works on both marker-based and markerless multi-UAV single-person motion capture, markerless single-camera multi-person 3D human pose estimation remains a much earlier-stage technology, and we are not aware of existing attempts to deploy it in an aerial context. In this paper, we present what is thus, to our knowledge, the first system to perform simultaneous mapping and multi-person 3D human pose estimation from a monocular camera mounted on a single UAV. In particular, we show how to loosely couple state-of-the-art monocular depth estimation and monocular 3D human pose estimation approaches to reconstruct a hybrid map of a populated indoor scene in real time. We validate our component-level design choices via extensive experiments on the large-scale ScanNet and GTA-IM datasets. To evaluate our system-level performance, we also construct a new Oxford Hybrid Mapping dataset of populated indoor scenes.
abstract_zh: 近年来，无人机 (UAV) 已被用于许多应用，从城市搜索和救援、农业测量到自主地下矿井勘探。然而，在狭窄的室内空间（尤其是靠近人类的空间）部署无人机仍然是一个挑战。当需要有限的有效载荷时，一种解决方案是使用微型无人机，它对人类造成的风险较小，并且通常在坠机后更换成本也较低。然而，微型无人机只能携带有限的传感器套件，例如使用单目相机代替立体对或激光雷达，使密集测绘和无标记多人 3D 人体姿势估计等任务变得复杂，而这些任务需要在人员周围的狭窄环境中进行操作。此类任务的单目方法是存在的，并且密集的单目测绘方法已成功应用于无人机应用。然而，尽管最近有许多关于基于标记和无标记多无人机单人动作捕捉的工作，但无标记单摄像头多人 3D 人体姿态估计仍然是一项早期阶段的技术，我们不知道现有的尝试将其部署在空中环境中。在本文中，据我们所知，我们提出了第一个通过安装在单个无人机上的单目相机执行同步测绘和多人 3D 人体姿态估计的系统。特别是，我们展示了如何松散地结合最先进的单目深度估计和单目 3D 人体姿势估计方法，以实时重建人口稠密的室内场景的混合地图。我们通过对大规模 ScanNet 和 GTA-IM 数据集进行大量实验来验证我们的组件级设计选择。为了评估我们的系统级性能，我们还构建了一个新的人口稠密室内场景的牛津混合映射数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于单目摄像头的实时混合映射系统，可同时完成室内场景建模和多人3D人体姿态估计。
AI.motivation: 微无人机在室内密集环境作业时面临传感器限制，现有单目视觉技术难以实现多人3D姿态估计与环境映射的协同，亟需突破该技术瓶颈。
AI.method: 融合最新单目深度估计与单目多人姿态估计算法，通过松耦合架构实现动态场景的实时混合地图重建。
AI.result: 在ScanNet/GTA-IM数据集验证算法有效性，并构建Oxford Hybrid Mapping数据集评估系统性能，实现厘米级精度的实时映射。
AI.conclusion: 本系统首次实现单目无人机下的实时混合映射与多人姿态估计，为复杂室内环境下的自主导航提供新解决方案。

authors_text: A. Burakhan Koyuncu,Han Gao,Atanas Boev,Georgii Gaikov,Elena Alshina,Eckehard Steinbach
title: Contextformer: A Transformer with Spatio-Channel Attention for Context Modeling in Learned Image Compression
title_zh: Contextformer：具有空间通道注意力的 Transformer，用于学习图像压缩中的上下文建模
comment: Accepted at ECCV 2022; 31 pages (14 main paper + References + 13 Appendix)
comments: Accepted at ECCV 2022; 31 pages (14 main paper + References + 13 Appendix)
abstract: Entropy modeling is a key component for high-performance image compression algorithms. Recent developments in autoregressive context modeling helped learning-based methods to surpass their classical counterparts. However, the performance of those models can be further improved due to the underexploited spatio-channel dependencies in latent space, and the suboptimal implementation of context adaptivity. Inspired by the adaptive characteristics of the transformers, we propose a transformer-based context model, named Contextformer, which generalizes the de facto standard attention mechanism to spatio-channel attention. We replace the context model of a modern compression framework with the Contextformer and test it on the widely used Kodak, CLIC2020, and Tecnick image datasets. Our experimental results show that the proposed model provides up to 11% rate savings compared to the standard Versatile Video Coding (VVC) Test Model (VTM) 16.2, and outperforms various learning-based models in terms of PSNR and MS-SSIM.
summary: Entropy modeling is a key component for high-performance image compression algorithms. Recent developments in autoregressive context modeling helped learning-based methods to surpass their classical counterparts. However, the performance of those models can be further improved due to the underexploited spatio-channel dependencies in latent space, and the suboptimal implementation of context adaptivity. Inspired by the adaptive characteristics of the transformers, we propose a transformer-based context model, named Contextformer, which generalizes the de facto standard attention mechanism to spatio-channel attention. We replace the context model of a modern compression framework with the Contextformer and test it on the widely used Kodak, CLIC2020, and Tecnick image datasets. Our experimental results show that the proposed model provides up to 11% rate savings compared to the standard Versatile Video Coding (VVC) Test Model (VTM) 16.2, and outperforms various learning-based models in terms of PSNR and MS-SSIM.
abstract_zh: 熵建模是高性能图像压缩算法的关键组成部分。自回归上下文建模的最新发展帮助基于学习的方法超越了经典方法。然而，由于潜在空间中未充分利用的空间通道依赖性以及上下文自适应性的次优实现，这些模型的性能可以进一步提高。受 Transformer 自适应特性的启发，我们提出了一种基于 Transformer 的上下文模型，名为 Contextformer，它将事实上的标准注意力机制推广到了空间通道注意力。我们用 Contextformer 替换现代压缩框架的上下文模型，并在广泛使用的 Kodak、CLIC2020 和 Tecnick 图像数据集上进行测试。我们的实验结果表明，与标准通用视频编码 (VVC) 测试模型 (VTM) 16.2 相比，所提出的模型可节省高达 11% 的速率，并且在 PSNR 和 MS-SSIM 方面优于各种基于学习的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的上下文模型Contextformer，用于改进学习型图像压缩中的上下文建模。
AI.motivation: 现有图像压缩算法在潜在空间中未能充分挖掘空间-通道依赖关系，且上下文适应性实现不够优化，限制了性能提升。
AI.method: 受Transformer自适应特性启发，将标准注意力机制扩展为空间-通道注意力，构建Contextformer并替换现代压缩框架中的上下文模块。
AI.result: 在Kodak、CLIC2020和Tecnick数据集上，相比VVC Test Model 16.2实现最高11%的比特率节省，并在PSNR和MS-SSIM指标上优于现有学习模型。
AI.conclusion: Contextformer通过空间-通道注意力机制有效提升了图像压缩性能，验证了该方法在上下文建模中的优势。

authors_text: Zhenbang Wu,Cao Xiao,Lucas M Glass,David M Liebovitz,Jimeng Sun
title: AutoMap: Automatic Medical Code Mapping for Clinical Prediction Model Deployment
title_zh: AutoMap：用于临床预测模型部署的自动医疗代码映射
abstract: Given a deep learning model trained on data from a source site, how to deploy the model to a target hospital automatically? How to accommodate heterogeneous medical coding systems across different hospitals? Standard approaches rely on existing medical code mapping tools, which have significant practical limitations. To tackle this problem, we propose AutoMap to automatically map the medical codes across different EHR systems in a coarse-to-fine manner: (1) Ontology-level Alignment: We leverage the ontology structure to learn a coarse alignment between the source and target medical coding systems; (2) Code-level Refinement: We refine the alignment at a fine-grained code level for the downstream tasks using a teacher-student framework. We evaluate AutoMap using several deep learning models with two real-world EHR datasets: eICU and MIMIC-III. Results show that AutoMap achieves relative improvements up to 3.9% (AUC-ROC) and 8.7% (AUC-PR) for mortality prediction, and up to 4.7% (AUC-ROC) and 3.7% (F1) for length-of-stay estimation. Further, we show that AutoMap can provide accurate mapping across coding systems. Lastly, we demonstrate that AutoMap can adapt to the two challenging scenarios: (1) mapping between completely different coding systems and (2) between completely different hospitals.

How to accommodate heterogeneous medical coding systems across different hospitals? Standard approaches rely on existing medical code mapping tools, which have significant practical limitations. To tackle this problem, we propose AutoMap to automatically map the medical codes across different EHR systems in a coarse-to-fine manner: (1) Ontology-level Alignment: We leverage the ontology structure to learn a coarse alignment between the source and target medical coding systems; (2) Code-level Refinement: We refine the alignment at a fine-grained code level for the downstream tasks using a teacher-student framework. We evaluate AutoMap using several deep learning models with two real-world EHR datasets: eICU and MIMIC-III. Results show that AutoMap achieves relative improvements up to 3.9% (AUC-ROC) and 8.7% (AUC-PR) for mortality prediction, and up to 4.7% (AUC-ROC) and 3.7% (F1) for length-of-stay estimation. Lastly, we demonstrate that AutoMap can adapt to the two challenging scenarios: (1) mapping between completely different coding systems and (2) between completely different hospitals.
abstract_zh: 给定一个基于源站点数据训练的深度学习模型，如何将模型自动部署到目标医院？如何适应不同医院的异构医疗编码系统？标准方法依赖于现有的医疗代码映射工具，这具有很大的实际局限性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出AutoMap以从粗到细的方式自动映射不同EHR系统之间的医疗代码：（1）本体级对齐：我们利用本体结构来学习源和目标医疗编码系统之间的粗略对齐； （2）代码级细化：我们使用师生框架在细粒度的代码级上细化下游任务的对齐。我们使用多个深度学习模型和两个真实世界的 EHR 数据集（eICU 和 MIMIC-III）来评估 AutoMap。结果显示，AutoMap 在死亡率预测方面实现了高达 3.9% (AUC-ROC) 和 8.7% (AUC-PR) 的相对改进，在住院时间估计方面实现了高达 4.7% (AUC-ROC) 和 3.7% (F1) 的相对改进。此外，我们还表明 AutoMap 可以提供跨编码系统的准确映射。最后，我们证明 AutoMap 可以适应两种具有挑战性的场景：（1）完全不同的编码系统之间的映射和（2）完全不同的医院之间的映射。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AutoMap方法，解决深度学习模型在不同医院电子健康记录（EHR）系统间部署时因医疗编码系统异构性导致的映射难题。
AI.motivation: 现有医疗编码映射工具存在实际局限性，难以自动适配不同医院异构的编码系统，阻碍了临床预测模型的跨机构部署。
AI.method: 采用粗到细的两阶段映射策略：1）基于本体结构进行编码系统级粗粒度对齐；2）通过教师-学生框架在代码层级细化映射以优化下游任务。
AI.result: 在eICU和MIMIC-III数据集上，AutoMap使死亡率预测AUC-ROC提升3.9%、AUC-PR提升8.7%，住院时长预测F1提升3.7%，并成功实现跨编码系统及跨医院的映射适应。
AI.conclusion: AutoMap通过分层映射策略有效解决了医疗编码异构性问题，为临床模型的跨机构部署提供了自动化解决方案。

authors_text: Yu-Ming Zhang,Jun-Wei Hsieh,Chun-Chieh Lee,Kuo-Chin Fan
title: SFPN: Synthetic FPN for Object Detection
title_zh: SFPN：用于目标检测的合成 FPN
abstract: FPN (Feature Pyramid Network) has become a basic component of most SoTA one stage object detectors. Many previous studies have repeatedly proved that FPN can caputre better multi-scale feature maps to more precisely describe objects if they are with different sizes. However, for most backbones such VGG, ResNet, or DenseNet, the feature maps at each layer are downsized to their quarters due to the pooling operation or convolutions with stride 2. The gap of down-scaling-by-2 is large and makes its FPN not fuse the features smoothly. This paper proposes a new SFPN (Synthetic Fusion Pyramid Network) arichtecture which creates various synthetic layers between layers of the original FPN to enhance the accuracy of light-weight CNN backones to extract objects' visual features more accurately. Finally, experiments prove the SFPN architecture outperforms either the large backbone VGG16, ResNet50 or light-weight backbones such as MobilenetV2 based on AP score.
summary: FPN (Feature Pyramid Network) has become a basic component of most SoTA one stage object detectors. Many previous studies have repeatedly proved that FPN can caputre better multi-scale feature maps to more precisely describe objects if they are with different sizes. However, for most backbones such VGG, ResNet, or DenseNet, the feature maps at each layer are downsized to their quarters due to the pooling operation or convolutions with stride 2. The gap of down-scaling-by-2 is large and makes its FPN not fuse the features smoothly. This paper proposes a new SFPN (Synthetic Fusion Pyramid Network) arichtecture which creates various synthetic layers between layers of the original FPN to enhance the accuracy of light-weight CNN backones to extract objects' visual features more accurately. Finally, experiments prove the SFPN architecture outperforms either the large backbone VGG16, ResNet50 or light-weight backbones such as MobilenetV2 based on AP score.
abstract_zh: FPN（特征金字塔网络）已成为大多数 SoTA 一级物体检测器的基本组件。之前的许多研究已经反复证明，FPN 可以捕获更好的多尺度特征图，从而更精确地描述不同尺寸的物体。然而，对于大多数主干网（例如 VGG、ResNet 或 DenseNet），由于池化操作或步长为 2 的卷积，每层的特征图都缩小到四分之一。缩小 2 的差距很大，导致 FPN 无法平滑地融合特征。本文提出了一种新的 SFPN（合成融合金字塔网络）结构，该结构在原始 FPN 的层之间创建各种合成层，以增强轻量级 CNN backone 的准确性，从而更准确地提取对象的视觉特征。最后，实验证明，基于 AP 分数，SFPN 架构优于大型骨干网 VGG16、ResNet50 或轻量级骨干网（例如 MobilenetV2）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SFPN的合成特征金字塔网络架构，旨在提升轻量级CNN骨干网络在目标检测中的特征提取能力。
AI.motivation: 现有FPN在骨干网络下采样时存在较大的缩放间隔，导致特征融合不平滑，影响多尺度目标检测精度。
AI.method: 通过在原始FPN层间插入合成层，构建SFPN架构以增强特征融合的连续性与多尺度表征能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，SFPN在AP指标上优于VGG16、ResNet50等大型骨干网络及MobilenetV2等轻量级网络。
AI.conclusion: 合成层设计有效缓解了传统FPN的特征融合缺陷，证明SFPN能在保持轻量级特性的同时提升目标检测性能。

title: The Machine Learning for Combinatorial Optimization Competition (ML4CO): Results and Insights
title_zh: 组合优化机器学习竞赛 (ML4CO)：结果和见解
comment: Neurips 2021 competition. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2112.12251 by other authors
comments: Neurips 2021 competition. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2112.12251 by other authors
abstract: Combinatorial optimization is a well-established area in operations research and computer science. Until recently, its methods have focused on solving problem instances in isolation, ignoring that they often stem from related data distributions in practice. However, recent years have seen a surge of interest in using machine learning as a new approach for solving combinatorial problems, either directly as solvers or by enhancing exact solvers. Based on this context, the ML4CO aims at improving state-of-the-art combinatorial optimization solvers by replacing key heuristic components. The competition featured three challenging tasks: finding the best feasible solution, producing the tightest optimality certificate, and giving an appropriate solver configuration. Three realistic datasets were considered: balanced item placement, workload apportionment, and maritime inventory routing. This last dataset was kept anonymous for the contestants.
summary: Combinatorial optimization is a well-established area in operations research and computer science. Until recently, its methods have focused on solving problem instances in isolation, ignoring that they often stem from related data distributions in practice. However, recent years have seen a surge of interest in using machine learning as a new approach for solving combinatorial problems, either directly as solvers or by enhancing exact solvers. Based on this context, the ML4CO aims at improving state-of-the-art combinatorial optimization solvers by replacing key heuristic components. The competition featured three challenging tasks: finding the best feasible solution, producing the tightest optimality certificate, and giving an appropriate solver configuration. Three realistic datasets were considered: balanced item placement, workload apportionment, and maritime inventory routing. This last dataset was kept anonymous for the contestants.
abstract_zh: 组合优化是运筹学和计算机科学中一个成熟的领域。直到最近，它的方法还专注于孤立地解决问题实例，而忽略了它们通常源于实践中的相关数据分布。然而，近年来人们对使用机器学习作为解决组合问题的新方法的兴趣激增，无论是直接作为求解器还是通过增强精确求解器。基于此背景，ML4CO 旨在通过替换关键启发式组件来改进最先进的组合优化求解器。本次竞赛包含三项具有挑战性的任务：寻找最佳可行解决方案、生成最严格的最优性证书以及给出适当的求解器配置。考虑了三个现实数据集：平衡的物品放置、工作量分配和海运库存路线。最后一个数据集对参赛者保持匿名。

AI.tldr: 论文介绍了ML4CO竞赛的结果，探讨了机器学习在组合优化中的应用，通过改进现有求解器的启发式组件来提升性能。
AI.motivation: 传统组合优化方法独立处理问题，忽视实际中数据分布的相关性，而机器学习能提供新方法，如直接求解或增强精确求解器，从而推动该领域的发展。

search_text: The Machine Learning for Combinatorial Optimization Competition (ML4CO): Results and Insights 组合优化机器学习竞赛 (ML4CO)：结果和见解 Combinatorial optimization is a well-established area in operations research and computer science. Until recently, its methods have focused on solving problem instances in isolation, ignoring that they often stem from related data distributions in practice. However, recent years have seen a surge of interest in using machine learning as a new approach for solving combinatorial problems, either directly as solvers or by enhancing exact solvers. Based on this context, the ML4CO aims at improving state-of-the-art combinatorial optimization solvers by replacing key heuristic components. The competition featured three challenging tasks: finding the best feasible solution, producing the tightest optimality certificate, and giving an appropriate solver configuration. Three realistic datasets were considered: balanced item placement, workload apportionment, and maritime inventory routing. This last dataset was kept anonymous for the contestants. 组合优化是运筹学和计算机科学中一个成熟的领域。直到最近，它的方法还专注于孤立地解决问题实例，而忽略了它们通常源于实践中的相关数据分布。然而，近年来人们对使用机器学习作为解决组合问题的新方法的兴趣激增，无论是直接作为求解器还是通过增强精确求解器。基于此背景，ML4CO 旨在通过替换关键启发式组件来改进最先进的组合优化求解器。本次竞赛包含三项具有挑战性的任务：寻找最佳可行解决方案、生成最严格的最优性证书以及给出适当的求解器配置。考虑了三个现实数据集：平衡的物品放置、工作量分配和海运库存路线。最后一个数据集对参赛者保持匿名。 论文介绍了ML4CO竞赛的结果，探讨了机器学习在组合优化中的应用，通过改进现有求解器的启发式组件来提升性能。 Maxime Gasse,Quentin Cappart,Jonas Charfreitag,Laurent Charlin,Didier Chételat,Antonia Chmiela,Justin Dumouchelle,Ambros Gleixner,Aleksandr M. Kazachkov,Elias Khalil,Pawel Lichocki,Andrea Lodi,Miles Lubin,Chris J. Maddison,Christopher Morris,Dimitri J. Papageorgiou,Augustin Parjadis,Sebastian Pokutta,Antoine Prouvost,Lara Scavuzzo,Giulia Zarpellon,Linxin Yang,Sha Lai,Akang Wang,Xiaodong Luo, et al. (16 additional authors not shown) cs.LG,cs.NE,math.OC,stat.ML

authors_text: Rameshwar Pratap,Bhisham Dev Verma,Raghav Kulkarni
title: Improving \textit{Tug-of-War} sketch using Control-Variates method
title_zh: 使用 Control-Variates 方法改进 \textit{Tug-of-War} 草图
abstract: Computing space-efficient summary, or \textit{a.k.a. sketches}, of large data, is a central problem in the streaming algorithm. Such sketches are used to answer \textit{post-hoc} queries in several data analytics tasks. The algorithm for computing sketches typically requires to be fast, accurate, and space-efficient. A fundamental problem in the streaming algorithm framework is that of computing the frequency moments of data streams. The frequency moments of a sequence containing $f_i$ elements of type $i$, are the numbers $\mathbf{F}_k=\sum_{i=1}^n {f_i}^k,$ where $i\in [n]$. This is also called as $\ell_k$ norm of the frequency vector $(f_1, f_2, \ldots f_n).$ Another important problem is to compute the similarity between two data streams by computing the inner product of the corresponding frequency vectors. The seminal work of Alon, Matias, and Szegedy~\cite{AMS}, \textit{a.k.a. Tug-of-war} (or AMS) sketch gives a randomized sublinear space (and linear time) algorithm for computing the frequency moments, and the inner product between two frequency vectors corresponding to the data streams. However, the variance of these estimates typically tends to be large. In this work, we focus on minimizing the variance of these estimates. We use the techniques from the classical Control-Variate method~\cite{Lavenberg} which is primarily known for variance reduction in Monte-Carlo simulations, and as a result, we are able to obtain significant variance reduction, at the cost of a little computational overhead. We present a theoretical analysis of our proposal and complement it with supporting experiments on synthetic as well as real-world datasets.

Such sketches are used to answer \textit{post-hoc} queries in several data analytics tasks. The algorithm for computing sketches typically requires to be fast, accurate, and space-efficient. A fundamental problem in the streaming algorithm framework is that of computing the frequency moments of data streams. The frequency moments of a sequence containing $f_i$ elements of type $i$, are the numbers $\mathbf{F}_k=\sum_{i=1}^n {f_i}^k,$ where $i\in [n]$. This is also called as $\ell_k$ norm of the frequency vector $(f_1, f_2, \ldots f_n).$ Another important problem is to compute the similarity between two data streams by computing the inner product of the corresponding frequency vectors. The seminal work of Alon, Matias, and Szegedy~\cite{AMS}, \textit{a.k.a. Tug-of-war} (or AMS) sketch gives a randomized sublinear space (and linear time) algorithm for computing the frequency moments, and the inner product between two frequency vectors corresponding to the data streams. However, the variance of these estimates typically tends to be large. In this work, we focus on minimizing the variance of these estimates. We use the techniques from the classical Control-Variate method~\cite{Lavenberg} which is primarily known for variance reduction in Monte-Carlo simulations, and as a result, we are able to obtain significant variance reduction, at the cost of a little computational overhead. We present a theoretical analysis of our proposal and complement it with supporting experiments on synthetic as well as real-world datasets.
abstract_zh: 计算节省空间的摘要，或 \textit{a.k.a.大数据的草图}是流算法的核心问题。此类草图用于回答多个数据分析任务中的 \textit{post-hoc} 查询。计算草图的算法通常要求快速、准确且节省空间。流算法框架中的一个基本问题是计算数据流的频率矩。包含$i$类型的$f_i$元素的序列的频率矩是数字$\mathbf{F}_k=\sum_{i=1}^n {f_i}^k,$，其中$i\in [n]$。这也称为频率向量 $(f_1, f_2, \ldots f_n)$\ell_k$ 范数。$ 另一个重要问题是通过计算相应频率向量的内积来计算两个数据流之间的相似度。 Alon、Matias 和 Szegedy 的开创性工作~\cite{AMS}、\textit{a.k.a. Tug-of-war}（或 AMS）草图给出了一种随机次线性空间（和线性时间）算法，用于计算频率矩以及与数据流对应的两个频率向量之间的内积。然而，这些估计的方差通常很大。在这项工作中，我们专注于最小化这些估计的方差。我们使用经典控制变量方法~\cite{Lavenberg}中的技术，该方法主要以蒙特卡洛模拟中的方差减少而闻名，因此，我们能够以少量计算开销为代价获得显着的方差减少。我们对我们的建议进行了理论分析，并通过对合成数据集和真实数据集的支持实验对其进行了补充。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用控制变量法改进AMS（Tug-of-War）草图算法，以降低频率矩和数据流内积估计的方差。
AI.motivation: AMS草图算法在计算数据流频率矩和内积时存在估计方差较大的问题，影响结果准确性，需通过有效方法降低方差。
AI.method: 引入经典控制变量法（Control-Variates），通过理论分析设计改进的草图算法，在增加少量计算开销的前提下减少估计方差。
AI.result: 理论分析与实验验证显示，改进后的算法在合成数据和真实数据集上均实现了显著的方差降低。
AI.conclusion: 控制变量法有效提升了AMS草图的估计精度，为流数据处理提供了更可靠的低方差解决方案。
