authors_text: Zhengyang Feng,Shaohua Guo,Xin Tan,Ke Xu,Min Wang,Lizhuang Ma
title: Rethinking Efficient Lane Detection via Curve Modeling
title_zh: 重新思考通过曲线建模进行高效车道检测
comment: Fix GT fitting equations and descriptions in Section 3.3. Code: https://github.com/voldemortX/pytorch-auto-drive
comments: Fix GT fitting equations and descriptions in Section 3.3. Code: https://github.com/voldemortX/pytorch-auto-drive
abstract: This paper presents a novel parametric curve-based method for lane detection in RGB images. Unlike state-of-the-art segmentation-based and point detection-based methods that typically require heuristics to either decode predictions or formulate a large sum of anchors, the curve-based methods can learn holistic lane representations naturally. To handle the optimization difficulties of existing polynomial curve methods, we propose to exploit the parametric Bézier curve due to its ease of computation, stability, and high freedom degrees of transformations. In addition, we propose the deformable convolution-based feature flip fusion, for exploiting the symmetry properties of lanes in driving scenes. The proposed method achieves a new state-of-the-art performance on the popular LLAMAS benchmark. It also achieves favorable accuracy on the TuSimple and CULane datasets, while retaining both low latency (> 150 FPS) and small model size (< 10M). Our method can serve as a new baseline, to shed the light on the parametric curves modeling for lane detection. Codes of our model and PytorchAutoDrive: a unified framework for self-driving perception, are available at: https://github.com/voldemortX/pytorch-auto-drive .
summary: This paper presents a novel parametric curve-based method for lane detection in RGB images. Unlike state-of-the-art segmentation-based and point detection-based methods that typically require heuristics to either decode predictions or formulate a large sum of anchors, the curve-based methods can learn holistic lane representations naturally. To handle the optimization difficulties of existing polynomial curve methods, we propose to exploit the parametric Bézier curve due to its ease of computation, stability, and high freedom degrees of transformations. In addition, we propose the deformable convolution-based feature flip fusion, for exploiting the symmetry properties of lanes in driving scenes. The proposed method achieves a new state-of-the-art performance on the popular LLAMAS benchmark. It also achieves favorable accuracy on the TuSimple and CULane datasets, while retaining both low latency (> 150 FPS) and small model size (< 10M). Our method can serve as a new baseline, to shed the light on the parametric curves modeling for lane detection. Codes of our model and PytorchAutoDrive: a unified framework for self-driving perception, are available at: https://github.com/voldemortX/pytorch-auto-drive .
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的基于参数曲线的 RGB 图像车道检测方法。与最先进的基于分割和基于点检测的方法通常需要启发式解码预测或制定大量锚点不同，基于曲线的方法可以自然地学习整体车道表示。为了解决现有多项式曲线方法的优化困难，我们建议利用参数贝塞尔曲线，因为它易于计算、稳定且变换自由度高。此外，我们提出了基于可变形卷积的特征翻转融合，用于利用驾驶场景中车道的对称性。所提出的方法在流行的 LLAMAS 基准上实现了新的最先进的性能。它还在 TuSimple 和 CULane 数据集上实现了良好的准确性，同时保留了低延迟 (> 150 FPS) 和小模型大小 (< 10M)。我们的方法可以作为新的基线，以阐明车道检测的参数曲线建模。我们的模型和 PytorchAutoDrive（自动驾驶感知的统一框架）的代码可在：https://github.com/voldemortX/pytorch-auto-drive 获得。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于参数曲线的高效车道检测方法，通过Bézier曲线和可变形卷积优化车道表示。
AI.motivation: 现有分割和点检测方法依赖启发式策略或大量锚点，难以自然建模车道整体特征，而参数曲线方法能更稳定地学习车道表示。
AI.method: 采用Bézier曲线处理多项式优化难题，并设计可变形卷积特征翻转融合模块，利用车道对称性提升检测效果。
AI.result: 在LLAMAS基准测试中达到SOTA性能，在TuSimple和CULane数据集上保持高精度（>150 FPS，<10M模型大小）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为车道检测的参数曲线建模提供了新基准，并开源了PytorchAutoDrive框架。

ai_content_json.method: 采用Bézier曲线处理多项式优化难题，并设计可变形卷积特征翻转融合模块，利用车道对称性提升检测效果。
ai_content_json.result: 在LLAMAS基准测试中达到SOTA性能，在TuSimple和CULane数据集上保持高精度（>150 FPS，<10M模型大小）。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 该方法为车道检测的参数曲线建模提供了新基准，并开源了PytorchAutoDrive框架。

search_text: Rethinking Efficient Lane Detection via Curve Modeling 重新思考通过曲线建模进行高效车道检测 This paper presents a novel parametric curve-based method for lane detection in RGB images. Unlike state-of-the-art segmentation-based and point detection-based methods that typically require heuristics to either decode predictions or formulate a large sum of anchors, the curve-based methods can learn holistic lane representations naturally. To handle the optimization difficulties of existing polynomial curve methods, we propose to exploit the parametric Bézier curve due to its ease of computation, stability, and high freedom degrees of transformations. In addition, we propose the deformable convolution-based feature flip fusion, for exploiting the symmetry properties of lanes in driving scenes. The proposed method achieves a new state-of-the-art performance on the popular LLAMAS benchmark. It also achieves favorable accuracy on the TuSimple and CULane datasets, while retaining both low latency (> 150 FPS) and small model size (< 10M). Our method can serve as a new baseline, to shed the light on the parametric curves modeling for lane detection. Codes of our model and PytorchAutoDrive: a unified framework for self-driving perception, are available at: https://github.com/voldemortX/pytorch-auto-drive . 本文提出了一种新颖的基于参数曲线的 RGB 图像车道检测方法。与最先进的基于分割和基于点检测的方法通常需要启发式解码预测或制定大量锚点不同，基于曲线的方法可以自然地学习整体车道表示。为了解决现有多项式曲线方法的优化困难，我们建议利用参数贝塞尔曲线，因为它易于计算、稳定且变换自由度高。此外，我们提出了基于可变形卷积的特征翻转融合，用于利用驾驶场景中车道的对称性。所提出的方法在流行的 LLAMAS 基准上实现了新的最先进的性能。它还在 TuSimple 和 CULane 数据集上实现了良好的准确性，同时保留了低延迟 (> 150 FPS) 和小模型大小 (< 10M)。我们的方法可以作为新的基线，以阐明车道检测的参数曲线建模。我们的模型和 PytorchAutoDrive（自动驾驶感知的统一框架）的代码可在：https://github.com/voldemortX/pytorch-auto-drive 获得。 本文提出了一种基于参数曲线的高效车道检测方法，通过Bézier曲线和可变形卷积优化车道表示。 Zhengyang Feng,Shaohua Guo,Xin Tan,Ke Xu,Min Wang,Lizhuang Ma cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Xin Yu,Yucheng Tang,Yinchi Zhou,Riqiang Gao,Qi Yang,Ho Hin Lee,Thomas Li,Shunxing Bao,Yuankai Huo,Zhoubing Xu,Thomas A. Lasko,Richard G. Abramson,Bennett A. Landman
title: Characterizing Renal Structures with 3D Block Aggregate Transformers
title_zh: 使用 3D 块聚合变压器表征肾脏结构
abstract: Efficiently quantifying renal structures can provide distinct spatial context and facilitate biomarker discovery for kidney morphology. However, the development and evaluation of the transformer model to segment the renal cortex, medulla, and collecting system remains challenging due to data inefficiency. Inspired by the hierarchical structures in vision transformer, we propose a novel method using a 3D block aggregation transformer for segmenting kidney components on contrast-enhanced CT scans. We construct the first cohort of renal substructures segmentation dataset with 116 subjects under institutional review board (IRB) approval. Our method yields the state-of-the-art performance (Dice of 0.8467) against the baseline approach of 0.8308 with the data-efficient design. The Pearson R achieves 0.9891 between the proposed method and manual standards and indicates the strong correlation and reproducibility for volumetric analysis. We extend the proposed method to the public KiTS dataset, the method leads to improved accuracy compared to transformer-based approaches. We show that the 3D block aggregation transformer can achieve local communication between sequence representations without modifying self-attention, and it can serve as an accurate and efficient quantification tool for characterizing renal structures.
summary: Efficiently quantifying renal structures can provide distinct spatial context and facilitate biomarker discovery for kidney morphology. However, the development and evaluation of the transformer model to segment the renal cortex, medulla, and collecting system remains challenging due to data inefficiency. Inspired by the hierarchical structures in vision transformer, we propose a novel method using a 3D block aggregation transformer for segmenting kidney components on contrast-enhanced CT scans. We construct the first cohort of renal substructures segmentation dataset with 116 subjects under institutional review board (IRB) approval. Our method yields the state-of-the-art performance (Dice of 0.8467) against the baseline approach of 0.8308 with the data-efficient design. The Pearson R achieves 0.9891 between the proposed method and manual standards and indicates the strong correlation and reproducibility for volumetric analysis. We extend the proposed method to the public KiTS dataset, the method leads to improved accuracy compared to transformer-based approaches. We show that the 3D block aggregation transformer can achieve local communication between sequence representations without modifying self-attention, and it can serve as an accurate and efficient quantification tool for characterizing renal structures.
abstract_zh: 有效量化肾脏结构可以提供独特的空间背景，并促进肾脏形态学生物标志物的发现。然而，由于数据效率低下，用于分割肾皮质、髓质和收集系统的变压器模型的开发和评估仍然具有挑战性。受视觉变压器分层结构的启发，我们提出了一种使用 3D 块聚合变压器在对比增强 CT 扫描上分割肾脏成分的新方法。我们构建了第一批肾脏亚结构分割数据集，其中包含 116 名受试者，并得到机构审查委员会 (IRB) 的批准。我们的方法通过数据高效的设计产生了最先进的性能（Dice 为 0.8467），而基准方法为 0.8308。所提出的方法和手动标准之间的 Pearson R 达到 0.9891，表明体积分析具有很强的相关性和重现性。我们将所提出的方法扩展到公共 KiTS 数据集，与基于 Transformer 的方法相比，该方法提高了准确性。我们证明，3D 块聚合转换器可以在不修改自注意力的情况下实现序列表示之间的本地通信，并且它可以作为表征肾脏结构的准确有效的量化工具。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于3D块聚合Transformer的新方法，用于在增强CT扫描中分割肾脏皮质、髓质和集合系统，以高效量化肾结构。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer模型在肾结构分割中面临数据效率低下和分割精度不足的挑战，需开发更高效且准确的分割方法以支持肾脏形态生物标志物研究。
AI.method: 受视觉Transformer层次结构启发，设计3D块聚合Transformer，通过局部序列表示通信机制优化分割，构建包含116例受试者的肾亚结构分割数据集进行验证。
AI.result: 在自定义数据集上Dice系数达0.8467（基线0.8308），与手动标注的皮尔逊R值为0.9891；在KiTS数据集上优于其他Transformer方法。
AI.conclusion: 3D块聚合Transformer实现了无需修改自注意力机制的局部通信，为肾结构量化提供了准确高效的解决方案，具有临床应用潜力。

authors_text: Vic Degraeve,Gilles Vandewiele,Femke Ongenae,Sofie Van Hoecke
title: R-GCN: The R Could Stand for Random
title_zh: R-GCN：R 可以代表随机
abstract: The inception of the Relational Graph Convolutional Network (R-GCN) marked a milestone in the Semantic Web domain as a widely cited method that generalises end-to-end hierarchical representation learning to Knowledge Graphs (KGs). R-GCNs generate representations for nodes of interest by repeatedly aggregating parameterised, relation-specific transformations of their neighbours. However, in this paper, we argue that the the R-GCN's main contribution lies in this "message passing" paradigm, rather than the learned weights. To this end, we introduce the "Random Relational Graph Convolutional Network" (RR-GCN), which leaves all parameters untrained and thus constructs node embeddings by aggregating randomly transformed random representations from neighbours, i.e., with no learned parameters. We empirically show that RR-GCNs can compete with fully trained R-GCNs in both node classification and link prediction settings.
summary: The inception of the Relational Graph Convolutional Network (R-GCN) marked a milestone in the Semantic Web domain as a widely cited method that generalises end-to-end hierarchical representation learning to Knowledge Graphs (KGs). R-GCNs generate representations for nodes of interest by repeatedly aggregating parameterised, relation-specific transformations of their neighbours. However, in this paper, we argue that the the R-GCN's main contribution lies in this "message passing" paradigm, rather than the learned weights. To this end, we introduce the "Random Relational Graph Convolutional Network" (RR-GCN), which leaves all parameters untrained and thus constructs node embeddings by aggregating randomly transformed random representations from neighbours, i.e., with no learned parameters. We empirically show that RR-GCNs can compete with fully trained R-GCNs in both node classification and link prediction settings.
abstract_zh: 关系图卷积网络（R-GCN）的诞生标志着语义网领域的一个里程碑，它是一种被广泛引用的方法，将端到端的分层表示学习推广到知识图（KG）。 R-GCN 通过重复聚合其邻居的参数化、特定于关系的转换来生成感兴趣节点的表示。然而，在本文中，我们认为 R-GCN 的主要贡献在于这种“消息传递”范式，而不是学习的权重。为此，我们引入了“随机关系图卷积网络”（RR-GCN），它使所有参数未经训练，从而通过聚合来自邻居的随机变换的随机表示来构造节点嵌入，即没有学习到的参数。我们凭经验证明，RR-GCN 在节点分类和链路预测设置方面都可以与经过充分训练的 R-GCN 竞争。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练参数的随机关系图卷积网络（RR-GCN），通过随机化邻居表示来挑战传统R-GCN的参数学习必要性。
AI.motivation: 作者认为R-GCN的核心贡献在于消息传递范式而非参数学习，因此尝试验证仅依赖随机变换是否能实现类似性能。
AI.method: 设计RR-GCN模型，完全移除参数训练过程，通过聚合邻居节点的随机变换表示生成目标节点嵌入。
AI.result: 实验表明RR-GCN在节点分类和链接预测任务中可与全参数R-GCN模型竞争，验证了随机化方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 消息传递机制本身可能比参数学习更重要，为知识图谱表示学习提供了新的简洁范式。

authors_text: Wei Xiao,Tsun-Hsuan Wang,Makram Chahine,Alexander Amini,Ramin Hasani,Daniela Rus
title: Differentiable Control Barrier Functions for Vision-based End-to-End Autonomous Driving
title_zh: 基于视觉的端到端自动驾驶的可微分控制屏障函数
comment: 11 pages, Wei Xiao and Tsun-Hsuan Wang are with equal contributions
comments: 11 pages, Wei Xiao and Tsun-Hsuan Wang are with equal contributions
abstract: Guaranteeing safety of perception-based learning systems is challenging due to the absence of ground-truth state information unlike in state-aware control scenarios. In this paper, we introduce a safety guaranteed learning framework for vision-based end-to-end autonomous driving. To this end, we design a learning system equipped with differentiable control barrier functions (dCBFs) that is trained end-to-end by gradient descent. Our models are composed of conventional neural network architectures and dCBFs. They are interpretable at scale, achieve great test performance under limited training data, and are safety guaranteed in a series of autonomous driving scenarios such as lane keeping and obstacle avoidance. We evaluated our framework in a sim-to-real environment, and tested on a real autonomous car, achieving safe lane following and obstacle avoidance via Augmented Reality (AR) and real parked vehicles.
summary: Guaranteeing safety of perception-based learning systems is challenging due to the absence of ground-truth state information unlike in state-aware control scenarios. In this paper, we introduce a safety guaranteed learning framework for vision-based end-to-end autonomous driving. To this end, we design a learning system equipped with differentiable control barrier functions (dCBFs) that is trained end-to-end by gradient descent. Our models are composed of conventional neural network architectures and dCBFs. They are interpretable at scale, achieve great test performance under limited training data, and are safety guaranteed in a series of autonomous driving scenarios such as lane keeping and obstacle avoidance. We evaluated our framework in a sim-to-real environment, and tested on a real autonomous car, achieving safe lane following and obstacle avoidance via Augmented Reality (AR) and real parked vehicles.
abstract_zh: 由于缺乏与状态感知控制场景不同的真实状态信息，保证基于感知的学习系统的安全性具有挑战性。在本文中，我们介绍了一种基于视觉的端到端自动驾驶的安全保障学习框架。为此，我们设计了一个配备可微控制屏障函数（dCBF）的学习系统，该系统通过梯度下降进行端到端训练。我们的模型由传统的神经网络架构和 dCBF 组成。它们具有规模可解释性，在有限的训练数据下取得了良好的测试性能，并在车道保持、避障等一系列自动驾驶场景中保证了安全性。我们在模拟真实环境中评估了我们的框架，并在真正的自动驾驶汽车上进行了测试，通过增强现实 (AR) 和真实停放的车辆实现安全车道跟随和避障。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于可微分控制屏障函数（dCBFs）的端到端视觉自动驾驶框架，以解决感知学习系统安全性保障问题。
AI.motivation: 传统基于感知的自动驾驶系统因缺乏真实状态信息难以保证安全性，需设计可解释且安全的学习框架。
AI.method: 结合常规神经网络与dCBFs构建可解释模型，通过梯度下降端到端训练，实现车道保持与避障等场景的安全保障。
AI.result: 在仿真与真实环境中验证有效，实现安全车道跟随与避障，且在有限训练数据下表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过dCBFs有效平衡安全性和性能，为视觉自动驾驶提供了可解释且可靠的技术方案。

authors_text: Catarina Moreira,Yu-Liang Chou,Chihcheng Hsieh,Chun Ouyang,João Madeiras Pereira,Joaquim Jorge
title: Benchmarking Instance-Centric Counterfactual Algorithms for XAI: From White Box to Black Box
title_zh: XAI 以实例为中心的反事实算法的基准测试：从白盒到黑盒
abstract: This study investigates the impact of machine learning models on the generation of counterfactual explanations by conducting a benchmark evaluation over three different types of models: a decision tree (fully transparent, interpretable, white-box model), a random forest (semi-interpretable, grey-box model), and a neural network (fully opaque, black-box model). We tested the counterfactual generation process using four algorithms (DiCE, WatcherCF, prototype, and GrowingSpheresCF) in the literature in 25 different datasets. Our findings indicate that: (1) Different machine learning models have little impact on the generation of counterfactual explanations; (2) Counterfactual algorithms based uniquely on proximity loss functions are not actionable and will not provide meaningful explanations; (3) One cannot have meaningful evaluation results without guaranteeing plausibility in the counterfactual generation. Algorithms that do not consider plausibility in their internal mechanisms will lead to biased and unreliable conclusions if evaluated with the current state-of-the-art metrics; (4) A counterfactual inspection analysis is strongly recommended to ensure a robust examination of counterfactual explanations and the potential identification of biases.
summary: This study investigates the impact of machine learning models on the generation of counterfactual explanations by conducting a benchmark evaluation over three different types of models: a decision tree (fully transparent, interpretable, white-box model), a random forest (semi-interpretable, grey-box model), and a neural network (fully opaque, black-box model). We tested the counterfactual generation process using four algorithms (DiCE, WatcherCF, prototype, and GrowingSpheresCF) in the literature in 25 different datasets. Our findings indicate that: (1) Different machine learning models have little impact on the generation of counterfactual explanations; (2) Counterfactual algorithms based uniquely on proximity loss functions are not actionable and will not provide meaningful explanations; (3) One cannot have meaningful evaluation results without guaranteeing plausibility in the counterfactual generation. Algorithms that do not consider plausibility in their internal mechanisms will lead to biased and unreliable conclusions if evaluated with the current state-of-the-art metrics; (4) A counterfactual inspection analysis is strongly recommended to ensure a robust examination of counterfactual explanations and the potential identification of biases.
abstract_zh: 本研究通过对三种不同类型的模型进行基准评估，研究机器学习模型对反事实解释生成的影响：决策树（完全透明、可解释、白盒模型）、随机森林（半可解释、灰盒模型）和神经网络（完全不透明、黑盒模型）。我们使用文献中的四种算法（DiCE、WatcherCF、prototype 和 GrowingSpheresCF）在 25 个不同的数据集中测试了反事实生成过程。我们的研究结果表明：（1）不同的机器学习模型对反事实解释的生成影响不大； (2) 唯一基于邻近损失函数的反事实算法不具有可操作性，也不会提供有意义的解释； (3) 如果不保证反事实生成的合理性，就不可能获得有意义的评估结果。如果使用当前最先进的指标进行评估，不考虑其内部机制合理性的算法将导致有偏见且不可靠的结论； (4) 强烈建议进行反事实检查分析，以确保对反事实解释进行强有力的检查并识别潜在的偏见。

AI.tldr: 该论文对三种不同透明度的机器学习模型（白盒、灰盒、黑盒）中的反事实解释算法进行基准测试，评估其生成效果。
AI.motivation: 研究不同机器学习模型对反事实解释生成的影响，并验证现有算法在可解释性人工智能（XAI）中的有效性与局限性。
AI.method: 在25个数据集上测试四种反事实生成算法（DiCE、WatcherCF、prototype、GrowingSpheresCF），对比白盒（决策树）、灰盒（随机森林）和黑盒（神经网络）模型的表现。
AI.result: 模型类型对反事实生成影响较小；仅依赖距离损失函数的算法不可行；缺乏可解释性保障会导致评估结果偏差；需通过反事实检验分析识别潜在偏倚。
AI.conclusion: 反事实解释需确保可解释性与合理性，算法设计应纳入可解释性机制，且需通过检验分析保障结果可靠性。

authors_text: Olga Taran,Joakim Tutt,Taras Holotyak,Roman Chaban,Slavi Bonev,Slava Voloshynovskiy
title: Mobile authentication of copy detection patterns
title_zh: 复制检测模式的移动认证
abstract: In the recent years, the copy detection patterns (CDP) attracted a lot of attention as a link between the physical and digital worlds, which is of great interest for the internet of things and brand protection applications. However, the security of CDP in terms of their reproducibility by unauthorized parties or clonability remains largely unexplored. In this respect this paper addresses a problem of anti-counterfeiting of physical objects and aims at investigating the authentication aspects and the resistances to illegal copying of the modern CDP from machine learning perspectives. A special attention is paid to a reliable authentication under the real life verification conditions when the codes are printed on an industrial printer and enrolled via modern mobile phones under regular light conditions. The theoretical and empirical investigation of authentication aspects of CDP is performed with respect to four types of copy fakes from the point of view of (i) multi-class supervised classification as a baseline approach and (ii) one-class classification as a real-life application case. The obtained results show that the modern machine-learning approaches and the technical capacities of modern mobile phones allow to reliably authenticate CDP on end-user mobile phones under the considered classes of fakes.
summary: In the recent years, the copy detection patterns (CDP) attracted a lot of attention as a link between the physical and digital worlds, which is of great interest for the internet of things and brand protection applications. However, the security of CDP in terms of their reproducibility by unauthorized parties or clonability remains largely unexplored. In this respect this paper addresses a problem of anti-counterfeiting of physical objects and aims at investigating the authentication aspects and the resistances to illegal copying of the modern CDP from machine learning perspectives. A special attention is paid to a reliable authentication under the real life verification conditions when the codes are printed on an industrial printer and enrolled via modern mobile phones under regular light conditions. The theoretical and empirical investigation of authentication aspects of CDP is performed with respect to four types of copy fakes from the point of view of (i) multi-class supervised classification as a baseline approach and (ii) one-class classification as a real-life application case. The obtained results show that the modern machine-learning approaches and the technical capacities of modern mobile phones allow to reliably authenticate CDP on end-user mobile phones under the considered classes of fakes.
abstract_zh: 近年来，复制检测模式（CDP）作为物理世界和数字世界之间的纽带而引起了广泛关注，这对于物联网和品牌保护应用引起了极大的兴趣。然而，CDP 在未经授权方的可复制性或可克隆性方面的安全性在很大程度上仍未得到探索。在这方面，本文解决了物理对象的防伪问题，旨在从机器学习的角度研究现代 CDP 的认证方面和对非法复制的抵抗力。当代码在工业打印机上打印并在常规光照条件下通过现代移动电话注册时，我们特别关注现实生活验证条件下的可靠验证。 CDP 认证方面的理论和实证研究是针对四种类型的仿冒品，从 (i) 多类监督分类作为基线方法和 (ii) 一类分类作为现实应用案例的角度进行。获得的结果表明，现代机器学习方法和现代移动电话的技术能力允许在考虑的假货类别下可靠地验证最终用户移动电话上的 CDP。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过移动设备和机器学习方法对现代复制检测模式（CDP）进行防伪认证，以应对非法复制问题。
AI.motivation: CDP作为连接物理与数字世界的桥梁，在物联网和品牌保护中具有重要价值，但其防伪安全性尚未得到充分探索。
AI.method: 从机器学习视角出发，采用多类监督分类（基线方法）和一类分类（实际应用案例），针对四种伪造类型评估CDP的认证性能，并在工业打印机和移动设备环境下进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，现代机器学习方法与移动设备技术可有效实现CDP在用户端的可靠认证，抵御指定类别的伪造攻击。
AI.conclusion: 现代移动设备与机器学习技术结合，能够为CDP提供实用的防伪解决方案，增强物联网和品牌保护的安全性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究如何通过移动设备和机器学习方法对现代复制检测模式（CDP）进行防伪认证，以应对非法复制问题。

search_text: Mobile authentication of copy detection patterns 复制检测模式的移动认证 In the recent years, the copy detection patterns (CDP) attracted a lot of attention as a link between the physical and digital worlds, which is of great interest for the internet of things and brand protection applications. However, the security of CDP in terms of their reproducibility by unauthorized parties or clonability remains largely unexplored. In this respect this paper addresses a problem of anti-counterfeiting of physical objects and aims at investigating the authentication aspects and the resistances to illegal copying of the modern CDP from machine learning perspectives. A special attention is paid to a reliable authentication under the real life verification conditions when the codes are printed on an industrial printer and enrolled via modern mobile phones under regular light conditions. The theoretical and empirical investigation of authentication aspects of CDP is performed with respect to four types of copy fakes from the point of view of (i) multi-class supervised classification as a baseline approach and (ii) one-class classification as a real-life application case. The obtained results show that the modern machine-learning approaches and the technical capacities of modern mobile phones allow to reliably authenticate CDP on end-user mobile phones under the considered classes of fakes. 近年来，复制检测模式（CDP）作为物理世界和数字世界之间的纽带而引起了广泛关注，这对于物联网和品牌保护应用引起了极大的兴趣。然而，CDP 在未经授权方的可复制性或可克隆性方面的安全性在很大程度上仍未得到探索。在这方面，本文解决了物理对象的防伪问题，旨在从机器学习的角度研究现代 CDP 的认证方面和对非法复制的抵抗力。当代码在工业打印机上打印并在常规光照条件下通过现代移动电话注册时，我们特别关注现实生活验证条件下的可靠验证。 CDP 认证方面的理论和实证研究是针对四种类型的仿冒品，从 (i) 多类监督分类作为基线方法和 (ii) 一类分类作为现实应用案例的角度进行。获得的结果表明，现代机器学习方法和现代移动电话的技术能力允许在考虑的假货类别下可靠地验证最终用户移动电话上的 CDP。 本文研究如何通过移动设备和机器学习方法对现代复制检测模式（CDP）进行防伪认证，以应对非法复制问题。 Olga Taran,Joakim Tutt,Taras Holotyak,Roman Chaban,Slavi Bonev,Slava Voloshynovskiy cs.CR,cs.CV

authors_text: Takuhiro Kaneko,Kou Tanaka,Hirokazu Kameoka,Shogo Seki
title: iSTFTNet: Fast and Lightweight Mel-Spectrogram Vocoder Incorporating Inverse Short-Time Fourier Transform
title_zh: iSTFTNet：结合短时傅里叶逆变换的快速轻量级梅尔声谱声码器
abstract: In recent text-to-speech synthesis and voice conversion systems, a mel-spectrogram is commonly applied as an intermediate representation, and the necessity for a mel-spectrogram vocoder is increasing. A mel-spectrogram vocoder must solve three inverse problems: recovery of the original-scale magnitude spectrogram, phase reconstruction, and frequency-to-time conversion. A typical convolutional mel-spectrogram vocoder solves these problems jointly and implicitly using a convolutional neural network, including temporal upsampling layers, when directly calculating a raw waveform. Such an approach allows skipping redundant processes during waveform synthesis (e.g., the direct reconstruction of high-dimensional original-scale spectrograms). By contrast, the approach solves all problems in a black box and cannot effectively employ the time-frequency structures existing in a mel-spectrogram. We thus propose iSTFTNet, which replaces some output-side layers of the mel-spectrogram vocoder with the inverse short-time Fourier transform (iSTFT) after sufficiently reducing the frequency dimension using upsampling layers, reducing the computational cost from black-box modeling and avoiding redundant estimations of high-dimensional spectrograms. During our experiments, we applied our ideas to three HiFi-GAN variants and made the models faster and more lightweight with a reasonable speech quality. Audio samples are available at https://www.kecl.ntt.co.jp/people/kaneko.takuhiro/projects/istftnet/.
summary: In recent text-to-speech synthesis and voice conversion systems, a mel-spectrogram is commonly applied as an intermediate representation, and the necessity for a mel-spectrogram vocoder is increasing. A mel-spectrogram vocoder must solve three inverse problems: recovery of the original-scale magnitude spectrogram, phase reconstruction, and frequency-to-time conversion. A typical convolutional mel-spectrogram vocoder solves these problems jointly and implicitly using a convolutional neural network, including temporal upsampling layers, when directly calculating a raw waveform. Such an approach allows skipping redundant processes during waveform synthesis (e.g., the direct reconstruction of high-dimensional original-scale spectrograms). By contrast, the approach solves all problems in a black box and cannot effectively employ the time-frequency structures existing in a mel-spectrogram. We thus propose iSTFTNet, which replaces some output-side layers of the mel-spectrogram vocoder with the inverse short-time Fourier transform (iSTFT) after sufficiently reducing the frequency dimension using upsampling layers, reducing the computational cost from black-box modeling and avoiding redundant estimations of high-dimensional spectrograms. During our experiments, we applied our ideas to three HiFi-GAN variants and made the models faster and more lightweight with a reasonable speech quality. Audio samples are available at https://www.kecl.ntt.co.jp/people/kaneko.takuhiro/projects/istftnet/.
abstract_zh: 在最近的文本到语音合成和语音转换系统中，通常应用梅尔谱图作为中间表示，并且对梅尔谱图声码器的必要性正在增加。梅尔频谱声码器必须解决三个逆问题：原始尺度幅度频谱图的恢复、相位重建和频率到时间的转换。典型的卷积梅尔声谱声码器在直接计算原始波形时使用卷积神经网络（包括时间上采样层）联合隐式地解决这些问题。这种方法允许在波形合成期间跳过冗余过程（例如，高维原始尺度频谱图的直接重建）。相比之下，该方法在黑匣子中解决了所有问题，并且不能有效地利用梅尔谱图中存在的时频结构。因此，我们提出了 iSTFTNet，在使用上采样层充分降低频率维度后，用逆短时傅立叶变换（iSTFT）取代了梅尔频谱声码器的一些输出侧层，减少了黑盒建模的计算成本并避免了高维频谱图的冗余估计。在我们的实验中，我们将我们的想法应用到了三种 HiFi-GAN 变体中，使模型更快、更轻量，并具有合理的语音质量。音频样本可在 https://www.kecl.ntt.co.jp/people/kaneko.takuhiro/projects/istftnet/ 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出iSTFTNet，一种结合逆短时傅里叶变换（iSTFT）的快速轻量级梅尔频谱语音合成器。
AI.motivation: 现有梅尔频谱声码器通过卷积网络隐式解决逆问题，但无法有效利用梅尔频谱的时频结构，导致计算成本高且冗余。
AI.method: 通过上采样层降低频率维度后，用iSTFT替代部分输出层，直接重构时域波形，减少高维谱图估计的冗余计算。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在三个HiFi-GAN变体上实现了更快、更轻量的模型，同时保持合理语音质量。
AI.conclusion: iSTFTNet通过显式引入iSTFT和结构化处理，有效降低了计算成本，为高效梅尔频谱声码器提供了新思路。

authors_text: Minghui Wu,Jia-Rui Lin,Xin-Hao Zhang
title: How human-robot collaboration impacts construction productivity: an agent-based multi-fidelity modeling approach
title_zh: 人机协作如何影响施工效率：基于代理的多保真度建模方法
abstract: Though construction robots have drawn attention in research and practice for decades, human-robot collaboration (HRC) remains important to conduct complex construction tasks. Considering its complexity and uniqueness, it is still unclear how HRC process will impact construction productivity. To this end, an agent-based (AB) multi-fidelity modeling approach is introduced to simulate and evaluate how HRC influences construction productivity. A high-fidelity model is first proposed for a scenario with one robot. Then, a low-fidelity model is established to extract key parameters that capture the inner relationship among scenarios. The multi-fidelity models work together to simulate complex scenarios. Simulation and experiements show that: 1) the proposed approach is feasible and flexible for simulation of complex HRC processes, and can cover multiple collaboration and interaction modes; 2) the influence of the supplement strategy is simple when there is only one robot, where lower Check Interval (CI) and higher Supplement Limit (SL) will improve productivity. But the influence becomes much more complicated when there are more robots due to the internal competition among robots for the limited time of workers; 3) the productivity per robot improves when there are more robots and workers, even if the human-robot ratio remains the same; 4) introducing proactive interaction between robots and workers could improve productivity significantly, up to 22% in our experiments, which further depends on the supplement strategy and the human-robot ratio. Overall, this research contributes an integrated approach to simulate and evaluate HRC's impacts on productivity as well as valuable insights on how to optimize HRC for better performance.
summary: Though construction robots have drawn attention in research and practice for decades, human-robot collaboration (HRC) remains important to conduct complex construction tasks. Considering its complexity and uniqueness, it is still unclear how HRC process will impact construction productivity. To this end, an agent-based (AB) multi-fidelity modeling approach is introduced to simulate and evaluate how HRC influences construction productivity. A high-fidelity model is first proposed for a scenario with one robot. Then, a low-fidelity model is established to extract key parameters that capture the inner relationship among scenarios. The multi-fidelity models work together to simulate complex scenarios. Simulation and experiements show that: 1) the proposed approach is feasible and flexible for simulation of complex HRC processes, and can cover multiple collaboration and interaction modes; 2) the influence of the supplement strategy is simple when there is only one robot, where lower Check Interval (CI) and higher Supplement Limit (SL) will improve productivity. But the influence becomes much more complicated when there are more robots due to the internal competition among robots for the limited time of workers; 3) the productivity per robot improves when there are more robots and workers, even if the human-robot ratio remains the same; 4) introducing proactive interaction between robots and workers could improve productivity significantly, up to 22% in our experiments, which further depends on the supplement strategy and the human-robot ratio. Overall, this research contributes an integrated approach to simulate and evaluate HRC's impacts on productivity as well as valuable insights on how to optimize HRC for better performance.
abstract_zh: 尽管建筑机器人几十年来在研究和实践中引起了人们的关注，但人机协作（HRC）对于执行复杂的建筑任务仍然很重要。考虑到其复杂性和独特性，热轧卷工艺将如何影响施工效率仍不清楚。为此，引入基于代理 (AB) 的多保真度建模方法来模拟和评估 HRC 如何影响施工生产率。首先针对只有一个机器人的场景提出了高保真模型。然后，建立低保真模型来提取捕获场景之间内在关系的关键参数。多保真度模型协同工作来模拟复杂的场景。仿真和实验表明：1）所提出的方法对于复杂HRC过程的仿真是可行和灵活的，并且可以覆盖多种协作和交互模式； 2）当只有一台机器人时，补充策略的影响很简单，较低的检查间隔（CI）和较高的补充限制（SL）将提高生产率。但当机器人数量较多时，由于机器人之间对工人有限时间的内部竞争，影响变得更加复杂； 3）当机器人和工人数量越多时，即使人机比例保持不变，每个机器人的生产率也会提高； 4）在机器人和工人之间引入主动交互可以显着提高生产率，在我们的实验中高达22％，这进一步取决于补充策略和人机比例。总体而言，这项研究提供了一种综合方法来模拟和评估 HRC 对生产力的影响，并就如何优化 HRC 以获得更好的性能提供了宝贵的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多保真度建模的智能体方法，用于模拟和评估人机协作（HRC）对建筑施工生产力的影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管建筑机器人研究已持续数十年，但人机协作对复杂施工任务生产力的具体影响仍不明确，亟需一种灵活的仿真方法来探索不同协作场景。
AI.method: 构建高保真模型模拟单机器人场景，低保真模型提取关键参数，通过多保真度模型协同模拟复杂场景，结合仿真与实验验证方法。
AI.result: 1) 该方法可灵活模拟多种协作模式；2) 单机器人时补充策略影响简单，但多机器人时因竞争关系变得复杂；3) 机器人与工人数量增加可提升单机器人生产力；4) 主动交互可使生产力提升最高达22%。
AI.conclusion: 研究提供了评估HRC生产力影响的集成方法，并揭示了优化协作策略的关键因素，如补充策略与人机比例的协同作用。

ai_content.conclusion: 研究提供了评估HRC生产力影响的集成方法，并揭示了优化协作策略的关键因素，如补充策略与人机比例的协同作用。

search_text: How human-robot collaboration impacts construction productivity: an agent-based multi-fidelity modeling approach 人机协作如何影响施工效率：基于代理的多保真度建模方法 Though construction robots have drawn attention in research and practice for decades, human-robot collaboration (HRC) remains important to conduct complex construction tasks. Considering its complexity and uniqueness, it is still unclear how HRC process will impact construction productivity. To this end, an agent-based (AB) multi-fidelity modeling approach is introduced to simulate and evaluate how HRC influences construction productivity. A high-fidelity model is first proposed for a scenario with one robot. Then, a low-fidelity model is established to extract key parameters that capture the inner relationship among scenarios. The multi-fidelity models work together to simulate complex scenarios. Simulation and experiements show that: 1) the proposed approach is feasible and flexible for simulation of complex HRC processes, and can cover multiple collaboration and interaction modes; 2) the influence of the supplement strategy is simple when there is only one robot, where lower Check Interval (CI) and higher Supplement Limit (SL) will improve productivity. But the influence becomes much more complicated when there are more robots due to the internal competition among robots for the limited time of workers; 3) the productivity per robot improves when there are more robots and workers, even if the human-robot ratio remains the same; 4) introducing proactive interaction between robots and workers could improve productivity significantly, up to 22% in our experiments, which further depends on the supplement strategy and the human-robot ratio. Overall, this research contributes an integrated approach to simulate and evaluate HRC's impacts on productivity as well as valuable insights on how to optimize HRC for better performance. 尽管建筑机器人几十年来在研究和实践中引起了人们的关注，但人机协作（HRC）对于执行复杂的建筑任务仍然很重要。考虑到其复杂性和独特性，热轧卷工艺将如何影响施工效率仍不清楚。为此，引入基于代理 (AB) 的多保真度建模方法来模拟和评估 HRC 如何影响施工生产率。首先针对只有一个机器人的场景提出了高保真模型。然后，建立低保真模型来提取捕获场景之间内在关系的关键参数。多保真度模型协同工作来模拟复杂的场景。仿真和实验表明：1）所提出的方法对于复杂HRC过程的仿真是可行和灵活的，并且可以覆盖多种协作和交互模式； 2）当只有一台机器人时，补充策略的影响很简单，较低的检查间隔（CI）和较高的补充限制（SL）将提高生产率。但当机器人数量较多时，由于机器人之间对工人有限时间的内部竞争，影响变得更加复杂； 3）当机器人和工人数量越多时，即使人机比例保持不变，每个机器人的生产率也会提高； 4）在机器人和工人之间引入主动交互可以显着提高生产率，在我们的实验中高达22％，这进一步取决于补充策略和人机比例。总体而言，这项研究提供了一种综合方法来模拟和评估 HRC 对生产力的影响，并就如何优化 HRC 以获得更好的性能提供了宝贵的见解。 本文提出一种基于多保真度建模的智能体方法，用于模拟和评估人机协作（HRC）对建筑施工生产力的影响。 Minghui Wu,Jia-Rui Lin,Xin-Hao Zhang cs.RO,cs.HC

authors_text: Hong Liu,Dong Wei,Donghuan Lu,Yuexiang Li,Kai Ma,Liansheng Wang,Yefeng Zheng
title: Simultaneous Alignment and Surface Regression Using Hybrid 2D-3D Networks for 3D Coherent Layer Segmentation of Retina OCT Images
title_zh: 使用混合 2D-3D 网络同时对齐和表面回归，实现视网膜 OCT 图像的 3D 相干层分割
abstract: Automated surface segmentation of retinal layer is important and challenging in analyzing optical coherence tomography (OCT). Recently, many deep learning based methods have been developed for this task and yield remarkable performance. However, due to large spatial gap and potential mismatch between the B-scans of OCT data, all of them are based on 2D segmentation of individual B-scans, which may loss the continuity information across the B-scans. In addition, 3D surface of the retina layers can provide more diagnostic information, which is crucial in quantitative image analysis. In this study, a novel framework based on hybrid 2D-3D convolutional neural networks (CNNs) is proposed to obtain continuous 3D retinal layer surfaces from OCT. The 2D features of individual B-scans are extracted by an encoder consisting of 2D convolutions. These 2D features are then used to produce the alignment displacement field and layer segmentation by two 3D decoders, which are coupled via a spatial transformer module. The entire framework is trained end-to-end. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first study that attempts 3D retinal layer segmentation in volumetric OCT images based on CNNs. Experiments on a publicly available dataset show that our framework achieves superior results to state-of-the-art 2D methods in terms of both layer segmentation accuracy and cross-B-scan 3D continuity, thus offering more clinical values than previous works.
summary: Automated surface segmentation of retinal layer is important and challenging in analyzing optical coherence tomography (OCT). Recently, many deep learning based methods have been developed for this task and yield remarkable performance. However, due to large spatial gap and potential mismatch between the B-scans of OCT data, all of them are based on 2D segmentation of individual B-scans, which may loss the continuity information across the B-scans. In addition, 3D surface of the retina layers can provide more diagnostic information, which is crucial in quantitative image analysis. In this study, a novel framework based on hybrid 2D-3D convolutional neural networks (CNNs) is proposed to obtain continuous 3D retinal layer surfaces from OCT. The 2D features of individual B-scans are extracted by an encoder consisting of 2D convolutions. These 2D features are then used to produce the alignment displacement field and layer segmentation by two 3D decoders, which are coupled via a spatial transformer module. The entire framework is trained end-to-end. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first study that attempts 3D retinal layer segmentation in volumetric OCT images based on CNNs. Experiments on a publicly available dataset show that our framework achieves superior results to state-of-the-art 2D methods in terms of both layer segmentation accuracy and cross-B-scan 3D continuity, thus offering more clinical values than previous works.
abstract_zh: 视网膜层的自动表面分割在分析光学相干断层扫描 (OCT) 时非常重要且具有挑战性。最近，针对此任务开发了许多基于深度学习的方法，并取得了显着的性能。然而，由于 OCT 数据的 B 扫描之间存在较大的空间间隙和潜在的不匹配，所有这些都是基于单个 B 扫描的 2D 分割，这可能会丢失 B 扫描之间的连续性信息。此外，视网膜层的 3D 表面可以提供更多的诊断信息，这对于定量图像分析至关重要。在本研究中，提出了一种基于混合 2D-3D 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的新颖框架，用于从 OCT 获取连续 3D 视网膜层表面。各个 B 扫描的 2D 特征由由 2D 卷积组成的编码器提取。然后，这些 2D 特征用于通过两个 3D 解码器产生对齐位移场和层分割，这两个解码器通过空间变换器模块耦合。整个框架是端到端训练的。据我们所知，这是第一个尝试基于 CNN 在体积 OCT 图像中进行 3D 视网膜层分割的研究。在公开数据集上进行的实验表明，我们的框架在层分割精度和跨 B 扫描 3D 连续性方面均取得了优于最先进的 2D 方法的结果，从而比以前的工作提供了更多的临床价值。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于混合2D-3D卷积神经网络的框架，用于从OCT图像中实现视网膜层的3D连贯分割。
AI.motivation: 现有方法基于单个B扫描的2D分割，导致跨B扫描的连续性信息丢失，且3D视网膜层表面能提供更关键的诊断信息。
AI.method: 通过2D卷积提取单个B扫描的特征，利用两个3D解码器结合空间变换模块生成对齐位移场和层分割，整体框架端到端训练。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上，该框架在层分割精度和跨B扫描3D连续性方面均优于现有2D方法，具有更高的临床价值。
AI.conclusion: 这是首个基于CNN的3D视网膜层分割研究，通过混合网络结构有效提升了分割精度和连续性。

authors_text: Nils Dengler,David Großklaus,Maren Bennewitz
title: Learning Goal-Oriented Non-Prehensile Pushing in Cluttered Scenes
title_zh: 在杂乱的场景中学习目标导向的非预制推送
comment: Accepted at the International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2022
comments: Accepted at the International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2022
abstract: Pushing objects through cluttered scenes is a challenging task, especially when the objects to be pushed have initially unknown dynamics and touching other entities has to be avoided to reduce the risk of damage. In this paper, we approach this problem by applying deep reinforcement learning to generate pushing actions for a robotic manipulator acting on a planar surface where objects have to be pushed to goal locations while avoiding other items in the same workspace. With the latent space learned from a depth image of the scene and other observations of the environment, such as contact information between the end effector and the object as well as distance to the goal, our framework is able to learn contact-rich pushing actions that avoid collisions with other objects. As the experimental results with a six degrees of freedom robotic arm show, our system is able to successfully push objects from start to end positions while avoiding nearby objects. Furthermore, we evaluate our learned policy in comparison to a state-of-the-art pushing controller for mobile robots and show that our agent performs better in terms of success rate, collisions with other objects, and continuous object contact in various scenarios.
summary: Pushing objects through cluttered scenes is a challenging task, especially when the objects to be pushed have initially unknown dynamics and touching other entities has to be avoided to reduce the risk of damage. In this paper, we approach this problem by applying deep reinforcement learning to generate pushing actions for a robotic manipulator acting on a planar surface where objects have to be pushed to goal locations while avoiding other items in the same workspace. With the latent space learned from a depth image of the scene and other observations of the environment, such as contact information between the end effector and the object as well as distance to the goal, our framework is able to learn contact-rich pushing actions that avoid collisions with other objects. As the experimental results with a six degrees of freedom robotic arm show, our system is able to successfully push objects from start to end positions while avoiding nearby objects. Furthermore, we evaluate our learned policy in comparison to a state-of-the-art pushing controller for mobile robots and show that our agent performs better in terms of success rate, collisions with other objects, and continuous object contact in various scenarios.
abstract_zh: 在杂乱的场景中推动物体是一项具有挑战性的任务，特别是当要推动的物体最初具有未知的动态并且必须避免接触其他实体以降低损坏风险时。在本文中，我们通过应用深度强化学习来解决这个问题，为作用在平面上的机器人操纵器生成推动动作，其中物体必须被推到目标位置，同时避开同一工作空间中的其他物体。通过从场景的深度图像和其他环境观察中学习到的潜在空间，例如末端执行器和物体之间的接触信息以及到目标的距离，我们的框架能够学习接触丰富的推动动作，从而避免与其他物体发生碰撞。正如六自由度机械臂的实验结果所示，我们的系统能够成功地将物体从开始位置推动到结束位置，同时避开附近的物体。此外，我们与最先进的移动机器人推动控制器相比，评估了我们学习的策略，并表明我们的代理在成功率、与其他物体的碰撞以及各种场景中的连续物体接触方面表现更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度强化学习的框架，用于在杂乱场景中通过非抓取式推挤操作将物体从起点推至目标位置。
AI.motivation: 在杂乱环境中推动物体时，物体动力学未知且需避免碰撞以减少损坏风险，传统方法难以有效解决该问题。
AI.method: 利用深度强化学习，结合场景深度图像、末端执行器接触信息及目标距离的潜在空间表征，学习避障的推挤策略。
AI.result: 六自由度机械臂实验表明，该系统能成功完成推挤任务，且在成功率、碰撞次数和持续接触性能上优于现有移动机器人推挤控制器。
AI.conclusion: 提出的深度强化学习框架有效解决了杂乱场景下的目标导向非抓取推挤问题，优于现有方法。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度强化学习的框架，用于在杂乱场景中通过非抓取式推挤操作将物体从起点推至目标位置。

search_text: Learning Goal-Oriented Non-Prehensile Pushing in Cluttered Scenes 在杂乱的场景中学习目标导向的非预制推送 Pushing objects through cluttered scenes is a challenging task, especially when the objects to be pushed have initially unknown dynamics and touching other entities has to be avoided to reduce the risk of damage. In this paper, we approach this problem by applying deep reinforcement learning to generate pushing actions for a robotic manipulator acting on a planar surface where objects have to be pushed to goal locations while avoiding other items in the same workspace. With the latent space learned from a depth image of the scene and other observations of the environment, such as contact information between the end effector and the object as well as distance to the goal, our framework is able to learn contact-rich pushing actions that avoid collisions with other objects. As the experimental results with a six degrees of freedom robotic arm show, our system is able to successfully push objects from start to end positions while avoiding nearby objects. Furthermore, we evaluate our learned policy in comparison to a state-of-the-art pushing controller for mobile robots and show that our agent performs better in terms of success rate, collisions with other objects, and continuous object contact in various scenarios. 在杂乱的场景中推动物体是一项具有挑战性的任务，特别是当要推动的物体最初具有未知的动态并且必须避免接触其他实体以降低损坏风险时。在本文中，我们通过应用深度强化学习来解决这个问题，为作用在平面上的机器人操纵器生成推动动作，其中物体必须被推到目标位置，同时避开同一工作空间中的其他物体。通过从场景的深度图像和其他环境观察中学习到的潜在空间，例如末端执行器和物体之间的接触信息以及到目标的距离，我们的框架能够学习接触丰富的推动动作，从而避免与其他物体发生碰撞。正如六自由度机械臂的实验结果所示，我们的系统能够成功地将物体从开始位置推动到结束位置，同时避开附近的物体。此外，我们与最先进的移动机器人推动控制器相比，评估了我们学习的策略，并表明我们的代理在成功率、与其他物体的碰撞以及各种场景中的连续物体接触方面表现更好。 本文提出了一种基于深度强化学习的框架，用于在杂乱场景中通过非抓取式推挤操作将物体从起点推至目标位置。 Nils Dengler,David Großklaus,Maren Bennewitz cs.RO

authors_text: Dou Hu,Xiaolong Hou,Lingwei Wei,Lianxin Jiang,Yang Mo
title: MM-DFN: Multimodal Dynamic Fusion Network for Emotion Recognition in Conversations
title_zh: MM-DFN：用于对话中情绪识别的多模态动态融合网络
abstract: Emotion Recognition in Conversations (ERC) has considerable prospects for developing empathetic machines. For multimodal ERC, it is vital to understand context and fuse modality information in conversations. Recent graph-based fusion methods generally aggregate multimodal information by exploring unimodal and cross-modal interactions in a graph. However, they accumulate redundant information at each layer, limiting the context understanding between modalities. In this paper, we propose a novel Multimodal Dynamic Fusion Network (MM-DFN) to recognize emotions by fully understanding multimodal conversational context. Specifically, we design a new graph-based dynamic fusion module to fuse multimodal contextual features in a conversation. The module reduces redundancy and enhances complementarity between modalities by capturing the dynamics of contextual information in different semantic spaces. Extensive experiments on two public benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of MM-DFN.
summary: Emotion Recognition in Conversations (ERC) has considerable prospects for developing empathetic machines. For multimodal ERC, it is vital to understand context and fuse modality information in conversations. Recent graph-based fusion methods generally aggregate multimodal information by exploring unimodal and cross-modal interactions in a graph. However, they accumulate redundant information at each layer, limiting the context understanding between modalities. In this paper, we propose a novel Multimodal Dynamic Fusion Network (MM-DFN) to recognize emotions by fully understanding multimodal conversational context. Specifically, we design a new graph-based dynamic fusion module to fuse multimodal contextual features in a conversation. The module reduces redundancy and enhances complementarity between modalities by capturing the dynamics of contextual information in different semantic spaces. Extensive experiments on two public benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of MM-DFN.
abstract_zh: 对话中的情绪识别（ERC）对于开发共情机器具有广阔的前景。对于多模态 ERC，理解上下文并融合对话中的模态信息至关重要。最近的基于图的融合方法通常通过探索图中的单模态和跨模态交互来聚合多模态信息。然而，它们在每一层积累​​冗余信息，限制了模态之间的上下文理解。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的多模态动态融合网络（MM-DFN），通过充分理解多模态对话上下文来识别情绪。具体来说，我们设计了一个新的基于图的动态融合模块来融合对话中的多模态上下文特征。该模块通过捕获不同语义空间中上下文信息的动态来减少冗余并增强模态之间的互补性。对两个公共基准数据集的大量实验证明了 MM-DFN 的有效性和优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态动态融合网络（MM-DFN），用于通过充分理解多模态对话上下文来识别对话中的情绪。
AI.motivation: 现有基于图的融合方法在融合多模态信息时存在冗余积累问题，限制了模态间的上下文理解能力，需设计更高效的融合机制。
AI.method: 设计基于图的动态融合模块，通过捕捉不同语义空间中的上下文动态信息，减少冗余并增强模态间互补性。
AI.result: 在两个公开基准数据集上的实验验证了MM-DFN的有效性和优越性。
AI.conclusion: MM-DFN通过动态融合模块显著提升了多模态对话情绪识别的性能，为开发共情机器提供了新方法。

authors_text: Xi Chen,Jiahuan Lv,Dehua Feng,Xuanqin Mou,Ling Bai,Shu Zhang,Zhiguo Zhou
title: AutoMO-Mixer: An automated multi-objective Mixer model for balanced, safe and robust prediction in medicine
title_zh: AutoMO-Mixer：一种自动化多目标混合器模型，用于平衡、安全和稳健的医学预测
abstract: Accurately identifying patient's status through medical images plays an important role in diagnosis and treatment. Artificial intelligence (AI), especially the deep learning, has achieved great success in many fields. However, more reliable AI model is needed in image guided diagnosis and therapy. To achieve this goal, developing a balanced, safe and robust model with a unified framework is desirable. In this study, a new unified model termed as automated multi-objective Mixer (AutoMO-Mixer) model was developed, which utilized a recent developed multiple layer perceptron Mixer (MLP-Mixer) as base. To build a balanced model, sensitivity and specificity were considered as the objective functions simultaneously in training stage. Meanwhile, a new evidential reasoning based on entropy was developed to achieve a safe and robust model in testing stage. The experiment on an optical coherence tomography dataset demonstrated that AutoMO-Mixer can obtain safer, more balanced, and robust results compared with MLP-Mixer and other available models.
summary: Accurately identifying patient's status through medical images plays an important role in diagnosis and treatment. Artificial intelligence (AI), especially the deep learning, has achieved great success in many fields. However, more reliable AI model is needed in image guided diagnosis and therapy. To achieve this goal, developing a balanced, safe and robust model with a unified framework is desirable. In this study, a new unified model termed as automated multi-objective Mixer (AutoMO-Mixer) model was developed, which utilized a recent developed multiple layer perceptron Mixer (MLP-Mixer) as base. To build a balanced model, sensitivity and specificity were considered as the objective functions simultaneously in training stage. Meanwhile, a new evidential reasoning based on entropy was developed to achieve a safe and robust model in testing stage. The experiment on an optical coherence tomography dataset demonstrated that AutoMO-Mixer can obtain safer, more balanced, and robust results compared with MLP-Mixer and other available models.
abstract_zh: 通过医学图像准确识别患者的状态对于诊断和治疗具有重要作用。人工智能（AI），特别是深度学习，在许多领域取得了巨大成功。然而，图像引导诊断和治疗需要更可靠的人工智能模型。为了实现这一目标，需要开发一个具有统一框架的平衡、安全和鲁棒的模型。在本研究中，开发了一种新的统一模型，称为自动多目标混合器（AutoMO-Mixer）模型，该模型利用最近开发的多层感知器混合器（MLP-Mixer）作为基础。为了建立一个平衡的模型，在训练阶段同时考虑敏感性和特异性作为目标函数。同时，开发了一种基于熵的新证据推理，以在测试阶段实现安全稳健的模型。在光学相干断层扫描数据集上的实验表明，与 MLP-Mixer 和其他可用模型相比，AutoMO-Mixer 可以获得更安全、更平衡、更稳健的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为AutoMO-Mixer的自动化多目标混合模型，旨在医学图像分析中实现更安全、平衡且鲁棒的预测。
AI.motivation: 现有AI模型在医学图像引导诊断中存在可靠性不足的问题，需开发兼顾平衡性、安全性与鲁棒性的统一框架。
AI.method: 基于MLP-Mixer架构，训练阶段同时优化灵敏度和特异性作为目标函数；测试阶段引入基于熵的证据推理机制以提升模型安全性与鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在光学相干断层扫描数据集上，AutoMO-Mixer相较MLP-Mixer及其他模型展现出更优的安全性、平衡性与鲁棒性表现。
AI.conclusion: AutoMO-Mixer为医学图像分析提供了可靠AI模型的新思路，验证了多目标优化与证据推理结合的有效性。

authors_text: Max Lodel,Bruno Brito,Álvaro Serra-Gómez,Laura Ferranti,Robert Babuška,Javier Alonso-Mora
title: Where to Look Next: Learning Viewpoint Recommendations for Informative Trajectory Planning
title_zh: 下一步看哪里：信息性轨迹规划的学习观点建议
abstract: Search missions require motion planning and navigation methods for information gathering that continuously replan based on new observations of the robot's surroundings. Current methods for information gathering, such as Monte Carlo Tree Search, are capable of reasoning over long horizons, but they are computationally expensive. An alternative for fast online execution is to train, offline, an information gathering policy, which indirectly reasons about the information value of new observations. However, these policies lack safety guarantees and do not account for the robot dynamics. To overcome these limitations we train an information-aware policy via deep reinforcement learning, that guides a receding-horizon trajectory optimization planner. In particular, the policy continuously recommends a reference viewpoint to the local planner, such that the resulting dynamically feasible and collision-free trajectories lead to observations that maximize the information gain and reduce the uncertainty about the environment. In simulation tests in previously unseen environments, our method consistently outperforms greedy next-best-view policies and achieves competitive performance compared to Monte Carlo Tree Search, in terms of information gains and coverage time, with a reduction in execution time by three orders of magnitude.
summary: Search missions require motion planning and navigation methods for information gathering that continuously replan based on new observations of the robot's surroundings. Current methods for information gathering, such as Monte Carlo Tree Search, are capable of reasoning over long horizons, but they are computationally expensive. An alternative for fast online execution is to train, offline, an information gathering policy, which indirectly reasons about the information value of new observations. However, these policies lack safety guarantees and do not account for the robot dynamics. To overcome these limitations we train an information-aware policy via deep reinforcement learning, that guides a receding-horizon trajectory optimization planner. In particular, the policy continuously recommends a reference viewpoint to the local planner, such that the resulting dynamically feasible and collision-free trajectories lead to observations that maximize the information gain and reduce the uncertainty about the environment. In simulation tests in previously unseen environments, our method consistently outperforms greedy next-best-view policies and achieves competitive performance compared to Monte Carlo Tree Search, in terms of information gains and coverage time, with a reduction in execution time by three orders of magnitude.
abstract_zh: 搜索任务需要运动规划和导航方法来收集信息，并根据对机器人周围环境的新观察不断重新规划。当前的信息收集方法，例如蒙特卡罗树搜索，能够进行长范围的推理，但计算成本很高。快速在线执行的另一种选择是离线训练信息收集策略，该策略间接推断新观察结果的信息价值。然而，这些政策缺乏安全保障，也没有考虑到机器人的动态。为了克服这些限制，我们通过深度强化学习训练信息感知策略，指导后退轨迹优化规划器。特别是，该政策不断向当地规划者推荐参考观点，从而产生动态可行且无碰撞的轨迹，从而产生最大化信息增益并减少环境不确定性的观测结果。在以前未见过的环境中的模拟测试中，我们的方法始终优于贪婪的次佳视图策略，并且在信息增益和覆盖时间方面与蒙特卡罗树搜索相比实现了有竞争力的性能，执行时间减少了三个数量级。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的信息感知策略，结合轨迹优化规划器，实现动态可行且无碰撞的轨迹规划，以最大化环境信息增益。
AI.motivation: 现有信息采集方法如蒙特卡洛树搜索计算成本高，而离线训练策略缺乏安全性和动力学约束，需开发兼顾信息价值与安全性的实时规划方法。
AI.method: 通过深度强化学习训练信息感知策略，指导滚动时域轨迹优化规划器连续推荐参考视角，确保轨迹动态可行且无碰撞，同时最大化信息增益。
AI.result: 仿真测试显示，该方法在未知环境中信息增益和覆盖时间优于贪心策略，执行时间较蒙特卡洛树搜索缩短三个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过结合深度强化学习与轨迹优化，在保证安全性的同时显著提升信息采集效率，为实时在线规划提供有效解决方案。

authors_text: Junlong Li,Yiheng Xu,Tengchao Lv,Lei Cui,Cha Zhang,Furu Wei
title: DiT: Self-supervised Pre-training for Document Image Transformer
title_zh: DiT：文档图像转换器的自监督预训练
abstract: Image Transformer has recently achieved significant progress for natural image understanding, either using supervised (ViT, DeiT, etc.) or self-supervised (BEiT, MAE, etc.) pre-training techniques. In this paper, we propose \textbf{DiT}, a self-supervised pre-trained \textbf{D}ocument \textbf{I}mage \textbf{T}ransformer model using large-scale unlabeled text images for Document AI tasks, which is essential since no supervised counterparts ever exist due to the lack of human-labeled document images. We leverage DiT as the backbone network in a variety of vision-based Document AI tasks, including document image classification, document layout analysis, table detection as well as text detection for OCR. Experiment results have illustrated that the self-supervised pre-trained DiT model achieves new state-of-the-art results on these downstream tasks, e.g. document image classification (91.11 $\rightarrow$ 92.69), document layout analysis (91.0 $\rightarrow$ 94.9), table detection (94.23 $\rightarrow$ 96.55) and text detection for OCR (93.07 $\rightarrow$ 94.29). The code and pre-trained models are publicly available at \url{https://aka.ms/msdit}.
summary: Image Transformer has recently achieved significant progress for natural image understanding, either using supervised (ViT, DeiT, etc.) or self-supervised (BEiT, MAE, etc.) pre-training techniques. In this paper, we propose \textbf{DiT}, a self-supervised pre-trained \textbf{D}ocument \textbf{I}mage \textbf{T}ransformer model using large-scale unlabeled text images for Document AI tasks, which is essential since no supervised counterparts ever exist due to the lack of human-labeled document images. We leverage DiT as the backbone network in a variety of vision-based Document AI tasks, including document image classification, document layout analysis, table detection as well as text detection for OCR. Experiment results have illustrated that the self-supervised pre-trained DiT model achieves new state-of-the-art results on these downstream tasks, e.g. document image classification (91.11 $\rightarrow$ 92.69), document layout analysis (91.0 $\rightarrow$ 94.9), table detection (94.23 $\rightarrow$ 96.55) and text detection for OCR (93.07 $\rightarrow$ 94.29). The code and pre-trained models are publicly available at \url{https://aka.ms/msdit}.
abstract_zh: Image Transformer 最近在自然图像理解方面取得了重大进展，无论是使用监督（ViT、DeiT 等）还是自监督（BEiT、MAE 等）预训练技术。在本文中，我们提出了 \textbf{DiT}，这是一种自监督预训练 \textbf{D}ocument \textbf{I}mage \textbf{T}ransformer 模型，使用大规模未标记文本图像执行文档 AI 任务，这是至关重要的，因为由于缺乏人工标记的文档图像，不存在有监督的对应物。我们利用 DiT 作为各种基于视觉的文档 AI 任务的主干网络，包括文档图像分类、文档布局分析、表格检测以及 OCR 文本检测。实验结果表明，自监督预训练 DiT 模型在这些下游任务上取得了新的最先进的结果，例如文档图像分类 (91.11 $\rightarrow$ 92.69)、文档布局分析 (91.0 $\rightarrow$ 94.9)、表格检测 (94.23 $\rightarrow$ 96.55) 和 OCR 文本检测 (93.07 $\rightarrow$ 94.29)。代码和预训练模型可在 \url{https://aka.ms/msdit} 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DiT模型，通过自监督预训练方法提升文档图像处理任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 文档图像处理任务缺乏人工标注数据，传统监督学习方法难以应用，需依赖自监督预训练技术。
AI.method: 基于大规模未标注文本图像，设计自监督预训练的文档图像Transformer模型DiT，并将其作为多种视觉文档AI任务的主干网络。
AI.result: DiT在文档分类、布局分析、表格检测及OCR文本检测任务中均取得新SOTA结果，如分类准确率提升1.58个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 自监督预训练的DiT模型有效解决了文档AI领域标注数据匮乏的问题，显著提升了多项下游任务性能。

authors_text: Bin Chen,Ran Wang,Di Ming,Xin Feng
title: ViT-P: Rethinking Data-efficient Vision Transformers from Locality
title_zh: ViT-P：从本地重新思考数据高效的视觉转换器
abstract: Recent advances of Transformers have brought new trust to computer vision tasks. However, on small dataset, Transformers is hard to train and has lower performance than convolutional neural networks. We make vision transformers as data-efficient as convolutional neural networks by introducing multi-focal attention bias. Inspired by the attention distance in a well-trained ViT, we constrain the self-attention of ViT to have multi-scale localized receptive field. The size of receptive field is adaptable during training so that optimal configuration can be learned. We provide empirical evidence that proper constrain of receptive field can reduce the amount of training data for vision transformers. On Cifar100, our ViT-P Base model achieves the state-of-the-art accuracy (83.16%) trained from scratch. We also perform analysis on ImageNet to show our method does not lose accuracy on large data sets.
summary: Recent advances of Transformers have brought new trust to computer vision tasks. However, on small dataset, Transformers is hard to train and has lower performance than convolutional neural networks. We make vision transformers as data-efficient as convolutional neural networks by introducing multi-focal attention bias. Inspired by the attention distance in a well-trained ViT, we constrain the self-attention of ViT to have multi-scale localized receptive field. The size of receptive field is adaptable during training so that optimal configuration can be learned. We provide empirical evidence that proper constrain of receptive field can reduce the amount of training data for vision transformers. On Cifar100, our ViT-P Base model achieves the state-of-the-art accuracy (83.16%) trained from scratch. We also perform analysis on ImageNet to show our method does not lose accuracy on large data sets.
abstract_zh: Transformers 的最新进展为计算机视觉任务带来了新的信任。然而，在小数据集上，Transformers 很难训练，并且性能低于卷积神经网络。通过引入多焦点注意力偏差，我们使视觉转换器与卷积神经网络一样具有数据效率。受到训练有素的 ViT 中注意力距离的启发，我们将 ViT 的自注意力限制为具有多尺度局部感受野。感受野的大小在训练过程中是可调整的，以便可以学习最佳配置。我们提供的经验证据表明，适当的感受野约束可以减少视觉变换器的训练数据量。在 Cifar100 上，我们的 ViT-P Base 模型从头开始训练，达到了最先进的准确率 (83.16%)。我们还对 ImageNet 进行了分析，以表明我们的方法在大数据集上不会失去准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ViT-P方法，通过引入多焦点注意力偏差和可适应的多尺度局部感受野约束，提升视觉Transformer在小数据集上的数据效率。
AI.motivation: Transformer在小数据集上训练困难且性能低于卷积神经网络，需改进其数据效率以适应实际应用场景。
AI.method: 设计多焦点注意力偏差机制，约束ViT的自注意力模块形成多尺度局部感受野，并在训练过程中动态调整感受野大小。
AI.result: 在CIFAR100数据集上，ViT-P Base模型从零训练达到83.16%的最先进准确率；在ImageNet上保持原有精度，验证方法普适性。
AI.conclusion: 通过局部感受野约束，ViT-P显著提升了视觉Transformer的数据效率，同时保持对大规模数据集的兼容性，为小样本场景提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出ViT-P方法，通过引入多焦点注意力偏差和可适应的多尺度局部感受野约束，提升视觉Transformer在小数据集上的数据效率。
ai_content.motivation: Transformer在小数据集上训练困难且性能低于卷积神经网络，需改进其数据效率以适应实际应用场景。
ai_content.method: 设计多焦点注意力偏差机制，约束ViT的自注意力模块形成多尺度局部感受野，并在训练过程中动态调整感受野大小。
ai_content.result: 在CIFAR100数据集上，ViT-P Base模型从零训练达到83.16%的最先进准确率；在ImageNet上保持原有精度，验证方法普适性。
ai_content.conclusion: 通过局部感受野约束，ViT-P显著提升了视觉Transformer的数据效率，同时保持对大规模数据集的兼容性，为小样本场景提供新思路。

search_text: ViT-P: Rethinking Data-efficient Vision Transformers from Locality ViT-P：从本地重新思考数据高效的视觉转换器 Recent advances of Transformers have brought new trust to computer vision tasks. However, on small dataset, Transformers is hard to train and has lower performance than convolutional neural networks. We make vision transformers as data-efficient as convolutional neural networks by introducing multi-focal attention bias. Inspired by the attention distance in a well-trained ViT, we constrain the self-attention of ViT to have multi-scale localized receptive field. The size of receptive field is adaptable during training so that optimal configuration can be learned. We provide empirical evidence that proper constrain of receptive field can reduce the amount of training data for vision transformers. On Cifar100, our ViT-P Base model achieves the state-of-the-art accuracy (83.16%) trained from scratch. We also perform analysis on ImageNet to show our method does not lose accuracy on large data sets. Transformers 的最新进展为计算机视觉任务带来了新的信任。然而，在小数据集上，Transformers 很难训练，并且性能低于卷积神经网络。通过引入多焦点注意力偏差，我们使视觉转换器与卷积神经网络一样具有数据效率。受到训练有素的 ViT 中注意力距离的启发，我们将 ViT 的自注意力限制为具有多尺度局部感受野。感受野的大小在训练过程中是可调整的，以便可以学习最佳配置。我们提供的经验证据表明，适当的感受野约束可以减少视觉变换器的训练数据量。在 Cifar100 上，我们的 ViT-P Base 模型从头开始训练，达到了最先进的准确率 (83.16%)。我们还对 ImageNet 进行了分析，以表明我们的方法在大数据集上不会失去准确性。 本文提出ViT-P方法，通过引入多焦点注意力偏差和可适应的多尺度局部感受野约束，提升视觉Transformer在小数据集上的数据效率。 Bin Chen,Ran Wang,Di Ming,Xin Feng cs.CV

authors_text: Rui Fan,Sicen Guo,Li Wang,Mohammud Junaid Bocus
title: Computer-Aided Road Inspection: Systems and Algorithms
title_zh: 计算机辅助道路检查：系统和算法
abstract: Road damage is an inconvenience and a safety hazard, severely affecting vehicle condition, driving comfort, and traffic safety. The traditional manual visual road inspection process is pricey, dangerous, exhausting, and cumbersome. Also, manual road inspection results are qualitative and subjective, as they depend entirely on the inspector's personal experience. Therefore, there is an ever-increasing need for automated road inspection systems. This chapter first compares the five most common road damage types. Then, 2-D/3-D road imaging systems are discussed. Finally, state-of-the-art machine vision and intelligence-based road damage detection algorithms are introduced.
summary: Road damage is an inconvenience and a safety hazard, severely affecting vehicle condition, driving comfort, and traffic safety. The traditional manual visual road inspection process is pricey, dangerous, exhausting, and cumbersome. Also, manual road inspection results are qualitative and subjective, as they depend entirely on the inspector's personal experience. Therefore, there is an ever-increasing need for automated road inspection systems. This chapter first compares the five most common road damage types. Then, 2-D/3-D road imaging systems are discussed. Finally, state-of-the-art machine vision and intelligence-based road damage detection algorithms are introduced.
abstract_zh: 道路损坏不仅带来不便，而且存在安全隐患，严重影响车辆状况、驾驶舒适性和交通安全。传统的手动目视道路检查过程成本高昂、危险、劳累且繁琐。此外，手动道路检查结果是定性的和主观的，因为它们完全取决于检查员的个人经验。因此，对自动道路检查系统的需求不断增加。本章首先比较了五种最常见的道路损坏类型。然后，讨论了 2-D/3-D 道路成像系统。最后，介绍了最先进的机器视觉和基于智能的道路损坏检测算法。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了计算机辅助道路检测的系统和算法，旨在解决传统人工检测的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统人工道路检测存在成本高、危险、主观性强等问题，亟需自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 比较五种常见道路损坏类型，分析2D/3D成像系统，并综述基于机器视觉与智能算法的检测技术。
AI.result: 系统梳理了道路检测技术现状，为自动化检测提供了方法论和算法参考。
AI.conclusion: 自动化检测系统可提升效率与准确性，未来需进一步优化算法与硬件集成。

authors_text: Lawrence Schobs,Andrew J. Swift,Haiping Lu
title: Uncertainty Estimation for Heatmap-based Landmark Localization
title_zh: 基于热图的地标定位的不确定性估计
comment: 14 pages, in IEEE Transactions on Medical Imaging, 2022
comments: 14 pages, in IEEE Transactions on Medical Imaging, 2022
abstract: Automatic anatomical landmark localization has made great strides by leveraging deep learning methods in recent years. The ability to quantify the uncertainty of these predictions is a vital component needed for these methods to be adopted in clinical settings, where it is imperative that erroneous predictions are caught and corrected. We propose Quantile Binning, a data-driven method to categorize predictions by uncertainty with estimated error bounds. Our framework can be applied to any continuous uncertainty measure, allowing straightforward identification of the best subset of predictions with accompanying estimated error bounds. We facilitate easy comparison between uncertainty measures by constructing two evaluation metrics derived from Quantile Binning. We compare and contrast three epistemic uncertainty measures (two baselines, and a proposed method combining aspects of the two), derived from two heatmap-based landmark localization model paradigms (U-Net and patch-based). We show results across three datasets, including a publicly available Cephalometric dataset. We illustrate how filtering out gross mispredictions caught in our Quantile Bins significantly improves the proportion of predictions under an acceptable error threshold. Finally, we demonstrate that Quantile Binning remains effective on landmarks with high aleatoric uncertainty caused by inherent landmark ambiguity, and offer recommendations on which uncertainty measure to use and how to use it. The code and data are available at https://github.com/schobs/qbin.
summary: Automatic anatomical landmark localization has made great strides by leveraging deep learning methods in recent years. The ability to quantify the uncertainty of these predictions is a vital component needed for these methods to be adopted in clinical settings, where it is imperative that erroneous predictions are caught and corrected. We propose Quantile Binning, a data-driven method to categorize predictions by uncertainty with estimated error bounds. Our framework can be applied to any continuous uncertainty measure, allowing straightforward identification of the best subset of predictions with accompanying estimated error bounds. We facilitate easy comparison between uncertainty measures by constructing two evaluation metrics derived from Quantile Binning. We compare and contrast three epistemic uncertainty measures (two baselines, and a proposed method combining aspects of the two), derived from two heatmap-based landmark localization model paradigms (U-Net and patch-based). We show results across three datasets, including a publicly available Cephalometric dataset. We illustrate how filtering out gross mispredictions caught in our Quantile Bins significantly improves the proportion of predictions under an acceptable error threshold. Finally, we demonstrate that Quantile Binning remains effective on landmarks with high aleatoric uncertainty caused by inherent landmark ambiguity, and offer recommendations on which uncertainty measure to use and how to use it. The code and data are available at https://github.com/schobs/qbin.
abstract_zh: 近年来，利用深度学习方法，自动解剖标志定位取得了长足的进步。量化这些预测的不确定性的能力是这些方法在临床环境中采用所需的重要组成部分，在临床环境中，必须捕获并纠正错误的预测。我们提出了分位数分箱，这是一种数据驱动的方法，可以根据估计误差范围的不确定性对预测进行分类。我们的框架可以应用于任何连续的不确定性测量，允许直接识别最佳预测子集以及伴随的估计误差范围。我们通过构建从分位数分箱派生的两个评估指标来促进不确定性度量之间的轻松比较。我们比较和对比了从两个基于热图的地标定位模型范例（U-Net 和基于补丁的）派生的三种认知不确定性度量（两个基线，以及结合两者的建议方法）。我们展示了三个数据集的结果，包括公开可用的头影测量数据集。我们说明了如何过滤掉分位数箱中捕获的严重错误预测，从而显着提高可接受误差阈值下的预测比例。最后，我们证明分位数分箱对于由于固有的地标模糊性而引起的高度任意不确定性的地标仍然有效，并就使用哪种不确定性度量以及如何使用它提供建议。代码和数据可在 https://github.com/schobs/qbin 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于分位数分箱的数据驱动方法，用于量化热图引导的解剖标志点定位中的不确定性，并评估不同不确定性度量的有效性。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习在解剖标志点定位中取得进展，但临床应用需要量化预测不确定性以识别和修正错误预测，现有方法在处理高模糊性标志点时存在不足。
AI.method: 提出分位数分箱（Quantile Binning）框架，通过估计误差范围对预测进行分类，并构建两种评估指标比较三种认识不确定性度量（含新方法），在U-Net和基于补丁的模型上进行验证。
AI.result: 实验显示分位数分箱能有效过滤粗略错误预测，提升预测精度；方法在高模糊性标志点上仍保持有效性，且不同数据集验证了其普适性。
AI.conclusion: 分位数分箱为不确定性估计提供有效工具，推荐结合具体任务选择不确定性度量，并通过分箱过滤提升临床可靠性。

authors_text: Abdul Hannan Khan,Mohsin Munir,Ludger van Elst,Andreas Dengel
title: F2DNet: Fast Focal Detection Network for Pedestrian Detection
title_zh: F2DNet：用于行人检测的快速焦点检测网络
abstract: Two-stage detectors are state-of-the-art in object detection as well as pedestrian detection. However, the current two-stage detectors are inefficient as they do bounding box regression in multiple steps i.e. in region proposal networks and bounding box heads. Also, the anchor-based region proposal networks are computationally expensive to train. We propose F2DNet, a novel two-stage detection architecture which eliminates redundancy of current two-stage detectors by replacing the region proposal network with our focal detection network and bounding box head with our fast suppression head. We benchmark F2DNet on top pedestrian detection datasets, thoroughly compare it against the existing state-of-the-art detectors and conduct cross dataset evaluation to test the generalizability of our model to unseen data. Our F2DNet achieves 8.7\%, 2.2\%, and 6.1\% MR-2 on City Persons, Caltech Pedestrian, and Euro City Person datasets respectively when trained on a single dataset and reaches 20.4\% and 26.2\% MR-2 in heavy occlusion setting of Caltech Pedestrian and City Persons datasets when using progressive fine-tunning. Furthermore, F2DNet have significantly lesser inference time compared to the current state-of-the-art. Code and trained models will be available at https://github.com/AbdulHannanKhan/F2DNet.
summary: Two-stage detectors are state-of-the-art in object detection as well as pedestrian detection. However, the current two-stage detectors are inefficient as they do bounding box regression in multiple steps i.e. in region proposal networks and bounding box heads. Also, the anchor-based region proposal networks are computationally expensive to train. We propose F2DNet, a novel two-stage detection architecture which eliminates redundancy of current two-stage detectors by replacing the region proposal network with our focal detection network and bounding box head with our fast suppression head. We benchmark F2DNet on top pedestrian detection datasets, thoroughly compare it against the existing state-of-the-art detectors and conduct cross dataset evaluation to test the generalizability of our model to unseen data. Our F2DNet achieves 8.7\%, 2.2\%, and 6.1\% MR-2 on City Persons, Caltech Pedestrian, and Euro City Person datasets respectively when trained on a single dataset and reaches 20.4\% and 26.2\% MR-2 in heavy occlusion setting of Caltech Pedestrian and City Persons datasets when using progressive fine-tunning. Furthermore, F2DNet have significantly lesser inference time compared to the current state-of-the-art. Code and trained models will be available at https://github.com/AbdulHannanKhan/F2DNet.
abstract_zh: 两级探测器在物体检测和行人检测方面是最先进的。然而，当前的两级检测器效率低下，因为它们在多个步骤中进行边界框回归，即在区域提议网络和边界框头中。此外，基于锚的区域提议网络的训练计算成本很高。我们提出了 F2DNet，一种新颖的两级检测架构，通过用我们的焦点检测网络替换区域提议网络，用我们的快速抑制头替换边界框头，消除了当前两级检测器的冗余。我们在顶级行人检测数据集上对 F2DNet 进行基准测试，将其与现有最先进的检测器进行彻底比较，并进行跨数据集评估，以测试我们的模型对未见过的数据的泛化能力。当在单个数据集上训练时，我们的 F2DNet 在 City Persons、Caltech Pedestrian 和 Euro City Person 数据集上分别实现了 8.7\%、2.2\% 和 6.1\% MR-2，并且在使用渐进式微调时，在 Caltech Pedestrian 和 City Persons 数据集的重度遮挡设置中达到 20.4\% 和 26.2\% MR-2。此外，与当前最先进的技术相比，F2DNet 的推理时间显着缩短。代码和训练模型将在 https://github.com/AbdulHannanKhan/F2DNet 上提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为F2DNet的新型两阶段检测架构，用于行人检测。
AI.motivation: 当前的两阶段检测器在行人检测任务中效率较低，因为它们在多个步骤中进行边界框回归，且基于锚点的区域建议网络训练计算成本较高。
AI.method: 本文通过用焦点检测网络替换区域建议网络，并用快速抑制头替换边界框头，消除了现有两阶段检测器的冗余部分。
AI.result: F2DNet在City Persons、Caltech Pedestrian和Euro City Person数据集上分别达到了8.7%、2.2%和6.1%的MR-2指标，并在遮挡严重的场景下表现出色。此外，F2DNet的推理时间显著少于当前最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: F2DNet在保持高检测精度的同时显著提升了检测效率，适用于各种行人检测场景。

authors_text: Tian Huang,Jun Xu,Tao Luo,Xiaozhe Gu,Rick Goh,Weng-Fai Wong
title: Benchmarking Quantum(-inspired) Annealing Hardware on Practical Use Cases
title_zh: 在实际用例中对量子（启发）退火硬件进行基准测试
abstract: Quantum(-inspired) annealers show promise in solving combinatorial optimisation problems in practice. There has been extensive researches demonstrating the utility of D-Wave quantum annealer and quantum-inspired annealer, i.e., Fujitsu Digital Annealer on various applications, but few works are comparing these platforms. In this paper, we benchmark quantum(-inspired) annealers with three combinatorial optimisation problems ranging from generic scientific problems to complex problems in practical use. In the case where the problem size goes beyond the capacity of a quantum(-inspired) computer, we evaluate them in the context of decomposition. Experiments suggest that both annealers are effective on problems with small size and simple settings, but lose their utility when facing problems in practical size and settings. Decomposition methods extend the scalability of annealers, but they are still far away from practical use. Based on the experiments and comparison, we discuss the advantages and limitations of quantum(-inspired) annealers, as well as the research directions that may improve the utility and scalability of the these emerging computing technologies.
summary: Quantum(-inspired) annealers show promise in solving combinatorial optimisation problems in practice. There has been extensive researches demonstrating the utility of D-Wave quantum annealer and quantum-inspired annealer, i.e., Fujitsu Digital Annealer on various applications, but few works are comparing these platforms. In this paper, we benchmark quantum(-inspired) annealers with three combinatorial optimisation problems ranging from generic scientific problems to complex problems in practical use. In the case where the problem size goes beyond the capacity of a quantum(-inspired) computer, we evaluate them in the context of decomposition. Experiments suggest that both annealers are effective on problems with small size and simple settings, but lose their utility when facing problems in practical size and settings. Decomposition methods extend the scalability of annealers, but they are still far away from practical use. Based on the experiments and comparison, we discuss the advantages and limitations of quantum(-inspired) annealers, as well as the research directions that may improve the utility and scalability of the these emerging computing technologies.
abstract_zh: 量子（受启发）退火器在解决实践中的组合优化问题方面显示出了前景。已有大量研究证明了 D-Wave 量子退火器和量子启发退火器（即富士通数字退火器）在各种应用中的实用性，但很少有作品对这些平台进行比较。在本文中，我们用三个组合优化问题（从一般科学问题到实际使用中的复杂问题）对量子退火器进行基准测试。在问题规模超出量子计算机能力的情况下，我们在分解的背景下评估它们。实验表明，两种退火器对于小尺寸和简单设置的问题都是有效的，但在面对实际尺寸和设置的问题时就失去了效用。分解方法扩展了退火器的可扩展性，但距离实际使用还很远。基于实验和比较，我们讨论了量子退火器的优点和局限性，以及可以提高这些新兴计算技术的实用性和可扩展性的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文对量子（启发式）退火硬件在实际应用中的性能进行了基准测试，比较了D-Wave和Fujitsu Digital Annealer在不同规模组合优化问题上的表现。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有研究展示量子退火器在多个领域的应用潜力，但缺乏对量子与量子启发式退火平台的系统性对比，尤其在实际规模问题上的表现尚不明确。
AI.method: 通过三个从科学通用问题到复杂实际问题的组合优化案例，测试退火硬件在问题规模超出硬件容量时的分解方法有效性，并对比其性能差异。
AI.result: 实验表明，两种退火器在小规模简单问题上表现良好，但在实际规模问题中效果显著下降；分解方法虽提升可扩展性，但仍无法满足实用需求。
AI.conclusion: 量子（启发式）退火器在实用场景中面临规模与复杂度限制，需进一步研究提升其实用性和可扩展性，以推动该技术的实际应用。

authors_text: Luca Bernecker,Andrea Idini
title: Quantum Levenberg--Marquardt Algorithm for optimization in Bundle Adjustment
title_zh: Quantum Levenberg--束调整优化的 Marquardt 算法
abstract: In this paper we develop a quantum optimization algorithm and use it to solve the bundle adjustment problem with a simulated quantum computer. Bundle adjustment is the process of optimizing camera poses and sensor properties to best reconstruct the three-dimensional structure and viewing parameters. This problem is often solved using some implementation of the Levenberg--Marquardt algorithm. In this case we implement a quantum algorithm for solving the linear system of normal equations that calculates the optimization step in Levenberg--Marquardt. This procedure is the current bottleneck in the algorithmic complexity of bundle adjustment. The proposed quantum algorithm dramatically reduces the complexity of this operation with respect to the number of points. We investigate 9 configurations of a toy-model for bundle adjustment, limited to 10 points and 2 cameras. This optimization problem is solved both by using the sparse Levenberg-Marquardt algorithm and our quantum implementation. The resulting solutions are presented, showing an improved rate of convergence, together with an analysis of the theoretical speed up and the probability of running the algorithm successfully on a current quantum computer. The presented quantum algorithm is a seminal implementation of using quantum computing algorithms in order to solve complex optimization problems in computer vision, in particular bundle adjustment, which offers several avenues of further investigations.
summary: In this paper we develop a quantum optimization algorithm and use it to solve the bundle adjustment problem with a simulated quantum computer. Bundle adjustment is the process of optimizing camera poses and sensor properties to best reconstruct the three-dimensional structure and viewing parameters. This problem is often solved using some implementation of the Levenberg--Marquardt algorithm. In this case we implement a quantum algorithm for solving the linear system of normal equations that calculates the optimization step in Levenberg--Marquardt. This procedure is the current bottleneck in the algorithmic complexity of bundle adjustment. The proposed quantum algorithm dramatically reduces the complexity of this operation with respect to the number of points. We investigate 9 configurations of a toy-model for bundle adjustment, limited to 10 points and 2 cameras. This optimization problem is solved both by using the sparse Levenberg-Marquardt algorithm and our quantum implementation. The resulting solutions are presented, showing an improved rate of convergence, together with an analysis of the theoretical speed up and the probability of running the algorithm successfully on a current quantum computer. The presented quantum algorithm is a seminal implementation of using quantum computing algorithms in order to solve complex optimization problems in computer vision, in particular bundle adjustment, which offers several avenues of further investigations.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们开发了一种量子优化算法，并用它来解决模拟量子计算机的束调整问题。捆绑调整是优化相机位姿和传感器属性以最好地重建三维结构和观察参数的过程。这个问题通常可以使用 Levenberg-Marquardt 算法的某种实现来解决。在本例中，我们实现了一种量子算法来求解线性正规方程组，该算法计算 Levenberg-Marquardt 中的优化步骤。该过程是当前束调整算法复杂度的瓶颈。所提出的量子算法极大地降低了该操作在点数方面的复杂性。我们研究了用于束调整的玩具模型的 9 种配置，仅限于 10 个点和 2 个摄像机。这个优化问题可以通过使用稀疏 Levenberg-Marquardt 算法和我们的量子实现来解决。提出了最终的解决方案，显示了收敛速度的提高，并分析了理论加速以及在当前量子计算机上成功运行算法的概率。所提出的量子算法是使用量子计算算法解决计算机视觉中复杂优化问题的开创性实现，特别是束调整，它提供了多种进一步研究的途径。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种量子优化算法用于解决光束法平差问题，通过量子计算机模拟实现对传统Levenberg-Marquardt算法中线性方程组求解步骤的优化。
AI.motivation: 传统光束法平差问题中Levenberg-Marquardt算法的线性方程组求解步骤存在计算复杂度瓶颈，而量子算法在处理此类问题上具有潜在优势。
AI.method: 设计量子算法求解正则方程组以替代经典算法中的该步骤，并在10个点和2个相机的玩具模型上进行9种配置的对比实验。
AI.result: 实验显示量子算法收敛速度提升，理论加速比显著，同时分析了当前量子计算机上算法成功运行的概率。
AI.conclusion: 该量子算法为量子计算在计算机视觉优化问题中的应用提供了开创性实现，为后续研究开辟了多个方向。
