search_text: Quantum Levenberg--Marquardt Algorithm for optimization in Bundle Adjustment Quantum Levenberg--束调整优化的 Marquardt 算法 In this paper we develop a quantum optimization algorithm and use it to solve the bundle adjustment problem with a simulated quantum computer. Bundle adjustment is the process of optimizing camera poses and sensor properties to best reconstruct the three-dimensional structure and viewing parameters. This problem is often solved using some implementation of the Levenberg--Marquardt algorithm. In this case we implement a quantum algorithm for solving the linear system of normal equations that calculates the optimization step in Levenberg--Marquardt. This procedure is the current bottleneck in the algorithmic complexity of bundle adjustment. The proposed quantum algorithm dramatically reduces the complexity of this operation with respect to the number of points. We investigate 9 configurations of a toy-model for bundle adjustment, limited to 10 points and 2 cameras. This optimization problem is solved both by using the sparse Levenberg-Marquardt algorithm and our quantum implementation. The resulting solutions are presented, showing an improved rate of convergence, together with an analysis of the theoretical speed up and the probability of running the algorithm successfully on a current quantum computer. The presented quantum algorithm is a seminal implementation of using quantum computing algorithms in order to solve complex optimization problems in computer vision, in particular bundle adjustment, which offers several avenues of further investigations. 在本文中，我们开发了一种量子优化算法，并用它来解决模拟量子计算机的束调整问题。捆绑调整是优化相机位姿和传感器属性以最好地重建三维结构和观察参数的过程。这个问题通常可以使用 Levenberg-Marquardt 算法的某种实现来解决。在本例中，我们实现了一种量子算法来求解线性正规方程组，该算法计算 Levenberg-Marquardt 中的优化步骤。该过程是当前束调整算法复杂度的瓶颈。所提出的量子算法极大地降低了该操作在点数方面的复杂性。我们研究了用于束调整的玩具模型的 9 种配置，仅限于 10 个点和 2 个摄像机。这个优化问题可以通过使用稀疏 Levenberg-Marquardt 算法和我们的量子实现来解决。提出了最终的解决方案，显示了收敛速度的提高，并分析了理论加速以及在当前量子计算机上成功运行算法的概率。所提出的量子算法是使用量子计算算法解决计算机视觉中复杂优化问题的开创性实现，特别是束调整，它提供了多种进一步研究的途径。 本文提出一种量子优化算法用于解决光束法平差问题，通过量子计算机模拟实现对传统Levenberg-Marquardt算法中线性方程组求解步骤的优化。 Luca Bernecker,Andrea Idini cs.CV,quant-ph

authors_text: Sensen Liu,Zhaoying Wang,Xinjun Sheng,Wei Dong
title: Hitchhiker: A Quadrotor Aggressively Perching on a Moving Inclined Surface Using Compliant Suction Cup Gripper
title_zh: Hitchhiker：四旋翼飞行器使用顺应性吸盘夹具积极地栖息在移动的倾斜表面上
comment: This paper has been submitted to IEEE Transactions on Automation Science and Engineering at 22-Januray-2022
comments: This paper has been submitted to IEEE Transactions on Automation Science and Engineering at 22-Januray-2022
abstract: Perching on {the surface} of moving objects, like vehicles, could extend the flight {time} and range of quadrotors. Suction cups are usually adopted for {surface attachment} due to their durability and large adhesive force. To seal on {a surfaces}, suction cups {must} be aligned with {the surface} and {possess proper relative tangential velocity}. {However, quadrotors' attitude and relative velocity errors would become significant when the object surface is moving and inclined. To address this problem, we proposed a real-time trajectory planning algorithm. The time-optimal aggressive trajectory is efficiently generated through multimodal search in a dynamic time-domain. The velocity errors relative to the moving surface are alleviated.} To further adapt to the residual errors, we design a compliant gripper using self-sealing cups. Multiple cups in different directions are integrated into a wheel-like mechanism to increase the tolerance to attitude errors. The wheel mechanism also eliminates the requirement of matching the attitude and tangential velocity. {Extensive tests are conducted to perch on static and moving surfaces at various inclinations.} Results demonstrate that our proposed system enables a quadrotor to reliably perch on moving inclined surfaces (up to $1.07m/s$ and $90^\circ$) with a success rate of $70\%$ or higher. {The efficacy of the trajectory planner is also validated. Our gripper has larger adaptability to attitude errors and tangential velocities than conventional suction cup grippers.} The success rate increases by 45\% in dynamic perches.

To seal on {a surfaces}, suction cups {must} be aligned with {the surface} and {possess proper relative tangential velocity}. {However, quadrotors' attitude and relative velocity errors would become significant when the object surface is moving and inclined. To address this problem, we proposed a real-time trajectory planning algorithm. The time-optimal aggressive trajectory is efficiently generated through multimodal search in a dynamic time-domain. The velocity errors relative to the moving surface are alleviated.} To further adapt to the residual errors, we design a compliant gripper using self-sealing cups. Multiple cups in different directions are integrated into a wheel-like mechanism to increase the tolerance to attitude errors. The wheel mechanism also eliminates the requirement of matching the attitude and tangential velocity. {Extensive tests are conducted to perch on static and moving surfaces at various inclinations.} Results demonstrate that our proposed system enables a quadrotor to reliably perch on moving inclined surfaces (up to $1.07m/s$ and $90^\circ$) with a success rate of $70\%$ or higher. {The efficacy of the trajectory planner is also validated. Our gripper has larger adaptability to attitude errors and tangential velocities than conventional suction cup grippers.} The success rate increases by 45\% in dynamic perches.
abstract_zh: 栖息在移动物体（例如车辆）的{表面}上可以延长四旋翼飞行器的飞行{时间}和范围。由于吸盘耐用且附着力大，通常采用吸盘进行{表面附着}。为了密封{表面}，吸盘{必须}与{表面}对齐并{具有适当的相对切向速度}。 {然而，当物体表面发生移动和倾斜时，四旋翼飞行器的姿态和相对速度误差会变得很大。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种实时轨迹规划算法。通过动态时域中的多模态搜索有效地生成时间最优攻击轨迹。相对于移动表面的速度误差得到了缓解。}为了进一步适应残余误差，我们设计了一个使用自密封杯的柔性夹具。不同方向的多个杯子被集成到一个轮状机构中，以增加对姿态误差的容忍度。轮机构还消除了匹配姿态和切向速度的要求。 {进行了广泛的测试，以在各种倾斜度下栖息在静态和移动表面上。}结果表明，我们提出的系统使四旋翼飞行器能够可靠地栖息在移动倾斜表面上（高达 $1.07m/s$ 和 $90^\circ$），成功率达到 $70\%$ 或更高。 {轨迹规划器的功效也得到了验证。我们的夹具比传统的吸盘夹具对姿态误差和切向速度具有更大的适应性。}动态栖息的成功率提高了 45%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种四旋翼无人机在移动倾斜表面使用柔性吸盘抓取器进行快速着陆的方法。
AI.motivation: 无人机在移动物体表面着陆可延长飞行时间与范围，但传统吸盘需精确对齐表面且难以应对移动倾斜表面的姿态和速度误差。
AI.method: 设计实时轨迹规划算法生成时间最优轨迹，并开发多向自密封吸盘轮式抓取器以容忍姿态误差和消除速度匹配需求。
AI.result: 系统实现70%以上成功率的移动倾斜表面着陆（速度1.07m/s，倾斜角90°），动态着陆成功率提升45%。
AI.conclusion: 轨迹规划与柔性抓取器结合有效解决移动倾斜表面着陆难题，显著提升适应性与成功率。

authors_text: Naye Ji,Fan Zhang,Haoxiang Zhang,Youbing Zhao,Dingguo Yu
title: Mixed Reality Depth Contour Occlusion Using Binocular Similarity Matching and Three-dimensional Contour Optimisation
title_zh: 使用双目相似性匹配和三维轮廓优化的混合现实深度轮廓遮挡
abstract: Mixed reality applications often require virtual objects that are partly occluded by real objects. However, previous research and commercial products have limitations in terms of performance and efficiency. To address these challenges, we propose a novel depth contour occlusion (DCO) algorithm. The proposed method is based on the sensitivity of contour occlusion and a binocular stereoscopic vision device. In this method, a depth contour map is combined with a sparse depth map obtained from a two-stage adaptive filter area stereo matching algorithm and the depth contour information of the objects extracted by a digital image stabilisation optical flow method. We also propose a quadratic optimisation model with three constraints to generate an accurate dense map of the depth contour for high-quality real-virtual occlusion. The whole process is accelerated by GPU. To evaluate the effectiveness of the algorithm, we demonstrate a time con-sumption statistical analysis for each stage of the DCO algorithm execution. To verify the relia-bility of the real-virtual occlusion effect, we conduct an experimental analysis on single-sided, enclosed, and complex occlusions; subsequently, we compare it with the occlusion method without quadratic optimisation. With our GPU implementation for real-time DCO, the evaluation indicates that applying the presented DCO algorithm can enhance the real-time performance and the visual quality of real-virtual occlusion.
summary: Mixed reality applications often require virtual objects that are partly occluded by real objects. However, previous research and commercial products have limitations in terms of performance and efficiency. To address these challenges, we propose a novel depth contour occlusion (DCO) algorithm. The proposed method is based on the sensitivity of contour occlusion and a binocular stereoscopic vision device. In this method, a depth contour map is combined with a sparse depth map obtained from a two-stage adaptive filter area stereo matching algorithm and the depth contour information of the objects extracted by a digital image stabilisation optical flow method. We also propose a quadratic optimisation model with three constraints to generate an accurate dense map of the depth contour for high-quality real-virtual occlusion. The whole process is accelerated by GPU. To evaluate the effectiveness of the algorithm, we demonstrate a time con-sumption statistical analysis for each stage of the DCO algorithm execution. To verify the relia-bility of the real-virtual occlusion effect, we conduct an experimental analysis on single-sided, enclosed, and complex occlusions; subsequently, we compare it with the occlusion method without quadratic optimisation. With our GPU implementation for real-time DCO, the evaluation indicates that applying the presented DCO algorithm can enhance the real-time performance and the visual quality of real-virtual occlusion.
abstract_zh: 混合现实应用程序通常需要部分被真实对象遮挡的虚拟对象。然而，先前的研究和商业产品在性能和效率方面存在局限性。为了解决这些挑战，我们提出了一种新颖的深度轮廓遮挡（DCO）算法。该方法基于轮廓遮挡的敏感性和双目立体视觉装置。该方法将深度轮廓图与两级自适应滤波区域立体匹配算法获得的稀疏深度图和数字图像稳定光流法提取的物体的深度轮廓信息相结合。我们还提出了具有三个约束的二次优化模型，以生成精确的深度轮廓密集图，以实现高质量的真实虚拟遮挡。整个过程由GPU加速。为了评估算法的有效性，我们对 DCO 算法执行的每个阶段进行了时间消耗统计分析。为了验证实虚遮挡效果的可靠性，我们对单侧遮挡、封闭遮挡和复杂遮挡进行了实验分析；随后，我们将其与没有二次优化的遮挡方法进行比较。通过我们的实时 DCO 的 GPU 实现，评估表明应用所提出的 DCO 算法可以提高实时性能和真实虚拟遮挡的视觉质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于双目相似匹配和三维轮廓优化的混合现实深度轮廓遮挡算法，旨在提升虚实融合场景中遮挡效果的实时性与视觉质量。
AI.motivation: 现有混合现实遮挡算法在性能和效率上存在不足，难以满足复杂场景下实时高质量虚实融合的需求。
AI.method: 结合双目立体视觉设备，融合稀疏深度图与深度轮廓图，通过两阶段自适应滤波立体匹配算法及数字图像稳定光流法提取物体深度轮廓信息，并构建带三个约束条件的二次优化模型生成密集深度轮廓图，最终通过GPU加速实现实时处理。
AI.result: 实验表明，该算法在单侧、封闭及复杂遮挡场景中均优于无二次优化的遮挡方法，显著提升实时性能与视觉质量。
AI.conclusion: 提出的DCO算法通过深度轮廓优化与GPU加速有效解决了混合现实遮挡的性能与质量瓶颈，为虚实融合应用提供了新思路。

search_text: Mixed Reality Depth Contour Occlusion Using Binocular Similarity Matching and Three-dimensional Contour Optimisation 使用双目相似性匹配和三维轮廓优化的混合现实深度轮廓遮挡 Mixed reality applications often require virtual objects that are partly occluded by real objects. However, previous research and commercial products have limitations in terms of performance and efficiency. To address these challenges, we propose a novel depth contour occlusion (DCO) algorithm. The proposed method is based on the sensitivity of contour occlusion and a binocular stereoscopic vision device. In this method, a depth contour map is combined with a sparse depth map obtained from a two-stage adaptive filter area stereo matching algorithm and the depth contour information of the objects extracted by a digital image stabilisation optical flow method. We also propose a quadratic optimisation model with three constraints to generate an accurate dense map of the depth contour for high-quality real-virtual occlusion. The whole process is accelerated by GPU. To evaluate the effectiveness of the algorithm, we demonstrate a time con-sumption statistical analysis for each stage of the DCO algorithm execution. To verify the relia-bility of the real-virtual occlusion effect, we conduct an experimental analysis on single-sided, enclosed, and complex occlusions; subsequently, we compare it with the occlusion method without quadratic optimisation. With our GPU implementation for real-time DCO, the evaluation indicates that applying the presented DCO algorithm can enhance the real-time performance and the visual quality of real-virtual occlusion. 混合现实应用程序通常需要部分被真实对象遮挡的虚拟对象。然而，先前的研究和商业产品在性能和效率方面存在局限性。为了解决这些挑战，我们提出了一种新颖的深度轮廓遮挡（DCO）算法。该方法基于轮廓遮挡的敏感性和双目立体视觉装置。该方法将深度轮廓图与两级自适应滤波区域立体匹配算法获得的稀疏深度图和数字图像稳定光流法提取的物体的深度轮廓信息相结合。我们还提出了具有三个约束的二次优化模型，以生成精确的深度轮廓密集图，以实现高质量的真实虚拟遮挡。整个过程由GPU加速。为了评估算法的有效性，我们对 DCO 算法执行的每个阶段进行了时间消耗统计分析。为了验证实虚遮挡效果的可靠性，我们对单侧遮挡、封闭遮挡和复杂遮挡进行了实验分析；随后，我们将其与没有二次优化的遮挡方法进行比较。通过我们的实时 DCO 的 GPU 实现，评估表明应用所提出的 DCO 算法可以提高实时性能和真实虚拟遮挡的视觉质量。 本文提出一种基于双目相似匹配和三维轮廓优化的混合现实深度轮廓遮挡算法，旨在提升虚实融合场景中遮挡效果的实时性与视觉质量。 Naye Ji,Fan Zhang,Haoxiang Zhang,Youbing Zhao,Dingguo Yu cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Jing Xu,Wei Zhang,Yalong Bai,Qibin Sun,Tao Mei
title: Freeform Body Motion Generation from Speech
title_zh: 从语音生成自由形式的身体动作
abstract: People naturally conduct spontaneous body motions to enhance their speeches while giving talks. Body motion generation from speech is inherently difficult due to the non-deterministic mapping from speech to body motions. Most existing works map speech to motion in a deterministic way by conditioning on certain styles, leading to sub-optimal results. Motivated by studies in linguistics, we decompose the co-speech motion into two complementary parts: pose modes and rhythmic dynamics. Accordingly, we introduce a novel freeform motion generation model (FreeMo) by equipping a two-stream architecture, i.e., a pose mode branch for primary posture generation, and a rhythmic motion branch for rhythmic dynamics synthesis. On one hand, diverse pose modes are generated by conditional sampling in a latent space, guided by speech semantics. On the other hand, rhythmic dynamics are synced with the speech prosody. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superior performance against several baselines, in terms of motion diversity, quality and syncing with speech. Code and pre-trained models will be publicly available through https://github.com/TheTempAccount/Co-Speech-Motion-Generation.
summary: People naturally conduct spontaneous body motions to enhance their speeches while giving talks. Body motion generation from speech is inherently difficult due to the non-deterministic mapping from speech to body motions. Most existing works map speech to motion in a deterministic way by conditioning on certain styles, leading to sub-optimal results. Motivated by studies in linguistics, we decompose the co-speech motion into two complementary parts: pose modes and rhythmic dynamics. Accordingly, we introduce a novel freeform motion generation model (FreeMo) by equipping a two-stream architecture, i.e., a pose mode branch for primary posture generation, and a rhythmic motion branch for rhythmic dynamics synthesis. On one hand, diverse pose modes are generated by conditional sampling in a latent space, guided by speech semantics. On the other hand, rhythmic dynamics are synced with the speech prosody. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superior performance against several baselines, in terms of motion diversity, quality and syncing with speech. Code and pre-trained models will be publicly available through https://github.com/TheTempAccount/Co-Speech-Motion-Generation.
abstract_zh: 人们在演讲时会自然地进行自发的身体动作来增强演讲效果。由于从语音到身体运动的非确定性映射，从语音生成身体运动本质上是困难的。大多数现有作品通过调节某些风格以确定性方式将语音映射到动作，从而导致次优结果。在语言学研究的推动下，我们将协同语音运动分解为两个互补的部分：姿势模式和节奏动力学。因此，我们通过配备双流架构引入了一种新颖的自由运动生成模型（FreeMo），即用于主要姿势生成的姿势模式分支和用于节奏动态合成的节奏运动分支。一方面，在语音语义的指导下，通过潜在空间中的条件采样生成不同的姿势模式。另一方面，节奏动态与语音韵律同步。大量实验证明了在运动多样性、质量和语音同步方面相对于多个基线的卓越性能。代码和预训练模型将通过 https://github.com/TheTempAccount/Co-Speech-Motion-Generation 公开提供。

AI.tldr: 从语音生成自然的伴随肢体动作
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过确定性映射生成肢体动作效果不佳，受语言学启发将动作分解为姿态模式和节奏动态以提升表现
AI.method: 提出双流架构FreeMo模型，包含姿态模式分支（基于语义的潜在空间条件采样）和节奏动态分支（与语音韵律同步）
AI.result: 在动作多样性、生成质量及语音同步性指标上优于多个基线方法
AI.conclusion: 通过解耦姿态与节奏的生成过程，有效提升了语音驱动的肢体动作生成效果

authors_text: Huajian Fang,Tal Peer,Stefan Wermter,Timo Gerkmann
title: Integrating Statistical Uncertainty into Neural Network-Based Speech Enhancement
title_zh: 将统计不确定性集成到基于神经网络的语音增强中
comment: ©2022 IEEE. Personal use of this material is permitted. Permission from IEEE must be obtained for all other uses, in any current or future media, including reprinting/republishing this material for advertising or promotional purposes, creating new collective works, for resale or redistribution to servers or lists, or reuse of any copyrighted component of this work in other works
comments: ©2022 IEEE. Personal use of this material is permitted. Permission from IEEE must be obtained for all other uses, in any current or future media, including reprinting/republishing this material for advertising or promotional purposes, creating new collective works, for resale or redistribution to servers or lists, or reuse of any copyrighted component of this work in other works
abstract: Speech enhancement in the time-frequency domain is often performed by estimating a multiplicative mask to extract clean speech. However, most neural network-based methods perform point estimation, i.e., their output consists of a single mask. In this paper, we study the benefits of modeling uncertainty in neural network-based speech enhancement. For this, our neural network is trained to map a noisy spectrogram to the Wiener filter and its associated variance, which quantifies uncertainty, based on the maximum a posteriori (MAP) inference of spectral coefficients. By estimating the distribution instead of the point estimate, one can model the uncertainty associated with each estimate. We further propose to use the estimated Wiener filter and its uncertainty to build an approximate MAP (A-MAP) estimator of spectral magnitudes, which in turn is combined with the MAP inference of spectral coefficients to form a hybrid loss function to jointly reinforce the estimation. Experimental results on different datasets show that the proposed method can not only capture the uncertainty associated with the estimated filters, but also yield a higher enhancement performance over comparable models that do not take uncertainty into account.
summary: Speech enhancement in the time-frequency domain is often performed by estimating a multiplicative mask to extract clean speech. However, most neural network-based methods perform point estimation, i.e., their output consists of a single mask. In this paper, we study the benefits of modeling uncertainty in neural network-based speech enhancement. For this, our neural network is trained to map a noisy spectrogram to the Wiener filter and its associated variance, which quantifies uncertainty, based on the maximum a posteriori (MAP) inference of spectral coefficients. By estimating the distribution instead of the point estimate, one can model the uncertainty associated with each estimate. We further propose to use the estimated Wiener filter and its uncertainty to build an approximate MAP (A-MAP) estimator of spectral magnitudes, which in turn is combined with the MAP inference of spectral coefficients to form a hybrid loss function to jointly reinforce the estimation. Experimental results on different datasets show that the proposed method can not only capture the uncertainty associated with the estimated filters, but also yield a higher enhancement performance over comparable models that do not take uncertainty into account.
abstract_zh: 时频域中的语音增强通常通过估计乘法掩模来提取干净的语音来执行。然而，大多数基于神经网络的方法执行点估计，即它们的输出由单个掩模组成。在本文中，我们研究了基于神经网络的语音增强中不确定性建模的好处。为此，我们的神经网络经过训练，将噪声频谱图映射到维纳滤波器及其相关方差，从而根据频谱系数的最大后验 (MAP) 推断来量化不确定性。通过估计分布而不是点估计，可以对与每个估计相关的不确定性进行建模。我们进一步建议使用估计的维纳滤波器及其不确定性来构建频谱幅度的近似 MAP（A-MAP）估计器，该估计器又与频谱系数的 MAP 推断相结合，形成混合损失函数以共同加强估计。不同数据集上的实验结果表明，所提出的方法不仅可以捕获与估计滤波器相关的不确定性，而且比不考虑不确定性的可比较模型产生更高的增强性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何在基于神经网络的语音增强中建模不确定性，以提高增强效果。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络语音增强方法仅输出单一掩码（点估计），无法反映估计的不确定性，可能导致增强效果受限。
AI.method: 训练神经网络输出维纳滤波器及其方差（量化不确定性），结合近似最大后验估计（A-MAP）与谱系数最大后验推断，构建混合损失函数联合优化估计。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法能更准确捕捉滤波器不确定性，并在多个数据集上优于不考虑不确定性的对比模型。
AI.conclusion: 建模不确定性可提升语音增强的鲁棒性与性能，为后续研究提供新思路。

search_text: Integrating Statistical Uncertainty into Neural Network-Based Speech Enhancement 将统计不确定性集成到基于神经网络的语音增强中 Speech enhancement in the time-frequency domain is often performed by estimating a multiplicative mask to extract clean speech. However, most neural network-based methods perform point estimation, i.e., their output consists of a single mask. In this paper, we study the benefits of modeling uncertainty in neural network-based speech enhancement. For this, our neural network is trained to map a noisy spectrogram to the Wiener filter and its associated variance, which quantifies uncertainty, based on the maximum a posteriori (MAP) inference of spectral coefficients. By estimating the distribution instead of the point estimate, one can model the uncertainty associated with each estimate. We further propose to use the estimated Wiener filter and its uncertainty to build an approximate MAP (A-MAP) estimator of spectral magnitudes, which in turn is combined with the MAP inference of spectral coefficients to form a hybrid loss function to jointly reinforce the estimation. Experimental results on different datasets show that the proposed method can not only capture the uncertainty associated with the estimated filters, but also yield a higher enhancement performance over comparable models that do not take uncertainty into account. 时频域中的语音增强通常通过估计乘法掩模来提取干净的语音来执行。然而，大多数基于神经网络的方法执行点估计，即它们的输出由单个掩模组成。在本文中，我们研究了基于神经网络的语音增强中不确定性建模的好处。为此，我们的神经网络经过训练，将噪声频谱图映射到维纳滤波器及其相关方差，从而根据频谱系数的最大后验 (MAP) 推断来量化不确定性。通过估计分布而不是点估计，可以对与每个估计相关的不确定性进行建模。我们进一步建议使用估计的维纳滤波器及其不确定性来构建频谱幅度的近似 MAP（A-MAP）估计器，该估计器又与频谱系数的 MAP 推断相结合，形成混合损失函数以共同加强估计。不同数据集上的实验结果表明，所提出的方法不仅可以捕获与估计滤波器相关的不确定性，而且比不考虑不确定性的可比较模型产生更高的增强性能。 本文研究如何在基于神经网络的语音增强中建模不确定性，以提高增强效果。 Huajian Fang,Tal Peer,Stefan Wermter,Timo Gerkmann eess.AS,cs.LG,cs.SD

authors_text: Mingrui Zhu,Yun Yi,Nannan Wang,Xiaoyu Wang,Xinbo Gao
title: Semi-parametric Makeup Transfer via Semantic-aware Correspondence
title_zh: 通过语义感知对应进行半参数化妆传输
abstract: The large discrepancy between the source non-makeup image and the reference makeup image is one of the key challenges in makeup transfer. Conventional approaches for makeup transfer either learn disentangled representation or perform pixel-wise correspondence in a parametric way between two images. We argue that non-parametric techniques have a high potential for addressing the pose, expression, and occlusion discrepancies. To this end, this paper proposes a \textbf{S}emi-\textbf{p}arametric \textbf{M}akeup \textbf{T}ransfer (SpMT) method, which combines the reciprocal strengths of non-parametric and parametric mechanisms. The non-parametric component is a novel \textbf{S}emantic-\textbf{a}ware \textbf{C}orrespondence (SaC) module that explicitly reconstructs content representation with makeup representation under the strong constraint of component semantics. The reconstructed representation is desired to preserve the spatial and identity information of the source image while "wearing" the makeup of the reference image. The output image is synthesized via a parametric decoder that draws on the reconstructed representation. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of our method in terms of visual quality, robustness, and flexibility. Code and pre-trained model are available at \url{https://github.com/AnonymScholar/SpMT.
summary: The large discrepancy between the source non-makeup image and the reference makeup image is one of the key challenges in makeup transfer. Conventional approaches for makeup transfer either learn disentangled representation or perform pixel-wise correspondence in a parametric way between two images. We argue that non-parametric techniques have a high potential for addressing the pose, expression, and occlusion discrepancies. To this end, this paper proposes a \textbf{S}emi-\textbf{p}arametric \textbf{M}akeup \textbf{T}ransfer (SpMT) method, which combines the reciprocal strengths of non-parametric and parametric mechanisms. The non-parametric component is a novel \textbf{S}emantic-\textbf{a}ware \textbf{C}orrespondence (SaC) module that explicitly reconstructs content representation with makeup representation under the strong constraint of component semantics. The reconstructed representation is desired to preserve the spatial and identity information of the source image while "wearing" the makeup of the reference image. The output image is synthesized via a parametric decoder that draws on the reconstructed representation. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of our method in terms of visual quality, robustness, and flexibility. Code and pre-trained model are available at \url{https://github.com/AnonymScholar/SpMT.
abstract_zh: 源非化妆图像与参考化妆图像之间的巨大差异是化妆转移的关键挑战之一。化妆迁移的传统方法要么学习解缠结的表示，要么以参数的方式在两个图像之间执行像素级对应。我们认为非参数技术在解决姿势、表情和遮挡差异方面具有很大的潜力。为此，本文提出了一种 \textbf{S}emi-\textbf{p}arametric \textbf{M}akeup \textbf{T}transfer (SpMT) 方法，该方法结合了非参数和参数机制的相互优势。非参数组件是一种新颖的 \textbf{S}emantic-\textbf{a}ware \textbf{C}orrespondence (SaC) 模块，它在组件语义的强约束下用化妆表示显式地重构内容表示。重建的表示需要保留源图像的空间和身份信息，同时“佩戴”参考图像的妆容。输出图像通过参数解码器合成，该解码器利用重建的表示。大量的实验证明了我们的方法在视觉质量、鲁棒性和灵活性方面的优越性。代码和预训练模型可在 \url{https://github.com/AnonymScholar/SpMT 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合非参数与参数机制的半参数化化妆迁移方法（SpMT），通过语义感知对应模块解决源图像与参考图像间的姿态、表情和遮挡差异问题。
AI.motivation: 传统化妆迁移方法在处理姿态、表情和遮挡差异时存在局限，非参数技术具有更高潜力但未被充分探索，需结合非参数与参数方法的优势以提升鲁棒性与灵活性。
AI.method: 提出半参数化化妆迁移框架SpMT，包含语义感知对应模块（SaC）与参数化解码器。SaC模块通过语义约束重建源图像内容与参考化妆表征，解码器基于重建表征生成最终图像。
AI.result: 实验表明SpMT在视觉质量、鲁棒性和灵活性方面优于现有方法，代码与预训练模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: SpMT通过结合非参数语义对应与参数化生成，有效解决了化妆迁移中的关键挑战，为复杂场景下的图像编辑提供了新思路。

authors_text: Hui Zhang,Jonathan Wei Zhong Lau,Lingxiao Wan,Liang Shi,Hong Cai,Xianshu Luo,Patrick Lo,Chee-Kong Lee,Leong-Chuan Kwek,Ai Qun Liu
title: A photonic chip-based machine learning approach for the prediction of molecular properties
title_zh: 用于预测分子特性的基于光子芯片的机器学习方法
abstract: Machine learning methods have revolutionized the discovery process of new molecules and materials. However, the intensive training process of neural networks for molecules with ever-increasing complexity has resulted in exponential growth in computation cost, leading to long simulation time and high energy consumption. Photonic chip technology offers an alternative platform for implementing neural networks with faster data processing and lower energy usage compared to digital computers. Photonics technology is naturally capable of implementing complex-valued neural networks at no additional hardware cost. Here, we demonstrate the capability of photonic neural networks for predicting the quantum mechanical properties of molecules. To the best of our knowledge, this work is the first to harness photonic technology for machine learning applications in computational chemistry and molecular sciences, such as drug discovery and materials design. We further show that multiple properties can be learned simultaneously in a photonic chip via a multi-task regression learning algorithm, which is also the first of its kind as well, as most previous works focus on implementing a network in the classification task.
summary: Machine learning methods have revolutionized the discovery process of new molecules and materials. However, the intensive training process of neural networks for molecules with ever-increasing complexity has resulted in exponential growth in computation cost, leading to long simulation time and high energy consumption. Photonic chip technology offers an alternative platform for implementing neural networks with faster data processing and lower energy usage compared to digital computers. Photonics technology is naturally capable of implementing complex-valued neural networks at no additional hardware cost. Here, we demonstrate the capability of photonic neural networks for predicting the quantum mechanical properties of molecules. To the best of our knowledge, this work is the first to harness photonic technology for machine learning applications in computational chemistry and molecular sciences, such as drug discovery and materials design. We further show that multiple properties can be learned simultaneously in a photonic chip via a multi-task regression learning algorithm, which is also the first of its kind as well, as most previous works focus on implementing a network in the classification task.
abstract_zh: 机器学习方法彻底改变了新分子和材料的发现过程。然而，神经网络对复杂性不断增加的分子的强化训练过程导致计算成本呈指数级增长，导致模拟时间长、能耗高。与数字计算机相比，光子芯片技术为实现神经网络提供了一种替代平台，具有更快的数据处理速度和更低的能耗。光子技术自然能够实现复杂值的神经网络，而无需额外的硬件成本。在这里，我们展示了光子神经网络预测分子量子力学特性的能力。据我们所知，这项工作是第一个利用光子技术在计算化学和分子科学（例如药物发现和材料设计）中的机器学习应用的工作。我们进一步表明，可以通过多任务回归学习算法在光子芯片中同时学习多个属性，这也是此类算法中的第一个，因为之前的大多数工作都集中在分类任务中实现网络。

AI.tldr: 提出基于光子芯片的机器学习方法预测分子量子力学性质
AI.motivation: 解决传统神经网络计算成本高、能耗大问题，利用光子芯片实现高效低耗的分子属性预测
AI.method: 采用光子神经网络结合多任务回归算法，实现分子属性预测
AI.result: 首次实现光子芯片在计算化学中的多任务回归预测，提升效率并降低能耗
AI.conclusion: 光子芯片技术为计算化学提供高效低耗的机器学习平台，推动分子科学领域发展

authors_text: Martin Weigert,Uwe Schmidt
title: Nuclei instance segmentation and classification in histopathology images with StarDist
title_zh: 使用 StarDist 进行组织病理学图像中的细胞核实例分割和分类
abstract: Instance segmentation and classification of nuclei is an important task in computational pathology. We show that StarDist, a deep learning nuclei segmentation method originally developed for fluorescence microscopy, can be extended and successfully applied to histopathology images. This is substantiated by conducting experiments on the Lizard dataset, and through entering the Colon Nuclei Identification and Counting (CoNIC) challenge 2022, where our approach achieved the first spot on the leaderboard for the segmentation and classification task for both the preliminary and final test phase.
summary: Instance segmentation and classification of nuclei is an important task in computational pathology. We show that StarDist, a deep learning nuclei segmentation method originally developed for fluorescence microscopy, can be extended and successfully applied to histopathology images. This is substantiated by conducting experiments on the Lizard dataset, and through entering the Colon Nuclei Identification and Counting (CoNIC) challenge 2022, where our approach achieved the first spot on the leaderboard for the segmentation and classification task for both the preliminary and final test phase.
abstract_zh: 细胞核的实例分割和分类是计算病理学中的一项重要任务。我们证明 StarDist 是一种最初为荧光显微镜开发的深度学习细胞核分割方法，可以扩展并成功应用于组织病理学图像。通过在 Lizard 数据集上进行实验以及参加 2022 年结肠核识别和计数 (CoNIC) 挑战赛，我们的方法在初步和最终测试阶段的分割和分类任务排行榜上均获得了第一名，从而证实了这一点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将原本用于荧光显微镜的StarDist深度学习方法扩展至组织病理学图像，实现细胞核的实例分割与分类任务。
AI.motivation: 组织病理学图像中的细胞核分割与分类是计算病理学的关键任务，而现有方法在复杂染色和密集排列场景下效果有限，需探索更有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于StarDist的深度学习框架，通过调整模型参数和训练流程，针对组织病理学图像的染色特性进行优化，实现细胞核的实例分割与分类。
AI.result: 在Lizard数据集实验及CoNIC 2022挑战赛中，该方法在分割和分类任务的初步和最终测试阶段均位列榜首。
AI.conclusion: StarDist方法可有效迁移至组织病理学图像分析，为细胞核分割与分类提供了高精度解决方案，具有临床病理分析的实用价值。

authors_text: Banoth Thulasya Naik,Mohammad Farukh Hashmi,Neeraj Dhanraj Bokde
title: A Comprehensive Review of Computer Vision in Sports: Open Issues, Future Trends and Research Directions
title_zh: 体育计算机视觉的全面回顾：悬而未决的问题、未来趋势和研究方向
abstract: Recent developments in video analysis of sports and computer vision techniques have achieved significant improvements to enable a variety of critical operations. To provide enhanced information, such as detailed complex analysis in sports like soccer, basketball, cricket, badminton, etc., studies have focused mainly on computer vision techniques employed to carry out different tasks. This paper presents a comprehensive review of sports video analysis for various applications high-level analysis such as detection and classification of players, tracking player or ball in sports and predicting the trajectories of player or ball, recognizing the teams strategies, classifying various events in sports. The paper further discusses published works in a variety of application-specific tasks related to sports and the present researchers views regarding them. Since there is a wide research scope in sports for deploying computer vision techniques in various sports, some of the publicly available datasets related to a particular sport have been provided. This work reviews a detailed discussion on some of the artificial intelligence(AI)applications in sports vision, GPU-based work stations, and embedded platforms. Finally, this review identifies the research directions, probable challenges, and future trends in the area of visual recognition in sports.
summary: Recent developments in video analysis of sports and computer vision techniques have achieved significant improvements to enable a variety of critical operations. To provide enhanced information, such as detailed complex analysis in sports like soccer, basketball, cricket, badminton, etc., studies have focused mainly on computer vision techniques employed to carry out different tasks. This paper presents a comprehensive review of sports video analysis for various applications high-level analysis such as detection and classification of players, tracking player or ball in sports and predicting the trajectories of player or ball, recognizing the teams strategies, classifying various events in sports. The paper further discusses published works in a variety of application-specific tasks related to sports and the present researchers views regarding them. Since there is a wide research scope in sports for deploying computer vision techniques in various sports, some of the publicly available datasets related to a particular sport have been provided. This work reviews a detailed discussion on some of the artificial intelligence(AI)applications in sports vision, GPU-based work stations, and embedded platforms. Finally, this review identifies the research directions, probable challenges, and future trends in the area of visual recognition in sports.
abstract_zh: 运动视频分析和计算机视觉技术的最新发展已经取得了重大改进，可以实现各种关键操作。为了提供增强的信息，例如足球、篮球、板球、羽毛球等运动中的详细复杂分析，研究主要集中在用于执行不同任务的计算机视觉技术上。本文全面回顾了体育视频分析的各种应用高级分析，例如运动员的检测和分类、跟踪运动中的运动员或球并预测运动员或球的轨迹、识别球队策略、对运动中的各种事件进行分类。本文进一步讨论了与体育相关的各种特定应用任务中已发表的作品以及目前研究人员对此的看法。由于在各种运动中部署计算机视觉技术的运动研究范围很广，因此已经提供了与特定运动相关的一些公开可用的数据集。本文回顾了对运动视觉、基于 GPU 的工作站和嵌入式平台中的一些人工智能 (AI) 应用的详细讨论。最后，这篇综述确定了体育视觉识别领域的研究方向、可能的挑战和未来趋势。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了计算机视觉在体育领域的应用，涵盖球员检测、轨迹预测、策略识别等任务，并探讨了未来研究方向和挑战。
AI.motivation: 随着视频分析技术的进步，计算机视觉在体育中的应用日益广泛，但现有研究缺乏系统性总结和未来趋势分析。
AI.method: 通过综合文献回顾、公开数据集分析及AI技术应用案例，梳理体育视觉识别的现状与问题。
AI.result: 总结了当前计算机视觉在体育中的关键技术，识别出数据多样性、实时性等挑战，并提出未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 计算机视觉在体育领域具有广阔前景，但需进一步解决跨场景适应性、多模态融合等核心问题以推动实际应用。

authors_text: Marcos Faundez-Zanuy,Jose Juan Lucena-Molina,Martin Hagmueller
title: Speech watermarking: an approach for the forensic analysis of digital telephonic recordings
title_zh: 语音水印：数字电话录音取证分析的方法
abstract: In this article, the authors discuss the problem of forensic authentication of digital audio recordings. Although forensic audio has been addressed in several articles, the existing approaches are focused on analog magnetic recordings, which are less prevalent because of the large amount of digital recorders available on the market (optical, solid state, hard disks, etc.). An approach based on digital signal processing that consists of spread spectrum techniques for speech watermarking is presented. This approach presents the advantage that the authentication is based on the signal itself rather than the recording format. Thus, it is valid for usual recording devices in police-controlled telephone intercepts. In addition, our proposal allows for the introduction of relevant information such as the recording date and time and all the relevant data (this is not always possible with classical systems). Our experimental results reveal that the speech watermarking procedure does not interfere in a significant way with the posterior forensic speaker identification.
summary: In this article, the authors discuss the problem of forensic authentication of digital audio recordings. Although forensic audio has been addressed in several articles, the existing approaches are focused on analog magnetic recordings, which are less prevalent because of the large amount of digital recorders available on the market (optical, solid state, hard disks, etc.). An approach based on digital signal processing that consists of spread spectrum techniques for speech watermarking is presented. This approach presents the advantage that the authentication is based on the signal itself rather than the recording format. Thus, it is valid for usual recording devices in police-controlled telephone intercepts. In addition, our proposal allows for the introduction of relevant information such as the recording date and time and all the relevant data (this is not always possible with classical systems). Our experimental results reveal that the speech watermarking procedure does not interfere in a significant way with the posterior forensic speaker identification.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，作者讨论了数字录音的法医鉴定问题。尽管法医音频已在几篇文章中得到讨论，但现有的方法主要集中在模拟磁记录上，由于市场上有大量数字记录器（光学、固态、硬盘等），因此模拟磁记录不太流行。提出了一种基于数字信号处理的方法，其中包括用于语音水印的扩频技术。这种方法的优点是认证基于信号本身而不是记录格式。因此，它对于警察控制的电话拦截中的常用录音设备是有效的。此外，我们的建议允许引入相关信息，例如记录日期和时间以及所有相关数据（这对于经典系统来说并不总是可行）。我们的实验结果表明，语音水印过程不会对后验说话人识别产生显着干扰。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于扩展频谱技术的语音水印方法，用于数字电话录音的鉴证分析。
AI.motivation: 现有音频鉴证方法多针对模拟录音，难以适应主流数字录音设备，且传统系统无法有效嵌入元数据。
AI.method: 采用数字信号处理中的扩展频谱技术，在语音信号中嵌入水印信息，包含录音时间、日期等元数据，实现基于信号内容的鉴证。
AI.result: 实验表明语音水印过程对后续说话人识别任务无显著干扰。
AI.conclusion: 该方法适用于数字录音设备，可有效嵌入元数据且不影响鉴证准确性，为电话录音鉴证提供新思路。

result: 实验表明语音水印过程对后续说话人识别任务无显著干扰。
conclusion: 该方法适用于数字录音设备，可有效嵌入元数据且不影响鉴证准确性，为电话录音鉴证提供新思路。
search_text: Speech watermarking: an approach for the forensic analysis of digital telephonic recordings 语音水印：数字电话录音取证分析的方法 In this article, the authors discuss the problem of forensic authentication of digital audio recordings. Although forensic audio has been addressed in several articles, the existing approaches are focused on analog magnetic recordings, which are less prevalent because of the large amount of digital recorders available on the market (optical, solid state, hard disks, etc.). An approach based on digital signal processing that consists of spread spectrum techniques for speech watermarking is presented. This approach presents the advantage that the authentication is based on the signal itself rather than the recording format. Thus, it is valid for usual recording devices in police-controlled telephone intercepts. In addition, our proposal allows for the introduction of relevant information such as the recording date and time and all the relevant data (this is not always possible with classical systems). Our experimental results reveal that the speech watermarking procedure does not interfere in a significant way with the posterior forensic speaker identification. 在本文中，作者讨论了数字录音的法医鉴定问题。尽管法医音频已在几篇文章中得到讨论，但现有的方法主要集中在模拟磁记录上，由于市场上有大量数字记录器（光学、固态、硬盘等），因此模拟磁记录不太流行。提出了一种基于数字信号处理的方法，其中包括用于语音水印的扩频技术。这种方法的优点是认证基于信号本身而不是记录格式。因此，它对于警察控制的电话拦截中的常用录音设备是有效的。此外，我们的建议允许引入相关信息，例如记录日期和时间以及所有相关数据（这对于经典系统来说并不总是可行）。我们的实验结果表明，语音水印过程不会对后验说话人识别产生显着干扰。 本文提出一种基于扩展频谱技术的语音水印方法，用于数字电话录音的鉴证分析。 Marcos Faundez-Zanuy,Jose Juan Lucena-Molina,Martin Hagmueller cs.CR,cs.LG,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Qiaoling Chen,Zhihao Chen,Wei Luo
title: Feature Transformation for Cross-domain Few-shot Remote Sensing Scene Classification
title_zh: 跨域少样本遥感场景分类的特征转换
abstract: Effectively classifying remote sensing scenes is still a challenge due to the increasing spatial resolution of remote imaging and large variances between remote sensing images. Existing research has greatly improved the performance of remote sensing scene classification (RSSC). However, these methods are not applicable to cross-domain few-shot problems where target domain is with very limited training samples available and has a different data distribution from source domain. To improve the model's applicability, we propose the feature-wise transformation module (FTM) in this paper. FTM transfers the feature distribution learned on source domain to that of target domain by a very simple affine operation with negligible additional parameters. Moreover, FTM can be effectively learned on target domain in the case of few training data available and is agnostic to specific network structures. Experiments on RSSC and land-cover mapping tasks verified its capability to handle cross-domain few-shot problems. By comparison with directly finetuning, FTM achieves better performance and possesses better transferability and fine-grained discriminability. \textit{Code will be publicly available.}
summary: Effectively classifying remote sensing scenes is still a challenge due to the increasing spatial resolution of remote imaging and large variances between remote sensing images. Existing research has greatly improved the performance of remote sensing scene classification (RSSC). However, these methods are not applicable to cross-domain few-shot problems where target domain is with very limited training samples available and has a different data distribution from source domain. To improve the model's applicability, we propose the feature-wise transformation module (FTM) in this paper. FTM transfers the feature distribution learned on source domain to that of target domain by a very simple affine operation with negligible additional parameters. Moreover, FTM can be effectively learned on target domain in the case of few training data available and is agnostic to specific network structures. Experiments on RSSC and land-cover mapping tasks verified its capability to handle cross-domain few-shot problems. By comparison with directly finetuning, FTM achieves better performance and possesses better transferability and fine-grained discriminability. \textit{Code will be publicly available.}
abstract_zh: 由于遥感图像的空间分辨率不断提高以及遥感图像之间的巨大差异，有效地对遥感场景进行分类仍然是一个挑战。现有研究极大地提高了遥感场景分类（RSSC）的性能。然而，这些方法不适用于跨域少样本问题，其中目标域的可用训练样本非常有限，并且具有与源域不同的数据分布。为了提高模型的适用性，我们在本文中提出了特征变换模块（FTM）。 FTM 通过非常简单的仿射操作（附加参数可忽略不计），将在源域上学习到的特征分布转移到目标域的特征分布。此外，在可用训练数据很少的情况下，FTM 可以在目标域上有效学习，并且与特定网络结构无关。 RSSC 和土地覆盖测绘任务的实验验证了其处理跨域少样本问题的能力。与直接微调相比，FTM 取得了更好的性能，并具有更好的可迁移性和细粒度区分性。 \textit{代码将公开。}

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种特征级变换模块（FTM），用于解决跨域少样本遥感场景分类中的领域差异和样本不足问题。
AI.motivation: 现有遥感场景分类方法难以应对目标域样本稀缺且与源域数据分布差异大的跨域少样本场景，亟需提升模型的迁移能力与泛化性能。
AI.method: 设计轻量级特征-wise变换模块（FTM），通过仿射变换对齐源域与目标域特征分布，无需额外参数且兼容任意网络结构，在目标域少量样本下可有效学习。
AI.result: 在遥感场景分类与土地覆盖映射任务中，FTM相较直接微调方法取得更优性能，展现出更强的跨域迁移能力与细粒度判别性。
AI.conclusion: FTM通过简单仿射变换实现跨域特征分布对齐，在少样本条件下有效提升遥感场景分类的迁移性能，为跨域少样本学习提供实用解决方案。

authors_text: Ashkan Khakzar,Pedram Khorsandi,Rozhin Nobahari,Nassir Navab
title: Do Explanations Explain? Model Knows Best
title_zh: 解释能解释吗？模型最了解
comment: CVPR 2022 (IEEE/CVF Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition)
comments: CVPR 2022 (IEEE/CVF Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition)
abstract: It is a mystery which input features contribute to a neural network's output. Various explanation (feature attribution) methods are proposed in the literature to shed light on the problem. One peculiar observation is that these explanations (attributions) point to different features as being important. The phenomenon raises the question, which explanation to trust? We propose a framework for evaluating the explanations using the neural network model itself. The framework leverages the network to generate input features that impose a particular behavior on the output. Using the generated features, we devise controlled experimental setups to evaluate whether an explanation method conforms to an axiom. Thus we propose an empirical framework for axiomatic evaluation of explanation methods. We evaluate well-known and promising explanation solutions using the proposed framework. The framework provides a toolset to reveal properties and drawbacks within existing and future explanation solutions.
summary: It is a mystery which input features contribute to a neural network's output. Various explanation (feature attribution) methods are proposed in the literature to shed light on the problem. One peculiar observation is that these explanations (attributions) point to different features as being important. The phenomenon raises the question, which explanation to trust? We propose a framework for evaluating the explanations using the neural network model itself. The framework leverages the network to generate input features that impose a particular behavior on the output. Using the generated features, we devise controlled experimental setups to evaluate whether an explanation method conforms to an axiom. Thus we propose an empirical framework for axiomatic evaluation of explanation methods. We evaluate well-known and promising explanation solutions using the proposed framework. The framework provides a toolset to reveal properties and drawbacks within existing and future explanation solutions.
abstract_zh: 哪些输入特征对神经网络的输出有贡献是一个谜。文献中提出了各种解释（特征归因）方法来阐明该问题。一个奇怪的观察是，这些解释（归因）指出不同的特征是重要的。这种现象提出了一个问题：应该相信哪种解释？我们提出了一个使用神经网络模型本身来评估解释的框架。该框架利用网络生成输入特征，这些特征对输出施加特定的行为。使用生成的特征，我们设计受控实验设置来评估解释方法是否符合公理。因此，我们提出了一个对解释方法进行公理评估的经验框架。我们使用所提出的框架评估众所周知且有前途的解释解决方案。该框架提供了一个工具集来揭示现有和未来解释解决方案的属性和缺点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用模型自身生成特征的框架，评估不同特征归因方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有特征归因方法结果不一致，缺乏统一评估标准，需建立可靠框架验证其有效性。
AI.method: 通过模型生成特定行为的输入特征，设计控制实验验证解释方法是否符合设定公理。
AI.result: 评估了多种解释方法，揭示其优缺点，提供工具集分析现有及未来方法。
AI.conclusion: 框架为解释方法提供实证评估工具，促进更可靠模型解释方法的发展。

authors_text: Xiaofeng Ge,Jiangyu Han,Yanhua Long,Haixin Guan
title: PercepNet+: A Phase and SNR Aware PercepNet for Real-Time Speech Enhancement
title_zh: PercepNet+：用于实时语音增强的相位和 SNR 感知 PercepNet
comment: This article was submitted to Interspeech 2022
comments: This article was submitted to Interspeech 2022
abstract: PercepNet, a recent extension of the RNNoise, an efficient, high-quality and real-time full-band speech enhancement technique, has shown promising performance in various public deep noise suppression tasks. This paper proposes a new approach, named PercepNet+, to further extend the PercepNet with four significant improvements. First, we introduce a phase-aware structure to leverage the phase information into PercepNet, by adding the complex features and complex subband gains as the deep network input and output respectively. Then, a signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) estimator and an SNR switched post-processing are specially designed to alleviate the over attenuation (OA) that appears in high SNR conditions of the original PercepNet. Moreover, the GRU layer is replaced by TF-GRU to model both temporal and frequency dependencies. Finally, we propose to integrate the loss of complex subband gain, SNR, pitch filtering strength, and an OA loss in a multi-objective learning manner to further improve the speech enhancement performance. Experimental results show that, the proposed PercepNet+ outperforms the original PercepNet significantly in terms of both PESQ and STOI, without increasing the model size too much.
summary: PercepNet, a recent extension of the RNNoise, an efficient, high-quality and real-time full-band speech enhancement technique, has shown promising performance in various public deep noise suppression tasks. This paper proposes a new approach, named PercepNet+, to further extend the PercepNet with four significant improvements. First, we introduce a phase-aware structure to leverage the phase information into PercepNet, by adding the complex features and complex subband gains as the deep network input and output respectively. Then, a signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) estimator and an SNR switched post-processing are specially designed to alleviate the over attenuation (OA) that appears in high SNR conditions of the original PercepNet. Moreover, the GRU layer is replaced by TF-GRU to model both temporal and frequency dependencies. Finally, we propose to integrate the loss of complex subband gain, SNR, pitch filtering strength, and an OA loss in a multi-objective learning manner to further improve the speech enhancement performance. Experimental results show that, the proposed PercepNet+ outperforms the original PercepNet significantly in terms of both PESQ and STOI, without increasing the model size too much.
abstract_zh: PercepNet 是 RNNoise 的最新扩展，是一种高效、高质量、实时的全频带语音增强技术，在各种公共深度噪声抑制任务中表现出了良好的性能。本文提出了一种名为 PercepNet+ 的新方法，通过四项重大改进进一步扩展 PercepNet。首先，我们引入了一种相位感知结构，通过分别添加复杂特征和复杂子带增益作为深度网络输入和输出，将相位信息利用到 PercepNet 中。然后，专门设计了信噪比（SNR）估计器和SNR切换后处理，以减轻原始PercepNet在高SNR条件下出现的过度衰减（OA）。此外，GRU 层被 TF-GRU 取代，以对时间和频率依赖性进行建模。最后，我们建议以多目标学习的方式整合复杂子带增益的损失、SNR、基音滤波强度和OA损失，以进一步提高语音增强性能。实验结果表明，所提出的 PercepNet+ 在 PESQ 和 STOI 方面均显着优于原始 PercepNet，而无需过多增加模型大小。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PercepNet+，通过引入相位感知结构、SNR估计器、TF-GRU层及多目标损失函数，提升实时语音增强性能。
AI.motivation: 为了解决原PercepNet在高信噪比条件下语音过衰减问题，并进一步提升语音增强效果，同时保持模型轻量化。
AI.method: 1. 引入相位感知结构，利用复数特征与子带增益；2. 设计SNR估计器与自适应后处理模块；3. 用TF-GRU替代GRU以建模时频依赖；4. 采用多目标损失函数联合优化子带增益、SNR、基频滤波强度及过衰减损失。
AI.result: 实验表明，PercepNet+在PESQ和STOI指标上显著优于原模型，且模型尺寸增长有限。
AI.conclusion: PercepNet+通过多项改进有效提升了语音增强性能，在保持实时性的同时解决了高SNR场景下的过衰减问题。

search_text: PercepNet+: A Phase and SNR Aware PercepNet for Real-Time Speech Enhancement PercepNet+：用于实时语音增强的相位和 SNR 感知 PercepNet PercepNet, a recent extension of the RNNoise, an efficient, high-quality and real-time full-band speech enhancement technique, has shown promising performance in various public deep noise suppression tasks. This paper proposes a new approach, named PercepNet+, to further extend the PercepNet with four significant improvements. First, we introduce a phase-aware structure to leverage the phase information into PercepNet, by adding the complex features and complex subband gains as the deep network input and output respectively. Then, a signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) estimator and an SNR switched post-processing are specially designed to alleviate the over attenuation (OA) that appears in high SNR conditions of the original PercepNet. Moreover, the GRU layer is replaced by TF-GRU to model both temporal and frequency dependencies. Finally, we propose to integrate the loss of complex subband gain, SNR, pitch filtering strength, and an OA loss in a multi-objective learning manner to further improve the speech enhancement performance. Experimental results show that, the proposed PercepNet+ outperforms the original PercepNet significantly in terms of both PESQ and STOI, without increasing the model size too much. PercepNet 是 RNNoise 的最新扩展，是一种高效、高质量、实时的全频带语音增强技术，在各种公共深度噪声抑制任务中表现出了良好的性能。本文提出了一种名为 PercepNet+ 的新方法，通过四项重大改进进一步扩展 PercepNet。首先，我们引入了一种相位感知结构，通过分别添加复杂特征和复杂子带增益作为深度网络输入和输出，将相位信息利用到 PercepNet 中。然后，专门设计了信噪比（SNR）估计器和SNR切换后处理，以减轻原始PercepNet在高SNR条件下出现的过度衰减（OA）。此外，GRU 层被 TF-GRU 取代，以对时间和频率依赖性进行建模。最后，我们建议以多目标学习的方式整合复杂子带增益的损失、SNR、基音滤波强度和OA损失，以进一步提高语音增强性能。实验结果表明，所提出的 PercepNet+ 在 PESQ 和 STOI 方面均显着优于原始 PercepNet，而无需过多增加模型大小。 本文提出PercepNet+，通过引入相位感知结构、SNR估计器、TF-GRU层及多目标损失函数，提升实时语音增强性能。 Xiaofeng Ge,Jiangyu Han,Yanhua Long,Haixin Guan eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Fan Yang,Kai Wu,Shuyi Zhang,Guannan Jiang,Yong Liu,Feng Zheng,Wei Zhang,Chengjie Wang,Long Zeng
title: Class-Aware Contrastive Semi-Supervised Learning
title_zh: 班级感知对比半监督学习
comment: cvpr2022 accepted, half more page for adding rebuttal Infos
comments: cvpr2022 accepted, half more page for adding rebuttal Infos
abstract: Pseudo-label-based semi-supervised learning (SSL) has achieved great success on raw data utilization. However, its training procedure suffers from confirmation bias due to the noise contained in self-generated artificial labels. Moreover, the model's judgment becomes noisier in real-world applications with extensive out-of-distribution data. To address this issue, we propose a general method named Class-aware Contrastive Semi-Supervised Learning (CCSSL), which is a drop-in helper to improve the pseudo-label quality and enhance the model's robustness in the real-world setting. Rather than treating real-world data as a union set, our method separately handles reliable in-distribution data with class-wise clustering for blending into downstream tasks and noisy out-of-distribution data with image-wise contrastive for better generalization. Furthermore, by applying target re-weighting, we successfully emphasize clean label learning and simultaneously reduce noisy label learning. Despite its simplicity, our proposed CCSSL has significant performance improvements over the state-of-the-art SSL methods on the standard datasets CIFAR100 and STL10. On the real-world dataset Semi-iNat 2021, we improve FixMatch by 9.80% and CoMatch by 3.18%. Code is available https://github.com/TencentYoutuResearch/Classification-SemiCLS.
summary: Pseudo-label-based semi-supervised learning (SSL) has achieved great success on raw data utilization. However, its training procedure suffers from confirmation bias due to the noise contained in self-generated artificial labels. Moreover, the model's judgment becomes noisier in real-world applications with extensive out-of-distribution data. To address this issue, we propose a general method named Class-aware Contrastive Semi-Supervised Learning (CCSSL), which is a drop-in helper to improve the pseudo-label quality and enhance the model's robustness in the real-world setting. Rather than treating real-world data as a union set, our method separately handles reliable in-distribution data with class-wise clustering for blending into downstream tasks and noisy out-of-distribution data with image-wise contrastive for better generalization. Furthermore, by applying target re-weighting, we successfully emphasize clean label learning and simultaneously reduce noisy label learning. Despite its simplicity, our proposed CCSSL has significant performance improvements over the state-of-the-art SSL methods on the standard datasets CIFAR100 and STL10. On the real-world dataset Semi-iNat 2021, we improve FixMatch by 9.80% and CoMatch by 3.18%. Code is available https://github.com/TencentYoutuResearch/Classification-SemiCLS.
abstract_zh: 基于伪标签的半监督学习（SSL）在原始数据利用方面取得了巨大成功。然而，由于自我生成的人工标签中包含噪声，其训练过程存在确认偏差。此外，在具有大量分布外数据的现实应用中，模型的判断变得更加嘈杂。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种名为类感知对比半监督学习（CCSSL）的通用方法，它是提高伪标签质量并增强模型在现实环境中的鲁棒性的辅助工具。我们的方法不是将现实世界的数据视为联合集，而是分别处理可靠的分布内数据，通过类聚类来混合到下游任务中，并通过图像对比来处理噪声分布外数据，以实现更好的泛化。此外，通过应用目标重新加权，我们成功地强调了干净的标签学习，同时减少了噪声标签学习。尽管很简单，但我们提出的 CCSSL 比标准数据集 CIFAR100 和 STL10 上最先进的 SSL 方法具有显着的性能改进。在现实数据集 Semi-iNat 2021 上，我们将 FixMatch 提高了 9.80%，将 CoMatch 提高了 3.18%。代码可见https://github.com/TencentYoutuResearch/Classification-SemiCLS。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Class-aware Contrastive Semi-Supervised Learning (CCSSL)的半监督学习方法，旨在提升伪标签质量并增强模型在真实场景下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 基于伪标签的半监督学习在实际应用中因噪声伪标签和分布外数据导致模型判断失准，亟需改进伪标签生成与噪声抑制方法。
AI.method: 通过分离处理可靠分布内数据（类级聚类融合下游任务）与噪声分布外数据（图像级对比学习提升泛化能力），结合目标重加权策略强化干净标签学习并抑制噪声影响。
AI.result: 在CIFAR100和STL10标准数据集上超越现有SOTA方法，在真实场景数据集Semi-iNat 2021上使FixMatch性能提升9.80%，CoMatch提升3.18%。
AI.conclusion: CCSSL通过简单有效的策略显著提升了半监督学习在标准与真实场景下的性能，为应对分布外数据和噪声伪标签问题提供了通用解决方案。

However, its training procedure suffers from confirmation bias due to the noise contained in self-generated artificial labels. Moreover, the model's judgment becomes noisier in real-world applications with extensive out-of-distribution data. To address this issue, we propose a general method named Class-aware Contrastive Semi-Supervised Learning (CCSSL), which is a drop-in helper to improve the pseudo-label quality and enhance the model's robustness in the real-world setting. Rather than treating real-world data as a union set, our method separately handles reliable in-distribution data with class-wise clustering for blending into downstream tasks and noisy out-of-distribution data with image-wise contrastive for better generalization. Furthermore, by applying target re-weighting, we successfully emphasize clean label learning and simultaneously reduce noisy label learning. authors_text: Zhikai Li,Liping Ma,Mengjuan Chen,Junrui Xiao,Qingyi Gu
title: Patch Similarity Aware Data-Free Quantization for Vision Transformers
title_zh: 视觉变压器的补丁相似性感知无数据量化
abstract: Vision transformers have recently gained great success on various computer vision tasks; nevertheless, their high model complexity makes it challenging to deploy on resource-constrained devices. Quantization is an effective approach to reduce model complexity, and data-free quantization, which can address data privacy and security concerns during model deployment, has received widespread interest. Unfortunately, all existing methods, such as BN regularization, were designed for convolutional neural networks and cannot be applied to vision transformers with significantly different model architectures. In this paper, we propose PSAQ-ViT, a Patch Similarity Aware data-free Quantization framework for Vision Transformers, to enable the generation of "realistic" samples based on the vision transformer's unique properties for calibrating the quantization parameters. Specifically, we analyze the self-attention module's properties and reveal a general difference (patch similarity) in its processing of Gaussian noise and real images. The above insights guide us to design a relative value metric to optimize the Gaussian noise to approximate the real images, which are then utilized to calibrate the quantization parameters. Extensive experiments and ablation studies are conducted on various benchmarks to validate the effectiveness of PSAQ-ViT, which can even outperform the real-data-driven methods. Code is available at: https://github.com/zkkli/PSAQ-ViT.
summary: Vision transformers have recently gained great success on various computer vision tasks; nevertheless, their high model complexity makes it challenging to deploy on resource-constrained devices. Quantization is an effective approach to reduce model complexity, and data-free quantization, which can address data privacy and security concerns during model deployment, has received widespread interest. Unfortunately, all existing methods, such as BN regularization, were designed for convolutional neural networks and cannot be applied to vision transformers with significantly different model architectures. In this paper, we propose PSAQ-ViT, a Patch Similarity Aware data-free Quantization framework for Vision Transformers, to enable the generation of "realistic" samples based on the vision transformer's unique properties for calibrating the quantization parameters. Specifically, we analyze the self-attention module's properties and reveal a general difference (patch similarity) in its processing of Gaussian noise and real images. The above insights guide us to design a relative value metric to optimize the Gaussian noise to approximate the real images, which are then utilized to calibrate the quantization parameters. Extensive experiments and ablation studies are conducted on various benchmarks to validate the effectiveness of PSAQ-ViT, which can even outperform the real-data-driven methods. Code is available at: https://github.com/zkkli/PSAQ-ViT.
abstract_zh: 视觉转换器最近在各种计算机视觉任务上取得了巨大成功；然而，它们的高模型复杂性使得在资源受限的设备上部署具有挑战性。量化是降低模型复杂度的有效方法，无数据量化可以解决模型部署过程中的数据隐私和安全问题，受到了广泛的关注。不幸的是，所有现有的方法，例如 BN 正则化，都是为卷积神经网络设计的，不能应用于模型架构显着不同的视觉变换器。在本文中，我们提出了 PSAQ-ViT，这是一种用于视觉变压器的补丁相似性感知无数据量化框架，能够根据视觉变压器校准量化参数的独特属性生成“真实”样本。具体来说，我们分析了自注意力模块的属性，并揭示了其处理高斯噪声和真实图像的一般差异（补丁相似性）。上述见解指导我们设计一个相对值度量来优化高斯噪声以逼近真实图像，然后用于校准量化参数。在各种基准上进行了大量的实验和消融研究，以验证 PSAQ-ViT 的有效性，它甚至可以优于真实数据驱动的方法。代码位于：https://github.com/zkkli/PSAQ-ViT。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需真实数据的视觉Transformer量化框架PSAQ-ViT，通过利用图像块相似性生成逼真样本以校准量化参数。
AI.motivation: 视觉Transformer模型复杂度高，难以部署在资源受限设备。现有量化方法多针对卷积网络，无法适应Transformer的架构差异，且数据驱动方法存在隐私风险。
AI.method: 分析自注意力模块对高斯噪声与真实图像的处理差异，设计基于块相似性的相对值度量指标，优化生成噪声样本逼近真实图像以校准量化参数。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中验证了PSAQ-ViT的有效性，其性能甚至优于基于真实数据的方法，且代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过挖掘Transformer结构特性，实现了无需真实数据的高效量化，为模型部署提供了新思路。

ai_content.conclusion: 该方法通过挖掘Transformer结构特性，实现了无需真实数据的高效量化，为模型部署提供了新思路。

search_text: Patch Similarity Aware Data-Free Quantization for Vision Transformers 视觉变压器的补丁相似性感知无数据量化 Vision transformers have recently gained great success on various computer vision tasks; nevertheless, their high model complexity makes it challenging to deploy on resource-constrained devices. Quantization is an effective approach to reduce model complexity, and data-free quantization, which can address data privacy and security concerns during model deployment, has received widespread interest. Unfortunately, all existing methods, such as BN regularization, were designed for convolutional neural networks and cannot be applied to vision transformers with significantly different model architectures. In this paper, we propose PSAQ-ViT, a Patch Similarity Aware data-free Quantization framework for Vision Transformers, to enable the generation of "realistic" samples based on the vision transformer's unique properties for calibrating the quantization parameters. Specifically, we analyze the self-attention module's properties and reveal a general difference (patch similarity) in its processing of Gaussian noise and real images. The above insights guide us to design a relative value metric to optimize the Gaussian noise to approximate the real images, which are then utilized to calibrate the quantization parameters. Extensive experiments and ablation studies are conducted on various benchmarks to validate the effectiveness of PSAQ-ViT, which can even outperform the real-data-driven methods. Code is available at: https://github.com/zkkli/PSAQ-ViT. 视觉转换器最近在各种计算机视觉任务上取得了巨大成功；然而，它们的高模型复杂性使得在资源受限的设备上部署具有挑战性。量化是降低模型复杂度的有效方法，无数据量化可以解决模型部署过程中的数据隐私和安全问题，受到了广泛的关注。不幸的是，所有现有的方法，例如 BN 正则化，都是为卷积神经网络设计的，不能应用于模型架构显着不同的视觉变换器。在本文中，我们提出了 PSAQ-ViT，这是一种用于视觉变压器的补丁相似性感知无数据量化框架，能够根据视觉变压器校准量化参数的独特属性生成“真实”样本。具体来说，我们分析了自注意力模块的属性，并揭示了其处理高斯噪声和真实图像的一般差异（补丁相似性）。上述见解指导我们设计一个相对值度量来优化高斯噪声以逼近真实图像，然后用于校准量化参数。在各种基准上进行了大量的实验和消融研究，以验证 PSAQ-ViT 的有效性，它甚至可以优于真实数据驱动的方法。代码位于：https://github.com/zkkli/PSAQ-ViT。 本文提出了一种无需真实数据的视觉Transformer量化框架PSAQ-ViT，通过利用图像块相似性生成逼真样本以校准量化参数。 Zhikai Li,Liping Ma,Mengjuan Chen,Junrui Xiao,Qingyi Gu cs.CV

authors_text: Sara Mandelli,Nicolò Bonettini,Paolo Bestagini,Stefano Tubaro
title: Detecting GAN-generated Images by Orthogonal Training of Multiple CNNs
title_zh: 通过多个 CNN 的正交训练检测 GAN 生成的图像
abstract: In the last few years, we have witnessed the rise of a series of deep learning methods to generate synthetic images that look extremely realistic. These techniques prove useful in the movie industry and for artistic purposes. However, they also prove dangerous if used to spread fake news or to generate fake online accounts. For this reason, detecting if an image is an actual photograph or has been synthetically generated is becoming an urgent necessity. This paper proposes a detector of synthetic images based on an ensemble of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs). We consider the problem of detecting images generated with techniques not available at training time. This is a common scenario, given that new image generators are published more and more frequently. To solve this issue, we leverage two main ideas: (i) CNNs should provide orthogonal results to better contribute to the ensemble; (ii) original images are better defined than synthetic ones, thus they should be better trusted at testing time. Experiments show that pursuing these two ideas improves the detector accuracy on NVIDIA's newly generated StyleGAN3 images, never used in training.
summary: In the last few years, we have witnessed the rise of a series of deep learning methods to generate synthetic images that look extremely realistic. These techniques prove useful in the movie industry and for artistic purposes. However, they also prove dangerous if used to spread fake news or to generate fake online accounts. For this reason, detecting if an image is an actual photograph or has been synthetically generated is becoming an urgent necessity. This paper proposes a detector of synthetic images based on an ensemble of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs). We consider the problem of detecting images generated with techniques not available at training time. This is a common scenario, given that new image generators are published more and more frequently. To solve this issue, we leverage two main ideas: (i) CNNs should provide orthogonal results to better contribute to the ensemble; (ii) original images are better defined than synthetic ones, thus they should be better trusted at testing time. Experiments show that pursuing these two ideas improves the detector accuracy on NVIDIA's newly generated StyleGAN3 images, never used in training.
abstract_zh: 在过去的几年里，我们见证了一系列深度学习方法的兴起，这些方法可以生成看起来极其逼真的合成图像。这些技术在电影业和艺术目的中被证明是有用的。然而，如果它们被用来传播虚假新闻或生成虚假在线账户，它们也被证明是危险的。因此，检测图像是真实照片还是合成生成的图像变得迫切需要。本文提出了一种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）集合的合成图像检测器。我们考虑检测使用训练时不可用的技术生成的图像的问题。鉴于新图像生成器的发布越来越频繁，这是一种常见的情况。为了解决这个问题，我们利用两个主要思想：（i）CNN 应该提供正交结果以更好地为集成做出贡献； (ii) 原始图像比合成图像更清晰，因此在测试时应该更值得信任。实验表明，追求这两个想法可以提高 NVIDIA 新生成的 StyleGAN3 图像（从未在训练中使用）的检测器准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多个卷积神经网络（CNNs）集成的检测器，用于检测生成对抗网络（GAN）生成的图像。
AI.motivation: 随着GAN等深度学习方法生成的合成图像越来越逼真，检测这些图像是否为真实照片变得尤为重要，尤其是在防止虚假新闻和虚假在线账户方面。
AI.method: 本文提出了两个主要思路：一是CNNs应提供正交结果以更好地贡献集成；二是原始图像比合成图像更可靠，因此在测试时应更信任原始图像。
AI.result: 实验表明，采用这两种思路可以提高检测器在NVIDIA新生成的StyleGAN3图像上的准确性，这些图像在训练时从未使用过。
AI.conclusion: 通过正交训练多个CNNs和信任原始图像，本文提出的检测方法在检测未见过的GAN生成图像方面表现良好。

authors_text: Nicole Hengesbach
title: Undoing Seamlessness: Exploring Seams for Critical Visualization
title_zh: 消除无缝性：探索关键可视化的接缝
abstract: While seamful design has been part of discourses and work within HCI contexts for some time, it has not yet been fully explored in data visualization design. At the same time, critics of visualization have been arguing that the representation of data as contextual, contingent, relational, partial, heterogeneous, and situated is currently lacking in visualization. Seamful visualization promises a fresh perspective on visualization design as we seek to find more expressive encodings and novel approaches to representing data that acknowledge their wider qualities and limitations. By consulting seams in other realms and exploring existing seams and seamfulness in visualization, this paper offers a foundation for conceptualizing seamful visualization, points towards the value of seams and seamfulness in critical visualization, and proposes principles for engaging with seamful visualization in practice and research.
summary: While seamful design has been part of discourses and work within HCI contexts for some time, it has not yet been fully explored in data visualization design. At the same time, critics of visualization have been arguing that the representation of data as contextual, contingent, relational, partial, heterogeneous, and situated is currently lacking in visualization. Seamful visualization promises a fresh perspective on visualization design as we seek to find more expressive encodings and novel approaches to representing data that acknowledge their wider qualities and limitations. By consulting seams in other realms and exploring existing seams and seamfulness in visualization, this paper offers a foundation for conceptualizing seamful visualization, points towards the value of seams and seamfulness in critical visualization, and proposes principles for engaging with seamful visualization in practice and research.
abstract_zh: 虽然无缝设计已经成为 HCI 环境中讨论和工作的一部分已有一段时间了，但它尚未在数据可视化设计中得到充分探索。与此同时，可视化的批评者一直认为，目前可视化缺乏将数据表示为上下文、偶然、关系、部分、异质和情境的数据。无缝可视化为可视化设计带来了全新的视角，因为我们寻求更具表现力的编码和新颖的方法来表示数据，承认其更广泛的质量和局限性。通过咨询其他领域的接缝并探索可视化中现有的接缝和接缝，本文为概念化接缝可视化提供了基础，指出了接缝和接缝在批判性可视化中的价值，并提出了在实践和研究中参与接缝可视化的原则。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨如何在数据可视化设计中引入‘seamful’（有缝）理念，以更全面地呈现数据的复杂性和局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有数据可视化过度追求无缝呈现，忽视了数据的上下文、条件性等复杂属性，而‘seamful’设计可为批判性可视化提供新视角。
AI.method: 通过借鉴其他领域对‘seams’的探讨，分析可视化中的现有‘seams’，并提出概念框架与实践原则。
AI.result: 构建了‘seamful可视化’的概念基础，明确了其在批判性可视化中的价值，并提出设计与研究原则。
AI.conclusion: ‘Seamful’设计能增强可视化表达的深度与批判性，为未来研究提供理论与实践方向。

authors_text: Peng Li,Jiayin Zhao,Jingyao Wu,Chao Deng,Haoqian Wang,Tao Yu
title: OPAL: Occlusion Pattern Aware Loss for Unsupervised Light Field Disparity Estimation
title_zh: OPAL：用于无监督光场视差估计的遮挡模式感知损失
abstract: Light field disparity estimation is an essential task in computer vision with various applications. Although supervised learning-based methods have achieved both higher accuracy and efficiency than traditional optimization-based methods, the dependency on ground-truth disparity for training limits the overall generalization performance not to say for real-world scenarios where the ground-truth disparity is hard to capture. In this paper, we argue that unsupervised methods can achieve comparable accuracy, but, more importantly, much higher generalization capacity and efficiency than supervised methods. Specifically, we present the Occlusion Pattern Aware Loss, named OPAL, which successfully extracts and encodes the general occlusion patterns inherent in the light field for loss calculation. OPAL enables: i) accurate and robust estimation by effectively handling occlusions without using any ground-truth information for training and ii) much efficient performance by significantly reducing the network parameters required for accurate inference. Besides, a transformer-based network and a refinement module are proposed for achieving even more accurate results. Extensive experiments demonstrate our method not only significantly improves the accuracy compared with the SOTA unsupervised methods, but also possesses strong generalization capacity, even for real-world data, compared with supervised methods. Our code will be made publicly available.
summary: Light field disparity estimation is an essential task in computer vision with various applications. Although supervised learning-based methods have achieved both higher accuracy and efficiency than traditional optimization-based methods, the dependency on ground-truth disparity for training limits the overall generalization performance not to say for real-world scenarios where the ground-truth disparity is hard to capture. In this paper, we argue that unsupervised methods can achieve comparable accuracy, but, more importantly, much higher generalization capacity and efficiency than supervised methods. Specifically, we present the Occlusion Pattern Aware Loss, named OPAL, which successfully extracts and encodes the general occlusion patterns inherent in the light field for loss calculation. OPAL enables: i) accurate and robust estimation by effectively handling occlusions without using any ground-truth information for training and ii) much efficient performance by significantly reducing the network parameters required for accurate inference. Besides, a transformer-based network and a refinement module are proposed for achieving even more accurate results. Extensive experiments demonstrate our method not only significantly improves the accuracy compared with the SOTA unsupervised methods, but also possesses strong generalization capacity, even for real-world data, compared with supervised methods. Our code will be made publicly available.
abstract_zh: 光场视差估计是计算机视觉中各种应用的一项重要任务。尽管基于监督学习的方法比传统的基于优化的方法实现了更高的准确性和效率，但训练对地面实况差异的依赖限制了整体泛化性能，更不用说对于难以捕捉地面实况差异的现实场景。在本文中，我们认为无监督方法可以达到相当的精度，但更重要的是，比监督方法具有更高的泛化能力和效率。具体来说，我们提出了遮挡模式感知损失（Occlusion Pattern Aware Loss），名为 OPAL，它成功地提取和编码光场中固有的一般遮挡模式以进行损失计算。 OPAL 能够：i）通过有效处理遮挡来实现准确而鲁棒的估计，而无需使用任何地面实况信息进行训练；ii）通过显着减少准确推理所需的网络参数来提高性能。此外，还提出了基于变压器的网络和细化模块以获得更准确的结果。大量的实验表明，与 SOTA 无监督方法相比，我们的方法不仅显着提高了准确性，而且与监督方法相比，即使对于真实世界的数据也具有很强的泛化能力。我们的代码将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督光场视差估计方法OPAL，通过感知遮挡模式的损失函数提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 监督学习方法依赖真实视差标签导致泛化能力不足，而无监督方法可提升效率与真实场景适应性。
AI.method: 设计OPAL损失函数编码光场遮挡模式，结合Transformer网络与优化模块实现无监督训练。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上优于现有无监督方法，且在真实场景中泛化能力超越监督方法。
AI.conclusion: OPAL通过无监督学习有效提升光场视差估计精度与泛化性，为实际应用提供新方案。

authors_text: Hongpeng Cao,Mirco Theile,Federico G. Wyrwal,Marco Caccamo
title: Cloud-Edge Training Architecture for Sim-to-Real Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 用于模拟到真实深度强化学习的云边训练架构
abstract: Deep reinforcement learning (DRL) is a promising approach to solve complex control tasks by learning policies through interactions with the environment. However, the training of DRL policies requires large amounts of training experiences, making it impractical to learn the policy directly on physical systems. Sim-to-real approaches leverage simulations to pretrain DRL policies and then deploy them in the real world. Unfortunately, the direct real-world deployment of pretrained policies usually suffers from performance deterioration due to the different dynamics, known as the reality gap. Recent sim-to-real methods, such as domain randomization and domain adaptation, focus on improving the robustness of the pretrained agents. Nevertheless, the simulation-trained policies often need to be tuned with real-world data to reach optimal performance, which is challenging due to the high cost of real-world samples. This work proposes a distributed cloud-edge architecture to train DRL agents in the real world in real-time. In the architecture, the inference and training are assigned to the edge and cloud, separating the real-time control loop from the computationally expensive training loop. To overcome the reality gap, our architecture exploits sim-to-real transfer strategies to continue the training of simulation-pretrained agents on a physical system. We demonstrate its applicability on a physical inverted-pendulum control system, analyzing critical parameters. The real-world experiments show that our architecture can adapt the pretrained DRL agents to unseen dynamics consistently and efficiently.
summary: Deep reinforcement learning (DRL) is a promising approach to solve complex control tasks by learning policies through interactions with the environment. However, the training of DRL policies requires large amounts of training experiences, making it impractical to learn the policy directly on physical systems. Sim-to-real approaches leverage simulations to pretrain DRL policies and then deploy them in the real world. Unfortunately, the direct real-world deployment of pretrained policies usually suffers from performance deterioration due to the different dynamics, known as the reality gap. Recent sim-to-real methods, such as domain randomization and domain adaptation, focus on improving the robustness of the pretrained agents. Nevertheless, the simulation-trained policies often need to be tuned with real-world data to reach optimal performance, which is challenging due to the high cost of real-world samples. This work proposes a distributed cloud-edge architecture to train DRL agents in the real world in real-time. In the architecture, the inference and training are assigned to the edge and cloud, separating the real-time control loop from the computationally expensive training loop. To overcome the reality gap, our architecture exploits sim-to-real transfer strategies to continue the training of simulation-pretrained agents on a physical system. We demonstrate its applicability on a physical inverted-pendulum control system, analyzing critical parameters. The real-world experiments show that our architecture can adapt the pretrained DRL agents to unseen dynamics consistently and efficiently.
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习（DRL）是一种通过与环境交互学习策略来解决复杂控制任务的有前途的方法。然而，DRL策略的训练需要大量的训练经验，使得直接在物理系统上学习策略是不切实际的。模拟到真实的方法利用模拟来预训练 DRL 策略，然后将其部署到现实世界中。不幸的是，预训练策略在现实世界中的直接部署通常会由于不同的动态（称为现实差距）而导致性能恶化。最近的模拟到真实方法，例如域随机化和域适应，专注于提高预训练代理的鲁棒性。然而，模拟训练的策略通常需要根据现实世界的数据进行调整才能达到最佳性能，由于现实世界样本的成本高昂，这具有挑战性。这项工作提出了一种分布式云边缘架构来在现实世界中实时训练 DRL 代理。在该架构中，推理和训练被分配到边缘和云端，将实时控制循环与计算成本高昂的训练循环分开。为了克服现实差距，我们的架构利用模拟到真实的传输策略来继续在物理系统上训练模拟预训练代理。我们通过分析关键参数来证明其在物理倒立摆控制系统上的适用性。现实世界的实验表明，我们的架构可以使预训练的 DRL 代理一致且高效地适应看不见的动态。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种云边协同架构，解决仿真到现实深度强化学习中的现实差距问题，通过分离实时控制与训练过程实现高效策略适应。
AI.motivation: 仿真预训练的深度强化学习策略在实际部署时因现实差距导致性能下降，而现有方法依赖昂贵的真实世界数据调优，效率低下。
AI.method: 设计分布式云边架构，将实时推理部署在边缘设备，计算密集型训练保留在云端，并结合仿真到现实迁移策略持续优化策略。
AI.result: 在物理倒立摆系统实验中，该架构能稳定高效地适应未见过的动力学变化，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 云边协同架构通过解耦控制与训练流程，结合迁移学习策略，为解决仿真到现实的深度强化学习提供了高效可行的解决方案。
